# **Trump’s 2025 Economic Revolution Is Here
Are Your Retirement Savings Ready?
**
---
**President Trump’s “One Big Beautiful Bill” strives to deliver the largest tax cuts for working and middle class Americans in our country’s history.** His bold plan not only extends the historic 2017 tax cuts but introduces even deeper reforms aimed at empowering American workers and retirees. If you are retired or near retirement, this could mean more money in your savings and a once-in-a-generation opportunity to help protect lasting wealth—**if you’re prepared**. **But here’s the catch:**
This new economic agenda may come with both massive opportunity and serious risk for anyone with a traditional retirement account—like a 401(k), IRA, or TSP. The fatal flaw? These accounts are built on a Wall Street system that assumes stability, free from manipulation and political shocks. And in today’s world, all it could take is one major event—another bank failure, a geopolitical crisis, a market crash—to wipe out decades of your savings like it did in the 2008 Financial Crisis. **If you have a retirement account and want to help safeguard—not just survive—during Trump’s economic revolution, this is your wake-up call.** We’ve outlined a wealth protection strategy inside the **[2025 Retirement Protection Guide](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z46dpab1hbmub7i98h68fcn15q2naat0oko2t9dg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c5g61ob2cjh2bs)** — and it’s completely FREE. **Inside this guide, you'll discover an IRS-approved loophole that allows you to move your retirement savings tax-free and penalty-free into a safe haven asset and hedge your wealth against inflation, market volatility and geopolitical crises.** **Time is short.** Trump’s reforms may be coming fast—and the financial system roller coaster may be a ride that you don’t want to take with your retirement savings.

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Struggling
body:
Are you struggling with a difficult question in your life?

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zurouk897eb27bq1kk9ak716vihaguohepg4gdq0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c5i64o33cdh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend of Knowledge, Are you struggling with a difficult question in your life? Often, I find myself in that position as well. It’s part of the human condition to be faced with difficult situations, choices, and people. We teach at Hillsdale College that we must carefully consider concepts such as morality, ethics, happiness, courage, character, and justice when we face difficult questions. In the _Nicomachean Ethics_ —the first book written on how best to live—Aristotle argues that human happiness chiefly depends upon a person’s character, which is formed by making good choices. But good choices don’t come naturally. That’s why every student at Hillsdale studies Aristotle. In fact, understanding Aristotle is so important to living a good life that we’ve produced our online course, **“Introduction to Aristotle’s _Ethics_ : How to Lead a Good Life.” **
---
| | And now you can own the course on DVD, along with a special Hillsdale College edition of Aristotle’s _Nicomachean Ethics_ , for personal study. You’ll not only study what Aristotle says about the good life with Hillsdale College President Larry P. Arnn, but you will also explore ways to put this knowledge to work.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfnf1dfv6uh9quvhedidb7hf6strbarfk6aosnqo_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c5i64o33cdh2bs)
---
| | The DVD gives you a seat at the table in a seminar-style class like those here on campus, and you’ll read from the same book the students are in the course. In addition to the topics I’ve already mentioned, the course focuses on subjects including:
* Aristotle’s _Politics_ and the Nature of Man
* Deliberation and Choice
* Practical Judgment
* Contemplation and Action

Just consider what Rebecca, a free online course student, recently said: _“I have learned [through the Aristotle course] that every choice we make etches into our soul.”_ Make a good choice, and watch a special preview video of the course. Then reserve your DVD and book today using this secure link: [**_https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/aristotle-dvd-book-offer_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc0ch7del8ea97kt7bsi07610a41foctltslcsog_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c5i64o33cdh2bs) After watching the preview, if you’re struggling with a thorny question, I hope you’ll join Rebecca and many others by reserving your DVD of [**“Introduction to Aristotle’s _Ethics_ ”**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ziobqp5fc31c82q41crl4l19q37r87ahhqc3sb5o_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c5i64o33cdh2bs)**** along with its companion book __ today _._ Quantities of the DVD and book are limited, so don’t wait too long to decide. Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College
---

Pop Acta Media | American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z77b47b4370eq9phe2pni09apb7kbsmnr5v1nm18_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c5i64o33cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp31cjh60pj1c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1bhfkt0af29v7van8d9bju5ngoedilp5jpnn01g_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c5i64o33cdh2bs)_

In addition to the topics I’ve already mentioned, the course focuses on subjects including: Aristotle’s Politics and the Nature of Man Deliberation and Choice Practical Judgment Contemplation and Action Just consider what Rebecca, a free online course student, recently said: “I have learned [through the Aristotle course] that every choice we make etches into our soul.” Make a good choice, and watch a special preview video of the course. Then reserve your DVD and book today using this secure link: After watching the preview, if you’re struggling with a thorny question, I hope you’ll join Rebecca and many others by reserving your DVD of **** along with its companion book today . Quantities of the DVD and book are limited, so don’t wait too long to decide. Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College Pop Acta Media | American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Take back our libraries
body:
If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical.

| | |
---
| | Fellow conservative,I know you’ve seen how the Left is creating a generation of fearful and confused children. And some of the worst culprits in this ungodly indoctrination are at your very own local library!Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian.She would fill your mind with classics like _Pat the Bunny_ and _The Little Engine That Could_. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the _Three Musketeers_ , _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte’s Web_.But today, all that has changed.The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.”Radical librarians call _Adventure of Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” _Little House_ series.And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...”
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zju76n6tsah87fev1q6tpr79o0laa5ab99s5ma6o_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c5i64p71c1h2bs)
---
| Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.”
---
| | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.”
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zehvtmd97hdqdjtd2pp46v611hks428vhspuk6n0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c5i64p71c1h2bs)
---
| | Prince and Knight. The “premier queer-friendly fairy tale” about a prince who marries a knight instead of a princess.
---
| | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.”
---
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1v0623lru9u9htcmk0tpopjfh6u7sr7pgvv5ghg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c5i64p71c1h2bs)
---
| | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.”
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2llf4p5gqdvskd6rbgq00c1j134jjphh9e9d610_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c5i64p71c1h2bs)
---
| | I wish I could tell you this was only happening in places like New York City and San Francisco.
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zf6smjabbo3ujnfmk605366u1a047i2svk6vth6o_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c5i64p71c1h2bs)
---
| But that’s just not true.<\- THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.”
---
| | But that’s just not true.THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.”
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2znq119a51sl07ju2ueihbu95s3j5cs40k94rpr20_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c5i64p71c1h2bs)
---
| | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA.And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content. Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion.The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: _Rick_ about a cross-dressing Grandpa, _Melissa_ filled with graphic nudity, and _Darkstalker_ featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming. We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values![**I hope you see why I need your help today to TAKE BACK OUR LIBRARIES.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zkfi39jifikg63tvhs9t6u5uv4se752fpfsmom60_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c5i64p71c1h2bs) My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **BRAVE Books** , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome **BRAVE Books** that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism.And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit.>> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves.>> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), **BRAVE Books** was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking **BRAVE Books** how they could host Story Hours of their own.So **BRAVE Books** has organized a nationwide grassroots “See You at the Library” movement to take back our libraries.Now with the guidance of **BRAVE Books** , committed conservatives just like you book event rooms at their local library for conservative Story Hours that fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God. And whenever we can, **BRAVE Books** authors like swimmer **Riley Gaines** , TV personality **Missy Robertson** , and myself stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots at these Story Hours......for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries. 2025 was the third year of “See You at the Library” and I’m proud to say that because of the amazing support of patriots like you, we were invited by President Trump’s DOE to kick off our event at the Library of Congress!What a testimony it was to bring our message of freedom, America’s greatness, and God’s love to children and families in the heart of our nation’s capital. Now we have a new and historic goal for 2026 – the 250th birthday of our nation! We aim to reach 250,000 children in the next year.But we can’t do it without you. __**[_I hope you’ll be able to give a sponsorship gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, $125 or more today..._..](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqcjhi1ds5kafaanjjnmvinifh0f4u65i017g9oo_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c5i64p71c1h2bs)**Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing an event at their library.The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. **BRAVE Books** is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our Story Hours for over 250,000 children to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, **[_please consider a sponsorship gift of $125._](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z830io214oqh0o29528o741gv2nhuf864q0mjf38_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c5i64p71c1h2bs)** That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself.Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. **_[Whatever you can give whether it’s $35, $125, or anything higher or lower will be necessary for the success of the next “Story Hour Kit” to be sent.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zc6aqmpihgld43gjv180k2r0r905909ql6mkj2l0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c5i64p71c1h2bs)_**
---
[ **DONATE ** ](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zo3n22hak9cpqchit2gukvhecbeafq9pf2bd4to0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c5i64p71c1h2bs)
---
Thank you! God Bless You and God Bless America,
---
---
Kirk Cameron
---

---

name: Troy Downing
subject: My story’s a little different than most.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
Here's 8 photos from the scrapbook.

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDkwOV9ITi1NUC4xMTAxMTdfdDE3MDQ0MTEtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA5MDlfSE4tTVAuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzA0NDExLTI4OTkifQ/Pbdeos2oXzM2h0skvYUhXg)
---
Never could this young boy have imagined he’d one day be sending an email like this.

Peter, it's Troy Downing.

If you don’t have much time, all you need to know about me is that **I only care about three things: God, family, and country.** **[I’m fighting in Congress to defend those three things for myself and every American.](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDkwOV9ITi1NUC4xMTAxMTdfdDE3MDQ0MTEtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA5MDlfSE4tTVAuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzA0NDExLTI4OTkifQ/Td_4lQosWnR93Zn1slYHZg)**
---
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDkwOV9ITi1NUC4xMTAxMTdfdDE3MDQ0MTEtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA5MDlfSE4tTVAuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzA0NDExLTI4OTkifQ/F2oFP5U1bkeLE7OlGd8P2w)
---
Growing up, I was a bit of a nerd. I studied mathematics and computer science in college. Then, I started my own business, which merged with Yahoo!. I started other small businesses in insurance and real estate, but then my life changed forever...

Like millions of Americans, September 11th was a turning point.

**I immediately enlisted in the United States Air Force/ANG.** I served two tours of duty in Afghanistan as part of a Combat Search and Rescue (CSAR) squadron.
---
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDkwOV9ITi1NUC4xMTAxMTdfdDE3MDQ0MTEtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA5MDlfSE4tTVAuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzA0NDExLTI4OTkifQ/imJt9irdIvU0TDKzy2tQPA)
---
After eight years of service, I was honorably discharged from the Air Force and returned home to Montana with my wife and kids.
---
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDkwOV9ITi1NUC4xMTAxMTdfdDE3MDQ0MTEtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA5MDlfSE4tTVAuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzA0NDExLTI4OTkifQ/wvtwjIUKs_mngLu76UL_zg)
---
We are partners in a local distillery in Bozeman, and when the COVID pandemic hit, our company went above and beyond to help our friends and neighbors. There was a shortage of toilet paper, sanitizing wipes, and hand sanitizer in every store.

We quickly turned our whiskey distillery into a hand sanitizer production facility to provide free hand sanitizer to families, first responders, and hospitals.
---
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDkwOV9ITi1NUC4xMTAxMTdfdDE3MDQ0MTEtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA5MDlfSE4tTVAuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzA0NDExLTI4OTkifQ/0io8aFePxfwGG6IkpjOMBQ)
---
In the Combat Search and Rescue (CSAR) Community, we live by this motto:

**“These things we do, that others may live.”**

I’ve taken this motto with me in everything I do. I’ve taught my kids to live by this. And now, my public service is not finished. **[I’m fighting in Congress to preserve our American way of life, protect our God-given rights, and defend our nation with everything I’ve got.](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDkwOV9ITi1NUC4xMTAxMTdfdDE3MDQ0MTEtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA5MDlfSE4tTVAuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzA0NDExLTI4OTkifQ/t4w0hzrJv5LAtWux-gpQWg)**
---
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDkwOV9ITi1NUC4xMTAxMTdfdDE3MDQ0MTEtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA5MDlfSE4tTVAuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzA0NDExLTI4OTkifQ/bAQnb7dVmg3McldtbG4XRg)
---
I’m fighting in Congress for **GOD** so we will never forget that we are one nation UNDER God.

I’m fighting in Congress for our **FAMILIES** so our kids have every opportunity to succeed.

I’m fighting in Congress for our **COUNTRY** so every future generation can still call the United States of America their home and the best country that has ever graced God’s creation.

Peter, defending our conservative House Majority and advancing President Trump’s agenda won’t come cheap. Democrats are chomping at the bit to flip the House BLUE so they can turn every state into the next California! I can’t let that happen, but I’m hoping strong, loyal Patriots like you will help win this fight.

[**If you can spare just $5 or $10, that’s all it takes to make a difference – seriously!**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDkwOV9ITi1NUC4xMTAxMTdfdDE3MDQ0MTEtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA5MDlfSE4tTVAuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzA0NDExLTI4OTkifQ/kOxSKM3OveoSq_JGNWlRTA) I don’t have billionaires on speed dial or Hollywood award winners to campaign for me.

I depend on like-minded friends and neighbors like you to chip in a few bucks. **[If everyone reading this chips in $8, I’ll hit my goal!](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDkwOV9ITi1NUC4xMTAxMTdfdDE3MDQ0MTEtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA5MDlfSE4tTVAuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzA0NDExLTI4OTkifQ/wyjoQgT_41zGJUVHN1Xb7Q)**
---
[ **DONATE TODAY**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
[**I appreciate any and all support.**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)

With your help, Peter, **we can save our country and put God, Family, and Country FIRST. **

God Bless,

Troy Downing (R-MT)
---

clean_body: Here's 8 photos from the scrapbook. | | | Never could this young boy have imagined he’d one day be sending an email like this. Peter, it's Troy Downing. If you don’t have much time, all you need to know about me is that I only care about three things: God, family, and country. Growing up, I was a bit of a nerd. I studied mathematics and computer science in college. Then, I started my own business, which merged with Yahoo!. I started other small businesses in insurance and real estate, but then my life changed forever... Like millions of Americans, September 11th was a turning point. I immediately enlisted in the United States Air Force/ANG. I served two tours of duty in Afghanistan as part of a Combat Search and Rescue (CSAR) squadron. After eight years of service, I was honorably discharged from the Air Force and returned home to Montana with my wife and kids. We are partners in a local distillery in Bozeman, and when the COVID pandemic hit, our company went above and beyond to help our friends and neighbors. There was a shortage of toilet paper, sanitizing wipes, and hand sanitizer in every store. We quickly turned our whiskey distillery into a hand sanitizer production facility to provide free hand sanitizer to families, first responders, and hospitals. In the Combat Search and Rescue (CSAR) Community, we live by this motto: “These things we do, that others may live.” I’ve taken this motto with me in everything I do. I’ve taught my kids to live by this. And now, my public service is not finished. I’m fighting in Congress for GOD so we will never forget that we are one nation UNDER God. I’m fighting in Congress for our FAMILIES so our kids have every opportunity to succeed. I’m fighting in Congress for our COUNTRY so every future generation can still call the United States of America their home and the best country that has ever graced God’s creation. Peter, defending our conservative House Majority and advancing President Trump’s agenda won’t come cheap. Democrats are chomping at the bit to flip the House BLUE so they can turn every state into the next California! I can’t let that happen, but I’m hoping strong, loyal Patriots like you will help win this fight. I don’t have billionaires on speed dial or Hollywood award winners to campaign for me. I depend on like-minded friends and neighbors like you to chip in a few bucks. With your help, Peter, we can save our country and put God, Family, and Country FIRST. God Bless, Troy Downing (R-MT) | | | Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress Troy Downing is a former member of the U.S. Air Force/Air National Guard. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: The left is creating a generation of confused and fearful children
body:
If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical.

| | |
---
| | Fellow conservative,I know you’ve seen how the Left is creating a generation of fearful and confused children. And some of the worst culprits in this ungodly indoctrination are at your very own local library!Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian.She would fill your mind with classics like _Pat the Bunny_ and _The Little Engine That Could_. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the _Three Musketeers_ , _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte’s Web_.But today, all that has changed.The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.”Radical librarians call _Adventure of Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” _Little House_ series.And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...”
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqkga33g1qn61vm102ab0jpjke9r1vtf32u165f0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c5i6aor4cdh2bs)
---
| Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.”
---
| | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.”
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeo4et571m841vo3beirir5e8s62ondebbf8nspo_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c5i6aor4cdh2bs)
---
| | Prince and Knight. The “premier queer-friendly fairy tale” about a prince who marries a knight instead of a princess.
---
| | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.”
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za24rcv85agd6au8blse2vbnimmq8hpa9nq6rg08_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c5i6aor4cdh2bs)
---
| | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.”
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg25e0oj7eg3u16tk30r23j4aklk89hca3bl735g_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c5i6aor4cdh2bs)
---
| | I wish I could tell you this was only happening in places like New York City and San Francisco.
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z28lfiku47gmvoah01mppc6rdats4fej8m0fc9v8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c5i6aor4cdh2bs)
---
| But that’s just not true.<\- THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.”
---
| | But that’s just not true.THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.”
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaqg047d33sj1dtja71m9orftgkb5plf7kgc8eh0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c5i6aor4cdh2bs)
---
| | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA.And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content. Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion.The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: _Rick_ about a cross-dressing Grandpa, _Melissa_ filled with graphic nudity, and _Darkstalker_ featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming. We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values![**I hope you see why I need your help today to TAKE BACK OUR LIBRARIES.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zabh5kqpvotetvfnao2dlan2ef80a3tpkhv73ns8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c5i6aor4cdh2bs) My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **BRAVE Books** , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome **BRAVE Books** that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism.And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit.>> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves.>> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), **BRAVE Books** was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking **BRAVE Books** how they could host Story Hours of their own.So **BRAVE Books** has organized a nationwide grassroots “See You at the Library” movement to take back our libraries.Now with the guidance of **BRAVE Books** , committed conservatives just like you book event rooms at their local library for conservative Story Hours that fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God. And whenever we can, **BRAVE Books** authors like swimmer **Riley Gaines** , TV personality **Missy Robertson** , and myself stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots at these Story Hours......for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries. 2025 was the third year of “See You at the Library” and I’m proud to say that because of the amazing support of patriots like you, we were invited by President Trump’s DOE to kick off our event at the Library of Congress!What a testimony it was to bring our message of freedom, America’s greatness, and God’s love to children and families in the heart of our nation’s capital. Now we have a new and historic goal for 2026 – the 250th birthday of our nation! We aim to reach 250,000 children in the next year.But we can’t do it without you. __**[_I hope you’ll be able to give a sponsorship gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, $125 or more today..._..](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztem3j6m1a7pr823a3l2lcgejjmmjc01o97sq6go_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c5i6aor4cdh2bs)**Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing an event at their library.The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. **BRAVE Books** is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our Story Hours for over 250,000 children to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, **[_please consider a sponsorship gift of $125._](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zai72olbvs2ehflqhsgnsu5all1dtcvnvc7mal90_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c5i6aor4cdh2bs)** That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself.Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. **_[Whatever you can give whether it’s $35, $125, or anything higher or lower will be necessary for the success of the next “Story Hour Kit” to be sent.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjpojs7j46na6jr4s05tina3k52u41ul5qbgo69g_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c5i6aor4cdh2bs)_**
---
[ **DONATE ** ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd2v2an7qobg9plnguafb78hcvhdv4dvjl4qce78_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c5i6aor4cdh2bs)
---
Thank you! God Bless You and God Bless America,
---
---
Kirk Cameron
---

---

Knowing that, That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself.Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. Thank you! God Bless You and God Bless America, Kirk Cameron | | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 **** | Pop Acta Media | American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

subject: Stop Chris Taylor’s Hypocrisy!

body:
[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qihurul-didthutlhu-r/) Patriot, We need your urgent support to protect Wisconsin's courts from far-left opportunists like Chris Taylor. The [_Milwaukee Journal Sentinel_](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qihurul-didthutlhu-y/) recently exposed Taylor's blatant hypocrisy, and we can't let her radical agenda undermine our justice system.Taylor co-sponsored a 2015 bill requiring judges to recuse themselves from cases involving donors who gave $1,000 or more. Now, as she runs for the Wisconsin Supreme Court, she's dismissed her own proposal as "not workable." Why? To keep big donor cash flowing into her campaign. This flip-flop proves Taylor prioritizes power and special interests over principle.Taylor's record is alarming:
* She opposed Marsy's Law, a measure to protect crime victims' rights.
* She's aligned with radical left-wing groups, signaling her judicial decisions would push a dangerous liberal agenda.

With the 2026 election quickly approaching, **we must act to keep far-left Chris Taylor off of our court.** Your [donation today](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qihurul-didthutlhu-j/) will help us expose Taylor's hypocrisy, support principled conservative candidates, and ensure justice remains blind in Wisconsin. name: Conor Lamb
subject: Something you can do *right now* to protect democracy.
body:
MAGA wants to own the conversation about Pennsylvania's judicial elections.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..dafxtUNRE4DTU3AsqIJRGLbeZAA14jBCumeDEw930NI?) for more
---
# [Something you can do *right now* to protect democracy.](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=5233352&post_id=173135201&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTczMTM1MjAxLCJpYXQiOjE3NTc0MDc4MzUsImV4cCI6MTc1OTk5OTgzNSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTUyMzMzNTIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.YwFsGd0KP24l4rFUGF8lBfLctnaJFlRSUABlzblyU-4)
### MAGA wants to own the conversation about Pennsylvania's judicial elections.
| | [Conor Lamb](https://substack.com/@conorlambpa)
---
| Sep 9
---
| [](https://substack.com/@conorlambpa)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=5233352&post_id=173135201&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTczMTM1MjAxLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1NzQwNzgzNSwiZXhwIjoxNzU5OTk5ODM1LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNTIzMzM1MiIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.VKCEJa_SMwiav8K-y3fFq-J9YSHFxfFrZolCaIZG1e4&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=5233352&post_id=173135201&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTczMTM1MjAxLCJpYXQiOjE3NTc0MDc4MzUsImV4cCI6MTc1OTk5OTgzNSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTUyMzMzNTIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.YwFsGd0KP24l4rFUGF8lBfLctnaJFlRSUABlzblyU-4&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=5233352&post_id=173135201&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTczMTM1MjAxLCJpYXQiOjE3NTc0MDc4MzUsImV4cCI6MTc1OTk5OTgzNSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTUyMzMzNTIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.YwFsGd0KP24l4rFUGF8lBfLctnaJFlRSUABlzblyU-4)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvY29ub3JsYW1icGEvcC9zb21ldGhpbmcteW91LWNhbi1kby1yaWdodC1ub3ctdG8_.qIyFUMabnyDZoYkJyDJWu61_87K5r11IVOqkcieTNIw?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/conorlambpa/p/something-you-can-do-right-now-to?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Many of you reading this are not from Pennsylvania, but I trust our excess share of national political coverage conveys the implications of our elections. In just a few weeks, Pennsylvanians will begin making a decision with enormous consequences for American democracy: they will choose whether to retain three justices on our Supreme Court. The justices, and all of us trying to protect democracy, need your help, because there is evidence that MAGA is already dominating the conversation.
The work of these justices was applauded across the country in [2018](https://substack.com/redirect/4f6341bd-8253-466b-a9df-97b4765a3bac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) when they ended Republican gerrymandering, and in [2020](https://substack.com/redirect/e96aebf3-31fb-481b-9fac-afb7c3f764e6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) when they rejected a Republican attempt to throw out 2.5 million ballots and allow the state legislature (then in Republican hands) to select Pennsylvania's presidential electors. You can imagine what having them on the bench in 2026 and 2028 will mean, and what it would mean not to have them. But as significant as their work has been, it is quickly forgotten. Today, we face an unacceptable risk of losing, which would be catastrophic for the elections that follow.
Why? Scott Presler, a MAGA activist focused on Pennsylvania who has been [funded](https://substack.com/redirect/30092502-a1b0-4038-bd11-174eaf7dcc3e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by Elon Musk. His reach has grown so large that even a simple photo of him attracts millions of eyeballs:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b68d66fa-c159-4def-a423-99fc17418e26?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Presler has engaged all of his recent [attention](https://substack.com/redirect/46e1c3d1-0d35-41eb-a6d1-c88188c7b88f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on the judicial campaign, and at times it feels like he's the only person doing so. The below post from earlier today is just one example: the message is not impressive, but riding off the engagement from Musk, the post has already been seen by 600k people. That will keep going up over the next 24 hours, and he's doing this All. The. Time. An entire MAGA ecosystem supports him.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a759d1c9-f761-4e07-b3f6-232ab9d4b6d5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Simply put, Presler is already shaping public opinion in this campaign before large-scale advertising has even begun. No liberal influencer of equal or greater reach has ridden to the rescue. But the good news is that if you're reading this newsletter, you're part of an audience that could, in combination, balance out or even negate him. And take a concrete step to defend democracy at the same time. Here are some things, most quite easy, you could do right now:
* Immediately email [this](https://substack.com/redirect/5b602b7c-4d45-4d6d-a830-213b6b9376c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to every Pennsylvania voter you know. The piece notes the Court's role in protecting elections and individual rights such as the right to choose, and contains the wise words of Shanin Specter, son of a prominent, long-time Pennsylvania Senator (and Republican): "[The 3 justices] do not have an agenda except to do justice. It's my hope that they are resoundingly retained so as to send a message to those who would take down a judge or justice simply for partisan political advantage."
* Repost [this](https://substack.com/redirect/e7927dd2-153c-45fb-9081-e573be62ad64?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on X.
* Repost [this](https://substack.com/redirect/e2683d0e-8ef5-427f-bde9-cc2f76d88f5e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on Instagram.
* Check websites like [this one](https://substack.com/redirect/b4f6dfe9-9101-471d-bc3f-127762432b93?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and [this one ](https://substack.com/redirect/84159606-268c-4d2e-884e-ea2ad36a3d70?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)to find opportunities to canvass in Pennsylvania. I went this past [weekend](https://substack.com/redirect/0fc898bf-0cd2-4b20-98f5-f6180d1e2b49?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and had some great conversations. It really enforced that the lack of knowledge most people have about the courts creates a huge opening to make an impact.
* You can donate directly to the three candidates [here](https://substack.com/redirect/2d308ee1-9385-4098-8970-ab5cbff70773?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [here](https://substack.com/redirect/505068b4-6b11-414c-ba28-f9cbebc5f100?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and [here](https://substack.com/redirect/c0b12f65-9615-49f2-8dc2-8c744dedb309?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), to help them move around the state, which they are doing constantly. They truly are working hard and just need a boost.

A big part of MAGA is trying to convince us that they are more relentless than we are, so actions like these won't seem to matter. But based on everything I've seen, I still think we want this democracy to work more than they want it to fail. So let's show them, and get these justices retained.
Conor Lamb is free today. But if you enjoyed this post, you can tell Conor Lamb that their writing is valuable by pledging a future subscription. You won't be charged unless they enable payments.

[](https://substack.com/redirect/a046a787-0135-4d7e-8d2c-8b756531c4e9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[](https://substack..qYw0U9z4kX_yleMm5TLWd4I0muncn8Y3um1WJsQhocw?)

name: Justin Story
subject: St. Cloud Republican Justin Story to Challenge Darren Soto
body:
Decorated U.S. Marine Corps fighter pilot and 6th generation Central Floridian launches campaign releasing biographical video

| | | | | [|
---](https://votejustinstory.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aa75fb334e8c06de90a8e46d5&id=e19b5cb734&e=90ad5fc3c5)
| | | | | |
**PRESS RELEASE**
**St. Cloud Republican Justin Story to Challenge Darren Soto in Florida’s 9th Congressional District******_Decorated U.S. Marine Corps fighter pilot and 6th generation Central Floridian launches campaign releasing biographical video in one of Florida’s top-targeted House seats_ ___**“If I can handle the swamp here in Florida, I know I can take on the swamp in Washington, DC,”** – Justin Story_
---
|
---
| | **September 8, 2025 Contact: justin@votejustinstory.com**
---
| | (**St. Cloud, Florida**) — Today, Justin Story, a decorated former U.S. Marine fighter pilot, 6th generation Central Floridian, husband and father, launched his campaign against Democrat incumbent Darren Soto in the competitive 9th Congressional District of Florida. [Justin’s video can be viewed in full here.](https://votejustinstory.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aa75fb334e8c06de90a8e46d5&id=46a9e7f02e&e=90ad5fc3c5)****_“President Trump can’t change Washington alone,”_**Story states in his campaign launch video.**_“He needs new leaders in Congress who will fight for our values and principles, not stand against them like our current representative.”_ _“I’m a husband, father of two, University of Florida graduate, retired Marine Corps officer, former F-18 fighter pilot, and 6_ _th_ _generation Central Floridian,”_**Story continues.**_“I sprouted from humble, agriculture roots. If I can handle the swamp here in Florida, I know I can take on the swamp in Washington, DC. So, I’m stepping forward to serve again, this time for U.S. Congress.”_ __ Florida’s 9th District has become one of the most competitive congressional seats in the Sunshine State, as the state continues its massive, transformational shift towards Republicans. In fact, _The Cook Political Report_ has narrowed the Democratic advantage to just D+4 Partisan Voting Index (PVI), down from D+8 just two years ago. _“Unfortunately, Congressman Darren Soto has a voting record that aligns with the radical fringe of his party in Washington, and is out of lockstep with ordinary Floridians,”_**Story continued**._“Soto has voted for open borders while opposing the Laken Riley Act. He opposes protecting our girls in athletics from competing against biological males, therefore losing scholarship and championship opportunities. He has voted for massive, inflationary spending that has skyrocketed our deficits and national debt. And, Darren Soto has voted for massive tax increases on the hardworking families of Central Florida. This is just the tip of the iceberg. Next November, I have faith that Florida voters will reject Darren Soto.”_ __ Justin Story has pledged to District 9 voters that he will support a Balanced Budget Amendment, term limits for Members of Congress, and he most recently signed the Taxpayer Protection Pledge, vowing to oppose any and all tax increases on Florida families. He lists as his priorities maintaining a secure border and prioritizing legal immigration over illegal immigration, preventing foreign adversaries from acquiring farmland and other property throughout the United States, unleashing American energy to benefit our economy and job-creation, and lowering costs for Florida families in housing, healthcare, and retirement. Florida’s 9th District consists of Osceola County along with portions of Orange County and Polk County. Of Florida’s 28 total congressional districts, the 9th District is one of only five that is currently held by an incumbent Democrat where their party’s PVI advantage is less than 10 percent, making it particularly competitive.
Justin Story is ready to fight for Central Florida with the same tenacity, courage and conviction as he fought for his country in the U.S. Marine Corps. Learn more at [VoteJustinStory.com](https://votejustinstory.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aa75fb334e8c06de90a8e46d5&id=6825f62701&e=90ad5fc3c5). ###
---
| |

---
| | | | | | | | | [View email in browser](https://mailchi.mp/cdb7097df672/st-cloud-republican-justin-story-to-challenge-darren-soto?e=90ad5fc3c5)
Justin Story for Congress * 4853 E Irlo Bronson Memorial Hwy PMB 152 * Saint Cloud, FL 34771-8722 * USA
[update your preferences](https://votejustinstory.us8.list-manage.com/profile?u=aa75fb334e8c06de90a8e46d5&id=da2f953b7d&e=90ad5fc3c5&c=dd95e87b5e) or [unsubscribe](https://votejustinstory.us8.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=aa75fb334e8c06de90a8e46d5&id=da2f953b7d&t=b&e=90ad5fc3c5&c=dd95e87b5e)

subject: Court OKs ICE Stops, YouTube's NFL Record, and a Red Moon
body:
The Supreme Court on Monday [lifted a lower-court order](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOpDAMhp8mdIwShwxQpLiGbq-9EnmJmfFdICgxi3j7U_YVtrFc_Prs7__zMX8gR95fv3EjL2uad7pKJBHK85LOLOlf4YWKpKPc6ZTzk8o-gwbX6rHV4xyQ4z13TfArEZBtyJve9Z0Bp23z9n234uIMjrb_DFo7Co4QEYIlZ0dnG_aVpkc9Gq0HgAeuDqEDMOtgjBmeqtMUWFJ-_E28y5vWeKcvyo8lbU30b5GjKPtLwaRguq7rcRaUFPCuAQVTkZRvBVM1UzAdKbLwUtd6WMGkxzqGGj2PTBu13-at5HM7Wt42fmUUTnubkUNpYyot7i-KVCGDe3ZmAKt1r2Bqsg_HxTFyefaq068NOX5_Kj-q98vD_wAAAP__STSOKg) that had limited federal immigration patrols in Los Angeles, allowing agents to resume broad stops while the case continues.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LuO4zAMBdCvkbsEevhZqFggSJdttxQYiba1I1mGRCXI3w-SCTDTT8tDEhf338VcwAe_LX8hoqY5mQ3vJSARZmNTzZQ-irdYKO3lkSrVK5bNSC67A58OfDIOfHiYtnF6RpSoGtRi6IZWyI6rZtUWrsKpabBXdD1MreDd6KRCNXZKIfDG6-c3PvFJcD5KeYS5A9lKKeZRCDH2rOXoPKV8_J_8RivO4ZFumI82xSbolWgvTP1h8szkmVbcU80vT3n5mrwPnhvqXCmakmq2yNTpJ_ZPieh8jUydvnt4i4W4g182pk6FgNBAXYwYm6zdfvch-NIPrOVLBB9e0ehXfd60_AwAAP__PwWNTw) | |
# Tuesday, September 9, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1945, computer pioneer Grace Hopper discovered [the first known case of a computer “bug](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDHOozAQRk8DndF4MAkULrahy7ZbImOPgzcGI3uciNuvslf4y0_69J70_jyWhwkxHM_fZifNPi0HfUokZsqLTTVzepVgqXA6y5Uq15XKsSDgIGASMC3OhHgtqnXaEyH1LWl5H-5K4gB9u-kbgbK-R7f2EziQBsdBkTfWSxjMatqgvzSYYJIAI2Jn_GBQIUo_SinHW6OAXOCUu78pHLyRj1d6U-5s2tuoN-azNP2vBucG51gPV1_UlboWNvb1PTU4nw3OvJEonPIlkhff4UMuLGzaz8qUxVqfbdbu_IQYQ7ndGwXP3YT438M_ivPW-C8AAP__Bf165A)." It turned out to be an actual moth found between the relay contacts of an early Harvard Mark II computer. Hopper taped the dead moth into her logbook report. Today’s edition features a moment [straight out of a rom-com](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuozAQAL8GOkf2AgEKF9eke9deifzsNezFeJG9JOLvT7lfePVIo9H8-Vq-HCXK62-3o5XIS8Z3TSiCZfF8FuFnJY9V-KgXn3J-Y80LaBiUnpWel-AoXUvfBhsRAbsWrRmHsTcw6K7drHHYezNM0EVv5sH7GXzwetbdON6DMy3Zj03PejZaTwA3FwcHPYCJkzFmuje9xkDC5faXKcuGMV38wnLzvLfJbiJHbbpfDTwaeBzIR8IPauBxZnphqSSX4qgyfhdXn04JrZsozEEdhQ-uWJWwCi57LIqzioQpKBcFi3pTzpRXtbodlTGTHqbRtMWG400pUb2PTa_X3VH6nyM_eviy8C8AAP__PV6H7Q): Nebraska tight end Luke Lindenmeyer proposed to his girlfriend and Husker dancer Kailyn Storovich on the field, just after a 68–0 win over Akron. We love this—and we want to hear your stories. Have you ever been proposed to, or done the proposing? How was it? Hit reply and let us know. 📬AI is shaking up markets, jobs, and even banking. That could mean trouble for retirement savers. Watch for today’s email from our partner [Goldco](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkb3u1DAQxJ_G6Xyy13E-ihSgkO6PREUZmfXmspwTR7Fz0b09CggQoqBg2_ntzK7m89v45jjwev_oFuryFMeVzhQoZ9pHjMee4yMxUspxS6945OMLpXUEBVaqVqp29I7DaywL301EQKagTte2LjVYZYq58yViDXXVoGkcGge11ggOa2PrCdEW3F1uqlWtVqoBuLnJOigB9NRorZtKlIo857jfvkZe80xTeMUn7TeMSxG6OectCfNOwCBgOM_zdo_BJw5P2h-cJS2Ow8UKGBzLPO_kcpKqVQD2WjIDrsL0jbWyaq0sW1ACKrdswrwPSZheKS0_XC5y-JEse_KMLpP_BaYJ2QvT10p_mtU1LkX8rR95GdEtm-P7-g9sIc_HIkz_PfMPKcVjRxKm_-uQYu_8dnIInKpalOr-8-si_1etzw6-BQAA__9XpbME) on how to protect your savings.💰 If you want biased, partisan news from "your party's" side... don’t try [The Pour Over](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LuO4zAMBdCvkbsEevhZqFggSJdttxQYiba1I1mGRCXI3w-SCTDTT8tDEhf338VcwAe_LX8hoqY5mQ3vJSARZmNTzZQ-irdYKO3lkSrVK5bNSC67A58OfDIOfHiYtnF6RpSoGtRi6IZWyI6rZtUWrsKpabBXdD1MreDd6KRCNXZKIfDG6-c3PvFJcD5KeYS5A9lKKeZRCDH2rOXoPKV8_J_8RivO4ZFumI82xSbolWgvTP1h8szkmVbcU80vT3n5mrwPnhvqXCmakmq2yNTpJ_ZPieh8jUydvnt4i4W4g182pk6FgNBAXYwYm6zdfvch-NIPrOVLBB9e0ehXfd60_AwAAP__PwWNTw). ## Court OKs Broad Rules for ICE Stops
The Supreme Court on Monday [lifted a lower-court order](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOpDAMhp8mdIwShwxQpLiGbq-9EnmJmfFdICgxi3j7U_YVtrFc_Prs7__zMX8gR95fv3EjL2uad7pKJBHK85LOLOlf4YWKpKPc6ZTzk8o-gwbX6rHV4xyQ4z13TfArEZBtyJve9Z0Bp23z9n234uIMjrb_DFo7Co4QEYIlZ0dnG_aVpkc9Gq0HgAeuDqEDMOtgjBmeqtMUWFJ-_E28y5vWeKcvyo8lbU30b5GjKPtLwaRguq7rcRaUFPCuAQVTkZRvBVM1UzAdKbLwUtd6WMGkxzqGGj2PTBu13-at5HM7Wt42fmUUTnubkUNpYyot7i-KVCGDe3ZmAKt1r2Bqsg_HxTFyefaq068NOX5_Kj-q98vD_wAAAP__STSOKg) that had limited federal immigration patrols in Los Angeles, allowing agents to resume broad stops while the case continues.

The 6-3 decision temporarily lets Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) agents pull people over for questioning based on criteria such as a person speaking Spanish or working in a specific profession. Justice [Brett Kavanaugh wrote](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGOszAQRk9jOkf2YAMuXPwNXf52S-TAALNrMLKHRLn9KskRtn56M_re13W4Boq0L__Dhp7nNOz4KBGZMQ9jOjOnn0IjFk5HeaaTzxuWfQAFVionlRumQPE5mGryMyJgXaHXrW2NBqvqavXtBI3uAqim6TTeaoNz2-jgjJ3GUdm6Iv-6ppxyWqkO4BJmG8AA6LnTWneNMAon4pQv34l2XnGOz3THfBnTVkW_Mh9F1P8E9AJ6XnGlGF9MQJ9xOWNgSruA_j1H3gJzxCKgt8ZpV3eynEfGDeWH07bRkt-OzOcrjYypyLAv-NGq7KfjQTFSaVph1LIFev-r-E8B7x5-AwAA___anYZU) that the lower court had overreached by limiting the stops only to cases showing "reasonable cause," while Justice Sonia Sotomayor dissented, warning of potential violations of constitutional rights. Federal officials say more than 5,000 arrests have been made in the region since June, and a hearing in the case is set for Sept. 24.
## Murdoch Succession Finally Set
The Murdoch family has settled its years-long dispute over control of the Fox and News Corp. empire, [giving control of the company](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1uwyAUxfGnwZsjuObDHhi6eEvXjhYx14EWTATXifz2VfoKnY_0k87_67pcXUxxv3-6jJa2suz4agmJsC5rOSqVnxZXbFQe7SwHHTds-wIcVM-nnk-LdzGdi-y83RABhw6tMMpIAYoPXbCj8EIr9KD1TazGyGHAmwePiqMelemifWt84pPgfAS4uE05kABiG4UQo2aSo49U6uW7xJ0CbuksT6yXteQu2UD0aGz4YDAzmClgiCm9NwZzKBnfhxjMGX10DGYlJ9Dc9Pmovqyh31yO6ewbEiXMuFO_lp1qSQzmrlr_eMWUYtOGSX7PLv7RHf2r1dPCbwAAAP__-lN-PQ) to Rupert Murdoch’s son Lachlan, who has been running it for the past few years. Family members James Murdoch, Elizabeth Murdoch, and Prudence MacLeod will each receive over a billion dollars in separate trusts in exchange for relinquishing their shared control of the company, which includes Fox News, the _Wall Street Journal_ , and the _New York Post_. Lachlan is [the more conservative](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L-ynSAYBPCnwQ4HPvEoBUUau5s2pYPwceWEPw7gMb59xrxCmm125jc7--tr_dI--PT9U0dUzeU14VUDtoZlNfksLf-u3mBt-ah3Ptu5YU0rMBgpk5TJ1Wof7lV0VjlEwKFDxadxEhxGNnS70m4z0soBHRMvK6zgbHLGGrFxaQccOq8ejUkmOWMzQK_dqEEAcDdzzucXEQytb7n07-xT29GFO3-w9CbHLqi9taOS4QeBhcByXVdv0maeksDy0AQWJp-YCSxBmz3oRONZbDY7NRgxtUpNTq3kQLOjLv-hV33TiNZrivHwBalPNOFFnY4-3NSiDv3eYuiKssflQ_D1NRHBvqP24d-w9l9vfhT8DQAA___a4Yqf) of the family members, and the deal is seen as cementing Rupert Murdoch’s current political direction for the global media empire.

## Fugitive New Zealand Dad Killed
For nearly four years, New Zealand father Tom Phillips [hid in the wilderness](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMFurCAYhZ8Gdxj4lXFcsJibGzc3czdN2qVB-RnpIBhArX36xvYRujz5kpNzvrd7f1fWWf_4r2aU2YTe454c5oyxH8Mac3gmO2LKYUlHWPM6YPI9MBCUtZS1vVbWHX1daGkQAasCJW9EU3MQrComWVeaCT0Iw9UFRNuOaJpGDVroBtXIRGHl2cZa1nLGrgClMkJBDcDNlXN-vZCaobY5xPI9WJ8nNO4IG8ZyDHPh5JTzkkh1I9AR6PZ9L-fkT0agQ08_HIHuPEWgC3nC-BPpJyqnvKZmfdhsN6RaaTqgs7ihpjnQSW1IB0RP0xQy1Xjygy7B2REJdCrS243f63-vT1J1YbSaVH__nCpxTy8YlyJKvezWOZsuDanZY1bWfY_OvzK9SfgKAAD__-hglII) with his three children before being killed in a police shootout Sunday after a burglary attempt. Phillips disappeared with his three children, Jayda, 12, Maverick, 10, and Ember, 9, in 2021 following a custody dispute, and lived with them in remote bushland, surviving in makeshift shelters and off the land. The case captivated New Zealand as Phillips evaded authorities for years, tied to thefts, a bank robbery, and recent break-ins that suggested growing desperation. See a [photo of the family hiking](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2unTAQhJ_GdD6y92B-Chdp6G7alMjgNTgxLMLLQeTpI-cVbrPFjubTzPz6Gr9cTHFffroNLQcad7xzQmY8x5muk-lPjjNmpiM_dPE1Yd5HUGCk6qXqR-9iesa68jYgAr4rtLo1ba3BqHe12rqb3g5nU5vQTJPC2YSpCb3uTNNoH3QVbaGpXvVaqQ7g5YJxUAPo0Gmtu0bUCn1kOl-_Ke68YkgPffB8zbRVya7MRxbvHwIGAcP-HJS5SAKGAhYwqL6cVsBw05m8LBUFDOFaIscPSu-8ZNrkscaU4pFlXomlR-elv864L-VBTBfLO_Iq979ypqMgqtP64y6u3LSiVsvmYvqfi7815sfCvwAAAP__8dGJ5g). _“[The children] have been dearly missed every day for nearly four years, and we are looking forward to welcoming them home with love and care,”_ [said their mother.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO4yAURb_G7ojgGWJTUGyTLttuaRF4xOxgPwQvifL3o8wvTH11z5HOv-t69bnk4_7X7-g40XrgqxdkxrYGejSmr54Ddqba3_Tgxw37sYIEI6QV0q7R5_Je9RhdQgScRnRqNrNWYOQ0bs7GABMYo2-zUuD1LOezDZNN3uBidRyz-9CklVZJuQCcfDIeNIBKi1JqOQ9aYsxM7fSf8sEbpvKmJ7ZToH0sbmOufZj-DHAZ4FKRasHPNMCFaRd1y6Xk2kXYcokND9F9QrHRS-y0i4Y-MEah1CINLHZsLtbX59LP86Dlffe5_Jj4V3meDr4DAAD__4zyeUo)

If that's more your jam, try it for free! | Court OKs Broad Rules for ICE Stops The Supreme Court on Monday that had limited federal immigration patrols in Los Angeles, allowing agents to resume broad stops while the case continues. The 6-3 decision temporarily lets Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) agents pull people over for questioning based on criteria such as a person speaking Spanish or working in a specific profession. Justice that the lower court had overreached by limiting the stops only to cases showing "reasonable cause," while Justice Sonia Sotomayor dissented, warning of potential violations of constitutional rights. Federal officials say more than 5,000 arrests have been made in the region since June, and a hearing in the case is set for Sept. 24. Murdoch Succession Finally Set The Murdoch family has settled its years-long dispute over control of the Fox and News Corp. empire, to Rupert Murdoch’s son Lachlan, who has been running it for the past few years. Family members James Murdoch, Elizabeth Murdoch, and Prudence MacLeod will each receive over a billion dollars in separate trusts in exchange for relinquishing their shared control of the company, which includes Fox News, the Wall Street Journal , and the New York Post. Lachlan is of the family members, and the deal is seen as cementing Rupert Murdoch’s current political direction for the global media empire. Fugitive New Zealand Dad Killed For nearly four years, New Zealand father Tom Phillips with his three children before being killed in a police shootout Sunday after a burglary attempt. Phillips disappeared with his three children, Jayda, 12, Maverick, 10, and Ember, 9, in 2021 following a custody dispute, and lived with them in remote bushland, surviving in makeshift shelters and off the land. The case captivated New Zealand as Phillips evaded authorities for years, tied to thefts, a bank robbery, and recent break-ins that suggested growing desperation. body:
Fermi America, the energy development company co-founded by former Texas governor and U.S. Energy Secretary Rick Perry, has [filed for an initial public offering](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDuupDAURFdjMiPb_AMHk5D1pBOiC77A1fiDbHfT7P6J7iW8tFQ6OlX_HtMDyJLf_oJDnd9rmDyeyWLOGKdIy_8DY7wSHWEPz5SDTwb8NimhGi4GLobJANlrqgujZ2EGWaCWXdPVsulEV-xa9LMcoFfQtYCq6gVIUwk5N-0g5NyLgvQNE4MYpBSyrst5lUsrTdWpuTUSDKsFGsohlnnHjG9Iq73CC2O5BFdYved8JFb9YWpkajzPszSQYUGfMZrLg6Ml3VWmRvRMjfdApsYVoyMODiMtwFeymPgaIqcjcHBk-GHBfyMpt5PfUP6l8gXc8UycPP_4MDUWUZvjJGsptR2rxeaA7Ecw_-7Wl1Y_AQAA___V7I8p) on the Nasdaq.

# Tuesday, September 9, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1971, actor [Henry Thomas](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGupCAUgOGnwW7MAVFCQbGN2Wa22mRLgnDQk0ExwM6Mb38z9xVu-Tdf8f-727ujRMf6x-1o2jtme-CrJmwNiy3kHyeWclU685b_15aPGtyxWgFivIG-gbbBUbqs7IJZIGjeoeFqVJKPClS3mWnQUg0RBq-Fin50jnvAKGCJ4KVXHZkPBho058Cl7JfI_cTDoMQyBe4Ck4CBWi5927Dh29WYrvzE0vu8d8lsrZ2VDb-YmJmY8ehf9KATA7k-l5WJ-dNMzL_xKJf9u-Xd1a6YcL4oJaqTYhLW3VH69trPLjyN-AoAAP__tS1yvA) was born in San Antonio. He is best known for starring as Elliott Taylor in the 1982 sci-fi film _E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial_. Folks in Lubbock shared [dramatic photos](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkMGOtCAQhJ8GbxhgRH4OHP6Lt9nrHg1Cox0ZMcCM49tvnOwb7KXT6a5Ufanv-3i3GHGbv-wDTH2HNG5wlAi1Qh4zunWHnM-Ce1rSs9S0FW-3eRRMSMo0ZXr0FuM5do03E_OaN2C4kqrjUjHVLEYLCTp4yUIPU8_lJP95FbRQIVglXWjQXGZMM805413XToG7nvubElPvufWkY-CxptzWBSq8bQnxTC_IrUuPJpql1r2Q238iBiKG4zhaF9Gt4hf4Ul13sHWBTMRwxRExMH2Na6sL0OJsRiiVxpRW3GbqYnp6ihv9fNeTiKHJxu8HxoilV6Rj88Ni_EDUv1X3MuInAAD__43Ug8o) of a shelf cloud with a Houston meteorologist, who explained that they look a lot more imposing than they actually are. _Flyover_ readers have seen [Pacaso](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2O2zAQhU8jdTaGPzKlQkWAhbtNm5IYkyNpEIokSMq7vn2gTZALbPveh5mH79e7fUcOHNefuNPcPpdkI33UQK1RsYXd70ylvCrntKWjthSrx7haCXK4wHSByXrk8LK69_MD_CR6moUZjBaDAdNvszRaKWMcCRq0MqPABZwccHkojcMoep7PYzDBJAQIra-PRbib8MrIx80L9J0G8txSubaNGn1iXcIrPalcXdr7MG-t5dqpH528d_LO8Um1XTM6rOkkzljdj7bbmo7iqFNvtCOHTt7OcCfPx96pt4zsLxlLi1Tqxvlf73DPyGv8Iv6XYoSLBmP_KjgiN7QCzDAqBSNMfZl9_uAQuN5Mp2E9H37Nbd-T_JzlnwAAAP__vGWRlA) featured before—and for good reason. This fast-growing vacation home co-ownership company, backed by top investors, is opening the door for everyday investors to get in at just [$2.90/share](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2O2zAQhU8jdTaGPzKlQkWAhbtNm5IYkyNpEIokSMq7vn2gTZALbPveh5mH79e7fUcOHNefuNPcPpdkI33UQK1RsYXd70ylvCrntKWjthSrx7haCXK4wHSByXrk8LK69_MD_CR6moUZjBaDAdNvszRaKWMcCRq0MqPABZwccHkojcMoep7PYzDBJAQIra-PRbib8MrIx80L9J0G8txSubaNGn1iXcIrPalcXdr7MG-t5dqpH528d_LO8Um1XTM6rOkkzljdj7bbmo7iqFNvtCOHTt7OcCfPx96pt4zsLxlLi1Tqxvlf73DPyGv8Iv6XYoSLBmP_KjgiN7QCzDAqBSNMfZl9_uAQuN5Mp2E9H37Nbd-T_JzlnwAAAP__vGWRlA). Even a few _Flyover_ team members have already invested, and now might be the perfect time for you to take a closer look.

## Rick Perry's Energy Company Files for IPO
Fermi America, the energy development company co-founded by former Texas governor and U.S. Energy Secretary Rick Perry, has [filed for an initial public offering](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDuupDAURFdjMiPb_AMHk5D1pBOiC77A1fiDbHfT7P6J7iW8tFQ6OlX_HtMDyJLf_oJDnd9rmDyeyWLOGKdIy_8DY7wSHWEPz5SDTwb8NimhGi4GLobJANlrqgujZ2EGWaCWXdPVsulEV-xa9LMcoFfQtYCq6gVIUwk5N-0g5NyLgvQNE4MYpBSyrst5lUsrTdWpuTUSDKsFGsohlnnHjG9Iq73CC2O5BFdYved8JFb9YWpkajzPszSQYUGfMZrLg6Ml3VWmRvRMjfdApsYVoyMODiMtwFeymPgaIqcjcHBk-GHBfyMpt5PfUP6l8gXc8UycPP_4MDUWUZvjJGsptR2rxeaA7Ecw_-7Wl1Y_AQAA___V7I8p) on the Nasdaq. In June, Fermi and Texas Tech [announced a partnership](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHOpCAUxfGn0Q4DiDoUFNvYfdtuaa5wHckiELiO49tvZl5h-5OTX_5_fpYf8MHH52840NB7S0vEqwYkwrIUb_9mLOWuPqc9nZVSrA7ic5FcDoxrxvXiwId7Ua0zK3datGjENExKDBOf2t2ItR_k1MOAj4dTWoOVvVW9fWwjOCd0683njGuuheBCqW7dhB2F6ye5jk6AaxRH5ymVjnYkfEPdwp1eWDqbjjaYnSjXpv_VyLmR83Vd3XdEaPcO3dnIuVIqHmsj5496ZEQnq3clPBhExzYsh2dwYPEWGMSYzmiRZSgUsdTd5y7vuS3G5cuH4Os4NYo_D_DhS6D_C_cy8l8AAAD__265hYc) to develop a massive 11-gigawatt energy and data center campus on approximately 5,800 acres in Amarillo. Dubbed "Project Matador," the 18 million-square-foot data center is expected to become the largest in the world. The company has already acquired 600 megawatts of natural gas power for the site and has signed agreements with Westinghouse and South Korean firms Hyundai and Doosan Enerbility to deploy nuclear reactors. The terms of the IPO have not yet been specified. Last month, Fermi closed a [$100 million round of funding](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGupCAUhp8GOwxwHZWCYhq72XazlUE46MkiGDhex7ffzL7CLf_8yZcv3-_X_LIYMa2_7A6G3iHPCa4agQjKXND9PaCUu-KRt3xWyql6m9ZZCfXgQnOhZ28x3nPXeLMIr2UDRg6PoZOPQQzNZqSXvfXCqVHo3gsHdvSqC2pctO5hHBs0H5jQQkspZNe1S5Cul_5rUEvvpfWsE-CRcmlpA4K3rSHe-RtK6_LeRLMRHZV9PZmamJqu62r3mj4fUxMkflampj0nuJmaCNyWcszrZ3hLljtIBIUvJ0YPhQcoO_KAESoPufCzcjwyt5UnuHjESpjWyq1zEKFYAqYmW_jzKV_DFf40xfjjwhix9gPrxLpbjP896Wd1v436FwAA__9B5JHs) led by Australian investment bank Macquarie Group.
## Deputy Fired for Pulling Gun During Dispute
A Harris County deputy [has been fired](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGupCAUxvGnwe5MAFHHwmIbu7vtlgbhoGRRCOd4Z3z7zewr3PpLvvzz-_O1fNmY4rn9tgdO_A55OfFFCZmxLjW6vwVrvSmWvOeLOJ_k7bktWuoO5AhyXLyN6V5M46dV-lE1OKmhG4zqBjk0-zSuz06PnQnBGBPatgu9tvqJSroxdNI0cfqcyVGOSkllzGMNyvXKt4Nee6-sF0aij5zrg3dkfFsK6c7fWB8uH02aduZCov0l9Cz0bFen2s8i9FwysdDzbmuNBC5fJ9_gsVx8Q4gVPRz55B1oR3hZAmevbWdw9sBqoVzpIwPbdQJFYqwE-IbiGBSQvUnoWQ1Dp1vzFHpu6uTLK6YUqR-EkdthY_qfyD-D_Z70vwAAAP__XLeObA) after she brandished her weapon during a family dispute last month while she was off-duty but in uniform. A grand jury will determine if criminal charges are warranted. On August 5, Precinct 1 Deputy Brittany Brown allegedly pursued her sister's former fiancé in a personal vehicle after he left the house with her phone. A [video](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFyhCAYhJ8GOxzgOJGCIo3dpU3pgPwqE04Y-D3Pt8-YyRuk39nd7_t6jA8bYtiWT_sEg-85jRscNQIilLGE6TtDKWcNOa1pr5i26u22jIKJO2WaMj16G-I5ysYbx7zmDRiu7kryu2KqWY3UVio16YmB0jB3vXbW9q6XvWOzU10TzFXGNNOcMy5l62Y-ddzflHCd59YTycAHTKXFFRDets7xTC8o7ZSeTTQrYq7k9kHEQMRwHEc7p7fo_v5eISKGi4qIYbWlhEqntG94Ug95x5Mu-0bzHiN4-goeEt2ztwhNMT4fIcZQO0UkW542xN9N_J-plxE_AQAA__9rS4Dw) recorded by the man, Michael Evans, shows Brown threatening him with her service pistol at a stoplight. Brown was reassigned to desk duty pending an internal investigation. Her attorney previously claimed Brown thought Evans had kidnapped her sister. "_She just jumped out the driver's door at that point planted the gun in my face_ ," [recounted Evans](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDuOpTAURFcDmdG1MR8HDiYhe5NOiAz3AtYYjPx5PHbfotU76KyCUunU-fcaX8Y6e6x_zU46fRY_HnRFRylRGIOd_58Uwh3t6TefY_JHRHOsowDRMFAM1IjGunuUJeoJUPGSNO-aTvKmg67ctAGaatnX1JJCBX0_Sd43BIBdr2oDpdXPGChQnAOXspoWPrcc605MLXKDhQRCm3yo0kaJPiYu7vZvCtXs99LpLaUzFvWfQgyFGK7rqhb_Ee0P71MqxPC8KsSAdOZ0s8UGQjabvG6JzWZnZ3aPBbbmg2EOT1zMbt3N0MYzJyqDxvOyztnYdoWEdTfWfQOk32l7a_EVAAD__2dohRQ). "_She was using her service pistol and uniform to bully and oppress me_."
## Garland Hosts Third Texas Film Festival
Garland is hosting its third [It Came From Texas](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGupCAYBeCn0Q4DiDIUFNvYzbZbml_4UbIoBv4ZZ97-5k7uG9z-5Ms55999vkNM8Vj_wo6WXiHPB141IRGWuUT3_8RS3jWeecuPSvmoHo51llwOjBvGzewhpvesWm8X7o1o0Qo9aCUGzXW7Weid7o0DhRhui1LopZHGcQ0gw3jjbbTfGDfcCMGFUt0ShBuF77VcRi_AN4qjj5RLRxsSvqCG9M5PLJ3Le5vsRnTWpv_TyKmR03VdnYeUoOalYvmJNXKCQrWRUyTmYEcWSt7ZR2OfMSGmnQWsFJ-QWEF6lKMyymyFkuDwTPay12YY2mL9ecWUYh11o_i6Q0yfKvS7A59WfgUAAP__jPuHKQ) film festival this weekend. This year's theme is True Texas Tales, and the festival will feature historical films and speakers who will provide expert insight on the events they portray. The [lineup](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGSqzAQRE8DmShJFugrUPATMm-6ISWYkZlagShpbOzbb9lX2Lzrdff7vk7XQIn221fY0PMz5mnHsyZkxjIVWn4OLOVV6chrvlfOe4Ww3yYtdS-kE9JNECi9JtOCnyU41aJXtrdG9VbadvX9MA_mEkJADRIGVM6h1aAwSgjLP9OSf8Okk04pqYzp5qiWQcHF6nkAFaAxEoE4l45XZHyGGtMrP7B0S97a5FfmozaX_40eGz2e59nFvNzrZ9f7zDvW6JFYLGFDEUvexAcjIqVNRKxMj5BEQb6XvYqKBwulhTKNHtvi4TgpJaqDbYy8bYHSp5j_puvh9W8AAAD__996gds) includes award-winning films _Bonnie and Clyde_ (1967), Denzel Washington's _The Great Debaters_ (2007), and John Wayne's _The Alamo_ (1960). Among the scheduled speakers are Bonnie's niece, Rhea Leen Linder, and Wayne's granddaughter, Anita La Cava Swift. Other showings include the comedies [_Bernie_](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFugzAQxvGngS3ozthYHjx0YUvXjshwl2DVYGRfQ_L2VfoKnb7hk37D_-s6XUNMcb9_ho29PG952vmsiUW4TCUu3weX8qrxyGv-qZL3SmG_TwqUuYC7gJsoxPSadEt-BnLYskdrrEZjwbarDy6ws_1AYJBmOxPjYAaLRMtiFIQ2-jcGDhwioNbdfMNlQOqtmgfCQI0Gpii5dLKy8DPUW3rlB5duyVub_Cpy1Kb_aNTYqPE8zy5uNL_PRo0SJfF7BS1oY_tGjW3xdJwxpVgH22i4byGmP0z-l-Dh1W8AAAD__9W7b-o) (2011) and [_Viva Max!_](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFugzAQxvGnMVuQbWwcDx66sKVrR2S4I5xqMLKvIXn7Kn2FTt_wSb_h_3Ubb5ES7ffPuGHg55LHHc-akBnLWGj-PrCUV6Ujr_mnct4rxP0-aqntRfqL9CNESq_RNBAmCV41GJSzzijrpGvW4LSOXe-7DjrnYUbj0Rplr25anIWrayi8MemlV0oqY9ppUXOvoHN66kFFEEYiEOfS8oqMz1iX9MoPLO2ctyaFlfmoovsQehB6OM-zpQ2m9yn0wMQJ38tS9lZdjdBDUwIcJ6VEtXfCyPsWKf1h_L8Ej6B_AwAA__8eGG8a) (1969)—films about a 1996 murder in East Texas and Mexico's fictional attempt to recapture San Antonio in 1969—and documentaries about the 1935 Wiley College debate team and the John F. In June, Fermi and Texas Tech to develop a massive 11-gigawatt energy and data center campus on approximately 5,800 acres in Amarillo. Dubbed "Project Matador," the 18 million-square-foot data center is expected to become the largest in the world. Deputy Fired for Pulling Gun During Dispute A Harris County deputy after she brandished her weapon during a family dispute last month while she was off-duty but in uniform. A grand jury will determine if criminal charges are warranted. On August 5, Precinct 1 Deputy Brittany Brown allegedly pursued her sister's former fiancé in a personal vehicle after he left the house with her phone. A recorded by the man, Michael Evans, shows Brown threatening him with her service pistol at a stoplight. Brown was reassigned to desk duty pending an internal investigation. Her attorney previously claimed Brown thought Evans had kidnapped her sister. "She just jumped out the driver's door at that point planted the gun in my face ," . "She was using her service pistol and uniform to bully and oppress me." Garland Hosts Third Texas Film Festival Garland is hosting its third film festival this weekend. This year's theme is True Texas Tales, and the festival will feature historical films and speakers who will provide expert insight on the events they portray. The includes award-winning films Bonnie and Clyde (1967), Denzel Washington's The Great Debaters (2007), and John Wayne's The Alamo (1960). Among the scheduled speakers are Bonnie's niece, Rhea Leen Linder, and Wayne's granddaughter, Anita La Cava Swift. Other showings include the comedies (2011) and (1969)—films about a 1996 murder in East Texas and Mexico's fictional attempt to recapture San Antonio in 1969—and documentaries about the 1935 Wiley College debate team and the John F. Kennedy assassination. to the three-day festival are $75, and individual tickets can be purchased for $10-$20. name: Dominic Rapini
subject: Voter Fraud: A Cautionary Tale of Two Cities
body:
It's time for Zero Trust in Mail In Voting

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/fe9155a9674c/when-we-vote-we-win-14765119?e=8763c56857)

| | | | |

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | “Absence of evidence is not evidence of absence.” - Carl Segan
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
|
---
| |
# Opinion: _Frio County, Texas, and Bridgeport, A Tale of Two Frauds_
---
| |
By Dominic Rapini, Republican Candidate for Secretary of State 2022
Voter fraud is neither hypothetical nor isolated. From the fields of Frio County, Texas, to the city streets of Bridgeport, Connecticut, **recent scandals illuminate a clear and present danger stalking our elections** : the abuse of absentee ballots and systematic ballot harvesting. These cautionary tales prove that fraud can be widespread, it does happen, and it’s dangerously difficult to expose and prosecute[11][2][3][7][5][6][1].
**Widespread and Hard to Prove**
In Frio County, Texas, six officials now face indictments for manipulating mail-in ballots and paying for harvested votes through cash or smartphone apps[11]. Their scheme targeted the elderly and disabled, using sophisticated methods to traffic ballots and conceal misconduct. Meanwhile, Bridgeport, Connecticut, witnessed one of the most significant absentee ballot fraud investigations in state history, with surveillance footage and tip-offs resulting in more than a dozen arrests and the overturning of the results of a mayoral primary [2][3][1][6]. Bridgeport operatives, city council members, party leaders, and campaign staff signed out hundreds of absentee ballot applications, illegally took possession of ballots, and sought to mislead voters about eligibility[10][5][6].
**Uncovering and Prosecuting Fraud: A Herculean Challenge**
The **Bridgeport scandal unraveled only after viral video evidence surfaced** , national news attention intensified, and a persistent investigation led to hundreds of criminal charges. [7][8][5][1] In both **Frio and Bridgeport, fraudsters exploited trust,** inadequate oversight, and the inherent vulnerabilities of absentee voting. Even with overwhelming evidence, prosecution is arduous, evidence is scattered, witnesses are fearful, and most frauds never make it to conviction[7][1][4].
**Damaging Democracy and Undermining Trust**
When fraud succeeds, it inflicts generational damage to our democracy. Voters lose faith. Turnout falls. Good candidates walk away, unwilling to risk a tainted process. Neighborhoods targeted by ballot harvesting lose their voice, and every alleged act casts doubt on the legitimacy of our elections[7][5]. The lesson from Frio and Bridgeport is crystal clear: fraud is not simply rare it is rarely caught, and its impact, especially when left unchecked, devastates the public’s trust in free and fair elections.
**The Only Answer: Zero Tolerance, Zero Trust**
If Connecticut, Texas, or any state wishes to safeguard democracy, there must be an absolute, uncompromising rejection of voter fraud. Campaigns must never be allowed to touch absentee ballot applications or ballots. Every absentee ballot application must be tied to a valid photo ID, and the law should cap campaign-initiated ballot requests at five per person solely for family or certified caregivers. Technology can help, but only vigilance, transparency, and common-sense restrictions will eliminate the raw materials of fraud[11][3][1].
**A Caution for the Nation**
Frio County’s harvesters, Bridgeport’s ballot stuffers these are warnings, not outliers. America must heed them. The legitimacy of elections cannot permit “just a little fraud.” The standard in banking, business, or government is zero. Our votes demand nothing less. **Only when we adopt zero tolerance and zero trust for fraud will we restore confidence and integrity where it matters most: the ballot box.**
**Sources**
[1] Five Charged Following Investigation into Handling of Absentee ... https://portal.ct.gov/dcj/press-releases/division-of-criminal-justice/02212025bridgeportarrests
[2] Bridgeport election probe expands; four more operatives charged https://ctmirror.org/2025/07/30/bridgeport-election-probe-expands/
[3] Bridgeport Municipal Mayoral Democratic Primary 2023 Election https://electionfraud.heritage.org/case/200379
[4] Suspect enters guilty plea in Bridgeport ballot fraud case - CT Mirror https://ctmirror.org/2025/07/23/ct-bridgeport-ballot-fraud-guilty-plea/
[5] Bridgeport Democrats in court to face election-related charges https://www.ctpublic.org/news/2025-03-06/bridgeport-absentee-ballots-election-fraud-ct-charges-court
[6] 5 charged in connection with 2023 Bridgeport election fraud - WSHU https://www.wshu.org/connecticut-news/2025-02-21/5-charged-in-connection-with-2023-bridgeport-election-fraud
[7] Election Fraud Is Rare. Except, Maybe, in Bridgeport, Conn. https://www.nytimes.com/2024/01/21/nyregion/joe-ganim-john-gomes-bridgeport-mayor-election.html
[8] 5 charged in Bridgeport absentee ballot fraud to be arraigned https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4BLQsfCIpOA
[9] Bridgeport absentee ballot fraud case yields 4 more arrests: Officials https://www.ctpost.com/news/article/bridgeport-primary-absentee-ballot-fraud-arrested-20794978.php
[10] Timeline of Bridgeport's 2023 election scandal and charges - CTPost https://www.ctpost.com/projects/2025/news/bridgeport-election-fraud-arrests-timeline/
[11] 6 people are charged in a Texas elections investigation involving ... https://www.ksat.com/news/national/2025/05/07/6-people-are-charged-in-a-texas-elections-investigation-involving-vote-harvesting/

name: Amy Taylor
subject: My husband was convicted for saving lives
body:
Chris stopped a knife-wielding man from stabbing him and his fellow officers in a crowded apartment building. He saved lives. He did exactly what he was trained to do. And now he's been branded a criminal.
| We appreciate your subscription to our alerts and updates.
To be removed from this list, **[unsubscribe here](https://libersend.loomered.com/unsubscribe/wJCYyn7638HXOcoR8928MiNxO5nXTgGo6s7D8pT0763BW8929so/jNrcjifZkRuM7634SQt2EHxg/IIVeJs6PyMxem5QwTY0KDQ)**.

---
Dear Friend, My name is Amy Taylor. I never imagined I'd be writing this email. My husband, Officer Chris Taylor, has been **wrongfully convicted** --for protecting innocent lives. [**PLEASE donate and help us fight for his freedom!**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/NftOhLTC892tgB99dlqV892XAg/IIVeJs6PyMxem5QwTY0KDQ) Chris stopped a knife-wielding man from stabbing him and his fellow officers in a crowded apartment building. He saved lives. He did exactly what he was trained to do. And now he's been branded a criminal. Chris is home with us on bail while we fight his appeal, but the threat of prison hangs over our family every single day. Our children cry, asking if their daddy will be taken away. I go to sleep every night with that same fear. And all the while, Soros-backed District Attorney Jose Garza is smiling, proud of tearing our family apart just to score political points. Friend, I am begging you**:[please donate today to help fund Chris's appeal. Without you, we can't keep fighting.](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/NftOhLTC892tgB99dlqV892XAg/IIVeJs6PyMxem5QwTY0KDQ)** Chris was cleared by the Austin Police Department. He should have gone home to his family with honor. Instead, years later, a radical DA indicted him, and now my husband--an innocent man, a decorated police officer--lives under the crushing weight of a wrongful conviction. This is not justice. This is a war on police. We are drowning under legal bills. Every day I am reminded that the system cares more about punishing cops than protecting families. And every day I pray that someone like you will step up and fight back with us. Chris fought to save lives. Now he needs YOU to fight for his. [**Please, rush a donation of $50, $100, or even $250 right now to help Chris win his appeal and keep him home with his family.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/NftOhLTC892tgB99dlqV892XAg/IIVeJs6PyMxem5QwTY0KDQ)
