name: Natalie Jones
subject: The Results are IN: Virginians Say Housing is their #1 Affordability Concern🏠
body:
When it comes to affordability, there are a lot of things that are weighing on our minds– prescription drugs, groceries, education–
| | |
---
| |
---
| Friends-
When it comes to affordability, there are a lot of things that are weighing on our minds- prescription drugs, groceries, education- but a new survey from YouGov for the Commonwealth Housing Coalition shows that what Virginians are most worried about is the cost of housing.

name: Team TFVC
subject: TFVC Tuesday: Unraveling the Lies
body:
| |
---
RFK Jr. and Others Reveal Government Failures | | [View in browser](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTY1MDY2OTQ3ODQwNDQzNjM1LFwiclwiOjE2NTA2Njk4NTYxNzQ5MTMwMn0iLCJzIjoiZjM5ODQ2OTdiOTNiNjZkZCJ9)
| | | [ ](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTY1MDY2OTQ3ODQ4ODMyMjQ1LFwiclwiOjE2NTA2Njk4NTYxNzQ5MTMwMn0iLCJzIjoiOGFmMzgyYWI1NzVmOTJjNCJ9)
---
|
# Unraveling the Lies
---
| |
---
| In a series of headline-grabbing events last week, the lies perpetuated by our public health institutions and used by governments at all levels to **coerce citizens into compliance** with mandates were dismantled. First, the Senate Finance Committee subjected **HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.** to hours of criticism and outright insults. Some committee members even released a statement calling on RFK Jr. to resign from his post, claiming he is a danger to the American people. One by one, RFK Jr. calmly and rationally [responded](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTY1MDY2OTQ3ODU4MjY5NDMxLFwiclwiOjE2NTA2Njk4NTYxNzQ5MTMwMn0iLCJzIjoiZDJkMDZlNzQ5MDVmNmJkZCJ9) to these outlandish accusations. He pointed out that the recent shake-ups at the CDC, in which some in leadership were fired and some walked out in protest, were the result of years, if not decades, of **failures by the agency to improve the health of Americans** and stem the tide of increased chronic disease rates in children. During one exchange, RFK Jr. revealed that more than 75% of Americans suffer from a chronic disease and 80% of our children would be medically disqualified from military service. When pressed about his skepticism of the American Academy of Pediatrics (AAP), an organization that has repeatedly maligned RFK Jr. and his policies, he exposed that the four largest contributors to the AAP are vaccine manufacturers, presenting a glaring **conflict of interest**. This entire hearing was clearly intended to put RFK Jr. in the “hot seat,” but he turned the tables on committee members by **destroying lie after lie**. Later in the week, **Florida Surgeon General Joseph Ladapo** lit a media firestorm by saying that he intends to work with public health departments and the legislature to rescind any and all _government_ vaccine mandates in the Sunshine State, comparing these draconian policies to slavery. His bold statements had medical tyrants across the country [spinning](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTY1MDY2OTQ3ODY3NzA2NjE4LFwiclwiOjE2NTA2Njk4NTYxNzQ5MTMwMn0iLCJzIjoiM2RjNTI2YzM5NGMwYWM4ZiJ9) out of control, with the Chairman of the Florida chapter of the AAP claiming that Dr. Ladapo will be putting school children and staff **at risk of certain death**. Team TFVC was fielding calls from supporters and journalists the rest of the week, wanting to know our thoughts on this proposed policy change in FL. Our thoughts? With the exception of healthcare facilities, the vast majority of Texans and all public school and higher education students have a right to exempt themselves from any vaccine for any reason at any time; in essence, **there are no true _government_ mandates in our state**. And we will continue to work to end any remaining requirements, particularly the policies impacting those who work in hospital and clinic settings. In fact, we recently announced the rule change adopted by the Department of State Health Services which reiterates current Texas law - college students enrolled in human and animal health care courses _must_ be able to submit exemptions and the exemption is finally available for [direct download](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTY1MDY2OTQ3ODczOTk4MDc1LFwiclwiOjE2NTA2Njk4NTYxNzQ5MTMwMn0iLCJzIjoiZmU2MjE1MjYwMTZhYjY1ZCJ9) on our website and the DSHS site. Finally, documents obtained via Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) requests revealed that federal public health bureaucrats knew all along that **COVID vaccine breakthrough cases were very real** and a threat to the public. Despite this knowledge, former **CDC Director Rochelle Walensky** [took to the airwaves](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTY1MDY2OTQ3ODgxMzM4MTA5LFwiclwiOjE2NTA2Njk4NTYxNzQ5MTMwMn0iLCJzIjoiOTQyMzhkMGI1ODNmYzdlNyJ9) in 2021 to assure Americans that such cases did not exist, which compounded the issue while allowing the federal government to argue in court that its mandates were necessary for the greater good. These bombshells continue to affirm what many of us have known for years, even before COVID was a household phrase - the vaccine industry and the government entities tasked with regulating public health have been **inextricably tied together for far too long** , with the proverbial fox guarding the hen house. Thanks in part to courageous leaders like RFJK and Dr. Ladapo, the manipulation of the American public is beginning to unwind and the **health of our children is becoming a priority**. TFVC is grateful for the work being done at the highest levels of government, but **our focus** will continue to be protecting and advancing informed consent, medical privacy and vaccine choice in Texas. **We have come so far, but we still have a long way to go and we need you at every step!**
---
|
# Print-at-Home Exemptions!
---
| |
---
| In case you missed it... After a ten year battle, print-from-home exemptions for enrollment in licensed daycares, public/charter schools and college are now available! The Department of State Health Services has released a **blank, printable vaccine exemption affidavit** that students and parents can print at their convenience. The updated form also makes clear: all college students - **including those in healthcare and veterinary programs** \- may use this form. No wait, no taxpayer waste, no limits, and no state tracking. **Celebrate this TFVC milestone and win for parental rights!**
---
|

clean_body: | | RFK Jr. and Others Reveal Government Failures | | | | | | Unraveling the Lies | | | In a series of headline-grabbing events last week, the lies perpetuated by our public health institutions and used by governments at all levels to coerce citizens into compliance with mandates were dismantled. First, the Senate Finance Committee subjected HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. to hours of criticism and outright insults. Some committee members even released a statement calling on RFK Jr. to resign from his post, claiming he is a danger to the American people. One by one, RFK Jr. calmly and rationally to these outlandish accusations. He pointed out that the recent shake-ups at the CDC, in which some in leadership were fired and some walked out in protest, were the result of years, if not decades, of failures by the agency to improve the health of Americans and stem the tide of increased chronic disease rates in children. During one exchange, RFK Jr. revealed that more than 75% of Americans suffer from a chronic disease and 80% of our children would be medically disqualified from military service. When pressed about his skepticism of the American Academy of Pediatrics (AAP), an organization that has repeatedly maligned RFK Jr. and his policies, he exposed that the four largest contributors to the AAP are vaccine manufacturers, presenting a glaring conflict of interest. This entire hearing was clearly intended to put RFK Jr. in the “hot seat,” but he turned the tables on committee members by destroying lie after lie. Later in the week, Florida Surgeon General Joseph Ladapo lit a media firestorm by saying that he intends to work with public health departments and the legislature to rescind any and all government vaccine mandates in the Sunshine State, comparing these draconian policies to slavery. His bold statements had medical tyrants across the country out of control, with the Chairman of the Florida chapter of the AAP claiming that Dr. Ladapo will be putting school children and staff at risk of certain death. Team TFVC was fielding calls from supporters and journalists the rest of the week, wanting to know our thoughts on this proposed policy change in FL. Our thoughts? With the exception of healthcare facilities, the vast majority of Texans and all public school and higher education students have a right to exempt themselves from any vaccine for any reason at any time; in essence, there are no true government mandates in our state. And we will continue to work to end any remaining requirements, particularly the policies impacting those who work in hospital and clinic settings. In fact, we recently announced the rule change adopted by the Department of State Health Services which reiterates current Texas law - college students enrolled in human and animal health care courses must be able to submit exemptions and the exemption is finally available for on our website and the DSHS site. Finally, documents obtained via Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) requests revealed that federal public health bureaucrats knew all along that COVID vaccine breakthrough cases were very real and a threat to the public. Despite this knowledge, former CDC Director Rochelle Walensky in 2021 to assure Americans that such cases did not exist, which compounded the issue while allowing the federal government to argue in court that its mandates were necessary for the greater good. These bombshells continue to affirm what many of us have known for years, even before COVID was a household phrase - the vaccine industry and the government entities tasked with regulating public health have been inextricably tied together for far too long , with the proverbial fox guarding the hen house. Thanks in part to courageous leaders like RFJK and Dr. Ladapo, the manipulation of the American public is beginning to unwind and the health of our children is becoming a priority. TFVC is grateful for the work being done at the highest levels of government, but our focus will continue to be protecting and advancing informed consent, medical privacy and vaccine choice in Texas. We have come so far, but we still have a long way to go and we need you at every step! | Print-at-Home Exemptions! | | | In case you missed it... After a ten year battle, print-from-home exemptions for enrollment in licensed daycares, public/charter schools and college are now available! The Department of State Health Services has released a blank, printable vaccine exemption affidavit that students and parents can print at their convenience. The updated form also makes clear: all college students - including those in healthcare and veterinary programs \- may use this form. No wait, no taxpayer waste, no limits, and no state tracking. Celebrate this TFVC milestone and win for parental rights! | | | | We've also been fielding numerous press inquiries about this new law! **To:** Texas Democrats
**From:** A grateful Democrat
**Subject:** THANK YOU! Dear Texas Democrats,

**THANK YOU for standing strong and fighting back against Trump’s plot to RIG the 2026 elections in his favor!**

Your brave decision to jeopardize the GOP’s redistricting process was an incredible act for our democracy.

**I know Trump and Texas Republicans want to EXPEL and even ARREST you for daring to speak out against their cheating.**

Right now, it’s crucial that ALL of us Democrats stand together, especially now that the new maps have passed. I want you to know I have your back and am on the right side of history!

[**So I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to thank you for your resilience, help Democrats FLIP the House, and stop Trump from attacking our democracy EVER AGAIN! >>**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93778?t=9&akid=21120%2E878179%2Ei5o9x1) | [**DONATE $3 TO SIGN THE LETTER »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93778?t=10&akid=21120%2E878179%2Ei5o9x1)

**_X A grateful Democrat_**

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: My situation is in your hands

body:
I’m writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea.

| | | [](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2znmspmbq7q48dn87ml0474e45mledg5dvav8m8t8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c5j6aob2cjh2bs)
---
My situation is in your hands, Friend. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. _Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so _please_ read this message to the end._ My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. **But right now I have a few _SERIOUS_ challenges:**
---
**I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session.** But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has been fundraising **_BIG TIME_** while I've been working hard in our capital. **Seriously,_a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response!_**
---
Now Spanberger has an _ENORMOUS_ fundraising advantage, Friend. Polls show this race is virtually tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage. _If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission _will_ be cut short._ **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; _please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!_**
---
[ **DONATE TO SUPPORT WINSOME >>** ](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z3a7hmthemqoa5laer1k0b4nsqd6ksqvusrpn3no_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c5j6aob2cjh2bs)
---
Without your support, we will fall even _further_ behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism! I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think it was worth it. And Friend, I **know** we will win if we hold strong and fight this battle together. __[_**I 'm not asking you to cut a big check, all I'm asking is that you send in a few dollars to help support me and my team in this crucial battle!**_](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z66drghepcnieba4ius3rbr53l0udoh2h06jgfe8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c5j6aob2cjh2bs "I’m not asking you to cut a big check, all I’m asking is that you send in a few dollars to help support me and my team in this crucial battle!")

---
| | **Welcome to the 2025 School Year! We're Excited to Start the Fall Season With You and Your Family.**
---
| |
* With the new school year comes allergens and weather changes to watch out for.

* Juggling work, life, and your childrens’ after-school activities requires setting boundaries for a a quality of life balance. Mental and social health is key in this journey.

* Forever Free Wellness offers guidance on how to reclaim your health and liberty. We focus on the well-being of your body, soul, and spirit.

* In addition to Dr. Cordie and Tania Williams, additional health and wellness experts, includuding Rudy Innocent (LMSW), Ron Sinagra and Chris Lippe, will share their knowledge.

* Look out for our ongoing monthly tips and hacks. Together, we can make positive changes for a healthier life.

* Click on the image below to watch a clip where I introduce what you can look forward to from the Forever Free Newsletter!

name: Wes Moore
subject: I’m running.
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=585%2E1086043%2Ent2J_m)
Peter, it’s Governor Wes Moore.
When we first launched our campaign four years ago, I had never run for political office. I was an Army Captain, the son of a single mom, and I ran one of the largest poverty-fighting organizations in the country.
So I traveled the state, listening to your stories and sharing mine. I heard the same thing again and again: That the career politicians had been telling us everything was great, when we knew it wasn’t.
Ever since I took office, I’ve been on a mission to change that. To lower taxes for middle class families. To make health care and prescription drugs cheaper. To make our communities safer.
But our mission is far from over.
**Today, I’m proud to announce that I’m running for another term as Governor of Maryland. Because our work isn’t done yet.**
**[Will you chip in $5 or more now to help power our movement and build a Maryland where we leave no one behind?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250909-1?refcode=em-20250909-1&refcode2=585_1086043_nt2J_m&akid=585%2E1086043%2Ent2J_m)**
While we’ve made a lot of progress over the last three years, our fight is even more important now because of who is in the White House.
The President of the United States is bending over backwards for billionaires and big corporations. He’s firing federal civil servants, gutting Medicaid, and raising prices on everything from electricity to groceries for families. His reckless attacks are hitting Maryland hard.
It's time for us to come together across counties and party lines to prove that even in the face of dysfunction in D.C.: We can show there’s a better way forward in Maryland.
**[We already have Republican opponents in this race. Will you be one of the first donors to this 2026 campaign by giving $5 today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250909-1?refcode=em-20250909-1&refcode2=585_1086043_nt2J_m&akid=585%2E1086043%2Ent2J_m)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250909-1?amount=5&refcode=em-20250909-1&refcode2=585_1086043_nt2J_m&akid=585%2E1086043%2Ent2J_m)**
Peter, join us. Let’s build a state where we leave no one behind.
Elevate,
Wes
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250909-1?refcode=em-20250909-1&refcode2=585_1086043_nt2J_m&akid=585%2E1086043%2Ent2J_m)

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20250909-1&t=2&refcode2=585_1086043_nt2J_m&akid=585%2E1086043%2Ent2J_m)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=585%2E1086043%2Ent2J_m)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=585%2E1086043%2Ent2J_m)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

subject: Virginians Agree: AXE the TAX!
body:
Hamilton for Delegate!
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in browser](https://hamiltonforvirginia.com/so/40Pag8YrK/c?w=Py5TC50kOhRPatPB3OIckCCpz4C-EE8mSy8nK7gIzRM.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9oYW1pbHRvbmZvcnZpcmdpbmlhLmNvbS9zby80MFBhZzhZcks_bGFuZ3VhZ2VUYWc9ZW4iLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI0NDI4ODkzMy1lNGNjLTRmMTItOGYzZS02ZjQ1ZjM3NjIxZjQifQ)_**

| | |
---
| | [](https://hamiltonforvirginia.com/so/40Pag8YrK/c?w=sZpqt3qxpvzA6Rzlyr69XWGYA1ysSFsvdtIksoTnoYE.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGFtaWx0b25mb3J2aXJnaW5pYS5jb20vbWVldC1rYXJlbiIsInIiOiIxNzQ4ZjYwOC04ZmFmLTQ2YTMtYjQ4MC03MjFkOTI2NzVkZDQiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI0NDI4ODkzMy1lNGNjLTRmMTItOGYzZS02ZjQ1ZjM3NjIxZjQifQ)
---
| | | |
---
| | VIRGINIA IS FOR PATRIOTS!
---
| |
---
| | | |
---
| | Virginians Agree:AXE the CAR TAX!
---
| | | |
---
| | Every year, families in Orange, Madison, Greene, Culpeper, and every other county in Virginia are hit with one of the most frustrating bills in Virginia—the car tax. It doesn’t matter that you’ve already paid the sales tax at the dealership, own it outright, or if your car is getting older. The government continues to punish you, year after year, for simply owning a car. Republicans attempted to bring relief earlier this year, but Democrats blocked it. Senator Mamie Locke (D-Hampton, pictured third from the left), criticized the proposal asking, “How does this help the person who does not own a car, first and foremost, and what does this do for those who have to rely on public transit?” By that logic, if you can't help everyone, you shouldn't help anyone. Despite having a $1.1 billion surplus set aside to prefund the measure for the first 3 years, and with a reported 50-60% of Americans living paycheck to paycheck, Democrats refused to offer relief, and Virginians remain compelled to pay hundreds or sometimes thousands of dollars every year just to keep a car in the driveway.Our elected representatives can and MUST do better.
---
| | [](https://hamiltonforvirginia.com/so/40Pag8YrK/c?w=tz-sUaI_kCNo0tgZebE5Ea1GmzejnCyKt-tDE6y6Opo.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly92aXJnaW5pYW1lcmN1cnkuY29tLzIwMjUvMDEvMjkvY2FyLXRheC1jcmVkaXQtaGl0cy1kZWFkLWVuZC1iZWZvcmUtc2VuYXRlLXBhbmVsLyIsInIiOiI2MmRkOWY2OC05MTU4LTRkZTItOGY2MC03YWMyMjNmMjg0MjUiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI0NDI4ODkzMy1lNGNjLTRmMTItOGYzZS02ZjQ1ZjM3NjIxZjQifQ)
---
| | Here are the facts you need to know about the Personal Property Tax (Car Tax):
* The “car tax” is the local personal property tax on vehicles. Instead of basing the tax on what you paid for a car, the government determines it based on your car's assessed value, which could be far more than you could even sell it for.
* During the pandemic, the price of used cars skyrocketed, which meant car tax bills also skyrocketed, even for families driving the same car they had the year before. So, the value of your car remained the same or even depreciated, but your tax went up.
* The state once promised Virginians real relief. In the late 1990s, legislation was passed to phase out the car tax. But in 2006, the General Assembly froze that relief at $950 million per year statewide. With inflation and rising car values, that fixed cap means the share of your bill the state covers gets smaller every single year.

---
| |
---
| | So, what does this look like here in HD-62? Madison County: Even after lowering the rate from $3.60 to $3.00 per $100 of value, Madison still projected $6.6 million in revenue from personal property taxes in FY23. That’s a huge chunk of the county’s budget coming straight from vehicle owners. Culpeper County: In FY25, Culpeper is expecting an extra $2 million in personal property tax revenue compared to last year, despite dropping the rate from $3.50 to $3.00. The tax base has grown so much that families are paying more overall, even with a lower rate. Orange County: Supervisors voted to cut the rate from 3.75% to 3.50% in 2022 to soften the blow from soaring vehicle values. But Orange County still leans heavily on this tax as a dependable revenue stream, meaning car owners keep shouldering the burden. Greene County: Right now, Greene has the highest rate in our region—$4.00 per $100 of assessed value. That means a family with a $20,000 vehicle is on the hook for $800 a year, just to own a car. Any talk of cutting property or personal property taxes, though, is understandably touchy with local governments. While it's true that localities must have funding to provide the necessary and often times Constitutionally obligated services to the public, that doesn't mean that the current method of funding is the best or most ethical path. Our Founding Fathers would be appalled at the current abuse that taxpayers are enduring, and it's incumbent upon the state to formulate a better solution that both serves our constituents, and satisfies the Constitution.
---
| |
---
| | There is a better path forward: I personally favor drastic changes to our tax code. Under conservative leadership, Florida continues to shift from reliance on property and personal property taxes to funding through consumption/sales tax to provide the necessary public services such as education, law enforcement, resource management, etc. In my view, this is a better and more ethically defensible way to fund the state. With Governor DeSantis pushing to eliminate property tax in Florida, some have argued that property tax is actually unconstitutional. Opinions vary on that, based on interpretations of the 5th and 10th amendments, but at the very least, property taxes are certainly un-American. The question is... Do you really own your car or house if the government can take it away from you for failing to pay annual taxes in order to keep it? The answer is NO, and most red-blooded patriots, me included, find this reality difficult to swallow! While a drastic change in the tax code is not currently being discussed, let's go through some potential solutions that Republicans have put forward to eliminate the universally hated personal property tax: We could eliminate the car tax on some personal-use vehicles by expanding the state’s existing reimbursement system (PPTRA) to any cars valued under $20,000 - $30,000. Instead of families writing a check every year, the state would step in and cover the bill for those who need it most. The General Assembly would hold local governments harmless by guaranteeing them the exact revenue they collect today. Counties wouldn't lose any funding for schools, deputies, or essential services. The only difference is that the money would come from Richmond rather than your household. Additionally, we must scale back the nearly $1 billion-a-year corporate tax break for data centers, which right now exempts them from sales tax on equipment purchases. Data Centers, which significantly increase our energy demands, were constructed over rural green spaces with the promise that they would become a major tax revenue base. We have yet to see that realized, and it’s past time we charge them what they owe. We could also modestly increase the state’s share of K–12 funding (Virginia already backfilled schools when it eliminated the grocery tax), which would free up local dollars so that counties aren't reliant on vehicle taxes. Finally, there is the possibility of sunsetting or capping low-performing tax credits and incentive programs that JLARC has already flagged as offering little return on investment. At a minimum, we could bring more fairness and transparency to the tax code by allowing localities to apply flat rate municipal service charges for residents, rather than selectively punishing those who own vehicles while everyone benefits from the services those taxes provide, which are almost entirely unrelated to vehicles.
---
| |
---
| | Here's the bottom line: While true conservatives are always looking for ways to cut taxes, Democrats are thinking up new ways to spend your money! Year after year they push to spend more, and therefore they resist any efforts to provide tax relief. This is why it is IMPERATIVE that we win BIG in November, FLIP the House of Delegates, retain the Governor' seat, and begin to go on the OFFENSE with our fiscally responsible agenda. Ending the car tax is a non-partisan and winning message that would deliver direct relief to Republicans and Democrats alike. It would give families breathing room, keep local governments whole, and we can do it all without raising a dime in new taxes on Virginia residents.
---
| | | |
---
| | This is a task worth taking on, and with your support, we can finally make good on the promise to end the car tax once and for all. Please stand with me! Early voting starts in just 11 days, and I need all the support I can get to ensure we make it over the finish line. The best way you could help my campaign outside of knocking on doors would be chipping in $10, $20, or even $50 if you’re able. With your support, we can get our message out far and wide!
---

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: My situation is in your hands
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
I’m writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea.

| | | [](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z1ef7sm887nh3tg218lj3dprn218m8g3m5c7rnug_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c5j66pj2cph2bs)
---
My situation is in your hands, Friend. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. _Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so _please_ read this message to the end._ My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. **But right now I have a few _SERIOUS_ challenges:**
---
**I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session.** But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has been fundraising **_BIG TIME_** while I've been working hard in our capital. **Seriously,_a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response!_**
---
Now Spanberger has an _ENORMOUS_ fundraising advantage, Friend. Polls show this race is virtually tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage. _If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission _will_ be cut short._ **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; _please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!_**

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/32d87789-57f1-4e4f-91a4-e09ceac41bf9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
It was only a matter of time before the far-left groups in Chicago started to seriously organize in response to the potential deployment of National Guardsmen. With each passing day, activists are figuring out what has worked in Los Angeles and how it can be applied to the Windy City.
The protests naturally started on Labor Day. The topic, while relating to the labor movement, was mainly about preparing for when the National Guard and extra federal immigration agents will be in the city. Mayor Brandon Johnson (D) encouraged people to resist.
"Are you prepared to defend this land? This land that [was] built by slaves. The land that was built by indigenous people. The land that was built by workers. Are you prepared to defend this land?" Johnson asked the cheering crowd. "I need you all to stand firm, to stand strong, if this president decides to continue to break this Constitution."
He then led a "No troops in Chicago!" chant.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/d32f6672-2128-427d-83c2-b7701f2ea8e2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Johnson would go on to shift blame on the horrific violence the city saw during the holiday weekend on Republican-run states.
"Chicago will continue to have a 'violence problem' as long as Red states continue to have a gun problem," Johnson said on X. "The endless flow of illegal guns into Chicago can be traced to Red states like Mississippi, Indiana, and Louisiana. It is up to the federal government to step up and stop interstate gun trafficking networks."
**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**
* * *
**[Together with Ifrah Law](https://substack.com/redirect/7c1ba5e1-dcb2-4141-b03f-295f5d3b5680?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
## Ifrah Law heightens the success of iGaming clients through every phase of their business cycle
Led by a managing partner who has been **[at the center of every significant court case affecting online gaming,](https://substack.com/redirect/7c1ba5e1-dcb2-4141-b03f-295f5d3b5680?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Ifrah Law operates at the cutting edge of technology, innovation, and regulation.
Its lawyers represent industry players throughout the entire business cycle, from the formation of a corporation or licensing relationship, through marketing, partnering, growth, and disputes, to profitable exits.
We're proud to share that all partners at Ifrah Law have been ranked by Chambers and Partners, the gold standard for evaluating legal excellence worldwide.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7c1ba5e1-dcb2-4141-b03f-295f5d3b5680?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/7c1ba5e1-dcb2-4141-b03f-295f5d3b5680?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**(Piece continues)**
While Monday's protest and march was peaceful, which also avoided going through the crime-ridden parts of Chicago, the tactics from the far-left are starting to escalate.
On Friday, anti-ICE protesters blocked the driveway leading into the Immigration and Customs Enforcement complex in Broadview, which is about 20 minutes from the heart of downtown.
The protesters claimed victory because, **[according to one prominent activist](https://substack.com/redirect/39d7cff9-a67f-47bc-9491-ae1fed734c27?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** at the scene, the ICE agents drove off and local police "refused" to arrest the protesters blocking the driveway. Due to their "success," the protesters stayed longer than planned, "now that we know that works...What's going to stop us?"
More protests are planned over the weekend, both in downtown and at Naval Station Great Lakes. The Navy base is north of the city and will be used by federal agents in their mission to arrest even more illegal aliens.
Only time will tell what the National Guard deployment will actually look like. Chicago Alderman Raymond Lopez (D), a staunch Johnson critic, suggested the National Guard protect the tourist areas of the city, like the Loop, so Chicago police "don't have to babysit the Bean or Buckingham Fountain for eight hours a day. Our officers can return to their districts [and] answer the thousands of 911 calls logged but never answered."
As if to prove again that the once safe areas are not so safe, there was a brazen smash and grab in the Gold Coast district on Friday. While the robbers were eventually caught after they fled to the south side, having the extra manpower will have a chilling effect on criminals similar to what has transpired in Washington, D.C.
The timing of the deployment is also interesting considering September 16th is Mexican Independence Day. Typically that day has brought out rowdy crowds in cities like Chicago and Los Angeles. With everything that will be going on with the immigration crackdown, it can be sure those days will bring even more people out into the streets to cause problems.
And the extra personnel aren't just random federal agents. The task force is being led by Chief Patrol Agent Gregory Bovino. His Border Patrol agents have been leading the charge in Los Angeles. They were behind the operation that used a rental box truck to get the drop on illegal aliens in a Home Depot parking lot. While the far-left in Chicago are preparing for their arrival, it is safe to say the Border Patrol agents under Bovino are ready following their missions in Los Angeles.

We're proud to share that all partners at Ifrah Law have been ranked by Chambers and Partners, the gold standard for evaluating legal excellence worldwide. | | ---|---|--- (Piece continues) While Monday's protest and march was peaceful, which also avoided going through the crime-ridden parts of Chicago, the tactics from the far-left are starting to escalate. On Friday, anti-ICE protesters blocked the driveway leading into the Immigration and Customs Enforcement complex in Broadview, which is about 20 minutes from the heart of downtown. The protesters claimed victory because, at the scene, the ICE agents drove off and local police "refused" to arrest the protesters blocking the driveway. Due to their "success," the protesters stayed longer than planned, "now that we know that works...What's going to stop us?" More protests are planned over the weekend, both in downtown and at Naval Station Great Lakes. The Navy base is north of the city and will be used by federal agents in their mission to arrest even more illegal aliens. Only time will tell what the National Guard deployment will actually look like. Chicago Alderman Raymond Lopez (D), a staunch Johnson critic, suggested the National Guard protect the tourist areas of the city, like the Loop, so Chicago police "don't have to babysit the Bean or Buckingham Fountain for eight hours a day. Our officers can return to their districts [and] answer the thousands of 911 calls logged but never answered." As if to prove again that the once safe areas are not so safe, there was a brazen smash and grab in the Gold Coast district on Friday. While the robbers were eventually caught after they fled to the south side, having the extra manpower will have a chilling effect on criminals similar to what has transpired in Washington, D.C. The timing of the deployment is also interesting considering September 16th is Mexican Independence Day. Typically that day has brought out rowdy crowds in cities like Chicago and Los Angeles. With everything that will be going on with the immigration crackdown, it can be sure those days will bring even more people out into the streets to cause problems. And the extra personnel aren't just random federal agents. The task force is being led by Chief Patrol Agent Gregory Bovino. His Border Patrol agents have been leading the charge in Los Angeles. They were behind the operation that used a rental box truck to get the drop on illegal aliens in a Home Depot parking lot. While the far-left in Chicago are preparing for their arrival, it is safe to say the Border Patrol agents under Bovino are ready following their missions in Los Angeles. | | POLL Should Trump push forward with plans to send troops to Chicago? | ? ? ? | A guest post by| Reporter at MostlyPeaceful.media. Subscribe to my newsletter for original content as I travel the United States and beyond. You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Politibrawl 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

body:
Lawmakers advance a map with national implications
| | | | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01K4Q8A2RCKK7W8Q1ZF6JPHSHP_0)
---
| | | | Hey Peter, Missouri is poised to approve new US House lines that could erase a Democratic held seat. The proposal follows a rapid timeline and mirrors moves in other states as both parties revisit maps ahead of the midterms. Residents testified that the plan splits Kansas City and pairs urban and rural areas with little in common. Lawmakers say the map reflects statewide priorities. What should we watch before the final vote and after? [**Read the full story** ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01K4Q8A2RCKK7W8Q1ZF6JPHSHP_1) More soon, Andy

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: My recovery after the car crash
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.

Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1p3vpaejqllkdf6tlhjlvltgbt9026tqt83e2a0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c5j6eoj2clh2bs)
---
Friend,
---
So many kind souls like you have asked how I’m doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery.
---
I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed.
---
Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together.**
---
But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive **__ANYTHING!__**
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zm378hcm7i12p8av9bsk48mvgi7bdkussu93u1gg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c5j6eoj2clh2bs)
__
---
One thing especially helped take the pain away...
---
...**President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom – _the highest civilian honor in America._**
---
**President Trump knows I’m in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to _federal_ cases, which means he _legally_ _cannot_ save me from the bogus _state-level_ charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS.**
---
**Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
**And now, this car crash has set me back even more...**
---
And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my _FREEDOM_ and my _JUSTICE_.
---
__Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END!__
---
[**So, if you can, please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrr8mvp5l4fdms59t2eo0cusosleg75smojr3fc0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c5j6eoj2clh2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $25](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbien1117c2mrintk6rgisv5hon5bjr9s8937sp8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c5j6eoj2clh2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za3r74ggjrkc8rvo9c3soromctlcf1lj3bll4rk8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c5j6eoj2clh2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqc4dg6akommpecs1617gl8npcepnjtitmp4npd0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c5j6eoj2clh2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $250](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfmpaml3fe91kbiau8a8trs00d0f2819gjt1h5vg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c5j6eoj2clh2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $500](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6bcqbfbvgpkdclav2o668lab2ov2arr6dvnkht8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c5j6eoj2clh2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znir2tmd2cif6t0fa6s720l34b5jj89qt54duajo_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c5j6eoj2clh2bs)
---

Thank you and God bless you,
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsi6kvvs04tsmhhmrpmebb9r3spiladhkmidnapo_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c5j6eoj2clh2bs)

Hey Patriot, it's Scott. I'll keep this quick.
The voter registration deadline in New Jersey is on October 14th, that is less than 6 weeks away.
My team is on the ground and we’re making some big voter registration gains in New Jersey and Pennsylvania before the elections in November. **_[I’m reaching out to you because we need sponsors to help fund our efforts on the ground](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e10423316/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9lYXJseS12b3RlL2V2YV9kb25fb21fZXJfc3AtbmpkX3JzXzIwMjUwOTA4Lw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDk/LbmNsWE1BU3JONA/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjE0NDJfd3Ix/gaMAqzw/s2n34782f96)_.**
With all of the amazing things President Trump is doing in the White House, Republicans are getting complacent and I’m worried if we don’t turn things around we’re going to lose these elections. I’m doing everything I can to wake people up, and I would be really grateful if you’d sponsor one of my voter registration staff for just an hour or two.
**_[You can confirm your sponsorship here](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e10423316/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9lYXJseS12b3RlL2V2YV9kb25fb21fZXJfc3AtbmpkX3JzXzIwMjUwOTA4Lw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDk/LbmNsWE1BU3JONA/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjE0NDJfd3Ix/gaMAqzw/s2n34782f96)_.**

_Thanks,_

**Scott Presler**

name: =?utf-8?B?4oCoQWxsaWUgUGhpbGxpcHM=?=
subject: Aftyn Behn has always fought for our rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Her Bold Move Action
body:
I know firsthand what happens when men in power pass laws that strip women of control over our own health. | | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114889116/568492631/-1821248200?refcode=EM_F_250909Allie_N_AP_90DO_9_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc3NGNmZTEyLTgxOGQtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kjkwQcy7o8eO3LlyFbOcp15-BEAOogJ26OqfFJsdytg=)
---
Hi Peter,

Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg once said, “Women belong in all places where decisions are being made.” At Her Bold Move, we exist to make that happen—especially in states where majority-male legislatures are writing laws about women’s bodies.

Since its founding in 2020, Her Bold Move has supported hundreds of women across the country, including me. **Today, I am proud to say that they are joining me in standing with Aftyn Behn in Tennessee’s 7th Congressional District Special Election.**

[**Before I share more, Aftyn is in a primary that is coming up fast on October 7th. Will you chip in a split contribution of $20.25 or more today and join me in supporting Her Bold Move and Aftyn Behn for Congress?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-aftyn/?refcode=EM_F_250909Allie_N_AP_90DO_9_G_N_L1&amount=20.25)

I know firsthand what happens when men in power pass laws that strip women of control over our own health. When my pregnancy developed fatal complications, Tennessee’s abortion ban forced me to carry until my life was in danger. Speaking out became my only option. I told my story in front of the state Capitol, in Congress, and to anyone who would listen — because silence never protected anyone.

**And every step of the way, Aftyn Behn was there.** Long before she ran for office herself, Aftyn was organizing alongside women like me, pushing back on Tennessee’s abortion ban, and amplifying the voices of those harmed by it. In the state legislature, she didn’t just vote the right way — she fought publicly and unapologetically against Republican attempts to criminalize healthcare, control our bodies, and punish families in crisis. When others looked away, she leaned in. **When they tried to silence us, she gave us a microphone.**
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114889117/568492632/-1821248200?refcode=EM_F_250909Allie_N_AP_90DO_9_G_N_P2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc3NGNmZTEyLTgxOGQtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kjkwQcy7o8eO3LlyFbOcp15-BEAOogJ26OqfFJsdytg=)
---
_Pictured: Rep. Aftyn Behn, D-Nashville, stands at her desk during a legislative session Tuesday, April 23, 2024, when the Underage Abortion Trafficking Act, a law criminalizing adults who "intentionally recruit, harbor, or transport" an unemancipated minor to get an abortion without notarized parental consent, passed in the majority-male TN legislature 74-24. Behn filed suit against the law._
---
That’s why I believe so deeply in Aftyn’s campaign for Congress. She has proven, time and again, that she will never back down when it comes to protecting our fundamental rights. She knows these fights aren’t abstract policy debates — they are life-and-death struggles for women, mothers, and families across Tennessee.

This race is about more than politics. It is about whether women’s lives and freedoms will continue to be treated as negotiable. Tennessee took my choice away when I needed it most, but I chose to fight back. And today,**I am choosing to fight alongside Aftyn Behn, because she has been in this fight from the very beginning.**

[**Aftyn’s campaign really needs to raise $30,000 in the next 10 days. Will you join me in helping her hit that goal by pitching in a split $20.25 or more contribution between Her Bold Move and Aftyn’s campaign today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-aftyn/?refcode=EM_F_250909Allie_N_AP_90DO_9_G_N_L2&amount=20.25)

clean_body: I know firsthand what happens when men in power pass laws that strip women of control over our own health. | | | | | = Hi Peter, Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg once said, “Women belong in all places where decisions are being made.” At Her Bold Move, we exist to make that happen—especially in states where majority-male legislatures are writing laws about women’s bodies. Since its founding in 2020, Her Bold Move has supported hundreds of women across the country, including me. Today, I am proud to say that they are joining me in standing with Aftyn Behn in Tennessee’s 7th Congressional District Special Election. I know firsthand what happens when men in power pass laws that strip women of control over our own health. When my pregnancy developed fatal complications, Tennessee’s abortion ban forced me to carry until my life was in danger. Speaking out became my only option. I told my story in front of the state Capitol, in Congress, and to anyone who would listen — because silence never protected anyone. And every step of the way, Aftyn Behn was there. Long before she ran for office herself, Aftyn was organizing alongside women like me, pushing back on Tennessee’s abortion ban, and amplifying the voices of those harmed by it. In the state legislature, she didn’t just vote the right way — she fought publicly and unapologetically against Republican attempts to criminalize healthcare, control our bodies, and punish families in crisis. When others looked away, she leaned in. When they tried to silence us, she gave us a microphone. = Pictured: Rep. Aftyn Behn, D-Nashville, stands at her desk during a legislative session Tuesday, April 23, 2024, when the Underage Abortion Trafficking Act, a law criminalizing adults who "intentionally recruit, harbor, or transport" an unemancipated minor to get an abortion without notarized parental consent, passed in the majority-male TN legislature 74-24. Behn filed suit against the law. That’s why I believe so deeply in Aftyn’s campaign for Congress. She has proven, time and again, that she will never back down when it comes to protecting our fundamental rights. She knows these fights aren’t abstract policy debates — they are life-and-death struggles for women, mothers, and families across Tennessee. This race is about more than politics. It is about whether women’s lives and freedoms will continue to be treated as negotiable. Tennessee took my choice away when I needed it most, but I chose to fight back. And today,I am choosing to fight alongside Aftyn Behn, because she has been in this fight from the very beginning. I will keep telling the truth, and I will keep backing women who fight for us. Aftyn is that woman. She belongs in the room where decisions are being made — because those decisions are about our lives, our health, and our futures. With love, Allie Phillips | | Her Bold Move is the fastest-growing support network for women running for political office in America. body:

Friend,

For the American left, if you burn down whole city blocks and riot, you'll probably get a financial settlement.

If you invade the country, NGOs will pay your legal bills as you enjoy free housing and debit cards filled with taxpayer cash.

If you wave the Mexican flag while assaulting law enforcement, the news will call it a _"potent sign of protest."_

If you burn the American flag, they'll call it free speech.

But if you dare tear down a Pride flag, you face years in prison.

This demonstrates the lunacy of the radical left.

It’s also what’s at stake if we rest on our laurels instead of taking action to win in 2026, 2028, and beyond...

**Turning Point PAC has a plan to hold the line!**

We have identified 3 battleground states where we can have the most impact: Arizona, Nevada, and New Hampshire.

By establishing field offices and ramping up field operations in those states, [you and I can build a RED WALL](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zkncjj7vgbb3io4nehqonga5etscfbtantb3eqs0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c5j69o34cjh2bs) to protect our America First victories.

name: Chris Pappas
subject: BREAKING: Marriage rights are under threat
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| This isn’t hypothetical. It’s real – and it’s personal.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8967%2E5257348%2EAVPmPs)
Derek, it’s Chris Pappas.
A decade ago when the Supreme Court finally recognized marriage equality as the law of the land, it affirmed the dignity of countless LGBTQ+ families across America.
_Now that very ruling is under threat._
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=abs-em-pappas25.90nCIT&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250909_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=8967%2E5257348%2EAVPmPs)
If the Court overturns marriage equality, loving couples could lose protections overnight. Families would be torn apart. Lives uprooted.
This isn’t hypothetical. It’s real — and it’s personal to me, my husband Vann, and so many Granite Staters.
**Elections have consequences.** The Senators we elect have a say in who sits on the Court, and those justices will shape our freedoms for generations to come.
Trump has stacked the Court with hardline conservatives — and right now extremists are determined to erase hard-won rights for LGBTQ+ families.
I can’t promise this fight will be easy or that the road ahead won’t be hard.
**But I can promise you this: I will never stop working to protect the rights and freedoms of every Granite Stater.**
[**Split $10 between my campaign and Adam Schiff to win this Senate race and keep fighting for our rights.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=abs-em-pappas25.OTe81O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250909_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=8967%2E5257348%2EAVPmPs)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Adam Schiff and Chris Pappas will go through immediately:_

clean_body: | This isn’t hypothetical. It’s real – and it’s personal. Derek, it’s Chris Pappas. A decade ago when the Supreme Court finally recognized marriage equality as the law of the land, it affirmed the dignity of countless LGBTQ+ families across America. Now that very ruling is under threat. If the Court overturns marriage equality, loving couples could lose protections overnight. Families would be torn apart. Lives uprooted. This isn’t hypothetical. It’s real — and it’s personal to me, my husband Vann, and so many Granite Staters. Elections have consequences. The Senators we elect have a say in who sits on the Court, and those justices will shape our freedoms for generations to come. Trump has stacked the Court with hardline conservatives — and right now extremists are determined to erase hard-won rights for LGBTQ+ families. I can’t promise this fight will be easy or that the road ahead won’t be hard. But I can promise you this: I will never stop working to protect the rights and freedoms of every Granite Stater. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Adam Schiff and Chris Pappas will go through immediately: | | | With pride and determination, Chris Pappas | | 135 E. Peter, we have only eight weeks left until Election Day.
_And I'm determined to make every moment count._
I know most messages we send are packed with details about how competitive this race is — and it's true. The whole country really is looking to us to lead the way.
_But right now, I'm just thinking about all of you, about the remarkable community we've created in this campaign._

name: Trump threatens War on Chicago...(Fight For Reform)
subject: Donald Trump is officially a Dictator >>>

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23377%2E4449941%2E67-vfe) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23377%2E4449941%2E67-vfe) [ **BREAKING FROM _DEMOCRACY DOCKET:_
["Trump Threatens 'WAR' on Chicago"**]() [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68466?t=4&akid=23377%2E4449941%2E67-vfe) In response to this news, we’re launching a poll to see where Democrats in your area stand.[ **So we need to know, Friend: Do you think Donald Trump is a dictator?**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68466?t=5&akid=23377%2E4449941%2E67-vfe) | [BEGIN MY POLL NOW →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68466?t=6&akid=23377%2E4449941%2E67-vfe)
---
* * *
Listen up — this is TERRIFYING:

After conducting sweeping immigration raids across the United States, Donald Trump just threatened **WAR** on Chicago.

This isn't the first time Trump has acted like a dictator. Just take a look at what he's done in the past few months...

**First:** Donald Trump called the National Guard on peaceful protestors in Los Angeles.
**Then:** His administration deployed thousands of National Guard troops to Washington, D.C. and declared a takeover of our Nation's Capital.
**Now:[_Trump is threatening 'WAR' on Chicago!](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68466?t=7&akid=23377%2E4449941%2E67-vfe)_**

This is absolutely sickening, friend!!

Donald Trump has been acting like a dictator from the MOMENT he took office, and he NEEDS to be held accountable.

So we’re launching an emergency poll to gather our own data to see where Top Democrats across the country stand.

[**But our records show [NO] data from Democrats in your area...so we need to know:** [**Do you think Donald Trump is a Dictator?**
](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68466?t=9&akid=23377%2E4449941%2E67-vfe) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68466?t=10&akid=23377%2E4449941%2E67-vfe)

name: Warren Howell Campaign
subject: Warren Howell - Republican For Harris County Judge
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Warren A
body:
Warren Howell will DOGE Harris County and restore common sense!

| | | | | [|
---](https://howellforharriscounty.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8c3a643a45a6e2b06d8f050&id=0ac77517bc&e=7c92d84deb)
| | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b39c5fac5d0e/warren-howell-the-only-candidate-with-a-real-plan-for-harris-county-17457497?e=7c92d84deb)
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | |
# _Real_ Leadership. A _Real_ Plan
# _for_ Harris County
---
| [Donate Today!](https://howellforharriscounty.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8c3a643a45a6e2b06d8f050&id=cf998d7aea&e=7c92d84deb)
---
| | Warren knows that Harris County is in _**dire straits**_ with Captain Lina Hidalgo at the helm of a sinking ship. Since 2018 she has slowly increased the size of County government adding departments and expenses well in-excess of any previous administration.
We no longer have any surplus, municipal tax rates are ever-increasing and our basic needs are simply not being met.
And Commissioners Court has become a profane-filled spectacle full-to-the-brim with taxpayer-funded 501-c(3)’s with their hands out looking for their next injection of funds from the taxpayer pipeline.
_**The pipeline is DRY, folks**_!
All of this while taxpayers weave around potholes, brave rising waters and do our darnedest to keep our families safe from crime. Enough is enough! Please get behind Warren’s plan to DOGE Harris County and bring back both efficiency and common-sense to our County government!
_**Harris County’s Department of County Efficiency (DOCE) will be the first of its kind in Texas,**_ rooting out waste, fraud and abuse while prioritizing basic statutory obligations - fighting crime, repairing roads, and preventing floods.
**Warren will once again create a surplus while reducing taxes and tolls — keeping your hard-earned money** _** in your pocket**_**,****where it belongs!****You can’t tax a County into prosperity!**
See the full plan to _MAKE HARRIS COUNTY GREAT AGAIN_ on the campaign website. [👉www.howellforharriscounty.com.](https://howellforharriscounty.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8c3a643a45a6e2b06d8f050&id=3d7e66efc5&e=7c92d84deb)
Join our winning team and help lead Harris County to a brighter future with leadership that **WORKS FOR THE PEOPLE!**
---
| [See Warren’s Full Plan!](https://howellforharriscounty.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8c3a643a45a6e2b06d8f050&id=30a63ead01&e=7c92d84deb)

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: Less than 60 days to SAVE New York
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
And STOP the communist takeover.
| Friend,
---
We now have less than 60 days left until Election Day in New York.
---
**As the state’s Senior elected Republican, I’m fighting with every fiber of my being to stop radical Democrat Zohran Mamdani – _an antisemitic, anti-American communist_ – from gaining power in America’s largest city. **
---
Per _Politico_ :
---
**“New York City Republican voters are going to be hearing from Rep. Elise Stefanik. The potential gubernatorial candidate is the face of a get-out-the-vote effort for Big Apple Republicans... Stefanik and the New York GOP are targeting Republican voters who turned out in the 2024 presidential election, but have _not_ cast ballots in mayoral elections.”**
---
The stakes in the NYC mayoral election have never been this high, Friend.
---
I never thought I’d write these words, but America's largest city is literally on the brink of a communist takeover – one that would have devastating consequences not just for the more than 8,000,000 New York City residents, but for our entire state.
---
_Violent crime will skyrocket thanks to Mamdani’s pro-criminal agenda. Illegals will flock to New York, knowing they’ll get protection and handouts from Mamdani. And I have no doubt spineless Kathy Hochul will eventually cave and raise taxes to help Mamdani fund his Marxist agenda!_
---
And the ripple effects will go far beyond our state’s borders...
---
Barack Obama recently called Zohran Mamdani to congratulate him and help guide him to victory. In fact, the entire Obama Political Machine is getting ready to deploy to New York to help elect Mamdani.
---
Why? **_Because they see Zohran Mamdani as the next Barack Obama._**
---
As I’ve said before, if you’re not from the city, you may be inclined to brush this off as a problem for New York City alone...
---
**_...But knowing what you know now, would you have brushed off a similar warning about a relatively unknown community organizer from Chicago named Barack Obama?_**
---
Make no mistake: This election will either go down in history as the moment that communism officially gained a foothold in America...
---
Or as the moment that the American people came together to vanquish this evil ideology once and for all.
---
**At this pivotal moment for our country, I’m entrusting _YOU_ with a 500% MATCH, Friend.**
---
_I hope you’ll put it to good use._
---
[**With under 60 days left to STOP the communist takeover of New York, please make a 500% impact contribution to help STOP Zohran Mamdani– the next Obama – before it's too late.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=670fa22469a0433893387265edda4840&_e=5IInYypZL923IeQupYyZPhtBiuKrTPyUOJ4rjvEk_Q41TpRSuuLrv0dnvV3Md9Bp1GfR91XT03Aap09O2E6KNBQb3L8b6j0fcQUK6JnaFSRNjTGOJB2KJVE7d2iD5xDv-vDbKqezYtO_N4U4Kbn2ri5dELiXFKF0D4CSJR9umGkx9AFXcvA_DC2zo0ZMO2UE6I2CeVR33-QTxjmbkaC9wvD2olRLkfWwNVCcYTo3bKovYUjMJug5K0aBC-E_LPeDyyM4cgDLZ6wV9jGgXFpImXy9F6LhMQRAHZQUwwTtWjP_U-zOjQwm48D7VLEkakfUomn36JpcXS0kvnswJLjd3A_RmyKeqtTDK96Pfm7aJZsMRfzIu_d3gml1N9Fh_mOn7WK-h0Ixsn4nL-cG4UuNfEHl94voas5CNiYlgc9yu0WCmdWoRC9SIrRM02n83UJSiPD4sA29h78MRJqtpdD7D_LBvPgjf4R5TUetoJMAuY-O6X10MXtI55mx8yTyEIDmqaWXyjIsWqithF12gEDHb2IGUBCuSWpaYaZ9VxD3LtlOvRZBYvIJ_4Ml33bxLkYJ6lDa-Pq-UN2z808VhC7GyGHCC6Zt1lwsDAIxXeoi-N8%3D)

name: Reid Rasner, CEO
subject: Here's what could be quietly reshaping your portfolio
body:
| Hi Peter, What's your first thought when you hear about new tariffs? Are you hopeful or apprehensive? If you're like most Americans, you're bracing for price hikes and disruptions.1 And you're probably somewhat skeptical about the "benefits" and what it all means for you.1
---
|
---
If you don't know much about tariffs, there's no better time than _now_ to see how they work and how they can affect you. That's the focus of this month's Visual Insights Newsletter. [**Click here to see it!**](https://financeinsights.net/DZPeF2aK8sOLeM1Fdm3Y1c27dMB?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) The truth is tariffs have a quiet but powerful way of interfering with markets and portfolios. If you have a clear idea of how it all works, you can stay a step or two ahead and make more informed decisions when it matters most. [**Go ahead and click here to find out how tariffs flow from policy to portfolios.**](https://financeinsights.net/DZPeF2aK8sOLeM1Fdm3Y1c27dMB?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) Sincerely,
---
**Reid Rasner - CEO**
Omnivest Financial
(307) 337-1223
[https://www.omnivestfinancial.com](https://snpy.io?djJ7InVybCI6Imh0dHBzOlwvXC93d3cub21uaXZlc3RmaW5hbmNpYWwuY29tIiwiaGFzaCI6InduNmdpcWcxNUhqMFg2MiIsImNvbnRhY3RfZW1haWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9)
* * *
---
P.S. When was the last time you noticed price hikes on items you buy all the time? How much more did you pay and what, if any, alternatives did you consider? Hit "reply" and share your answers. I'd love to hear about your experiences with rising costs and any workarounds you've considered. Sources
1. Peter, as Election Day comes closer and closer, I want to share with you everything you need to know about my opponent
Peter, as Election Day comes closer and closer, I want to share with you everything you need to know about my opponent, Jack Ciattarelli, and his plans for our state if we let him win this race.
And after reading this email, if you agree that my opponent is the wrong person to be leading New Jersey, I hope you’ll **[split whatever you can between my campaign and Heartland Patriots to help me win this upcoming election.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94432?refcode=em20250909-9376&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9376%2E614464%2ExkuHLU)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94432?refcode=em20250909-9376&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9376%2E614464%2ExkuHLU)**
**On abortion rights:** Jack Ciattarelli supports a statewide abortion ban and wants to defund Planned Parenthood healthcare centers in New Jersey, which would lead to patients losing access to not only abortion care, but also cancer and STI screenings, routine gynecological exams, and more.
**On affordability:** My opponent proudly stood alongside Trump as Washington Republicans cut Medicaid, set Medicare on track for disaster, took away food assistance, and gave billionaires a massive tax break in their price hike bill. Not only did he urge Republican Members of Congress to vote for Trump’s agenda — _he’s promising to implement it at the state level here in New Jersey, too._
**On Trump:** Ciattarelli got Trump’s endorsement in this race after shamelessly begging for it. He praises the disastrous policies Trump is implementing in Washington and promises, and even said this: “When I’m governor, we’re gonna do the same in New Jersey.”
Peter, it’s abundantly clear — **Jack Ciattarelli is out of touch with New Jersey, and we cannot let him become the next governor of our state.**
But with far-right super PACs lining the pockets of his campaign, I’m relying on my grassroots supporters now more than ever to help us out in the final stretch of this campaign.
**[If you’re with me, please split whatever you can between my team and Heartland Patriots to help our campaign fight back against Jack Ciattarelli and his far-right backers and win this election.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94432?refcode=em20250909-9376&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9376%2E614464%2ExkuHLU)**

clean_body: our own records need to be updated too Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this Peter, Why? Because it RIGS the game in their favor. Liberal states roll out the red carpet for illegal immigrants, so counting them in the Census lets them STEAL more House seats and electoral votes. These liberals will do whatever it takes to take back power, crush our movement, and silence your voice. Thankfully, my father is back in the White House -- and he's just taken one of the BOLDEST actions yet of his presidency 🇺🇲 He's ordered a NEW CENSUS, one that ONLY counts American citizens. Senate Republicans need to know that their own census records are up-to-date, and that they're only counting American citizens. It would be a huge help to my father, to me, and to our chances of keeping a MAGA Majority in the Senate. Thank you, Donald Trump Jr. | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Mike Johnson
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yes on 50, The Election Rigging Response Act, Governor Newsom’s Ballot Measure Committee
body:
Mike Johnson just donated $5 million to the campaign trying to stop the Election Rigging Response Act.

**Mike Johnson just donated $5 million to the campaign trying to stop the Election Rigging Response Act.**
He knows what Donald Trump knows: that he will lose his speakership and control of the House if Republicans are unable to rig the next election before any votes are cast.
He is fine with Texas redistricting. He is fine with Missouri. He is fine with Indiana. But he will donate millions to stop California.
Hypocrite!
This is about one thing for people like Mike Johnson and Donald Trump: Power.
The Election Rigging Response Act vote happening in a few weeks is essentially five competitive House races in one election. That's why Republicans are spending so much to beat us.
And it's why I need you to help match them. Please. Be a part of the team stopping Mike Johnson, Donald Trump and helping Democrats take back the House.
[**With that in mind, can you please contribute $3 to help my ballot measure committee running the campaign to pass the Election Rigging Response Act in California? We need a huge number of donations to catch up to the money Republicans are pouring in.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?refcode=em250909&refcode2=2531_4767699_iVTwfm&akid=2531%2E4767699%2EiVTwfm)

body:
Since Democrats won control of the state House, we’ve defended our slim majority with nine special election wins to block the GOP from gaining full control of the Pennsylvania state legislature. | | |
---
| |
---|---
The battle for control of the Pennsylvania House is competitive. **_How competitive, you might wonder?_ ** Democrats in the Pennsylvania House of Representatives hold a ONE-SEAT majority. Since we won control of this chamber in 2022, we’ve defended our slim majority with _nine_ special election wins to block the GOP from gaining full control of the Pennsylvania state legislature. [This is going to be one of the toughest fights for Democrats next year, and we need your support to win in states like Pennsylvania nationwide. Peter - Thank you for opening this email. It may be hard to believe, but under 30% of conservatives who get messages from me even bother to open them!

Numbers like that make it tough for conservatives like me because we rely on texts, emails, letters, and phone calls to keep in touch with supporters. So, I just want to start by saying thanks so much for reading this!

You may not know me, but my name is Winsome Earle-Sears.

_U.S. Marine Corporal Winsome Earle-Sears_
---
I served our nation in the US Marine Corps as an electrician & a diesel mechanic. I kept my brothers & sisters on the move and equipped to DEFEND our nation from terrorists & communists. It was during my service that I learned what real leadership and sacrifice are. _**I am forever grateful that I had the privilege to serve and defend our nation, Peter.**_

There's a saying: _Once a Marine, always a Marine._ Every Marine shares the same spirit of duty and service that inspired me to join--to defend our neighbors and our nation. That's why, today, I'm still serving my country.

But now, I'm fighting for my friends' and neighbors' freedoms as a civilian. In 2021, I decided to run for Lieutenant Governor of Virginia because I saw that our nation needed a strong Christian, someone who has served this great country, to step up and LEAD!

**And after a historic and hard-fought battle, my team and I won by LESS THAN 1.6% of the vote!!** Now, Democrats want me _GONE_. It doesn't matter that I'm a patriotic Marine, a strong Christian, and a mom & grandma; _the Left can 't stand me because I am a proud and unapologetic conservative!_

Now I'm running for Governor, and polls show this race could be _EVEN CLOSER_! I know my team, and I have a tough battle ahead of us. We're putting everything we've got into defending our values and showing the Left that they can't buy this election; losing simply is not an option, Peter.

I’m running a campaign that is FOR the people and BY the people.| | | | I’m running a campaign that is FOR the people and BY the people.| | | | I’m running a campaign that is FOR the people and BY the people.| | | | Peter - Thank you for opening this email. It may be hard to believe, but under 30% of conservatives who get messages from me even bother to open them! Numbers like that make it tough for conservatives like me because we rely on texts, emails, letters, and phone calls to keep in touch with supporters. So, I just want to start by saying thanks so much for reading this! You may not know me, but my name is Winsome Earle-Sears. U.S. Marine Corporal Winsome Earle-Sears I served our nation in the US Marine Corps as an electrician & a diesel mechanic. I kept my brothers & sisters on the move and equipped to DEFEND our nation from terrorists & communists. It was during my service that I learned what real leadership and sacrifice are. I am forever grateful that I had the privilege to serve and defend our nation, Peter. There's a saying: Once a Marine, always a Marine. Every Marine shares the same spirit of duty and service that inspired me to join--to defend our neighbors and our nation. That's why, today, I'm still serving my country. But now, I'm fighting for my friends' and neighbors' freedoms as a civilian. In 2021, I decided to run for Lieutenant Governor of Virginia because I saw that our nation needed a strong Christian, someone who has served this great country, to step up and LEAD! And after a historic and hard-fought battle, my team and I won by LESS THAN 1.6% of the vote!! Now, Democrats want me GONE. It doesn't matter that I'm a patriotic Marine, a strong Christian, and a mom & grandma; the Left can 't stand me because I am a proud and unapologetic conservative! Now I'm running for Governor, and polls show this race could be EVEN CLOSER! I know my team, and I have a tough battle ahead of us. We're putting everything we've got into defending our values and showing the Left that they can't buy this election; losing simply is not an option, Peter. I'm running a campaign that is FOR the people and BY the people. Liberal billionaires & Hollywood elites aren't bankrolling me; I'm counting on grassroots patriots like you to help me win! And the fact is , if we don't have the support of every conservative reading this email, I have no idea how my team and I are going to keep up with the millions and MILLIONS of dollars the Democrats have stacked against us, Peter! So please do not sit on the sidelines - make a donation to support me today, Peter! Thanks so much for your support, Winsome Earle-Sears US Marine Corporal | . Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. name: Team DNC
subject: Hope...
body:
---
Derek, Is there anything we can say to convince you to [**donate to the DNC today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-september-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250909_4546_fr&refcode2=4546_22930333_HMzQPq&akid=4546%2E22930333%2EHMzQPq) What if we gave you a little bit of _hope?_ Here we go: Across the country, voters — even those in the rubiest of red districts — are delivering a loud and clear rebuke of Trump and his allies. **Democrats have won or overperformed the top of the 2024 ticket in 41 out of 42 key elections so far this year.** In Iowa, Democrat Catelin Drey just clinched a huge victory in the Senate District 1 race, breaking the Republican supermajority in the state Senate. And she did it in a red district that went for Donald Trump by 11 points in 2024. In Pennsylvania, Democrat James Malone claimed an upset victory in an R+23 state Senate district — a district that hasn’t had a Democrat representing it since 1979. In Nebraska, Democrat John Ewing Jr. clinched a victory in the Omaha mayoral race, unseating the longest-serving Republican-aligned incumbent mayor in the country by an overwhelming majority. There are reasons to be hopeful all over the country, Derek. Voters are showing up. They’re rejecting Trump’s agenda. They’re putting their faith in Democratic leaders who will tackle Republicans’ extreme agenda head-on and fight for working families. Now it’s up to us to keep it going. **We’ve got big elections coming up in states like New Jersey and Virginia, and then after that, we’ll have a chance to take back Congress. But Trump and his allies are seeing the same Democratic momentum we are, and they’re trying to redraw as many districts as they can in their favor.** [**It’s going to take all hands on deck to overcome any obstacle they throw our way and elect as many Democrats as we can. Can you join your fellow Democrats in making your first or next contribution to the DNC today to help fund our work?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-september-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250909_4546_fr&refcode2=4546_22930333_HMzQPq&akid=4546%2E22930333%2EHMzQPq) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-september-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250909_4546_fr&refcode2=4546_22930333_HMzQPq&akid=4546%2E22930333%2EHMzQPq)**
