| Peter,
Things have not been looking good for Dems in the 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court reelection.
This obscure and little discussed race will determine whether or not Democrats retain their 3-vote majority on the Supreme Court Race. Losing it means Democrats never win or hold power in Pennsylvania again. PA and its 19 electoral college votes gone forever.
With the DNC unable to intervene due to colossal budget shortfalls, the national donor base focused on flipping the House in 2026, and the GOP having us massively outgunned - the situation has been nothing short of dire.
However, this past weekend, Defend our Courts launched a counter-offensive. The Democratic last stand for Pennsylvania is now underway.
---
| | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GLKA-SCe5H0dGVsNdRDfYR8RFZZ2ARlZt8RJNgibegBq6wo141hQsa63Ebv53P-_7qJT7vOp7XaXxKwecaUAIqbindK7XMOCeAQNpVIdCUwEA0MjFr1LN_AWGmmH_66jXhLjcSYkFl7C_9vB_rM8VMHd6NtuCVcNL90vCuWeLsKIEqXGmHTwBtnC4MJMaDbMK0rNQHgAATJo728u4G4peoaEsPLcP8GiA7Dz59hGbjU=&c=v4GRZQLBAje3YwENAGZfzUW8LidyBWvy8k-HSaWXxwovEB8Z7uqlpg==&ch=qXuFHzSqmrzygTquWW_Upyt_TIZr71riTK0MEgP6NlOE0D9ZlOfBkw==)

| | | | This past Saturday 100+ volunteers descended on Philadelphia to help Defend our Courts mount a comeback in this critical election with some groups of canvassers driving in from as far as Baltimore and NYC.
Defend our Courts launched in May of this year with the goal of waking up Democrats to the stakes of this race and rapidly mounting a defense to withstand and push back against the MAGA onslaught that we are facing.
Now, because of the 28,731 individual donors, from every state in the union, who have come together to help us raise a collective $1.2 million dollars, the defense of this beyond critical court has begun.
This is no time to rest on our laurels. MAGA has more than $30 million committed to this race with more on the way. Spending in this race is about to reach astronomical levels only seen in Presidential races. It is not outside the realm of possibility that $100 million + is spent in this race.
[We need to raise way more and we have less than two months to catch up to the GOP's sizable warchest. clean_body: This past weekend, Defend our Courts launched a counter-offensive. 100+ volunteers just descended on Philadelphia to help Defend our Courts mount a comeback in this critical election with some groups | | | | | == | Peter, Things have not been looking good for Dems in the 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court reelection. This obscure and little discussed race will determine whether or not Democrats retain their 3-vote majority on the Supreme Court Race. Losing it means Democrats never win or hold power in Pennsylvania again. PA and its 19 electoral college votes gone forever. With the DNC unable to intervene due to colossal budget shortfalls, the national donor base focused on flipping the House in 2026, and the GOP having us massively outgunned - the situation has been nothing short of dire. However, this past weekend, Defend our Courts launched a counter-offensive. The Democratic last stand for Pennsylvania is now underway. | | == | | | | This past Saturday 100+ volunteers descended on Philadelphia to help Defend our Courts mount a comeback in this critical election with some groups of canvassers driving in from as far as Baltimore and NYC. Defend our Courts launched in May of this year with the goal of waking up Democrats to the stakes of this race and rapidly mounting a defense to withstand and push back against the MAGA onslaught that we are facing. Now, because of the 28,731 individual donors, from every state in the union, who have come together to help us raise a collective $1.2 million dollars, the defense of this beyond critical court has begun. This is no time to rest on our laurels. MAGA has more than $30 million committed to this race with more on the way. Spending in this race is about to reach astronomical levels only seen in Presidential races. It is not outside the realm of possibility that $100 million + is spent in this race. == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | == The defense has begun. If you are able to, please rush whatever you can to the front. Team Defend Our Courts | | | | | | | | | | == | | | | | == | | | | Mail checks to: | | | | Defend Our CourtsP.O. name: Haley Stevens
subject: I truly want to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
Take 60 seconds to tell me your thoughts

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=776%2E49239%2EOGwbzJ)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5768?t=2&akid=776%2E49239%2EOGwbzJ)
---
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5769?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=776%2E49239%2EOGwbzJ)
Hi null, it’s Haley – just thinking back on my recent _Made in Michigan_ tour!
I had the chance to speak with so many incredible Michiganders, and each conversation is reminding me why I’m running for Senate: to fight for the hardworking people who make this state great.
But I can’t talk to everyone in person, and that’s why I’m reaching out: **[Will you take 60 seconds to fill out my September Priorities Survey?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5769?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=776%2E49239%2EOGwbzJ)**
| | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5769?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=776%2E49239%2EOGwbzJ)
---
From rising costs to protecting Social Security to defending Michigan’s manufacturing jobs, I’ve heard a lot about what is keeping people up at night. But I genuinely want to know:**What’s on YOUR mind, null?**
[**We’re hoping to get 42 more responses from 18326 before midnight tonight –** can I count on you to take the survey now?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5769?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=776%2E49239%2EOGwbzJ)
Grateful you're on this team,

Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5770?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=7&akid=776%2E49239%2EOGwbzJ) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5768?t=8&akid=776%2E49239%2EOGwbzJ)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=9&akid=776%2E49239%2EOGwbzJ)

33717 Woodward Ave #539
Birmingham, MI 48009

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: The moment in the Oval Office that vindicated me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
After everything, the TRUTH will set me free – I truly believe it!
Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e332258/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvREVKWHliMldRMw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA5MDk/LbmNsMURMdVJaaw/qP2hpZHM9bmNyR1B1NTBHU1BFQmxscw/gaMA_ig/s7na0b9193d)

| [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily._ig/s6na95d6739)
---
friend,
---
So many kind souls like you have asked how I’m doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery.
---
I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed.
---
Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together.
---
But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive **__ANYTHING!__**
---
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily._ig/s0g10df3b66)
__
---
One thing especially helped take the pain away...
---
...**President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom – _the highest civilian honor in America._**
---
**President Trump knows I’m in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to _federal_ cases, which means he _legally_ _cannot_ save me from the bogus _state-level_ charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS.**
---
**Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
**And now, this car crash has set me back even more...**
---
And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my _FREEDOM_ and my _JUSTICE_.
---
__Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END!__
---
[**So, if you can, please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice.**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily._ig/sfi2e6207e3)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $25](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily._ig/s3m3074445a)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily._ig/s4ha41d69b8)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily._ig/s5k7594abef)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $250](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily._ig/s0n2ee53f21)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $500](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily._ig/s4n6768f1f0)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily._ig/s4m3a8cabcf)
---

Thank you and God bless you,
---
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily._ig/sbnc72ad57d)
---
Rudy Giuliani
Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund
---

---

name: Moms for America
subject: AI and Our Kids
body:
What does the AI revolution mean for our children? We have an expert to explain and tips for staying vigilant in a world of many
threats.

Artificial Intelligence (AI) is the hot topic. There are new developments, ever-changing predictions, and dire warnings. To help
us navigate the AI revolution, we're bringing on an AI expert.

As an Air Force Colonel, Mark Hurley worked with Artificial Intelligence to enhance our national security capabilities while he
was stationed at the Pentagon. Now retired, Mark regularly speaks at public events about the importance of securing our personal
and professional data and educating ourselves about the use of AI. Parents do not want to miss this important information. Like,
subscribe and share.

School’s in Session: How to Stay Vigilant in Protecting Your Child

The kids are in school. Now what? As Mom, your job does not end when your children step onto the school bus or jump out in the car
line. We know that there is a battle for the hearts of our children. How do we protect them from predators and dangerous ideology
in our classrooms? We are sharing strategies to stay on top of what is happening in your child's school and tips on what to look

clean_body: What does the AI revolution mean for our children? We have an expert to explain and tips for staying vigilant in a world of many threats. If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] September 9, 2025 • Newsletter AI and Our Kids Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] [] Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] Artificial Intelligence (AI) is the hot topic. There are new developments, ever-changing predictions, and dire warnings. To help us navigate the AI revolution, we're bringing on an AI expert. As an Air Force Colonel, Mark Hurley worked with Artificial Intelligence to enhance our national security capabilities while he was stationed at the Pentagon. Now retired, Mark regularly speaks at public events about the importance of securing our personal and professional data and educating ourselves about the use of AI. Parents do not want to miss this important information. Like, subscribe and share. View the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast on Spotify [] Moms for America Weekly Blog [] [] School’s in Session: How to Stay Vigilant in Protecting Your Child The kids are in school. Now what? As Mom, your job does not end when your children step onto the school bus or jump out in the car line. We know that there is a battle for the hearts of our children. How do we protect them from predators and dangerous ideology in our classrooms? We are sharing strategies to stay on top of what is happening in your child's school and tips on what to look out for. Read the Blog [] [] In Truth & Liberty, Kimberly Fletcher Founder and President Moms for America® The Mom View [] [] Empowering Conversations Start Here! From parenting to public policy, The MomView delves into the topics that shape our culture, impact our nation and influence our homes, because every issue is a mom issue. Season 2 Episodes on Mondays at 10am ET View on YouTube [] View on Rumble [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] Copyright © 2025 Moms for America, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: Moms for America 1440 State HWY 248, Suite Q304 Branson, MO 65616 Visit our Website [] Visit our Store [] Visit us on Truth Social [] DONATE TODAY []

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: President Trump's Faith | 100 Victories Of Faith
body:
Last night, I joined Ed Henry on Newsmax to discuss the tremendous victories happening under the Trump Administration for people of Faith. See Preside
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24507310.12792.1.f0b1d69f6f82b06e027c066d8570d8e7) |
---
Last night, I joined **Ed Henry** on **Newsmax** to discuss the **tremendous victories** happening under the Trump Administration for people of Faith. See [President Trump’s Top 100 Victories for People of Faith](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24507310.12793.1.f44412454ccd19094762dadbc85f5a00) here: [https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/2025/09/president-trumps-top-100-victories-for-people-of-faith/ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24507310.12794.1.bef0699a1efd35107409f06e1c11553d) Why is **President Trump** such a _GREAT_ champion of Faith in America? This led to a conversation about **President Donald Trump's** own faith. You can watch it here: [https://x.com/JacksonLahmeyer/status/1965419198135378277](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24507310.12795.1.e66fedffa17048be1469bd1dd32c8fba) Thank you, Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
---
## Churches Are UNDER ATTACK
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24507310.12796.1.1d4e606a9de97259c1b12892e64c23c6)
---
Right now there is a **MAJOR escalation** of attacks upon Churches in the United States of America. Since 2018 there has been an **increase of over 700%** according to the **Family Research Council**. In 2018 there were 50 reported attacks on churches (**less than 1 per week**). In 2024 there were 415 reported attacks on churches (**more than 1 per day**). I want to **offer two thoughts**. **First to the Pastors** reading this.
Take measures at your church to prevent these attacks. At [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24507310.12797.1.2f7994c885dd914e617d14d559020e85), I am beyond grateful for our security team that watches over the House every service to make sure our people are _SAFE_. But we also partner with local law enforcement every service as well. The police car stationed at the front of our church, I believe, will prevent 99% of bad actors from even attempting something they should not. **We must be as wise as serpents and as harmless as doves.** **Second to Believers** reading this.
Don't you dare stop attending church! God has not given us a spirit of fear but instead one of power, love and a sound mind (**2 Tim 1:7** ). We are told in **Hebrews 10** that as the Day of the Lord gets near that many believers will stop attending church but we are command not to stop gathering together because we need one another. **Do not let the enemy intimidate you from going to the House of the Lord**. Although the stats are _disheartening_ , history proves that whenever the Church is attacked, she always _flourishes_. These attacks will backfire on the enemy and the Church of the Lord Jesus Christ in America will prevail and be even more effective because of them. **Pray for the Body of Christ and the local churches throughout America.** Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---

The Foreword is worth getting the book, I promise. This book is 200 pages and I am confident will change your life as it has mine. In ["Chasing After The Wind"](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24507310.12805.1.b7dc996fdbe601a44bb0822ce8e24593) I share VERY personal stories and I decided to get real and raw with the heartbreaks and triumphs I have experienced.

subject: Republicans can’t win on the issues. So they’re changing the rules in the middle of the game.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
These Republican politicians don’t understand a fundamental part of public service: They don’t work for Donald Trump or the DC party bosses

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114903178/568532447/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGUzMDcwYS04ZjhkLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T3yqpCyngWeJl8pRPppacJ-bZrlgJHXKMFSdBnOiFWU=) Kansans are exhausted right now. Donald Trump’s cost-of-living crisis is wreaking havoc on families’ budgets. Our schools and hospitals are receiving less support than ever before. At the same time, billionaires and big corporations have never held more power and influence over our day-to-day lives. These aren’t partisan issues. Republican or Democrat, we all need to put food on the table. We all need to send our kids to the doctor when they’re sick. We all deserve an economy that works for us, not just the top one percent. **But what is the extreme Kansas Legislature focused on? Rigging the maps to kick me out of office.** These Republican politicians don’t understand a fundamental part of public service: They don’t work for Donald Trump or the DC party bosses — they work for _you_. [_**But the only way we can prove that is by defeating their latest gerrymandering scheme once and for all. Will you help me do that by chipping in today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114903179/568532448/-2097022923?refcode=email_090925_rules&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGUzMDcwYS04ZjhkLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T3yqpCyngWeJl8pRPppacJ-bZrlgJHXKMFSdBnOiFWU=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114903180/568532449/-2097022923?refcode=email_090925_rules&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGUzMDcwYS04ZjhkLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T3yqpCyngWeJl8pRPppacJ-bZrlgJHXKMFSdBnOiFWU=)

Look, I’ve won four consecutive elections here in KS-03, all of them competitive. So if Republican politicians want to flip this district red, they should focus on the issues that Kansans care about most: **Affordability, strong public schools, tackling corruption, and creating jobs.**
But they won’t. Instead, they want to shove price hikes and DC politics down our throats, no matter how many times Kansans vote it down.
It’s ridiculous. KS-03 has rejected the National GOP’s agenda again and again. But instead of taking the hint, these extreme politicians want _even_ _more_ control over our state’s future.
[_**I’m going to do everything I can to fight back against this political stunt, but I’ll need your help. Can you pitch in to help me defend Kansas voters from this partisan power grab and protect this seat?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114903181/568532450/-2097022923?refcode=email_090925_rules&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGUzMDcwYS04ZjhkLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T3yqpCyngWeJl8pRPppacJ-bZrlgJHXKMFSdBnOiFWU=)

body:
We urgently need your help to build on this momentum for Democrats, Peter.
#
**HUGE NEWS IN IOWA: _GOP U.S. Senator Joni Ernst just announced that she will NOT seek re-election in 2026_**
This is MAJOR, Peter. Democrats in Iowa have gained some serious momentum this year. name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: the hardest decision I’ve made in this campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
It’s a bold step, but we can’t be timid right now.
#

Hey friend, it’s Mark Kelly. My friend Mikie Sherrill is running for Governor in New Jersey and needs our help. I hope you’ll read the message below from her, and [**consider splitting a donation between Mikie's campaign and mine.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-sherrill.Ja8SSv&refcode=em250909-1-90&t=1&akid=6184%2E6688874%2EvBqoNo)
---
Friend, I just met with my senior team, and at the end of the meeting, I made a big decision:
**_I told my team to place a massive new ad buy across New Jersey — earlier than we originally planned for.**_
Friend, I’m going to explain why we took this step, but if you support our decision to be bigger and bolder in our fight to defeat MAGA extremism here in New Jersey, [**I hope you’ll split a few dollars between my team and Mark Kelly to help close our budget gap and fund this new ad buy →](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-sherrill.Ja8SSv&refcode=em250909-1-90&t=2&akid=6184%2E6688874%2EvBqoNo)**
**[DONATE →](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-sherrill.Ja8SSv&refcode=em250909-1-90&t=3&akid=6184%2E6688874%2EvBqoNo)**
Here’s why we made this choice:
Jack Ciattarelli just made a massive investment in his own TV ads. $2,000,000 to be exact – and you can bet he’ll spend every dollar he can attacking me.
But we also know that when voters learn the truth about who I am, what I stand for, and how my vision for New Jersey differs from Ciattarelli’s, I earn their support.
**And we know that, with the polls this tight and the stakes so incredibly high, we can’t afford to let Ciattarelli’s attacks go unanswered. Now is the time for us to think big and fight back.**
This is how we do it. We’re going to get our message out everywhere. We’re going to make sure every voter knows the truth. And we’re going to do every damn thing within our power to win this fight for New Jersey’s future — and stop a MAGA lackey who takes marching orders from Trump from becoming our next governor.
[**Friend, to be candid with you, I made this choice because I believe that our grassroots team will come through the way you always have and help us power this campaign to victory. To close our budget gap and fund this big ad buy, we’ve set a goal of 100 online donations before midnight tonight. If you could step up and split a contribution between my campaign and Mark Kelly, I would be incredibly grateful.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-sherrill.Ja8SSv&refcode=em250909-1-90&t=4&akid=6184%2E6688874%2EvBqoNo)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll instantly process your split contribution to Mikie Sherrill and Mark Kelly:_

name: Andy Kim
subject: The consequences of GOP cuts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
Trump and Republicans in Congress gutted public broadcasting, and New Jersey is feeling the consequences.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114903728/568534634/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmQ2ZmM3Mi05MDhkLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UK2n-W9VIuwhZodT8XCfiNQgRV9-IK9Dbn4IZPqOA7g=&emci=7246895b-8c8d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=32d6fc72-908d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=26261389)
---

| | Trump and Republicans in Congress gutted public broadcasting, and New Jersey is feeling the consequences. When local stations lose funding, it means layoffs for workers right here in our state. It means rural and shore communities risk losing access to critical emergency alerts when storms hit. It means families across New Jersey lose access to the trusted news and educational programming that public broadcasting has delivered for generations. Public broadcasting isn't a luxury — it's a lifeline. Whether it's children's educational shows, local reporting that holds leaders accountable, or emergency alerts that save lives, cutting these resources off leaves our communities more vulnerable. Trump may not care about what happens when stations go dark, but I do. Every community in New Jersey deserves access to reliable information and the public service broadcasting that keeps us connected. I'll keep fighting in Congress to restore this funding and protect the services New Jersey families depend on. More soon, _Andy_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Andy Kim instantly:

clean_body: Trump and Republicans in Congress gutted public broadcasting, and New Jersey is feeling the consequences. | | | | Trump and Republicans in Congress gutted public broadcasting, and New Jersey is feeling the consequences. When local stations lose funding, it means layoffs for workers right here in our state. It means rural and shore communities risk losing access to critical emergency alerts when storms hit. It means families across New Jersey lose access to the trusted news and educational programming that public broadcasting has delivered for generations. Public broadcasting isn't a luxury — it's a lifeline. Whether it's children's educational shows, local reporting that holds leaders accountable, or emergency alerts that save lives, cutting these resources off leaves our communities more vulnerable. Trump may not care about what happens when stations go dark, but I do. Every community in New Jersey deserves access to reliable information and the public service broadcasting that keeps us connected. I'll keep fighting in Congress to restore this funding and protect the services New Jersey families depend on. More soon, Andy | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Andy Kim instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey | This email was sent by . name: Rural Americans United
subject: From Blue Sky Ranch to Big Ag: A Family Farmer’s Perspective
body:
Newhouse's Red Herring: China's Real Threat
| | | | |
---
| What Is In This Newsletter?

* From Blue Sky Ranch to Big Ag: A Family Farmer's Perspective
* Newhouse's Red Herring: China's Real Threat
* Will 47 get Bolasarioed?

---
| |
---
| My grandfather was a second generation American farmer. He and my grandmother started Blue Sky Ranch on Yakima's Scenic Drive in the 1930s. With about twenty acres of usable land he raised a family of five children. They were poor at the beginning, but over time fruit prices grew and in the 1970s they were finally able to build their forever home and enjoy a good income. Downtown Yakima thrived then with both a Bon Marche and a Nordstrom store. That was a real Nordstrom, not just a Nordstrom Rack.
But things began to change. Downward pressure on small farms and the livelihoods they supported came under attack. Shockingly, at this same time, many farmers began to align with the very forces working against them, voting against their own best interests. With the beginning of the Reagan Administration and its radical change to economic policy, compounded by the wider 1980s farm crisis, the negative impact on small farms was second only to that of the Great Depression. While this did trigger some reforms to assist farmers, the policies were most likely to benefit large farms, much as they still do today.
---
---
| |
---
|
It is easy to oversimplify the reasons the consolidation of small farms accelerated, but the 1980s marked a time of transformational corporate greed that brought a far more aggressive focus on profit at any cost. This was the moment when the devil convinced farmers that he didn't exist and shifted the blame for the world's problems onto "other people." Republicans somehow convinced rural America that they were fiscally responsible and had farmers' best interests at heart, despite all evidence to the contrary.
From here it began to snowball as policies continued to support large farms while small farms were continuously marginalized and expected to assume greater risk without receiving the benefits. This was reinforced as policies led to industry shifts in how farming was done. For example, price supports were largely limited to a few crops, mainly dairy and grains. The impact was most apparent in the H-2A visa process. In the 1980s, as borders began to close to migrant farmworkers, the H-2A visa program was created in 1986. In my view, this did great and lasting harm to small farmers. Unable to secure local labor, they were forced to use the H-2A program, which required time, money, and expertise that corporate farms had and small farmers did not. Since then the H-2A program has become a massive industry for lawyers, recruiters, logistics companies, financial institutions, and other players, making it nearly impossible for small farms to participate. How can a small farmer who needs only a few pickers for a few weeks during the year compete with corporate farms that have full time staff dedicated to managing the thousands of H-2A workers they employ?
---
| |
---
| Today, the challenges for small farmers remain immense. According to the [USDA's 2022 Census of Agriculture](https://zmhksxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EINZQKByUHCWYsKuQ2yii24ZD9HSsRIoYMW2tIvAUY3ZXXtFHzAcYqrsBwGM67eEugu5Yz5yAsOAGFKgrw7aVd0jVDUZQ9jC0fLMHI5HRFTLC3YTuXbrIFtT2nIfv6apEjglNANdyVEsBV8zyWl3j9eEwpiqXg9SYVFaT2p1Ga0evjEoYrOLeA7pJXbjdIczhgA_tJfogalQI-81GHdlcdvuRxK156M4&c=k9p6RFOw_VjLkdv6HegMLREM1vrBrdRSi39hJpBIjVCYIbTeBWy34A==&ch=rvxHS-0DZZ_8PTCgRr04pic7xJb7zy6vForSD8EzHAnzNOltzzaciA==), the average age of a farmer is close to 60 and the average age of a new farmer is nearly 50. The average size of a farm is now about 500 acres, a significant increase from my grandparents' twenty. What does this say about farm startups when new farmers are nearly fifty years old before they begin? In my circle of small farmers I see a clear trend toward niche farming. Competing in mainstream agriculture with large corporate farms is nearly impossible. But with niche farming comes greater risks and slimmer chances of success. I raise premium poultry, and I must price it about 250 percent higher than store-bought chicken. The financial risks are high, and the rewards are mostly intangible. Still, to me, it feels worth more than money in the bank.

| Newhouse's Red Herring: China's Real Threat
While Congressional District 4's Representative, Dan "Do Nothing" Newhouse is shouting that the sky is falling because China-based companies own a few thousand acres of American land, the real threat is much closer to home: our food supply. Two companies, wholly owned by Chinese interests, control the majority of our [seed](https://zmhksxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EINZQKByUHCWYsKuQ2yii24ZD9HSsRIoYMW2tIvAUY3ZXXtFHzAcYqrsBwGM67eESGP3G9R3yW8M_wdqoEkSkfP2uvsSI3UMZhD6ViElYx68QS9tBa-W8mc7bb2Y7b1GRcW8sCYipXngkpQftmuVz0ZoA5UQ85Uk7ILZeW8BvMQ=&c=k9p6RFOw_VjLkdv6HegMLREM1vrBrdRSi39hJpBIjVCYIbTeBWy34A==&ch=rvxHS-0DZZ_8PTCgRr04pic7xJb7zy6vForSD8EzHAnzNOltzzaciA==) and [pork production](https://zmhksxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EINZQKByUHCWYsKuQ2yii24ZD9HSsRIoYMW2tIvAUY3ZXXtFHzAcYqrsBwGM67eE6rDMvDL6J-yAC56n6Hfg2CNbq3SLgyy2JcS5Lb1Gpx9ebtJysj-R18kDGSBlOTD5vpALmW--xKMBFwPuxIpQ-ZgH2k5_aoGbEmMAg_Rf6FOiYS5vdsGWlw==&c=k9p6RFOw_VjLkdv6HegMLREM1vrBrdRSi39hJpBIjVCYIbTeBWy34A==&ch=rvxHS-0DZZ_8PTCgRr04pic7xJb7zy6vForSD8EzHAnzNOltzzaciA==).

clean_body: Newhouse's Red Herring: China's Real Threat | | | | | | What Is In This Newsletter? From Blue Sky Ranch to Big Ag: A Family Farmer's Perspective Newhouse's Red Herring: China's Real Threat * Will 47 get Bolasarioed? | | | My grandfather was a second generation American farmer. He and my grandmother started Blue Sky Ranch on Yakima's Scenic Drive in the 1930s. With about twenty acres of usable land he raised a family of five children. They were poor at the beginning, but over time fruit prices grew and in the 1970s they were finally able to build their forever home and enjoy a good income. Downtown Yakima thrived then with both a Bon Marche and a Nordstrom store. That was a real Nordstrom, not just a Nordstrom Rack. But things began to change. Downward pressure on small farms and the livelihoods they supported came under attack. Shockingly, at this same time, many farmers began to align with the very forces working against them, voting against their own best interests. With the beginning of the Reagan Administration and its radical change to economic policy, compounded by the wider 1980s farm crisis, the negative impact on small farms was second only to that of the Great Depression. While this did trigger some reforms to assist farmers, the policies were most likely to benefit large farms, much as they still do today. | | | It is easy to oversimplify the reasons the consolidation of small farms accelerated, but the 1980s marked a time of transformational corporate greed that brought a far more aggressive focus on profit at any cost. This was the moment when the devil convinced farmers that he didn't exist and shifted the blame for the world's problems onto "other people." Republicans somehow convinced rural America that they were fiscally responsible and had farmers' best interests at heart, despite all evidence to the contrary. From here it began to snowball as policies continued to support large farms while small farms were continuously marginalized and expected to assume greater risk without receiving the benefits. This was reinforced as policies led to industry shifts in how farming was done. For example, price supports were largely limited to a few crops, mainly dairy and grains. The impact was most apparent in the H-2A visa process. In the 1980s, as borders began to close to migrant farmworkers, the H-2A visa program was created in 1986. In my view, this did great and lasting harm to small farmers. Unable to secure local labor, they were forced to use the H-2A program, which required time, money, and expertise that corporate farms had and small farmers did not. Since then the H-2A program has become a massive industry for lawyers, recruiters, logistics companies, financial institutions, and other players, making it nearly impossible for small farms to participate. How can a small farmer who needs only a few pickers for a few weeks during the year compete with corporate farms that have full time staff dedicated to managing the thousands of H-2A workers they employ? | | | Today, the challenges for small farmers remain immense. According to the ==, the average age of a farmer is close to 60 and the average age of a new farmer is nearly 50. The average size of a farm is now about 500 acres, a significant increase from my grandparents' twenty. What does this say about farm startups when new farmers are nearly fifty years old before they begin? In my circle of small farmers I see a clear trend toward niche farming. Competing in mainstream agriculture with large corporate farms is nearly impossible. But with niche farming comes greater risks and slimmer chances of success. I raise premium poultry, and I must price it about 250 percent higher than store-bought chicken. That means relying on a small and often unstable market of customers who both have the means and the willingness to see the added cost as worthwhile. The financial risks are high, and the rewards are mostly intangible. Still, to me, it feels worth more than money in the bank. | | == | | | Newhouse's Red Herring: China's Real Threat While Congressional District 4's Representative, Dan "Do Nothing" Newhouse is shouting that the sky is falling because China-based companies own a few thousand acres of American land, the real threat is much closer to home: our food supply. Two companies, wholly owned by Chinese interests, control the majority of our == and ==. | | | Will 47 get Bolasarioed? name: Nancy Mace for Governor
subject: Nancy Mace Calls Out Wilson's Failure in Spivey Case
body:
Two years ago, 33-year-old Scott Spivey was killed on a rural Horry County road. Today his family still waits for justice. | | | |
---
| | | **NANCY MACE CALLS OUT ALAN WILSON'S FAILURE IN SCOTT SPIVEY CASE**
_Mace Demands Justice for Scott Spivey_ **CHARLESTON, S.C., September 9, 2025 —** Two years ago, 33-year-old Scott Spivey was killed on a rural Horry County road. Today his family still waits for justice. And by no surprise to anyone who knows him, South Carolina Attorney General Alan Wilson declined to prosecute. Now, he won’t even speak to the victim's family.

On September 9, 2023, Spivey was ambushed on Camp Swamp Road outside Loris. Spivey was shot more than 15 times from behind and in the back. But more troubling facts soon emerged. Just a week later, 15th Circuit Solicitor Jimmy Richardson asked the Attorney General to take over the case after the alleged shooter posted a bizarre “thank you” message on social media following the shooting. Wilson’s office sat on the case for 7 months before officially declining to prosecute in April 2024, citing “insufficient evidence.” That decision left the Spivey family with no charges, no trial, and certainly no justice.

**Timeline of the Case**

**Sept 9, 2023 –** Scott Spivey is chased nine miles down the road, ambushed and killed in Horry County. The 15th Circuit Solicitor’s Office recuses itself and refers the case to Attorney General Alan Wilson for review.
**April 2024 –** After an initial review, the Attorney General’s Office declines to prosecute, citing “insufficient evidence,” and informs SLED of its decision.
**June 2024 –** Spivey’s family files a wrongful death lawsuit. During civil discovery, significant, new disturbing evidence emerges.
**May 2025 –** Horry County officials request SLED reopen its investigation into the case.
**Aug 6, 2025 –** Following a second review, Wilson’s office again declines to prosecute. Worse yet, Wilson politicized this decision by making his announcement an hour before Rep. Mace took the stage for a town hall in Horry County.
**Aug 19, 2025 –** Facing public and political backlash, Wilson doubles down on this unforgivable decision.
**Sept 8, 2025 –** Wilson visits Horry County but refuses to address the Spivey case and continues to ignore calls from the Spivey family.
---
|
---
| “We believe it’s a cover-up,” **said Congresswoman Nancy Mace.** “We’ve spoken with the Spivey family. We’ve heard their pain. And we’ve seen how Alan Wilson ignored them at every turn. He refuses to prosecute, refuses to return their calls, and when he finally showed up in their backyard, he had nothing to say. He refused to meet with the family.”

Nearly two years later, a civil wrongful death lawsuit filed by Spivey’s family has unearthed a trove of new, disturbing evidence. Missing video footage, unearthed audio recordings and mishandled evidence have raised alarms and fueled calls for an outside investigation. Despite this, Alan Wilson still refuses to act. “If Alan Wilson can’t get serious and prosecute the most egregious cases, he has no business running for Governor,” **said Nancy Mace.** “South Carolina deserves a Governor who will fight crime and put law and order above politics. I stand with the Spivey family, and as Governor, I will make sure justice is finally served. Law and order isn’t optional, it’s the bare minimum.”
---
| [Donate](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=e3fa72eee0&e=ddc57b5ede "Donate")
---
|
---
| [Read More](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=2c925abf48&e=ddc57b5ede "Read More")
---
| **Mace added** , “Alan Wilson will never have the backbone or will to fight crime in South Carolina, it takes too much courage to do what’s right, and he has none.”****
---
|
---

Team Mace
Campaign@nancymace.org

subject: Tell Democratic Leaders: Stand up to Trump and Back Mamdani NOW!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ]Our Revolution Logo

Peter Willis,

This is urgent: as Trump intervenes to try to consolidate the field
against Zohran Mamdani in the NYC's mayoral race, Democratic leaders like
Hakeem Jeffries and Chuck Schumer are REFUSING to coalesce behind Mamdani.

Mamdani OVERWHELMINGLY won the primary as major unions, grassroots groups,
and the working class all united behind him. But instead of rallying
behind his powerful campaign, Schumer and Jeffries are standing with the
billionaire-backed status quo – abandoning their own party's nominee
rather than risk upsetting the moneyed elite.

Right now, AOC is on the frontlines with Mamdani, calling Democratic
leadership out for not rallying behind him:

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34014?source=email-20250909&t=1011&akid=9355%2E5885482%2ERbVoKz ]Manu Raju tweet about AOC addressing Jeffries and Schumer not endorsing
Mamdani yet.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34014?source=email-20250909&t=1012&akid=9355%2E5885482%2ERbVoKz ]Will you stand with them and urgently tell Jeffries, Schumer and the
rest of the establishment that it's time to unite and endorse Zohran
Mamdani for NYC Mayor RIGHT NOW? Click here to add your name.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34014?source=email-20250909&t=1013&akid=9355%2E5885482%2ERbVoKz ]ADD YOUR NAME

Right now, Trump is playing kingmaker for the Democrats – consolidating
Mamandi's opposition by throwing his weight behind Cuomo and demanding
other candidates drop out of the race. Billionaires and right-wing donors
are pouring MILLIONS into the campaign against Mamdani.

Meanwhile, the corporate wing of the Democratic party, including its
leadership, is showing they care more about power and campaign cash than
standing up for working families.

name: Aruna Miller
subject: I’m in
body:
Wes and I are running for reelection, because our work isn’t finished.
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=594%2E1086043%2EeqBk3V)
Peter, it's Lieutenant Governor Aruna Miller.
When Governor Moore and I first ran for office, our campaign slogan was to Leave No One Behind. But, it’s not just a tagline, it’s a promise.
I know firsthand what that means. I came to this country as a little girl, an immigrant who believed in the American dream. To be Maryland’s first woman of color and immigrant elected as Lieutenant Governor proves the promise of our great country and Maryland.
But for too many Marylanders, that dream is still out of reach. **That’s why Wes and I are running for reelection in 2026. Because our work _isn’t_ finished.**
**[Now, Wes and I need you on our team. So, will you chip in to our reelection campaign today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250909-2?refcode=em-20250909-2&refcode2=594_1086043_eqBk3V&akid=594%2E1086043%2EeqBk3V)**
Peter, we’ve made historic progress together over the past three years. Our administration created good-paying jobs, raised wages, and invested in public schools.
We lifted Maryland children and families out of poverty. We built a cabinet that reflects the diversity of Maryland. But as Wes would say, our mission is not yet complete.
Today, I’m asking you to join our team once more, so we can keep building a Maryland where every family has the opportunity to succeed. **[Will you chip in now to power our reelection campaign’s launch? Whatever you can give will go a long way in ensuring we can make our promise a reality.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250909-2?refcode=em-20250909-2&refcode2=594_1086043_eqBk3V&akid=594%2E1086043%2EeqBk3V)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250909-2?amount=5&refcode=em-20250909-2&refcode2=594_1086043_eqBk3V&akid=594%2E1086043%2EeqBk3V)**
With you on our team, we will build a Maryland that Leaves No One Behind.
With gratitude,
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250909-2?refcode=em-20250909-2&refcode2=594_1086043_eqBk3V&akid=594%2E1086043%2EeqBk3V)
Aruna Miller
Lieutenant Governor, Maryland

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20250909-2&t=2&refcode2=594_1086043_eqBk3V&akid=594%2E1086043%2EeqBk3V)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=594%2E1086043%2EeqBk3V)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=594%2E1086043%2EeqBk3V)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

name: No Dem Left Behind
subject: The Supreme Court has become Trump’s partner in crime
disclaimer_text: Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC Not Authorized by Any Federal Candidate or Candidate's Committee
body:
Shadow-dockets are being used by SCTOUS to help MAGA’s push towards authoritarianism. | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DS9fi8hUq1S8zgcF5CeUO1aCL1jrvd050fDKqSkpRyc0setScpmQG78qyv8d1OD1SexmXQkSVRGDybz-LhFCVGy-XCwZSiS1eDcWz-WmqcCej47I5vZNYs_9ErMV3GP5RyrMkC1e-7uSWPzO4z32mweh90rEH7FSo8WtVn9x01biSGyGUeyqPwowjl7zdaNvYq3E3Cmu_oayZRUfqKaYjvj8x8E84lzpI-Tc6oH0v5WbvrDVlvM26dkkrVxB2J_ASDG2NA9sGyJrxAmWao9Kanyt69DzzUQTpJY_AIgWzWaYhxj-CAyFGSJcPmKC03T_ro9pTgEU0o_h1zPA5leH71smnPPm4v86Y_VCzaUIVWm3G6Wa92aK_mfujd24TyjvS/4jr/OQuGIiqAQnCJ3vrxgjsBpw/h0/h001.bLobKHC3NwHwosdQFaUYN_t1M7g5zaRi2MjSMvJhW2c)
---
Friends, Trump inflicted lasting damage during his first term -- but his most dangerous legacy might be the one wearing robes.

**He handpicked three far-right justices. He radicalized the Supreme Court. And now, with a conservative supermajority, the Court is no longer a check on his power -- it's helping him enforce it.
**
**Just today, SCOTUS greenlit one of Trump 's most un-American policies yet: allowing his masked immigration agents to stop people in the streets -- just for speaking Spanish or doing manual labor -- and funnel them into his deportation machine.**
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DS9fi8hUq1S8zgcF5CeUO1aCL1jrvd050fDKqSkpRyc0HBzOdg4UmWQ18vOeHcRp5aLk5eRa8Lk-vP6xx6ol1eG5qjro8lV0iYV4Ogkyp8ibM3yeTa5BM2WvefIukOkUTwFpaoAjl9Z5saiBMuDM_hMfhSJVxnZ2BulOcXV7USpl3556mWw9ZIFfG81gqGJfANLs7ZtD0pndc3D7wUN4WnnRkN1O6fH6qmtXeH14ydSbdReMvM7fj0VD4Nk6dSZeofngMjHtk9v3a2cXJkJgIbYYNkjlcSNJ5inaS3z_mmQVHjDw7r0yBumN6DaytY5lvm845SlfQJBZfQ2QeFut3pKaUkBpFv3EuHcWG5pv8BPUav6aEAD7q4UveAqQCTCFN/4jr/OQuGIiqAQnCJ3vrxgjsBpw/h1/h001.rpbBT0cHnaMAo3uX-imWlwDxKekZ48e1OR1OMFsWk0g)
---
And it's happening through the shadow docket -- secretive rulings with no public arguments, no accountability, and no explanation. Trump doesn't even need to win in court. His Court just gives him what he wants.

Let's be clear: The Supreme Court is no longer impartial. It's MAGA's legal weapon.

[**If we lose our courts, we lose our democracy. That 's why No Dem Left Behind is fighting to elect Democrats in the hardest, most overlooked races -- the ones that shape the judges, the laws, and the future of our democracy. But this is an uphill fight. Trump has the money, the megaphone, and the Court. We have the truth -- and you. Chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can today to help us fight back and make sure MAGA doesn't control the courts forever.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DS9fi8hUq1S8zgcF5CeUO1aCL1jrvd050fDKqSkpRyc3aRUKsFGaW3VrkWuVW-QeaJVBCodDjdyHNMwH8e3-3KFLdqks5DnxnQ5A_PK1idr-j9WZYgQ0VwmPHdrA1ZYX7Vwd4-fUrYg4KD6u5-O35Bda_57t3pSt4GB5bHfxOkoswEPHZdtzjQ7UosD8OGCm2CfZx_XzBqquYMhyaMmyttfjP3hcslyOc6si8jTqSr-yGnhxcWKjC6Dl8LTNVfJqw9T3ymIsgFw3sMEdLOF7wKbrfI-ia5Gs5x7Dm4AyCzZVJ447sRustBGLjZSsJF4DLbsJ7rQuV08zY27EYQFce4-Dh5N9a1evcAR4r48grr6oZWv4eklYJomOH8MPHPiOK/4jr/OQuGIiqAQnCJ3vrxgjsBpw/h2/h001.SkFUJEoaFxW2QxD4_aT9QC6-g6Y4lslvpGiH6dVX6H0)

clean_body: Shadow-dockets are being used by SCTOUS to help MAGA’s push towards authoritarianism. | | Friends, Trump inflicted lasting damage during his first term -- but his most dangerous legacy might be the one wearing robes. He handpicked three far-right justices. He radicalized the Supreme Court. And now, with a conservative supermajority, the Court is no longer a check on his power -- it's helping him enforce it. Just today, SCOTUS greenlit one of Trump 's most un-American policies yet: allowing his masked immigration agents to stop people in the streets -- just for speaking Spanish or doing manual labor -- and funnel them into his deportation machine. | And it's happening through the shadow docket -- secretive rulings with no public arguments, no accountability, and no explanation. Trump doesn't even need to win in court. His Court just gives him what he wants. Let's be clear: The Supreme Court is no longer impartial. It's MAGA's legal weapon. We don't have time to wait. We don't have room for silence. For democracy, No Dem Left Behind | | Mail checks to: No Dem Left Behind P.O. clean_body: Together, we can reelect Nellie Pou, defend this critical seat, and keep building power for Democratic pro-choice women. | = Peter, For decades, New Jersey's 9th Congressional District has been a stronghold for Democrats. But Republicans have added Rep. Nellie Pou to their 2026 flip list — and they're already plotting to take her down. **= | = Here's the reality: Nellie won her 2024 race by just five points — the closest margin the district has seen in years. Her opponent, Republican Billy Prempeh, is a three-time loser, and with GOP megadonors waiting in the wings, this race will get expensive fast. Nellie has never shied away from a tough fight. She's a seasoned New Jersey leader who has proven she can deliver in Congress. But with national Republicans making an official play for her seat, she'll need grassroots Democrats like you to back her up. =** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Republicans think NJ-09 is vulnerable. name: Elizabeth Guzman
subject: I’m running for Virginia’s working families

body:
| | | **** Friend,
As an immigrant, social worker, and mother of four, I’ve lived the same challenges that so many Virginians face: working long hours to make ends meet, fighting to afford healthcare, and striving to give our kids the opportunities they deserve.
That’s why I ran for office: to make sure our government stands with working families, not the wealthy and well-connected.
But to keep fighting for working families, I need your help.
**This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters, not right-wing billionaires. Every single contribution makes a difference.**
******[Early voting starts next week. It’s GO TIME, and I know I can count on you ... pitch in now to win this red-to-blue race.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqeoZfkhx0rJYxvzeQyPAOXxPzaHpN7uxnA66Ao0W-7EqZyFw6iLW1nc6uNsMh9U_6DE9t7G1f0djlyyNqOSBFO5qHGhzT3C2tlLtLLtVtkFLarOzFW3iMho0kwAXMwNHd0UqM5HCABIOsbRNtBEIVK82tofIccbm5oG9cZU9URNmv1HoNimT6zmiBzU0f-kPaGLIpZYK61DQBEucWeXWexvR5T2mEISxl7KSVT9Fns5WKhHEPFQ8wSP4TbSVzdp3ql8-z2eO0JdVXLmKAK0ozoFBtYvPDBwu-KcGMQ-FvlBhD64jya65tTJB9Vef46JlMw/4jr/EXXTTeiURGuW1NAcAuyhrg/h0/h001.uHjANN4VED_lHxkg2i3oN7v7xqYtR8TnipAOSh1ILmg)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: CNN just reported…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
---
| | I hate to bother you on a Tuesday, but I urgently need your help! CNN just reported that Donald Trump’s Super PAC just raked in almost $200 million to expand his narrow MAGA Majority. [Please understand: That kind of money is enough to DECIMATE Democrats in our most critical races and DESTROY our chance to reclaim the House.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114905709/568539733/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250909_em_fr_b1_np4c_main&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmUzMDcwYS04ZjhkLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CO9dZeK5xhMlhpGxEl5nD0c_Uxsxo_vizpvikdEP5RA=) [_I know that I ask a lot of you, but this is the most important ask I’ve ever made! Unless we do something BOLD right away, we may NEVER recover. | ''Last month, just before the start of the school year, the Philadelphia Federation of Teachers and the School District of Philadelphia reached a tentative three-year agreement. It’s just the latest threat of a **looming strike** in [Philadelphia](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=b12d6eb384&e=b7b3eddce2) to be resolved. Many American cities have been affected by **strikes over the years**. The City of Philadelphia, is no exception..."

## Start your day in the know
Are you starting you day in the know? Every morning at 9am ET you can join the Morning Meeting with myself, Mark Halperin and Dan Turrentine. We walk thru the news of the day like no one else and then take your questions. You can find it all on the same [YouTube channel](https://substack.com/redirect/6bf5c4f7-713b-4ef0-86c8-b6dcddf0a295?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as my 6pm show. Make sure to subscribe and hit the notification button so you don't miss it!
[Subscribe HERE](https://substack.com/redirect/6bf5c4f7-713b-4ef0-86c8-b6dcddf0a295?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## This week on The Sean Spicer Show...
Coming up today, I'm joined for a conversation with Jack Ciatarelli and Jim McLaughlin. Wednesday, Sebastian Gorka comes on the show to discuss the latest political developments. Then Thursday we've got a great panel featuring Katie Miller, Hayley Coronia, and Rob Bluey. Finally, we're rounding out the week with Seth Keshel to talk about the latest polling numbers going into 2026.
## Wellness update...
If you watch the show or have been reading the newsletter for a while you know I have been on my own MAHA/wellness journey. One of the big things I have done is switched out many of the personal care products (soap, toothpaste, vitamins, etc) and home care products (cleaning supplies, detergent) with products from an American based, family company where wellness is front and center.
If you are interested in finding out what I did, text INFO to 276-500-1185 and join me!
## Sponsor links...

---|---|---
## I went on Gavin Newsom's podcast...
Last week, I got the opportunity to go on CA governor Gavin Newsom's podcast.
There's not much I agree with Gavin on, but it was a good conversation nonetheless.
You can check out the full episode [here](https://substack.com/redirect/7f9744e4-74f4-4317-851e-0a6f75f34830?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Not everyone was happy that I sat down with such a big figure on the Left though.
I've seen the comments...people have been asking why I platformed him.
Let's be honest--he has a big audience.
After all, he's a sitting governor.
By all accounts, he's the leading Democrat candidate for 2028.
I'm pretty sure he already had a platform.
But all that aside, I think this brings up a good conversation about why I went on the podcast, and why I'm glad I did.
Let's get into it...

We need to have competitive maps, so the voters are the ones who decide who represents them, and if they’re not happy, they have the ability to fire that individual. But that’s not what Kathy Hochul thinks. Redistricting is just another weapon to attack Republicans and stop President Trump.

While California and Texas are fighting each other over redrawing their congressional maps, Kathy Hochul, Hakeem Jeffries and the New York Democrats are scheming to steal our district. Remember when they tried to illegally gerrymander our seat into Park Slope? | | Hochul’s gerrymandering plan is wrong. It’s very corrupt. It takes away the voice of the people. We need to have competitive maps, so the voters are the ones who decide who represents them, and if they’re not happy, they have the ability to fire that individual. But that’s not what Kathy Hochul thinks. Redistricting is just another weapon to attack Republicans and stop President Trump. Friends, help me fight back! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Thanks for your support, Nicole | Nicole for New York, PO Box 60487, Staten Island, NY 10306

name: Squad Victory HQ
subject: Deploying troops in U.S. cities. Undermining local leadership. Instilling fear in the public.
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250909-1515-foote&t=1001&akid=1515%2E342411%2EyGPUyY ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

Donald Trump is not trying to keep Americans safe. He’s trying to control
us.

What started in Los Angeles... then moved to Washington, D.C.... is now
expanding. Trump is eyeing Chicago — and other major cities — for a
so-called "crime crackdown" that has nothing to do with public safety and
everything to do with terror and intimidation.^1

This is the authoritarian playbook in action.

Deploying troops in U.S. cities. Undermining local leadership. Instilling
fear in the public. Trump is militarizing America — not to protect us, but
to consolidate power and distract from his broken promises, like lowering
the cost of living.

This is a pivotal moment — and the Squad Victory Fund is building the
resistance. We’re supporting bold, progressive leaders who are fighting
back in Congress and in the streets, amplifying the truth, and organizing
the grassroots power it will take to stop Trump’s authoritarian overreach
before it spreads even further.

But we need your support to keep going.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250909-movement.iBeUf1&refcode=em20250909-1515&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1515%2E342411%2EyGPUyY ]Will you chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can afford to meet this
moment with urgency and fight back? We cannot allow this to become
normalized.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250909-movement.iBeUf1&refcode=em20250909-1515&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1515%2E342411%2EyGPUyY ]Contribute ››

Our movement is about justice, dignity, and real safety—not fear and
federal boots on city streets.

In solidarity,

Squad Victory HQ

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

name: Ryan Girdusky, 1776 Project Foundation
subject: Tucker Carlson answered my prayers.
body:
He did a MIRACLE for me. My message to him
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e18584086/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvR3R4d1B3TXlrSA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDk/LbmNsTEVZSVhiMA/qP2hpZHM9bmNEWlFTclA4Y25ZeVhscw/gaMBURA/sbk353630ca)
|
---
| | Tucker Carlson, _from the bottom of my heart_ , _**thank you!**_

Your courage changed the lives of **_MILLIONS_** of children, and my life as well. _Let me explain..._
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e18584086/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS8xNzc2LWZvdW5kYXRpb24vZm5hbWVwcmF5ZXJzLWFuc3dlcmVkcHJheWVycy1lbS1vbS8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDk/LbmNsTEVZSVhiMA/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImcmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW10cG9zaXRpb249MSZ1dG1fdGVybT0yMTQ0M193cjE/gaMBURA/sdn8f885e47)
---
Patriot, it all started during the pandemic. I discovered the _**HORROR**_ of what our children are being taught in schools.
__My own Godson had been given a so-called “kids’ book” that accused police of being racist and labeled every white child as an “oppressor.”__

Thanks to the **RIDICULOUS** school shutdowns, kids were forced to take classes remotely...
**... And for the FIRST TIME EVER, parents were able to listen in and hear exactly what their kids were being taught!**

>> Radical leftist teachers were __**BRAINWASHING**__ students with radical, Anti-American propaganda.
>> Education standards were __**PLUMMETING**__ as schools prioritized **INDOCTRINATION** over EDUCATION.

>> Parents were being _lied_ to and _mistreated_.

>> Students were being _groomed_ and _indoctrinated_ with a sick brand of sexual woke-ism.

**Soros and his WOKE army were spending BILLIONS to indoctrinate, brainwash, and ROT the minds of our children._And the WORST PART..._**

...There wasn’t a SINGLE conservative group doing **ANYTHING TO STOP HIM**.

**These conservative parents and school board members were ABANDONED by the establishment to fight against the JUGGERNAUT Soros created.**

_**Alone in my apartment, I decided to do SOMETHING and launched an organization that would change the entire political landscape.**_

The __1776 PROJECT PAC__ was born that day.

It was just me. No billionaires. No lobbyists. _An _empty_ bank account._

I prayed for help, and it came.

**Tucker Carlson had the courage to have me on his show and ask his viewers to make a contribution.__Within 24 hours__ , we were FLOODED with more than $100,000 in support!**

It was a **MIRACLE.**

I’ve spent the last half-decade FIGHTING and WINNING!

✅ Flipped _**270+ school board**_ seats from LIBERAL to CONSERVATIVE.
✅ Saved _**4.5 million students**_ from leftist indoctrination.
✅ Built the _**FIRST**_ national movement dedicated to saving schools.

And now we’re _**EXPANDING**_ our mission with the 1776 Project Foundation!

-> We’re **BUILDING** an **ARMY of PATRIOTIC** education officials and parents!

-> We’re **SUPPLYING** school boards with **CRITICAL** policies to _**LASER FOCUS**_ and **DESTROY** the leftist indoctrination!

-> We’re **PROVIDING** a**LETHAL** weapon (our 167-page school board member guide) that trains every Conservative school board member to dismember the radical left’s insanity!

->We’re **ARMING** parents with a **POWERFUL** weapon (a parents’ guide to school board advocacy) that shows them how to TARGET and CRUSH radicalism in schools.

We’re not just EDUCATING parents and EQUIPPING school board members... _**We're DESTROYING Soros’s plans and building a NEW Conservative-led power structure to SAVE OUR SCHOOLS!**_

But we can’t do any of it without __**YOU!**__

-> Your help means we can build up our ARMY of conservative school board members and parents.

_**- > Your help means we can IMPLEMENT Trump’s executive orders BANNING CRT and transgender ideology in schools!**_

_**- > Your help with just $5 can supply our DEVASTATING weapon (our 167-page school board member guide) to school board members!**_

And any donation you give is __**TAX DEDUCIBLE!!**__

[_**So if you can provide just $5, you can physically put a guidebook in the hands of a school board member.**_](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e18584086/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS8xNzc2LWZvdW5kYXRpb24vZm5hbWVwcmF5ZXJzLWFuc3dlcmVkcHJheWVycy1lbS1vbS8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDk/LbmNsTEVZSVhiMA/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImcmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW10cG9zaXRpb249MSZ1dG1fdGVybT0yMTQ0M193cjE/gaMBURA/sdn8f885e47)
---
[ SPONSOR A GUIDEBOOK! ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e18584086/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS8xNzc2LWZvdW5kYXRpb24vZm5hbWVwcmF5ZXJzLWFuc3dlcmVkcHJheWVycy1lbS1vbS8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDk/LbmNsTEVZSVhiMA/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImcmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW10cG9zaXRpb249MSZ1dG1fdGVybT0yMTQ0M193cjE/gaMBURA/sdn8f885e47)
---
You’ve been a blessing to me and to millions of kids across America. But this fight is about to get even bigger, even harder, and even more urgent.

_**_[If you can, we’d be HONORED to have your support in the next leg of this fight!](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e18584086/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS8xNzc2LWZvdW5kYXRpb24vZm5hbWVwcmF5ZXJzLWFuc3dlcmVkcHJheWVycy1lbS1vbS8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDk/LbmNsTEVZSVhiMA/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImcmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW10cG9zaXRpb249MSZ1dG1fdGVybT0yMTQ0M193cjE/gaMBURA/sdn8f885e47)_**_

Thank you,
Ryan Girdusky

Let me explain... Patriot, it all started during the pandemic. I discovered the HORROR of what our children are being taught in schools. My own Godson had been given a so-called “kids’ book” that accused police of being racist and labeled every white child as an “oppressor.” Thanks to the RIDICULOUS school shutdowns, kids were forced to take classes remotely... ... And for the FIRST TIME EVER, parents were able to listen in and hear exactly what their kids were being taught! > Radical leftist teachers were BRAINWASHING students with radical, Anti-American propaganda. > Education standards were PLUMMETING as schools prioritized INDOCTRINATION over EDUCATION. > Parents were being lied to and mistreated. > Students were being groomed and indoctrinated with a sick brand of sexual woke-ism. Soros and his WOKE army were spending BILLIONS to indoctrinate, brainwash, and ROT the minds of our children.And the WORST PART... ...There wasn’t a SINGLE conservative group doing ANYTHING TO STOP HIM. These conservative parents and school board members were ABANDONED by the establishment to fight against the JUGGERNAUT Soros created. Alone in my apartment, I decided to do SOMETHING and launched an organization that would change the entire political landscape. The 1776 PROJECT PAC was born that day. It was just me. No billionaires. No lobbyists. An empty bank account. I prayed for help, and it came. Tucker Carlson had the courage to have me on his show and ask his viewers to make a contribution.Within 24 hours , we were FLOODED with more than $100,000 in support! It was a MIRACLE. I’ve spent the last half-decade FIGHTING and WINNING! ✅ Flipped 270+ school board seats from LIBERAL to CONSERVATIVE. ✅ Saved 4.5 million students from leftist indoctrination. ✅ Built the FIRST national movement dedicated to saving schools. And now we’re EXPANDING our mission with the 1776 Project Foundation! -> We’re BUILDING an ARMY of PATRIOTIC education officials and parents! -> We’re SUPPLYING school boards with CRITICAL policies to LASER FOCUS and DESTROY the leftist indoctrination! -> We’re PROVIDING aLETHAL weapon (our 167-page school board member guide) that trains every Conservative school board member to dismember the radical left’s insanity! ->We’re ARMING parents with a POWERFUL weapon (a parents’ guide to school board advocacy) that shows them how to TARGET and CRUSH radicalism in schools. We’re not just EDUCATING parents and EQUIPPING school board members... We're DESTROYING Soros’s plans and building a NEW Conservative-led power structure to SAVE OUR SCHOOLS! But we can’t do any of it without YOU! -> Your help means we can build up our ARMY of conservative school board members and parents. - > Your help means we can IMPLEMENT Trump’s executive orders BANNING CRT and transgender ideology in schools! - > Your help with just $5 can supply our DEVASTATING weapon (our 167-page school board member guide) to school board members! And any donation you give is TAX DEDUCIBLE!! You’ve been a blessing to me and to millions of kids across America. But this fight is about to get even bigger, even harder, and even more urgent. Thank you, Ryan Girdusky Founder, 1776 Project PAC | | | 7816 Rose Garden Lane Springfield, VA 22153 |

body:
If Republicans flip this seat, Democrats’ chances of flipping the Senate fall to zero.
#
A top GOP dark money group just released a new poll that has Chris Pappas neck-and-neck in a potential matchup against former U.S. Senator John E. Sununu, showing that this is **one of the GOP’s best opportunities to pick up a Senate seat next year.**
**Their polling memo puts it plainly:_“If Sununu runs, Chris Pappas will be in for the fight of his political career.”_**
[**If that’s all you need to know, please rush a donation right now to help keep NH’s Senate seat blue and preserve Democrats’ chances of flipping the Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250909_1_poll?refcode=em20250909-2274&amount=10&refcode2=2274_582294_1jqNs2&akid=2274%2E582294%2E1jqNs2)
Republicans know that the path to Senate control runs through New Hampshire. If they flip this Senate seat, Democrats have zero chance of winning back the majority.
**With two points between them and a four-point margin of error, Chris and Sununu are in a statistical tie.** And it’s only a matter of time until GOP billionaires and special interests start dumping money into New Hampshire.
[**That’s why we need our supporters to step up right now. Can you chip in $10 today to help us build the grassroots operation we need to elect Chris, keep this seat blue, and help Democrats flip the Senate?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250909_1_poll?refcode=em20250909-2274&amount=10&refcode2=2274_582294_1jqNs2&akid=2274%2E582294%2E1jqNs2)
**[Donate $10 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250909_1_poll?amount=10&refcode=em20250909-2274&refcode2=2274_582294_1jqNs2&akid=2274%2E582294%2E1jqNs2)**
With your support we’ll protect this seat and send Chris to the Senate to fight for working families.
Thank you for being part of this team,
Team Pappas
P.S. This is one of the most competitive races in the country, and the outcome in New Hampshire will determine the balance of power in Washington. With national Republicans eyeing this race, we can’t afford to fall behind. [**Help us fight back by rushing a donation now.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250909_1_poll?refcode=em20250909-2274&amount=10&refcode2=2274_582294_1jqNs2&akid=2274%2E582294%2E1jqNs2)

Friend, The radical Left is laser-focused on one goal: **taking back the Senate.**

They want a blank check to ram through their woke agenda of universal healthcare, the Green New Deal, and every crazy policy you and I have fought against.

_If we lose, we lose it all._

Universal healthcare will destroy your choices. The Green New Deal will destroy American jobs and cripple our economy. **They’ll trample on our freedom, and we’ll be forced to live in their utopian nightmare.**

name: Wes Moore
subject: I’d be grateful to have your support
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
Together, we can make sure we’re ready for whatever attacks come our way.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/partner_ms_wes_em_dh_20250909-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250909-4317&refcode2=4317_400544_zW8bf7&akid=4317%2E400544%2EzW8bf7)
Hey — it's Wes Moore.
I wanted to make sure you heard the news from me:**I’m proud to announce that I’m running for another term as Governor of Maryland.**
Our work to make this Maryland’s decade is just getting started, and I’m incredibly grateful to have Deb Haaland’s support in this race. Now, I’m asking if you’ll have my back, too.
**[Would you please split a contribution of $5 – or any amount that feels right to you – between my campaign and Deb Haaland? I can’t win this race without you.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/partner_ms_wes_em_dh_20250909-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250909-4317&refcode2=4317_400544_zW8bf7&akid=4317%2E400544%2EzW8bf7)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/partner_ms_wes_em_dh_20250909-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250909-4317&refcode2=4317_400544_zW8bf7&akid=4317%2E400544%2EzW8bf7)**
Over the past three years, we’ve made tremendous strides to support Maryland families. From ensuring our children receive a world-class education, to building pathways to good jobs, to lowering taxes for the middle class, I couldn’t be prouder of how far we’ve come together.
But these past couple weeks have made one thing crystal clear: **I am now in Donald Trump’s sights. Republicans are already gearing up to take my seat in 2026.**
They’re afraid of the results we’ve delivered for Maryland. From public safety improvements to funding public education, our opponents are trying to roll it all back.
But here’s what they don’t know: I don’t back down from a fight. If they want to tear down our accomplishments, _let them try._
That’s why I need you with me. In order to stay in this fight, I’m asking for your early support as we launch our reelection so we can keep delivering results for Maryland.
[**Together, we can make sure we’re ready for whatever attacks come our way. I’d be so grateful if you’d split a $5 donation between my campaign and Deb Haaland today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/partner_ms_wes_em_dh_20250909-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250909-4317&refcode2=4317_400544_zW8bf7&akid=4317%2E400544%2EzW8bf7)
Elevate,
Wes
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Sign up for Texts](https://deb4gov.us/text-me)
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=1&akid=4317%2E400544%2EzW8bf7)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=2&akid=4317%2E400544%2EzW8bf7)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

I wanted to make sure you heard the news from me:I’m proud to announce that I’m running for another term as Governor of Maryland. Our work to make this Maryland’s decade is just getting started, and I’m incredibly grateful to have Deb Haaland’s support in this race. Now, I’m asking if you’ll have my back, too. Over the past three years, we’ve made tremendous strides to support Maryland families. From ensuring our children receive a world-class education, to building pathways to good jobs, to lowering taxes for the middle class, I couldn’t be prouder of how far we’ve come together. subject: Add your name: endorse George today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by George Latimer for Congress
body:
Grassroots support is what drives real change — add your name today.

George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/-Phg2RhDIEGJVPbb5vK87g2?unsubscribedata=DvZlXVSQtwqWvvktRa%2FEqZZ8Ykfgz%2BjD8ctGhx0I%2FcT%2FVmQFh%2BsKoSp0XBEMr%2B9TwMUZxyzUhp0aFSyXKvCp27qUsXbahejRf4I6miIIP5RNDOrJXWjdfFF2FpqE77eQPLZT5Rp5F%2BABUWopEG1C%2FRXZUSAOmqcqfOb8i42X51KkvTJkhos99hzJhO3Lc65g2H0oHi3T42bBDQ61aiMsQbRxA%2Bh2Cg8eEGsSjg2QeZdiQzSw3v8YZw99ehlvsOS8ABx%2FNv8YBoiDtywAWQPZ05y4EXgVdlSnPHJws5AGd04kpkuJoZh%2FxcYsbIZADCjeUD45UwPUlPwvBKsTznReLXQ8qshKMg0raScMsQdfKTkRw5SRJIO4fKfBc7EaXqFZV9uO0PimyOo9dtZ%2BgOJXtFewjvuhQxvqty4NAb6yGxTxT4Ct2GUUAst0Ip%2FYvYNr)

body:
We're personally asking you to endorse Chrissy's campaign.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114911387/568559796/-1072566757?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzg2YmY2Yi05ZThkLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BHI5Q2Dns0pYRuY_K0MP4GabD9vhwfmHODl2Pq37yUY=&emci=98f5537a-ba8c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=1c86bf6b-9e8d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=21278485)
