Derek, Chrissy has spent this year helping to recruit good Democrats to run for Congress, helping them raise money, and making endorsements in local races. All while doing her job in Washington, D.C. and Pennsylvania. Now she needs you. In a few paragraphs, we’re going to ask you to endorse her.
Here’s why. She’s fighting tirelessly in Congress to defend women’s rights, lower costs for families, and protect vital programs like Social Security and Medicare. She tried to stop the Republican Budget bill and is constantly urging Congressional Republicans to do the right thing for our country and stand up to President Trump.
Chrissy will never stop fighting to hold this administration accountable and push back against its reckless and dangerous agenda. But she already has not one but two opponents, including a wealthy Republican businessman. With so much at stake, we need to show this opponent and the entire country that our community stands united.
Derek, you are the core of our movement. As we prepare for the difficult months ahead, Chrissy needs to know she has your support.

Our goal is to get 250 supporters to officially endorse the campaign before midnight tonight.
[**Will you add your name to our list of key supporters and show Chrissy you have her back?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114911395/568559811/-1202250114?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1147-su-nd&refcode=jtk1147-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzg2YmY2Yi05ZThkLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BHI5Q2Dns0pYRuY_K0MP4GabD9vhwfmHODl2Pq37yUY=&emci=98f5537a-ba8c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=1c86bf6b-9e8d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=21278485)

I wanted to make sure you saw this important update on the Colorado gubernatorial race:

**A serious Republican opponent just announced she is running to be Colorado’s next governor. **
| | [DONATE NOW >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114912188/568562489/43140476?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk904-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDc1NjYxYi05ZjhkLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M8reyKHEwo1vwYNxSc_XKzWpadeBx1JOiLuSpn_kt_w=)

_Look, if she wins, she will govern for Donald Trump, not for Colorado families. _
I don’t mean to scare you, but these are the facts:
* **She has bragged about being one of Trump’s staunchest supporters in Colorado. **
* **She supported Trump’s dangerous budget that blew a huge hole in Colorado’s state budget and will kick tens of thousands of Coloradans off of Medicaid and close rural hospitals and nursing homes. **
* **She wants to criminalize abortion, even in cases of rape or incest.**

She’s all in on Trump’s economic agenda—a disaster for Colorado families, workers, and small businesses:
* **His tariffs are driving up prices on everything from groceries to housing, while small businesses get crushed. **
* **His policies are killing jobs and slowing our economy to a crawl. **
* **He racked up a $3 trillion deficit, leaving the bill to our kids and grandkids.**

Colorado deserves a governor who protects freedom, respects families, and fights for everyday Coloradans. This race could be extremely close, and we can’t let a Republican extremist like this be in charge of Colorado.
**[So I have to ask, without another moment to spare: Will you rush a donation right now to help Michael Bennet defeat this opponent? Every donation following this announcement will help us send a clear message about the strength of our campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114912190/568562491/43140476?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk904-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDc1NjYxYi05ZjhkLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M8reyKHEwo1vwYNxSc_XKzWpadeBx1JOiLuSpn_kt_w=)**

subject: Arizona families can’t afford Schweikert’s Medicaid cuts.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARLENE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Schweikert put healthcare for hundreds of thousands of Arizonans on the line.

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114912600/568563829/-1882479441?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.09_Medicaid_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjg0ZmI0Y2YtOWY4ZC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kNhgHuH3Ng8RvvQR7Oas9tISZ0IQmH1YukJ5MvI-mEg=)
---
We’ll get straight to the point: **David Schweikert voted for the largest Medicaid cut in U.S. history** — putting healthcare for over 31,000 people in AZ-01 on the line. It’s shameful. Here in Arizona:
* Over 2 million people rely on Medicaid for basic healthcare.
* Medicaid covers around 40% of births statewide.
* Medicaid funding helps keep rural hospitals open — and now five are at risk of closure.

_If the GOP’s cut to Medicaid wasn’t bad enough_ , a recent Supreme Court decision gave states the green light to block Medicaid funding for Planned Parenthood and other providers — slashing access to reproductive healthcare and preventative health services for families who need it most. **The bottom line is this: Women, seniors, folks with disabilities, and rural communities will be harmed the most._And Schweikert helped make it happen._** Marlene is running for Congress to defeat Trump puppet David Schweikert and be the healthcare champion Arizonans deserve. **[_But she needs your help. Will you chip in $5 today to help elect a fierce leader who will protect Medicaid and healthcare for every Arizonan?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114912601/568563831/-74077192?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.09_Medicaid_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjg0ZmI0Y2YtOWY4ZC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kNhgHuH3Ng8RvvQR7Oas9tISZ0IQmH1YukJ5MvI-mEg=)** | [If you’ve saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will be processed immediately:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114912603/568563832/-74077192?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.09_Medicaid_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjg0ZmI0Y2YtOWY4ZC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kNhgHuH3Ng8RvvQR7Oas9tISZ0IQmH1YukJ5MvI-mEg=)

clean_body: Schweikert put healthcare for hundreds of thousands of Arizonans on the line. | | = We’ll get straight to the point: David Schweikert voted for the largest Medicaid cut in U.S. history — putting healthcare for over 31,000 people in AZ-01 on the line. It’s shameful. Here in Arizona: Over 2 million people rely on Medicaid for basic healthcare. Medicaid covers around 40% of births statewide. Medicaid funding helps keep rural hospitals open — and now five are at risk of closure. If the GOP’s cut to Medicaid wasn’t bad enough , a recent Supreme Court decision gave states the green light to block Medicaid funding for Planned Parenthood and other providers — slashing access to reproductive healthcare and preventative health services for families who need it most. The bottom line is this: Women, seniors, folks with disabilities, and rural communities will be harmed the most.And Schweikert helped make it happen. Marlene is running for Congress to defeat Trump puppet David Schweikert and be the healthcare champion Arizonans deserve. =** | = | | = | = | = | = | = | = It’s time to unseat the spineless hypocrite who put our neighbors’ lives at risk. # Biden and Powell covered up nearly a million job losses: report
Just-released revised **[annual job numbers have exposed](https://substack.com/redirect/96b694aa-cf28-4e44-a0ce-e08b8be3c8a0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** the scale of economic downturn during Joe Biden's administration, overseen by as well by Fed Chair Jerome Powell.
The revised numbers slashed 911,000 jobs from initial estimates from March 2024 ro 2024 before March 2025, signaling alarming economic weakness.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/62e44bcd-1533-4071-b19c-4b232d9f1bfa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Largest Revision Since 2009:** The downward revision, including updated business data, marks the biggest adjustment since the Great Recession, reflecting a weaker labor market than previously thought.
* **Sector-Specific Job Losses:** Leisure and hospitality, professional services, and retail faced the largest cuts, with reductions of 176,000, 158,000, and 126,200 jobs, respectively, while government jobs fell by 31,000.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b18acd65-7fbb-4483-b725-50fdd18852cf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Political Heat on BLS:** The revisions intensify scrutiny on the Bureau of Labor Statistics, already criticized by the White House, following Trump's firing of Commissioner Erika McEntarfer after July's weak report.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b45ce395-edb1-45c9-b56b-3a121f1c8520?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Fed Faces Rate Pressure:** The updated data will add serious weight to President Trump's calls for Federal Reserve rate cuts, with traders now expecting at minimum a quarter-point reduction in September to address the softening labor market.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5ed9c972-512e-491a-a665-0a03967fea78?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **President Trump just prior** to the release of the numbers quoted Greg Faranello on Fox Business in a Truth Social post taking a swipe at the handling of monetary policy by the Federal Reserve chair Jerome Powell:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/96b694aa-cf28-4e44-a0ce-e08b8be3c8a0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Trump wrote:**
_" If the Fed had followed what we published, they would have raised rates in early 2021. The entire Organization is broken. It needs to be fixed. They need to use modern sources of information.We strongly disagree with Ken Griffin. We think Incompetence is more important than to defend theoretical independence. He ("Too Late!") has done a terrible job since he adapted a two target? It's too low, it's too rigid, they followed Data that's years delayed. They don't believe that money supply matters, it's like the Pope not believing in Jesus. We think that's a much bigger problem than this notion that they are dependent, or they're not independent." Jay Hatfield Infrastructure Capital Advisors, CEO & CIO, on Maria B. "Chair Powell was late to raise rates, they need to come down here, there's no question about it. He's dragging his feet. The Feds going to come down here 50, 75, Maybe 100." Greg Faranello, American Securities on Maria B._
* **Swift Response:** Vice President J.D. Vance, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent, Conservative pundit Scott Jennings and the financial outlet Zerohedge posted scathing commentary about the Bureau of Labor Statistics and the handling of the economy under Biden as well as Powell's interest rate policy.

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7483f7dc-6bfe-4322-9800-eff31ef18abe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/78f636a5-7db7-4a2f-88d5-b0bbd5c80e51?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

# **Ifrah Law heightens the success of iGaming clients through every phase of their business cycle**
Led by a managing partner who has been **[at the center of every significant court case affecting online gaming,](https://substack.com/redirect/38e9e412-2a95-456a-b1ca-fb95ab1630c7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Ifrah Law operates at the cutting edge of technology, innovation, and regulation.
Its lawyers represent industry players throughout the entire business cycle, from the formation of a corporation or licensing relationship, through marketing, partnering, growth, and disputes, to profitable exits.
We're proud to share that all partners at Ifrah Law have been ranked by Chambers and Partners, the gold standard for evaluating legal excellence worldwide.

# Christian Values comes to Wall Street with faith-aligned investment options
Bountiful Financial and S&P Dow Jones Indices launched the S&P 500 Christian Values Screened Index on September 8, 2025, **[empowering evangelical investors](https://substack.com/redirect/e3f0ab4d-ff10-4f76-930b-5be972371e6f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to align portfolios with their beliefs by screening out companies tied to abortion, gambling, and tobacco.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e3f0ab4d-ff10-4f76-930b-5be972371e6f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **S &P Collaboration Yields Index:** Bountiful Financial partnered with S&P Dow Jones Indices after a year of collaboration to create a tailored index for evangelical Christian investors.
* **Screens Exclude Controversial Industries:** The index filters out S&P 500 companies involved in activities like stem cell research, adult entertainment, and violent video games.
* **ETFs Planned for Launch:** Bountiful Financial and S&P plan to introduce ETFs based on the Christian values index later in 2025.
* **Expands Faith-Based Offerings:** Bountiful Financial builds on prior Roman Catholic and Latter-Day Saints index funds, broadening faith-aligned investment options.

* * *
* * *
# After huge Microsoft AI deal, Neibus shares surge 40%
AI manufacturer Nebius Group's stock **[surged 40% Tuesday](https://substack.com/redirect/093af77b-d91f-4b1a-adc9-1c5337e580f7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after securing a $17.4 billion deal to supply Microsoft with AI infrastructure, highlighting booming demand for GPU-powered cloud computing.
* **Massive Contract Value** : The five-year agreement with Microsoft, potentially worth $19.4 billion, includes $2 billion in optional services, boosting Nebius' revenue visibility through 2031.
* **Strategic U.S. Expansion** : Nebius, formerly Yandex NV, will deliver Nvidia GPU resources from its new Vineland, New Jersey data center, starting later this year.
* **Market Confidence Soars** : The deal validates Nebius' AI infrastructure strategy, with shares doubling in 2025, reflecting strong investor optimism in its growth potential.
* **Competitive Landscape Shifts** : The pact lifts rival CoreWeave's stock by 8%, signaling robust industry demand for AI computing resources amid a global tech race.

* * *
* * *
# Whistleblower claims Meta engineers had unrestricted access to user data
A former Meta employee **[sued the tech giant Monday,](https://substack.com/redirect/012f2b3c-2b71-4675-96f9-cc2458f40c52?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** alleging WhatsApp's cybersecurity failures, including unrestricted data access by 1,500 engineers, endangered user privacy, prompting a fierce rebuttal from Meta.
* **Unrestricted Data Access:** Approximately 1,500 WhatsApp engineers could access sensitive user data, like contact info and IP addresses, without oversight, violating a 2020 FTC privacy settlement.
* **Retaliation Against Whistleblower:** Attaullah Baig, WhatsApp's former security head, faced negative performance reviews and termination after reporting security issues to Meta's leadership, including CEO Mark Zuckerberg.
* **Inadequate Security Measures:** WhatsApp lacked a 24-hour security operations center and systems to track data access, posing regulatory compliance risks, according to Baig's lawsuit filed in California.
* **Meta Disputes Claims:** Meta denied the allegations, calling them distorted and emphasizing their commitment to user privacy, while downplaying Baig's role and alleging poor performance led to his firing.

* * *
* * *
# UAW Union is furious with Hyundai after ICE Bust
The United Auto Workers **[union blasted Hyundai's "disgraceful"](https://substack.com/redirect/d8c171c5-61bb-4664-8875-976363e19246?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** safety record after a federal immigration raid detained 475 workers, mostly subcontractors, at a Georgia battery plant, spotlighting hazardous conditions and labor exploitation.
* **Three Worker Deaths** : UAW reports three workplace fatalities at Hyundai facilities in two years, criticizing the company's lax safety standards and inadequate worker protections.
* **Subcontractor Labor Issues** : Most detained workers were from subcontractors, not Hyundai directly, raising concerns about oversight and reliance on exploited immigrant labor.
* **Union Demands Action** : UAW calls for federal investigations by OSHA and NLRB to enforce stricter safety measures and protect workers' rights at Hyundai plants.
* **Immigration Raid Fallout** : The raid, detaining 300 South Korean workers, has strained U.S.-South Korea relations, with Seoul negotiating their release and return.

Biden and Powell covered up nearly a million job losses: report Just-released revised the scale of economic downturn during Joe Biden's administration, overseen by as well by Fed Chair Jerome Powell. The revised numbers slashed 911,000 jobs from initial estimates from March 2024 ro 2024 before March 2025, signaling alarming economic weakness. | | ---|---|--- Largest Revision Since 2009: The downward revision, including updated business data, marks the biggest adjustment since the Great Recession, reflecting a weaker labor market than previously thought. Sector-Specific Job Losses: Leisure and hospitality, professional services, and retail faced the largest cuts, with reductions of 176,000, 158,000, and 126,200 jobs, respectively, while government jobs fell by 31,000. | | ---|---|--- Political Heat on BLS: The revisions intensify scrutiny on the Bureau of Labor Statistics, already criticized by the White House, following Trump's firing of Commissioner Erika McEntarfer after July's weak report. | | ---|---|--- Fed Faces Rate Pressure: The updated data will add serious weight to President Trump's calls for Federal Reserve rate cuts, with traders now expecting at minimum a quarter-point reduction in September to address the softening labor market. | | ---|---|--- President Trump just prior to the release of the numbers quoted Greg Faranello on Fox Business in a Truth Social post taking a swipe at the handling of monetary policy by the Federal Reserve chair Jerome Powell: | | ---|---|--- Trump wrote: " If the Fed had followed what we published, they would have raised rates in early 2021. The entire Organization is broken. It needs to be fixed. They need to use modern sources of information.We strongly disagree with Ken Griffin. We think Incompetence is more important than to defend theoretical independence. He ("Too Late!") has done a terrible job since he adapted a two target? It's too low, it's too rigid, they followed Data that's years delayed. They don't believe that money supply matters, it's like the Pope not believing in Jesus. We think that's a much bigger problem than this notion that they are dependent, or they're not independent." Jay Hatfield Infrastructure Capital Advisors, CEO & CIO, on Maria B. "Chair Powell was late to raise rates, they need to come down here, there's no question about it. He's dragging his feet. The Feds going to come down here 50, 75, Maybe 100." Greg Faranello, American Securities on Maria B. Swift Response: Vice President J.D. Vance, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent, Conservative pundit Scott Jennings and the financial outlet Zerohedge posted scathing commentary about the Bureau of Labor Statistics and the handling of the economy under Biden as well as Powell's interest rate policy. | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- Ifrah Law heightens the success of iGaming clients through every phase of their business cycle Led by a managing partner who has been Ifrah Law operates at the cutting edge of technology, innovation, and regulation. Its lawyers represent industry players throughout the entire business cycle, from the formation of a corporation or licensing relationship, through marketing, partnering, growth, and disputes, to profitable exits. We're proud to share that all partners at Ifrah Law have been ranked by Chambers and Partners, the gold standard for evaluating legal excellence worldwide. | | ---|---|--- Christian Values comes to Wall Street with faith-aligned investment options Bountiful Financial and S&P Dow Jones Indices launched the S&P 500 Christian Values Screened Index on September 8, 2025, to align portfolios with their beliefs by screening out companies tied to abortion, gambling, and tobacco. | | ---|---|--- S &P Collaboration Yields Index: Bountiful Financial partnered with S&P Dow Jones Indices after a year of collaboration to create a tailored index for evangelical Christian investors. Screens Exclude Controversial Industries: The index filters out S&P 500 companies involved in activities like stem cell research, adult entertainment, and violent video games. ETFs Planned for Launch: Bountiful Financial and S&P plan to introduce ETFs based on the Christian values index later in 2025. Expands Faith-Based Offerings: Bountiful Financial builds on prior Roman Catholic and Latter-Day Saints index funds, broadening faith-aligned investment options. After huge Microsoft AI deal, Neibus shares surge 40% AI manufacturer Nebius Group's stock after securing a $17.4 billion deal to supply Microsoft with AI infrastructure, highlighting booming demand for GPU-powered cloud computing. Massive Contract Value : The five-year agreement with Microsoft, potentially worth $19.4 billion, includes $2 billion in optional services, boosting Nebius' revenue visibility through 2031. Strategic U.S. Expansion : Nebius, formerly Yandex NV, will deliver Nvidia GPU resources from its new Vineland, New Jersey data center, starting later this year. Market Confidence Soars : The deal validates Nebius' AI infrastructure strategy, with shares doubling in 2025, reflecting strong investor optimism in its growth potential. Competitive Landscape Shifts : The pact lifts rival CoreWeave's stock by 8%, signaling robust industry demand for AI computing resources amid a global tech race. Whistleblower claims Meta engineers had unrestricted access to user data A former Meta employee alleging WhatsApp's cybersecurity failures, including unrestricted data access by 1,500 engineers, endangered user privacy, prompting a fierce rebuttal from Meta. Unrestricted Data Access: Approximately 1,500 WhatsApp engineers could access sensitive user data, like contact info and IP addresses, without oversight, violating a 2020 FTC privacy settlement. Retaliation Against Whistleblower: Attaullah Baig, WhatsApp's former security head, faced negative performance reviews and termination after reporting security issues to Meta's leadership, including CEO Mark Zuckerberg. Inadequate Security Measures: WhatsApp lacked a 24-hour security operations center and systems to track data access, posing regulatory compliance risks, according to Baig's lawsuit filed in California. Meta Disputes Claims: Meta denied the allegations, calling them distorted and emphasizing their commitment to user privacy, while downplaying Baig's role and alleging poor performance led to his firing. UAW Union is furious with Hyundai after ICE Bust The United Auto Workers safety record after a federal immigration raid detained 475 workers, mostly subcontractors, at a Georgia battery plant, spotlighting hazardous conditions and labor exploitation. Three Worker Deaths : UAW reports three workplace fatalities at Hyundai facilities in two years, criticizing the company's lax safety standards and inadequate worker protections. Subcontractor Labor Issues : Most detained workers were from subcontractors, not Hyundai directly, raising concerns about oversight and reliance on exploited immigrant labor. Union Demands Action : UAW calls for federal investigations by OSHA and NLRB to enforce stricter safety measures and protect workers' rights at Hyundai plants. Immigration Raid Fallout : The raid, detaining 300 South Korean workers, has strained U.S.-South Korea relations, with Seoul negotiating their release and return. * The Capitalist is a reader-supported publication. name: Rob Bonta
subject: re: ICE in California
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642]
body:
[ https://act.robbonta.com/go/4?refcode=em250909&t=1001&akid=1943%2E1088799%2ExHRFzQ ]Rob Bonta

Yesterday's Supreme Court
decision clears the way for ICE agents to use someone’s race, the language
they speak, where they work, or just where they happen to be as a reason
to stop, detail, search, and seize them.

Disappointing and disturbing, to say the least.

As Attorney General, I will never stop fighting to protect your rights,
our public safety, and the freedoms we are guaranteed by the Constitution.

[ https://act.robbonta.com/survey/em-250908-pet/?t=1004&akid=1943%2E1088799%2ExHRFzQ ]Please add your name to join me in condemning this administration’s
unlawful discrimination, overreach, and abuse of power.

[ https://act.robbonta.com/survey/em-250908-pet/?t=1005&akid=1943%2E1088799%2ExHRFzQ ]ADD YOUR NAME

ICE’s immigration enforcement tactics here in California and around the
country have been aggressive and cruel.

Armed officers conducting unannounced raids wearing masks, driving
unmarked vehicles, refusing to identify themselves — this stuff is already
harmful enough to our communities — but stopping people without a shred of
evidence of any wrongdoing is just wrong.

Nowhere in our country should people be expected to live like this — their
civil rights under attack, our public safety at risk, with many afraid to
even leave their homes.

Let me be clear: Someone speaking Spanish, being at a certain location, or
doing a certain kind of work should *not* be justification for trampling
on their legal rights.

[ https://act.robbonta.com/survey/em-250908-pet/?t=1006&akid=1943%2E1088799%2ExHRFzQ ]Please sign on today to join our fight for accountability and justice.

Thanks for reading,
Rob

Attorney General of California

name: Hillary (personal)
subject: Why I am hopeful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
I know it can feel exhausting to watch the news right now. Every day, it seems like there’s another attack on our freedoms, our health care, or our democracy itself.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114913153/568565668/32658279?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-09-09_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTVmYmExNy1hMjhkLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MgcTtWuNqkeqxzHrUWLZ95rISXe9k1PlmTpOpYCpxmI=)
---
| Hi there,

I know it can feel exhausting to watch the news right now. Every day, it seems like there’s another attack on our freedoms, our health care, or our democracy itself.

What always grounds me is supporters like you. Time and again, when things feel overwhelming, we come together, we organize, and we prove that hope is stronger than fear.
---
| [GIVE NOW ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114913154/568565669/32658279?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-09-09_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTVmYmExNy1hMjhkLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MgcTtWuNqkeqxzHrUWLZ95rISXe9k1PlmTpOpYCpxmI=)
---
Michigan is at the heart of this fight. With five competitive House seats (including mine), our state has the power to flip the House and put an end to the extremism emanating from Washington.

Republicans like the DeVos family are ready to spend big to stop our momentum. But I know we have something stronger: a grassroots movement built on people who believe in each other and in the future we’re fighting for.

[_**So even if you’re tired, I hope you’ll take a moment to stand with me today. Peter, Donald Trump called his social media platform “Truth Social,” but we know there’s rarely any truth to be found there. Now, he’s trying to score cheap political points by peddling lies about Roy Cooper — and we won’t let that slide. **[If you stand with Roy Cooper and against Trump, rush a donation Thank you for being on this team,
Team Cooper
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

name: Eileen Laubacher
subject: I’m emailing to ask for $5 to defeat Boebert, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
asking for just $5
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta1c96171-30e8-4ca1-9cea-fc310db6a8ef/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T10325e09-68ac-4d25-ba51-2fc06e19dc89/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, $5. That’s the amount I am humbly asking you to chip in to my campaign today to help me defeat Lauren Boebert. Yes, just $5. $5 because I am the retired Navy Rear Admiral and Democrat running against Lauren Boebert here in Colorado. $5 because Adam Frisch only lost to Lauren Boebert by 546 votes in the closest race in the country. $5 because Lauren Boebert has never been more unpopular than she is now. And $5 because Lauren Boebert and her Super PACs are going to spend millions attacking me, and I need your help now to fight back if we’re going to send Boebert packing and flip this seat. I know $5 probably doesn’t seem like much, but combined with tens of thousands of other grassroots donors like you, we out-raised Lauren Boebert and her corporate PAC supporters last quarter. But we cannot stop here or let up. We’ve set a goal to raise another $25,000 to defeat Boebert and flip this seat blue, and right now, we are still dangerously short. [Please, can I count on you to split a donation right now between my campaign and Blue Amp Action – any amount you can afford – to help me finally defeat Lauren Boebert, flip this seat blue, and take back the House for Democrats?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te47217e4-765c-4e29-9ad9-e3c0a67bf0dd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Having the support of people like you means the world to me. Thank you, Eileen Rear Admiral Eileen Laubacher (Retired)
United States Navy
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | | REAR ADMIRAL EILEEN LAUBACHER (RET) IS A FORMER MEMBER OF THE U.S. NAVY. USE OF HER MILITARY RANK, JOB TITLES, AND PHOTOGRAPHS IN UNIFORM DOES NOT IMPLY ENDORSEMENT FROM THE DEPARTMENT OF THE NAVY OR THE DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE.

PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/loc_em_fr_20250909_laubacher-five_b2_f1_s3_c3_warmup_rs-t0?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T753fcd78-1f9b-41c9-9aa6-a80a510ea4f6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---

subject: I’m calling for RFK’s resignation. Sign on to join me

name: Donald John Trump
subject: You were on my mind the other day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Never Surrender, Inc
body:
I wrote you this letter to show my deep appreciation for you!
| | | | [](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
---
[FULL TRUMP MEMO](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
**Friend** **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)** **Top Patriot in your county**
[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Dear Friend,
As I was flying aboard Air Force One the other day, I couldn’t help but reflect on the incredible journey we’ve taken together.
We’ve been through it all — rallies that shook the political establishment, victories the experts called impossible, witch hunts that tried to break us, and endless attacks from the radical left.
And in spite of every storm we’ve faced down, one truth has remained: YOU never left my side.
You’ve been there when the Fake News said we were finished. You stood strong when the Democrats thought they could divide us. You gave me strength when the weight of these battles was heaviest. And together, we showed the entire world that this movement cannot be stopped.
[Now, more than 200 days into this historic fight to save America once again, I want to hear directly from you. >](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
I want to know what you think about our progress, our victories, and the road ahead. That’s why I’m asking you — personally — to take my 200 Days Survey.
**[TAKE SURVEY>](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)**
Your voice has always been the heartbeat of this movement. When history is written about these times, it won’t just be about me flying on Air Force One or fighting in courtrooms — it will be about millions of patriots like YOU who refused to quit.
[So today, I’m asking you to make your voice heard again. Take the survey. Show the world that this movement is stronger than ever. >](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Together, we will finish this fight. Together, we will Make America Great Again.
Sincerely, Donald J. Trump 45th and 47th President of the United States of America
[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[RESPOND TO TRUMP](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)

body:
Special Guests & County Fairs 🇺🇸

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2b8cca4e16b6/robs-nepa-rundown?e=131e83a3c2)
---
| | | | |
---
| | Good Afternoon and Happy Fall,
Rob is back in D.C. and is excited to continue fighting for all Northeastern Pennsylvanians in PA-08! Last week, the _Stop Chinese Fentanyl Act of 2025_ , legislation Rob co-sponsored, passed the House! This legislation will hold Chinese companies and officials accountable for the fentanyl epidemic plaguing our country. It also expands the definition of a “foreign opioid trafficker” to include any entity (including China’s Senior officials) involved in the production, manufacturing, distribution, or sale of synthetic opioids and precursor elements. We look forward to what Rob has next on the docket for NEPA!
Let’s dive into this week’s Rundown ⬇️
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | Rob was back in NEPA over the weekend and went all over! He welcomed Mike Lawler to NEPA, connected with voters and constituents in Dupont at the Dozynki Harvest Festival, and ended the weekend at the Luzerne County Fair. Rob loves coming back home and speaking directly to the people he represents. He’ll be back in NEPA this weekend, and we hope to see you while we’re out and about!
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| | We’re starting our Volunteer of the Week Award for the 2026 cycle! This cycle’s first Volunteer of the Week is Jack Lee, from Luzerne County. He helped the Luzerne GOP with the County Fair and tirelessly helped our campaign last cycle. Thanks for all your hard work, Jack!
---
|
---
| | Scranton Mayor Paige Cognetti announced last week that she is launching her campaign for Congress against Rob while she campaigns for another term as Mayor. Portland Paige is a political climber and far-left extremist who has backed open borders, defunding the police, and even supports taxpayer-funded sex change operations for illegal immigrants. We must stop her and her radical agenda. **Chip in now to help Rob fight back and win big in 2026!**

clean_body: Special Guests & County Fairs 🇺🇸 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Good Afternoon and Happy Fall, Rob is back in D.C. and is excited to continue fighting for all Northeastern Pennsylvanians in PA-08! Last week, the Stop Chinese Fentanyl Act of 2025 , legislation Rob co-sponsored, passed the House! This legislation will hold Chinese companies and officials accountable for the fentanyl epidemic plaguing our country. It also expands the definition of a “foreign opioid trafficker” to include any entity (including China’s Senior officials) involved in the production, manufacturing, distribution, or sale of synthetic opioids and precursor elements. We look forward to what Rob has next on the docket for NEPA! Let’s dive into this week’s Rundown ⬇️ | | | | | | | | | | | | | Rob was back in NEPA over the weekend and went all over! He welcomed Mike Lawler to NEPA, connected with voters and constituents in Dupont at the Dozynki Harvest Festival, and ended the weekend at the Luzerne County Fair. Rob loves coming back home and speaking directly to the people he represents. He’ll be back in NEPA this weekend, and we hope to see you while we’re out and about! | | | | | We’re starting our Volunteer of the Week Award for the 2026 cycle! This cycle’s first Volunteer of the Week is Jack Lee, from Luzerne County. He helped the Luzerne GOP with the County Fair and tirelessly helped our campaign last cycle. Thanks for all your hard work, Jack! | | | Scranton Mayor Paige Cognetti announced last week that she is launching her campaign for Congress against Rob while she campaigns for another term as Mayor. Portland Paige is a political climber and far-left extremist who has backed open borders, defunding the police, and even supports taxpayer-funded sex change operations for illegal immigrants. We must stop her and her radical agenda. Chip in now to help Rob fight back and win big in 2026! | | | \- Team Rob | | | | | | [Paid for by Rob for PA]() | | | | | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2025 Rob for PA. All rights reserved.

Friend, Later this month, absentee ballots will be mailed out to my district for November’s elections. I am proud to endorse Denzel McCampbell in his race for Detroit City Council. We need representatives in government who are rooted in their community and who understand how urgently people need change. **Unfortunately, Denzel’s opponent is funded by MAGA billionaires and has voted with Republicans to strip our communities of millions of dollars** —including funding for hospitals, public education, proven public safety programs, the Arab American National Museum, the Charles H. Wright Museum of African American History, and the Holocaust Memorial Center. Denzel doesn’t take a dime from corporations or GOP-leaning groups. Although he was the number one vote getter in his primary election, he’s now up against his opponent’s corporate donors and their money for ads and mailers. He**** will always fight for the people, not billionaires or corporations—which is why he needs our grassroots support. [**Right now, Denzel is busy knocking on doors and talking to constituents in his race for Detroit City Council. From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Mon, Sep 8, 2025
Subject: Denzel doesn’t take a dime from corporations or GOP-leaning groups
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
We need elected officials at all levels who have the courage to stand up to fascism and the authoritarian-in-chief.
But right now, **in my progressive city of Detroit, we have a City Council candidate who is backed by billionaires, aligned with MAGA Republicans, and friendly with Trump**.
As a State Representative, she was the only Democrat to join Republicans in forcing the Michigan legislature to end last year’s session early—while we had a Democratic trifecta and while awaiting votes on much-needed policies for water affordability, Black Maternal Health, and voting rights. She has voted against abortion rights and endorsed Republicans who’ve tried to criminalize protesters.
Last month, she was the lone Democrat who voted with Republicans to strip Detroit and our communities of millions of dollars of funding for hospitals, public education, proven public safety programs, and institutions such as the Arab American National Museum, the Charles H. Wright Museum of African American History, and the Holocaust Memorial Center.
**Thankfully, Detroiters have a choice. And I’m proud to support Denzel McCampbell for Detroit City Council.**
Denzel is a long-time ally who will fight to keep the military out of our city and stand up to Donald Trump’s authoritarian agenda.
Like me, Denzel was born and raised in Detroit, is dedicated to public service, and believes that everyone should have safe, well-resourced, and thriving neighborhoods. He has been a partner in introducing bold policies and strong constituent services programs, which are positively changing the lives of thousands of people.
Although Denzel won the Democratic primary as the #1 vote-getter, he is now up against this MAGA Democrat and her corporate donors—and ballots get mailed to voters in just a few weeks! **This weekend, Denzel officially launched his campaign for City Council in November’s general election, and I was there to support him and help him knock on doors and speak with our neighbors.**

clean_body: For over a decade, I’ve seen Denzel fight hard for equity and human rights. | | | Friend, Later this month, absentee ballots will be mailed out to my district for November’s elections. I am proud to endorse Denzel McCampbell in his race for Detroit City Council. We need representatives in government who are rooted in their community and who understand how urgently people need change. Unfortunately, Denzel’s opponent is funded by MAGA billionaires and has voted with Republicans to strip our communities of millions of dollars —including funding for hospitals, public education, proven public safety programs, the Arab American National Museum, the Charles H. Wright Museum of African American History, and the Holocaust Memorial Center. Denzel doesn’t take a dime from corporations or GOP-leaning groups. Although he was the number one vote getter in his primary election, he’s now up against his opponent’s corporate donors and their money for ads and mailers. He** will always fight for the people, not billionaires or corporations—which is why he needs our grassroots support. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, with 100% going directly to Denzel McCampbell | | | | | | | | | | Denzel is my long-time colleague and comrade who has been an essential partner in introducing bold policies and strong constituent services programs. We need elected leaders at all levels who are rooted in community. Thank you for supporting these champions for the world we deserve, including Denzel McCampbell. Thank you for your support, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib**** Date: Mon, Sep 8, 2025 Subject: Denzel doesn’t take a dime from corporations or GOP-leaning groups To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, We need elected officials at all levels who have the courage to stand up to fascism and the authoritarian-in-chief. But right now, in my progressive city of Detroit, we have a City Council candidate who is backed by billionaires, aligned with MAGA Republicans, and friendly with Trump. As a State Representative, she was the only Democrat to join Republicans in forcing the Michigan legislature to end last year’s session early—while we had a Democratic trifecta and while awaiting votes on much-needed policies for water affordability, Black Maternal Health, and voting rights. She has voted against abortion rights and endorsed Republicans who’ve tried to criminalize protesters. Last month, she was the lone Democrat who voted with Republicans to strip Detroit and our communities of millions of dollars of funding for hospitals, public education, proven public safety programs, and institutions such as the Arab American National Museum, the Charles H. Wright Museum of African American History, and the Holocaust Memorial Center. Thankfully, Detroiters have a choice. And I’m proud to support Denzel McCampbell for Detroit City Council. Denzel is a long-time ally who will fight to keep the military out of our city and stand up to Donald Trump’s authoritarian agenda. Like me, Denzel was born and raised in Detroit, is dedicated to public service, and believes that everyone should have safe, well-resourced, and thriving neighborhoods. He has been a partner in introducing bold policies and strong constituent services programs, which are positively changing the lives of thousands of people. Although Denzel won the Democratic primary as the #1 vote-getter, he is now up against this MAGA Democrat and her corporate donors—and ballots get mailed to voters in just a few weeks! This weekend, Denzel officially launched his campaign for City Council in November’s general election, and I was there to support him and help him knock on doors and speak with our neighbors. For over a decade, I’ve seen Denzel fight hard for equity and human rights—including the essential right to clean air and affordable drinking water. We recently marched with unions to demand workers’ rights: Denzel helped found the Detroit Chapter of BYP100, where he led the fight against police brutality and mass incarceration. As an elected Detroit City Charter Commissioner, Denzel led an effort to revise our city’s governing documents to center the needs of residents. Denzel is also a member of the DSA Metro Detroit chapter and a proud democratic socialist. He’s also part of the LGBTQ+ community, and I was proud to march alongside him at this summer’s Motor City Pride: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, with 100% going directly to Denzel McCampbell | | | | | | | | | Thank you so much for joining me in supporting Denzel and our democracy! In solidarity, Rashida * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: True The Vote
subject: Stand firm. Armor on. Eyes on Michigan.
body:
Pray. Serve. Vote.
| | | September 9, 2025 |
---
| Hi Friend - Some battles find you. Last week we learned that Michigan is moving forward on a new set of administrative rules that would reshape how citizens can challenge bad data on the voter rolls and how those rolls can be cancelled or corrected. If adopted as drafted, these rules risk making an already difficult process even harder — stacking the deck against citizen oversight and codifying what too often already happens in practice: keep the public in the dark and call it “clarity.” The state may want this. The people do not. We didn’t hear about the [proposed rule ](https://click.convertkit-mail2.)[changes ](https://click.convertkit-mail2.)early enough to weigh in at the outset, mercy knows we have plenty on our plate, but there are some fights you engage in because silence looks like consent. We are not complicit. We are not silent. We are preparing to collaborate with allied citizens and groups this week to challenge these moves in court, because that’s where unconstitutional overreach is stopped. We’ll keep you posted. This is a fight worth having. While we press forward in Michigan, I want to encourage you to take one simple, meaningful step today: add your comments in support of America First Legal’s petition urging the U.S. Election Assistance Commission to require documentary proof of citizenship to register for federal elections. AFL is in the arena on real cases, and this is a concrete, national lever for reform. [Let’s](https://click.convertkit-mail2.com/xmu9er6g3ph6hpe8grpa5h2pxnlllbnh28k4m/6qheh8hl7k68vzco/aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmVndWxhdGlvbnMuZ292L2RvY3VtZW50L0VBQy0yMDI1LTAyMzYtMDAwMT91dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249c3RhbmQtZmlybS1hcm1vci1vbi1leWVzLW9uLW1pY2hpZ2FuJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09bmV3c2xldHRlciZ1dG1fc291cmNlPW5ld3NsZXR0ZXIudHJ1ZXRoZXZvdGUub3Jn)[ help them push.](https://click.convertkit-mail2.com/xmu9er6g3ph6hpe8grpa5h2pxnlllbnh28k4m/6qheh8hl7k68vzco/aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmVndWxhdGlvbnMuZ292L2RvY3VtZW50L0VBQy0yMDI1LTAyMzYtMDAwMT91dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249c3RhbmQtZmlybS1hcm1vci1vbi1leWVzLW9uLW1pY2hpZ2FuJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09bmV3c2xldHRlciZ1dG1fc291cmNlPW5ld3NsZXR0ZXIudHJ1ZXRoZXZvdGUub3Jn) Many of you also joined us in prayer last week as decisions in Washington that affect our work moved forward. We still haven’t received any feedback. That’s fine. We may not. If DC does the right thing, praise God. If politics prevails, we keep going. Either way, your prayers matter. The greatest prayer is strength to walk faithfully in God’s plan, whatever comes. So here’s how you can help right now: 1) Pray. For wisdom, protection, and perseverance for all who are standing watch. 2) Act. clean_body: Pray. Serve. Vote. | | | September 9, 2025 | | Hi Friend - Some battles find you. Last week we learned that Michigan is moving forward on a new set of administrative rules that would reshape how citizens can challenge bad data on the voter rolls and how those rolls can be cancelled or corrected. If adopted as drafted, these rules risk making an already difficult process even harder — stacking the deck against citizen oversight and codifying what too often already happens in practice: keep the public in the dark and call it “clarity.” The state may want this. The people do not. We didn’t hear about the enough to weigh in at the outset, mercy knows we have plenty on our plate, but there are some fights you engage in because silence looks like consent. We are not complicit. We are not silent. We are preparing to collaborate with allied citizens and groups this week to challenge these moves in court, because that’s where unconstitutional overreach is stopped. We’ll keep you posted. This is a fight worth having. While we press forward in Michigan, I want to encourage you to take one simple, meaningful step today: add your comments in support of America First Legal’s petition urging the U.S. Election Assistance Commission to require documentary proof of citizenship to register for federal elections. AFL is in the arena on real cases, and this is a concrete, national lever for reform. Many of you also joined us in prayer last week as decisions in Washington that affect our work moved forward. We still haven’t received any feedback. That’s fine. We may not. If DC does the right thing, praise God. If politics prevails, we keep going. Either way, your prayers matter. The greatest prayer is strength to walk faithfully in God’s plan, whatever comes. So here’s how you can help right now: 1) Pray. For wisdom, protection, and perseverance for all who are standing watch. 2) Act. support of proof of citizenship to register to vote 3) Stand with us. Share this message. Encourage one more person to get signed up and get involved. Soon we will be introducing a new community platform that will allow us all to connect and engage like never before! 4) If you’re able, please support the work that keeps the lights on and the lawsuits moving. And above all ... keep the faith. Never quit. Ephesians 6 FTW! Ever onward - Catherine | | == | Update your or unsubscribe © 2025 True the Vote 3120 Southwest Frwy Ste 101, PMB 19128, Houston, Texas 77098-4520

body:

**[Watch the official launch video right now, then join the team by pitching in $5 today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250909-3?refcode=em-20250909-3&noskip=true&refcode2=578_1086043_pBRGW-&akid=578%2E1086043%2EpBRGW-)**

subject: Using the government to attack opponents?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
AP: Trump orders Justice Department to investigate Democrats’ top fundraising platform [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/AP_TrumpDoJActBlue2.png]
President Donald Trump has ordered the Justice Department to investigate the progressive movement’s top fundraising platform, ActBlue.
ActBlue said it would pursue “all legal avenues to protect and defend itself.” They continued, “ActBlue will continue its mission and work undeterred and uninterrupted, providing a safe, secure fundraising platform for the millions of grassroots donors who rely on us.”
This comes after Donald Trump spent years complaining that investigations into his criminal wrongdoing and conviction on 34 counts of business fraud were politically motivated when they were not.
We want to hear from supporters in your area about this news. Will you take our one-click poll right away?
Team: Do you think the Trump administration is weaponizing the Justice Department against his political opponents?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=090925_1yes&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=090925_1no&amount=15]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=090925_1&amount=20]

name: Marty O'Donnell
subject: The system failed Iryna
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTY FOR CONGRESS**
body:
I’m running for Congress in Nevada’s 3rd District because this broken system is failing innocent people every single day. | [](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=59976ccaa4d74102abcffe9ee024f87f&_e=PCyft8yaEflUZ1AJG9CfgBD0FAgNA84vxYfRWhCoo9NzfSEGxlYD0-bEBJotP_n7PeCzRE5aj4XkZMU1oYxliUoQcTXKwQigu7b9CkorqUqEb9zPykvqikhVZdic9xwRavFVDxrr2bfueYQz86BYo1F6Uv0oHdg0FDTl4ddsa1WJkI6XZILJYiy-FdaBYELQ_AXR-E0HkTbYx9RqOZe05Gkcxq9-6mEl5H0zFn17N4zEwDzPmTNg5Zyv1zE18FMCqqjBTwTL2eZc1KBCGBn68-B2zdf9wSBPXF8dGplCihxP9kNmXwf0eiPQfnVDG2C-pGqvFtTc2tf9p1HDtLm_osMZuOMehWzk_K6Wd3gtS4qZOElLkD92oRPbp7RUkfwQ0IraGd66052xi1sztAhSBimscKCGKm7w0ocPA2_3JwAsZw_rR7m7Hihlc71zWGfvZg0g_CLNBcAGopI4R7ona2Mf9DLy2j_RuiOXRVfEyRpadToMOE6DwuMJEYJ0I6-e_vWalgLM4veKQW_PJlD9z0P1MAX1aIJahH-8pu5Npm-nV2_3tr_2D3uihq2rkZDFD_9c_mrt-3bQnlqPhMAscPjmF4BbKWEgpOtbirYKzqQ2zonYs1CGx3QC4601mzHOS4a1illMxgNyu4Y6ozPzoRMsELy5jZEOVtW8dBu6R04SA9oQB0U9wigEyGGtkbiAAhLu0-hMNsPo7hmAbGdpSfqjM47HrKbXGzCbIw2gfBcv8l4b1sIjnly-r_pkRZFm)
---
Friend,

Iryna Zarutska fled the war in Ukraine in search of safety. She came to America hoping for a better life. Instead, she was murdered on a Charlotte train by a man with _14 prior arrests_ who never should have been back on the streets.

This is what happens when judges put ideology over public safety. In this case, Magistrate Judge Teresa Stokes released a repeat criminal—while also running a treatment center with government contracts. It reeks of conflict of interest, and it cost Iryna her life.

**That’s not compassion._That’s corruption._**

clean_body: I’m running for Congress in Nevada’s 3rd District because this broken system is failing innocent people every single day. | Friend, Iryna Zarutska fled the war in Ukraine in search of safety. She came to America hoping for a better life. Instead, she was murdered on a Charlotte train by a man with 14 prior arrests who never should have been back on the streets. This is what happens when judges put ideology over public safety. In this case, Magistrate Judge Teresa Stokes released a repeat criminal—while also running a treatment center with government contracts. It reeks of conflict of interest, and it cost Iryna her life. When judges and politicians side with criminals, it’s families and communities who pay the price. President Trump has called for a crackdown on violent crime, and I stand with him. subject: BREAKING: SCOTUS grants Trump even MORE power against immigrant communities
body:
Trump just scored a major victory at the Supreme Court — and immigrant families will pay the price.
In a 6–3 decision, the Court lifted restrictions on ICE raids in Los Angeles.
That means Trump and his MAGA allies now have a green light to escalate mass raids across the country. If we don’t fight back immediately, today’s raids in Los Angeles will spread to Chicago, Houston, New York, and beyond.
We’ve set a rapid-response goal of raising $25,000 in the next 48 hours so we can help fund emergency organizing. Can you rush $15, $25, or whatever you can today to fight back against Trump’s raids? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-stoptrump?refcode=090925_2]

---|---
**Good Afternoon!** AI is changing everything: markets, jobs, and even banking security. That could spell real trouble for retirement savers. Our partners at [Goldco](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyskb_O1DAQxJ_G6Xxa_8nlUqQAQqg-JCrKyPFuLv6w48h2LuLtUYADIQoa3M7PMzu7n1_GF-O8W-8fTaCuzHFEQmdNIRxXOrKnUiiNKpjXmIwrSyJTcllMsXH3uI8SZM2h5dCOH6LHd7EnHEWF3UwkSVXUiaZutBZay2rpcJpmmFA2jSCYtFVoQMOkGxK3K9q5ct3pCC204iZAiwu2ys5CSFLNVFucmQZCV2K6vEa3loVm_zU-KF1sDJXvllK2zNQbJgcmh-M4LvfoMTv_oPTFFU7BOH-yTA7G8Z-FOLQgZX1-UoNdmepvdc2vbc11K4HJqwkbU299ZqoHEPz96cKHH8m8f67sF5hn65CpvgHxaYHzmRztb30vYbQmbMbd139ggdDtgan-e-YfUo57ssRU_9cgVepwO5z3Ll8bpuH-bF2V_3jkRye_BQAA___nO72V) break down the biggest threats and how to protect your savings and stay prepared for whatever comes next. --Cole

# **WARNING:
The A.I. Threats That Could Shatter ****Your Dreams of A Successful Retirement**
---
|
---
---
---
| | The media's calling Artificial Intelligence a "revolution," but for many Americans, the real impact might actually result in a significant **_loss_** , not gain. In fact, new reports reveal that A.I. is already driving **_3 Major Threats_ **to the global economy and your retirement. So, the sooner you take the steps to help protect yourself, the better off you will potentially be when you retire.
---
Here are the **_3 Major A.I. Threats_** you should be aware of...
---
**1. Skyrocketing market risk due to overvalued tech stocks******
---
---
---
According to Fortune, bots are creating an investment demand that is out of control and could cause a massive overvaluing of AI tech companies. Some are saying it **could be worse than the tech mania of the 1990s** , where trillions in wealth was wiped away.
---
**2. Tens of thousands of job losses in just the first half of 2025******
---
---
---
According to CBS News, there are massive layoffs as Artificial Intelligence takes American jobs. What does this mean for the broader economy? What happens when people are out of work and can't spend money? **The consequences could be devastating**.
---
**3. Banking Security and Privacy Under Siege**
---
---
---
| |

Fraudsters are now using cheap, AI-powered voice and video deepfakes to impersonate people convincingly enough to bypass security checks.
---

clean_body: The A.I. Threats That Could Shatter Your Dreams of A Successful Retirement | | | | | | TUESDAY, September 9, 2025 ---|--- Good Afternoon! AI is changing everything: markets, jobs, and even banking security. That could spell real trouble for retirement savers. Our partners at break down the biggest threats and how to protect your savings and stay prepared for whatever comes next. --Cole CEO, The Flyover | | | | WARNING: The A.I. Threats That Could Shatter **Your Dreams of A Successful Retirement | | | The media's calling Artificial Intelligence a "revolution," but for many Americans, the real impact might actually result in a significant loss , not gain. In fact, new reports reveal that A.I. is already driving 3 Major Threats to the global economy and your retirement. So, the sooner you take the steps to help protect yourself, the better off you will potentially be when you retire. Here are the 3 Major A.I. Threats you should be aware of... 1. Skyrocketing market risk due to overvalued tech stocks** According to Fortune, bots are creating an investment demand that is out of control and could cause a massive overvaluing of AI tech companies. Some are saying it could be worse than the tech mania of the 1990s , where trillions in wealth was wiped away. 2. Tens of thousands of job losses in just the first half of 2025**** According to CBS News, there are massive layoffs as Artificial Intelligence takes American jobs. What does this mean for the broader economy? What happens when people are out of work and can't spend money? The consequences could be devastating. 3. Banking Security and Privacy Under Siege | | According to Barron's, there is a growing concern that financial institutions are not seriously considering the growing threat of AI-powered scams targeting bank customers. Fraudsters are now using cheap, AI-powered voice and video deepfakes to impersonate people convincingly enough to bypass security checks. So what can you do to protect your money and your way of life? The impact of Artificial Intelligence is not just hype anymore, it's happening right before our eyes. And while it may be shaping the future, it could also unleash major damage to the U.S. economy, putting millions of retirement savers at potential risk. That's why more and more Americans are turning to gold and silver to help protect their wealth. They're looking for historically trusted assets in times of economic uncertainty. They're not taking any chances with the money they've worked so hard to save. With supply still lagging and global demand for precious metals rising, gold and silver are once again being seen as potential safe havens. That's why today, you're invited to claim your free, trusted by thousands of everyday Americans looking to help safeguard their savings. Inside your kit, you 'll discover... | | Why diversification matters and how you could benefit from safe haven assets. The hidden impact inflation and taxes could have on your retirement. | We should be making life more affordable, not less.

[**Peter, in a moment, I’m going to ask you to join our base of monthly recurring supporters. Will you give me a minute to explain why?**](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3587?c0=stb-em-sep25.iXe4PX&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250909_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4966%2E35263%2EPPf4xh) | [PITCH IN MONTHLY](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4527?c0=stb-em-sep25.a3pPaG&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250909_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=4966%2E35263%2EPPf4xh)
---
I’m back in Washington this month, and we’ve got a full slate of business to handle in the Senate.
Donald Trump and the Republicans standing behind him are drawing a line in the sand over the cuts they made to Medicaid, but me and my Democratic colleagues are fighting tooth and nail to restore affordable healthcare nationwide.
We’re doing what we can to put a stop to Trump’s reckless tariffs that are already hurting Wisconsin farmers and small business owners.
**We should be making life more affordable, not less.**
[**Your contribution keeps me focused on the work ahead, instead of worrying about hitting our fundraising goals. A little each month goes a long way, so if you can, will you sign on to make a monthly recurring donation today?**](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3587?c0=stb-em-sep25.iXe4PX&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250909_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=4966%2E35263%2EPPf4xh)

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol3nrd2aop430c3o1e3sfwsr9ov5jx92drm7m0vgyvjshdi5l5flvmgwyg6hbntk8sighlhgdyy2zdgom9vmuww4iverpg9w6h3tygbxhxvyrm77de5cbwr60mj7rnxc16fr7e4we4fk&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2c2o8&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2c2o8&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2c2o8&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2c2o8&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol3nrd2aop430c3o1e3sfwsr9ov5jx92drm7m0vgyvjshdi5l5flvmgwyg6hbntk8sighlhgdyy2zdgom9vmuww4iverpg9w6h3tygbxhxvyrm77de5cbwr60mj7rnxc16fr7e4we4fk&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2c2o8&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2c2o8&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Winsome
subject: This is my final email, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
clean_body: - This is my final message to you before time expires. Knowing that, will you please read every word carefully? Thanks for opening this email! I wouldn't be reaching out like this if my situation weren't truly dire. Let me explain my predicament: FIRST, while I was barred from accepting any campaign donations during Virginia's legislative session, my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was RAKING IN hundreds of thousands of dollars! THEN, a Soros-backed, liberal group gave my Democrat opponent $500K all in one shot! My Democrat opponent has continued to OUTRAISE me by MILLIONS of dollars. NOW, the polls are TIED. But I cannot win with this crippling cash disadvantage. TO MAKE MATTERS WORSE, I'm facing a CRUCIAL Deadline Goal and I'm WAY behind! in a serious bind here, Peter. I'm over $10,000 behind pace to reach my upcoming Goal. I'm asking you as a Christian, a Marine, and a mother: Democrat opponent has Leftist billionaires like George Soros and Hollywood liberals backing her, but I'm 100% relying on you! can't thank you enough for reading this message all the way through, Peter. You are truly a key part of my team! Together, we will close this fundraising gap and beat my liberal opponent in November! Thanks again and may God bless you! -Winsome Earle-Sears | | | | | | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Military disclaimer: Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. PO Box 71596 Richmond, VA 23255-1596 | | |

clean_body: Background on FBI investigation of its agents interfering in politically sensitive cases [NEWSLINK] BREAKING NEWS... [image] [] RIGHTS AND FREEDOMS IN PERIL "When it comes to fighting for the American people’s ‘right to know,’ no one holds a candle to Tom Fitton and his team at Judicial Watch" - SEAN HANNITY Tom Fitton returns with an exhaustive investigation into the progressive movement’s efforts to dismantle the venerable institutions of American rights and freedoms. Order Tom Fitton's Must-Read Today! [] [600x300] [] FBI probing whether its own agents obstructed or interfered with politically sensitive cases [] Source: Just the News [] The FBI is investigating material uncovered in “prohibited access” case files to determine whether its own agents or leaders may have obstructed criminal or congressional investigations involving major political figures such as Hillary Clinton and Joe Biden or their family associates. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] Background Notes from Judicial Watch [180x150x1] [] August 25, 2025 Judicial Watch Sues for FBI Records of Comey’s Investigation of Then-Presidential Candidate Trump [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch filed a FOIA lawsuit in May 2025 against the U.S. Department of Justice for all records regarding the FBI, under then-Director James Comey, initiating an investigation of then-2016 presidential candidate Donald Trump [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x2] [] April 09, 2025 Judicial Watch Sues for Emails of Anti-Trump FBI Executive Accused of Harassing Whistleblowers [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch filed a FOIA lawsuit against the Department of Justice for emails of Dena Perkins, a section chief of the FBI, regarding whistleblower retaliation. Perkins was among several FBI officials reportedly fired by the Trump administration. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x3] [] August 28, 2025 Judicial Watch Sues Justice Department, FBI, and ODNI for Records on Spying Targeting Trump Campaign Advisor Michael Caputo [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch sued the Justice Department, FBI, and ODNI after the agencies failed to adequately respond to FOIA requests for records about the targeting of former Trump campaign adviser and communications strategist Michael Caputo. name: Morgan Stahr, United for Democracy
subject: SCOTUS’ chance to end the Voting Rights Act.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
This case SCOTUS will decide in the fall could be the scariest, most dangerous yet. | |
---
Peter, **There’s one case the Supreme Court is hearing this fall could be the final nail in the coffin for our democracy.** The state of Louisiana has requested that the Supreme Court gut what’s left of the landmark civil rights legislation _Voting Rights Act_. If the MAGA justices side with the state, the voting power of minority populations is in danger of being stripped away across the country. **The case will be heard on October 15th, and could be just the opportunity this right-wing extremist Court needs to put the final nail in the coffin on our voting rights.** The Supreme Court needs to hear from us constantly for the next month and a half. We won’t stand by while they plan to steal our very democracy away from us. [**Tell the Supreme Court: Don’t gut the**** _Voting Rights Act_****even further. Stand with democracy and rule against the state of Louisiana.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39xlBV8K-h1SPh5Rb04hGqQSppTR2K2TLKBv7L84jlhD9k0W-aKPqiF3nyarKugtDlWxF1frVynP_myqnaX8hoKYXExAxypa73ey9XEVTDP8SVKUmr-VIDGQL--fMnsnpvJMNWb2fpJGIaI_PQayNfBrJwjK-H4A9-tEzhpELgO0Uol5z3GQ6ww754oPSyIENjTDPMyuL0gHjzukU7wLA9vynafPjfIDxMILWIOaVRt5qa9rOGy4xyaq1rAklJBickIobbld85A2OqEqJvhsS7FD8mmgvc0cWrSHOqcnAbDJdmX-eQiLdIkJWnVwLWGwz6RRvC-iIiwCPMianLqv-_K/4jr/sSvNaMFRQXKVBl53w3r2zQ/h0/h001.XqOY07bxsG6EMOhnT4eHdFv82npwTV5SYQzpX7lNqO4) [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39xlBV8K-h1SPh5Rb04hGqQSppTR2K2TLKBv7L84jlhD9k0W-aKPqiF3nyarKugtDlWxF1frVynP_myqnaX8hoKakKPRwe0yQPdIyWF9MOM-d_6gGI7MmK-Xz7o4YFP14lmckFpqcvo8_gVH-sCI9wStfe7JuyKRqWZgiwn1G8757UdJqYOiwXtVyRuFuk2DnKzgZGWl76pAFH8oeesgDgkw9Y0RHfkprePRgdGlE4zBxIwfc0yn2lvEJmDHqL2FGdrROshGiX9VhxsV6abX8cRlAH2BESyKcDpPk11yw5O6LOXmRvXJMVn5qBgxv8b3CFGfmCl2emkAQFhYOmD9AMP/4jr/sSvNaMFRQXKVBl53w3r2zQ/h1/h001.inA8dK33i9JiORZULkackIxrOHWbTzWCRdj2EADCb6w) **This case comes in the midst of a massive gerrymandering fight across the country.** Red states have started redrawing their congressional districts to give Republicans more seats and strip minority voting power. Blue states are in turn redrawing their maps to combat the power grab. **Governor Gavin Newsom has rightly called the redistricting from red states “a blatant power grab to rig the 2026 election before a single vote has been cast.”** 1 The Supreme Court’s decision on the Voting Rights Act in October could pour fuel on the flames, spelling the end of voting rights and enshrining a system rigged in favor of Trump and his MAGA cronies—potentially forever. This hostile takeover of our democracy has been decades in the making, and stacking the Supreme Court was the first step. **Trump and his right-wing extremists are depending on the Supreme Court to steal our voting rights and ring the final death knell for our democracy.** [**The MAGA justices on the Supreme Court need to hear from us loud and clear. Tell them not to gut the**** _Voting Rights Act_****and hand our democracy to right-wing extremists.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39xlBV8K-h1SPh5Rb04hGqQSppTR2K2TLKBv7L84jlhD9k0W-aKPqiF3nyarKugtDlWxF1frVynP_myqnaX8hoKJeOvkV07PdveK_rCTKaJf9MjVWPPyvY5zMNFr72yoRalcBWgHiLkU5l92vB7XkyeJVS7i_tWtYTpnseyoVozeYO3_Xl-phEQGvrf1YP-BsmMPfKmCacQ-0accn13FDtLLAaDYXle1W_8YtJ5q5DJ7SAR-EDE-ELUSrr6W6Jjx1QyrFrO-xx4uzcy-Qku-oEWAzK85N8iZyw5c9J5qDCIbbGdHbI5B3bq-_mZlIkSs1_FTFS6vsOSUWmsPLAp0Gq-/4jr/sSvNaMFRQXKVBl53w3r2zQ/h2/h001.v86px_uYT4HktYILEL6efqgv2crMReeQMM27DAxrA0Q) Thank you for fighting for our voting rights, Morgan Stahr
