body:
|
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114916936/568578636/-530215862?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.09_OTS-Wes-Moore-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGJkZTNhZi1hYjhkLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XR6V4MkAXF0AQ30-yGrLcJYWrcM3GgatnIm5u2_V1W8=)
It's Governor Wes Moore. Off the Sidelines said I could reach out today to share some important news with you. When we first launched our campaign four years ago, I had never run for political office. I was an Army Captain, the son of a single mom, and I ran one of the largest poverty-fighting organizations in the country. So I traveled the state, listening to your stories and sharing mine. I heard the same thing again and again: That the career politicians had been telling us everything was great, when we knew it wasn’t. Ever since I took office, I’ve been on a mission to change that. To lower taxes for middle class families. To make health care and prescription drugs cheaper. To make our communities safer. But our mission is far from over. **Today, I’m proud to announce that I’m running for another term as Governor of Maryland. Because our work isn’t done yet.** [**_Will you split a contribution of $10 or more to my campaign and Off the Sidelines now to help power our movement?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114916937/568578637/100526874?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.09_OTS-Wes-Moore-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGJkZTNhZi1hYjhkLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XR6V4MkAXF0AQ30-yGrLcJYWrcM3GgatnIm5u2_V1W8=) While we’ve made a lot of progress over the last three years, our fight is even more important now because of who is in the White House. The President of the United States is bending over backwards for billionaires and big corporations. He’s firing federal civil servants, gutting Medicaid, and raising prices on everything from electricity to groceries for families. His reckless attacks are hitting Maryland hard. It’s time for us to come together across counties and party lines to prove that even in the face of dysfunction in D.C.: We can show there’s a better way forward. [**_We already have Republican opponents in this race, and with the President and his allies working to undo our progress, the stakes couldn’t be higher. This campaign has always been about partnership – I’m grateful to have Off the Sidelines’s support in this race, and I’d like to have yours too. So please, give whatever you can and split a contribution between my campaign and Off the Sidelines today._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114916938/568578638/100526874?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.09_OTS-Wes-Moore-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGJkZTNhZi1hYjhkLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XR6V4MkAXF0AQ30-yGrLcJYWrcM3GgatnIm5u2_V1W8=) | | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114916939/568578639/100526874?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.09_OTS-Wes-Moore-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGJkZTNhZi1hYjhkLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XR6V4MkAXF0AQ30-yGrLcJYWrcM3GgatnIm5u2_V1W8=)

clean_body: | = It's Governor Wes Moore. Off the Sidelines said I could reach out today to share some important news with you. When we first launched our campaign four years ago, I had never run for political office. I was an Army Captain, the son of a single mom, and I ran one of the largest poverty-fighting organizations in the country. So I traveled the state, listening to your stories and sharing mine. I heard the same thing again and again: That the career politicians had been telling us everything was great, when we knew it wasn’t. Ever since I took office, I’ve been on a mission to change that. To lower taxes for middle class families. To make health care and prescription drugs cheaper. To make our communities safer. But our mission is far from over. Today, I’m proud to announce that I’m running for another term as Governor of Maryland. Because our work isn’t done yet. = While we’ve made a lot of progress over the last three years, our fight is even more important now because of who is in the White House. The President of the United States is bending over backwards for billionaires and big corporations. He’s firing federal civil servants, gutting Medicaid, and raising prices on everything from electricity to groceries for families. His reckless attacks are hitting Maryland hard. It’s time for us to come together across counties and party lines to prove that even in the face of dysfunction in D.C.: We can show there’s a better way forward. = | | = Join us. Let’s build a state where we leave no one behind. Elevate, Wes = © 2025 | Paid for by Off the Sidelines PAC

Defending Oregon’s right to vote |
#
---
Peter, President Trump continues his attacks on the integrity of our elections — spreading lies about vote-by-mail and threatening the very foundation of our democracy. **We will not back down.** Oregon has led the nation with secure, transparent, and accessible elections for decades. And as your governor, I will always defend every eligible Oregonian’s right to vote. But Trump and his allies are determined to undermine trust in voting. That’s why I need you with me in this fight. name: Democratic National Committee
subject: What you can do about Republicans stealing MORE seats:
body:
---
Derek — We're reaching out to ask if you can [**split a contribution between the Missouri Democratic Party and the DNC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-mo-split?amount=20&refcode=em_20250909_4557_fr&refcode2=4557_22930333_ywChV-&akid=4557%2E22930333%2EywChV-) But before we do, we want to tell you a little bit about how we'll put that donation to work. As you may have heard, Republicans recently began a special session in Missouri to support Donald Trump’s gerrymandering power grab. Missouri Republicans completed the first step today by passing their rigged maps through the state House, and they’ll now go to the state Senate. So, Derek, we’re doing everything we can to support the Democrats on the ground fighting for our democracy: At the DNC, we’re activating our organizing operation to pressure Republicans — supporting recruitment for rallies, contacting Missourians to attend town halls, and applying digital pressure. And Missouri Democrats are fighting back, including with a multi-day sit-in on the state House floor. Democrats are fighting fire with fire, because if Republicans succeed, it will be that much easier for Republicans to control Congress in 2026 — giving Trump two more years of power with no guardrails. **Your donation today goes toward supporting the Democrats who are fighting back. So now that we’ve explained where your donation goes, we're hoping you'll join your fellow Democrats in donating to the DNC and the Missouri Democratic Party today. Use this link:** [**Can Democrats defending free and fair elections in Missouri count on you to contribute $20 to the DNC and Missouri Democrats today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-mo-split?amount=20&refcode=em_20250909_4557_fr&refcode2=4557_22930333_ywChV-&akid=4557%2E22930333%2EywChV-) _If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution between the Missouri Democratic Party and the Democratic National Committee instantly:_ | | | **[Donate $20](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-mo-split?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=em_20250909_4557_fr&refcode2=4557_22930333_ywChV-&akid=4557%2E22930333%2EywChV-)**

name: Sign Petition | Left Action
subject: Trump gets called on his absurd lies about the Epstein birthday card
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Tell Trump he's obviously lying about the Epstein birthday card, and to release the damn files NOW!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T39d87f27-c59d-4ab2-ae72-596fd4d2e05b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T242bb17b-0862-4634-a811-34bd9bbd5d8c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | _([**Click here to see card**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T17ee70e0-726f-4c9a-8dd9-98f37bb3e151/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). Warning, may not be appropriate for some co-workers, family, etc)_ **The lies from Trump and his team about the Epstein files are getting more and more ludicrous with each passing day. ** A House committee investigating the matter released a Trump birthday card obtained from the Epstein estate. It's truly cringeworthy in light of what we know now about the sex trafficking of children, and Trump's "wink, wink, nudge nudge" text about the "secret" they "share." Trump's response? A series of every more ludicrous lies. When the card was first reported, he said it didn't exist. And when the card was actually released, and it was obvious it DID exist, he said it was a "Democrat hoax" to make him look bad. The card was from 2003, more than a decade before he first ran for president. Unless the Democrats had a crystal ball, why the hell would they have targeted him for a hoax? And then he said the signature wasn't his, which is absolutely ludicrous since it's a perfect match. He's a liar. He's desperate. And he's doing whatever he can to keep the files hidden. Which is why they need to be made public NOW. **[Tell Trump he's obviously lying about the Epstein birthday card, and to release the damn files NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9b00a029-1a3f-432b-9dcc-46d567975a5e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)!**

---
| | | Thank you, Left Action

name: George Whitesides
subject: Ban Stock Trading in Congress.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114917781/568581444/-1384072709?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjExMWJkYi1hZThkLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6DZhaKNwSeRco6BmyHfI-ltOLGYX_a_DNq-2ql1dwjQ=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114917782/568581446/-1723764784?refcode=em-9.9.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjExMWJkYi1hZThkLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6DZhaKNwSeRco6BmyHfI-ltOLGYX_a_DNq-2ql1dwjQ=&emci=7d167023-ae8d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=12111bdb-ae8d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=36198509)

Peter,

Just 3 in 10 Americans believe Congress acts in their best interests.

Among young Americans, that number drops to _less_ than 2 in 10.

We’re past calling this troubling. In fact, what’s most troubling is that you’re probably not even shocked to read these numbers.

We’ve grown so accustomed to the idea that our “system is broken.” That it’s one where corporate money speaks louder than the public voice.

What’s worse is the erosion of public trust comes at a time when the American people are stretched to the brink – and counting on Congress to push back on an authoritarian White House. Folks are rightly enraged to hear about members of Congress raking in cash trading stocks of the very companies they’re supposed to regulate.

It doesn’t have to be this way, Peter.

**This is a big reason why I divested from all my company-specific, publicly traded stock holdings the moment I took office. And I’m proud to co-lead the Restore Trust in Congress Act, to ban stock trading in Congress outright.**

The bill has just been introduced in the House, and momentum is building. But to get it out of committee and onto the floor, we need real grassroots pressure. That’s where you come in:

**[This isn't a cure-all, but it’s the bare-minimum in restoring public trust. Add your name today to show your support: no more stock trading in Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114917784/568581447/-1723764784?refcode=em-9.9.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjExMWJkYi1hZThkLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6DZhaKNwSeRco6BmyHfI-ltOLGYX_a_DNq-2ql1dwjQ=&emci=7d167023-ae8d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=12111bdb-ae8d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=36198509)**
| ****[Add Your Name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114917785/568581448/-1723764784?refcode=em-9.9.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjExMWJkYi1hZThkLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6DZhaKNwSeRco6BmyHfI-ltOLGYX_a_DNq-2ql1dwjQ=&emci=7d167023-ae8d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=12111bdb-ae8d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=36198509)****
---

Onward,

George
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114917787/568581450/-2104984614?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjExMWJkYi1hZThkLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6DZhaKNwSeRco6BmyHfI-ltOLGYX_a_DNq-2ql1dwjQ=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114917792/568581454/-723877621?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjExMWJkYi1hZThkLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6DZhaKNwSeRco6BmyHfI-ltOLGYX_a_DNq-2ql1dwjQ=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114917794/568581457/1617125231?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjExMWJkYi1hZThkLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6DZhaKNwSeRco6BmyHfI-ltOLGYX_a_DNq-2ql1dwjQ=) George has spent his career solving problems. Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. [Chip in to George's campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114917796/568581459/-1384072709?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjExMWJkYi1hZThkLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6DZhaKNwSeRco6BmyHfI-ltOLGYX_a_DNq-2ql1dwjQ=)

To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: [GeorgeWhitesides.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114917797/568581460/-1896241937?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjExMWJkYi1hZThkLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6DZhaKNwSeRco6BmyHfI-ltOLGYX_a_DNq-2ql1dwjQ=)

We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/7Lng7fM74EmfvnJSCPSYrg2?unsubscribedata=8f6EtujPeuJXYhmNFO4%2FSIldyWYc1baL3xpXwOZyXpZV2%2BmC1lyVr4zlaMJbOTQyCg%2FaU4jwxMV8jsxeqGOmXgDuAaJAncIu9BFDwzfvW8RZIHOWYSrq1%2BNJ%2FP0E0IuVfubvxJkYMYjiU72cll1mMVljwfWcXCGQbpiowHxw%2BabyVw%2BR5JWcf7DrNJPkRjJJVQNICv3ecnNRBCIkWxisgthYDmgfzETKvQAps3PYj3dJPzxhpjRVTnP7z40N3lehsrpKPShProsNWZZH4KT0oc84jWcLRJpmqBlDio6Zw%2FpRc5%2BNR1VkZSCTFsEdvp%2Bfz79mTKFEUahOP%2BvKnoZF6e%2BR0BBm5nFuYYErZ5rrj%2F%2BpnkkN1m2KcCW1%2FlowWo89hcMJdMT5j5LzOP2S3WdKOCpwfYg2mXpseu%2FgRcwVY%2Blm0dJAgCYDKDaM9cY8KFTQ).

But to get it out of committee and onto the floor, we need real grassroots pressure. That’s where you come in: | **** Onward, George | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. = To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . George Whitesides for Congress P.O. Box 221776 Newhall, CA 91322 United States

name: Emerge HQ
subject: [ADD YOUR NAME] Texas abortion rights under attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America
body:
HB 7 is part of the GOP’s strategy to roll back reproductive rights, silence women, and suppress marginalized communities.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114917802/568581466/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-09-09_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNhYzQ4Y2U3LWFlOGQtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=yXiti0rcpjY2YDYiZ90Q1TzXfczhtxT-R50o3-4Xoxc=)
---
| Peter,

Last week, Texas Republicans passed House Bill 7, a law allowing private citizens to sue out-of-state abortion pill providers. Abortion is already banned in Texas, but this new law makes it even harder to access abortion medications via telemedicine.

Abortion pills are the safest and most common form of abortion, yet HB 7 creates new hurdles for doctors and pharmacists, particularly targeting telehealth services. People in rural and underserved areas will face even greater barriers to care.

HB 7 is part of the GOP’s strategy to roll back reproductive rights, silence women, and suppress marginalized communities. It’s another step toward a country where the government dictates healthcare access instead of patients and doctors.

[_**Emerge women in Texas and across the country are standing up to these attacks, but we need you to stand with them. Add your name to our petition today to send a clear message: we will defend reproductive freedom, and support the women leading the fight.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114917803/568581467/717061913?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNhYzQ4Y2U3LWFlOGQtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=yXiti0rcpjY2YDYiZ90Q1TzXfczhtxT-R50o3-4Xoxc=&emci=c5992b46-808d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=cac48ce7-ae8d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=920818)

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 9/9/2025 🎂
body:
Are there too many Grumpy Old Men Voters in Colorado?
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hey folks!
Today’s a special day. 🥳 **Happy Birthday to Heidi Ganahl** , the founder of Rocky Mountain Voice! Heidi, thank you for inspiring so many of us to fight for freedom here in Colorado and across the country. Everyone go wish her a happy birthday!
🏳️🌈 Day 6 of the **Durango 9R Dirty Dozen** : Durango 9-R volunteers rejected 60 donated American flags—while passing resolutions to allow Pride & BLM flags. Vice President Erica Brown told parents: “Don’t like it? Vote us out.” Parents say this is ideology over patriotism.
Watch & share ➡️ **[Instagram](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) | [Facebook](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) | [X](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) | [TikTok](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
🎙️ Check out today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** CDOT claims a [1% boost in interstate pavement](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), but rural roads remain neglected. Ranchers are still reeling from the Lee Fire’s [137,000-acre destruction](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), while a new poll shows [Trump unpopular in Colorado](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) even as Democrats face backlash. [Ballot initiatives](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) continue shaping policy where lawmakers stall, and schools are now [stocking naloxone](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) after youth urged action in the wake of a classmate’s death.

**🇺🇸 On the National Stage...** [Minimum wage hikes](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) are fueling closures and cutting entry-level jobs, with Denver’s rate set to rise again in January. An Air Force review found decorated pilot Major Brennan Schilperoort suffered [religious discrimination over vaccine exemptions](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), a win for service members’ rights.The FDA is probing [child deaths linked to COVID shots](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), with Commissioner Marty Makary promising long-delayed data on fatalities and myocarditis risks. Conservatives say deportations alone won’t solve immigration, pushing for [visa, welfare, and assimilation reform](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), while critics warn [noncitizen voting is spreading in U.S. cities](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), threatening citizen rights and democracy itself.
This is the Mountain Minute for Tuesday, September 9, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Are there too many Grumpy Old Men Voters in Colorado?](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY MIKE O'DONNELL, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
_Every ten years the U.S. Census Bureau organizes a count of all the residents of the United States. This count includes citizens as well as non-citizens, and even those experiencing homelessness._
_The Census Bureau also provides annual updates to the decennial numbers using surveys as well as by tapping into government information they can easily access like data on births and deaths, federal tax returns, medicare enrollments, and statistics from the Social Security Administration._
_These annual updates serve many purposes and, in my case, one of them is to provide feedback on how accurate the Colorado voter roll is._
_Colorado switched to mail-in ballots in 2013 and is one of only eight states that conducts mail-in elections. Presumably this was done because as Coloradans grew fatter and lazier, it became too much trouble to visit a polling place, stand in line, show ID, and vote in person._
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Poll shows Trump policies unpopular yet Democrats face their own backlash](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [AXIOS DENVER](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* A new Magellan Strategies poll shows Trump deeply unpopular in Colorado, with only 41% approval and widespread opposition to his policies—including agency cuts, tariffs, and the “One Big Beautiful Bill Act."
* Democrats are using these numbers to tie GOP candidates to Trump ahead of 2026, but their own image is faltering: just 23% of Colorado voters view Democrats in Congress favorably.
* For the first time in two decades of Magellan polling, congressional Republicans (34% approval) are rated higher than their Democratic counterparts, signaling deep voter cynicism toward both parties.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Citizen rights at risk as noncitizen voting spreads in U.S. cities](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [WASHINGTON EXAMINER](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Only 20 state constitutions explicitly restrict voting to U.S. citizens, leaving most states vulnerable to cities allowing noncitizen voting in local elections.
* Examples include Chicago and San Francisco, where noncitizens can vote in school elections, and Washington, D.C., where they can vote in municipal races; studies suggest millions of illegal aliens nationwide may already be registered.
* Since 2018, voters in 14 states have overwhelmingly passed citizen-only voting measures, and new initiatives like Texas’ Proposition 16 aim to enshrine this principle in more state constitutions.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[The Sword of the Spirit: On the Offensive–Advancing with God’s Sword](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **BY DRAKE HUNTER | COMMENTARY | SEPTEMBER 7** _As a boy, I loved playing with swords. Sometimes I’d pick up a stick and pretend to be Robin Hood, while other times I engaged in lightsaber duels reminiscent of Star Wars. Our battles were always grand—filled with heroic moves, slow-motion falls, and victory speeches nobody requested._
**[Transgenderism, Firearms, and the Conservative Dilemma](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY C. J. GARBO | COMMENTARY | SEPTEMBER 5** _Rumors are circulating across social media that a future Trump administration might consider restricting firearm ownership for individuals who identify as transgender. These claims, unverified as of now, have sparked sharp reactions on both sides of the aisle._

**[Reduce Taxes BY Eliminating the Government Middleman](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY RUSS MINARY | COMMENTARY | SEPTEMBER 5** _"The power to tax is the power to destroy." – U.S. Supreme Court Chief Justice John Marshall, 1819
In this article, I’ll explain and contrast how and why the American free market works differently and better than government (in many cases) using two free market American businesses you know: Amazon and Costco._

This is the Mountain Minute for Tuesday, September 9, 2025. – Team RMV | TODAY'S TOP STORIES BY MIKE O'DONNELL, Every ten years the U.S. Census Bureau organizes a count of all the residents of the United States. This count includes citizens as well as non-citizens, and even those experiencing homelessness. The Census Bureau also provides annual updates to the decennial numbers using surveys as well as by tapping into government information they can easily access like data on births and deaths, federal tax returns, medicare enrollments, and statistics from the Social Security Administration. These annual updates serve many purposes and, in my case, one of them is to provide feedback on how accurate the Colorado voter roll is. Colorado switched to mail-in ballots in 2013 and is one of only eight states that conducts mail-in elections. Presumably this was done because as Coloradans grew fatter and lazier, it became too much trouble to visit a polling place, stand in line, show ID, and vote in person. | A new Magellan Strategies poll shows Trump deeply unpopular in Colorado, with only 41% approval and widespread opposition to his policies—including agency cuts, tariffs, and the “One Big Beautiful Bill Act." Democrats are using these numbers to tie GOP candidates to Trump ahead of 2026, but their own image is faltering: just 23% of Colorado voters view Democrats in Congress favorably. For the first time in two decades of Magellan polling, congressional Republicans (34% approval) are rated higher than their Democratic counterparts, signaling deep voter cynicism toward both parties. | The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. Examples include Chicago and San Francisco, where noncitizens can vote in school elections, and Washington, D.C., where they can vote in municipal races; studies suggest millions of illegal aliens nationwide may already be registered. Since 2018, voters in 14 states have overwhelmingly passed citizen-only voting measures, and new initiatives like Texas’ Proposition 16 aim to enshrine this principle in more state constitutions. | ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ BY DRAKE HUNTER | COMMENTARY | SEPTEMBER 7 As a boy, I loved playing with swords. body:

| | _" But as for you, be strong and do not give up, for your work will be rewarded."_ _-2 Chronicles 15:7_
---
Fellow Conservative, I want you to think back to every moment when the odds were stacked against conservatives. And yet - we always kept fighting. Just like Scripture tells us, we _REFUSED_ to give up. Because we wouldn't just be giving up on a political movement. _We 'd be giving up on America._ And look how far we've come. **_We 've defied history time and time again._** Now, it's time to do it again...
---
| | _Just "months into his second term,**the president is already hyper-engaged in the fight to keep the GOP 's majorities in Congress...** he's bullish about defying history and keeping Democrats away from committee gavels and subpoena powers" [POLITICO] _
---
| | I know I've said it before, but I'll say it again because it's God's honest truth: Republicans cannot merely play _defense_ after last November; we MUST go on the __offensive__. President Trump understands this better than anyone. Which is why he's working around the clock to ensure we can DEFEND and _EXPAND_ our majorities in the midterms. But I'll be honest with you, our new Republican OFFENSIVE for the midterms won't mean a thing unless grassroots patriots like _YOU_ are right there by our side. Which is why _*this*_ headline has me more concerned than ever: **NUMBER OF AMERICANS IDENTIFYING AS "REPUBLICAN" HITS LOWEST POINT IN A DECADE - ****_(from Gallup Polling)_** So, today, I'm answering the President's call to action in the fight to defend our majorities! **_And I 'm asking YOU to answer that call as well by _**_**_VERIFYING_**_** _your voter profile for the Nationwide Conservative Voter Census. _** **[Please, take just a moment to privately complete (keep your screen out of sight) your Voter Questionnaire to VERIFY your profile for the GOP's Nationwide Conservative Census.](https://trk.email.tedcruz._w)**
---

---
Thank you, Ted Cruz

name: Royce Alexander White
subject: I didn’t shake her hand.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
body:
This is real. Not theater. | [ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=535ed3fc5da0485f9b45e7def19ec8a2&_e=vroJxp_KterZdds8sVeDKRP_vDNwv-vcXv5F_dRrjsx0PvLT7Kqr_wN3UZuZcmJSzbQnMi2KEUryr-kv3Z3NPUKntPdjAl6HwLZFFhMeYFWF48N5RRWFfR3Tg9MNrFCFZZrRu3j6-MvAjza0yKoIEAv_8QJqYr-tRAIlosdXG8SJZPS6SvcLW9H7Bdn0u4A6ObkaSGXgQUmNyeZneUxupjBtzZRUNhv4kG9v1vXzKt45Vxo4CTlz85GQ0QqbNhe47Kxhm2LrWlFsu2OvXq9wXmxlYMRXEDFQYyu-LUBCWTcZEMgL9dx-voMBbo_WPxRK-_VFb4XR3H32NX1FjSJmlrY6Zb3mKwbO8TGJldrCd7KdoMEEHucVO88mk2dxhp9rWBe1mw_OJeaEp4doWAsP0z1ekzN5GMNzY7W2wAKFHohnVXJazewwvnH_bAg5Tg5tJtR5for6J4wuHniweZSintXxZyomAYEzKHIc6hxtPBWTS0-8SvqIHZVvLc3LXli8NKU1-m02QDEZ5ga3q6gIQdHXqu53MEjJY_JOFBu6E9RQRL9IrXtlRZUW8N3Lh57k)
---

Peter,

At the Minnesota State Fair, Rep. Angie Craig rolled up to my booth with an entire camera crew.

She smiled. She reached out her hand. And I looked her right in the eye... **And I said no.**

**I don’t shake hands with the people who’ve helped destroy this country.** Not for a photo op. Not for fake “civility.” And not for political theater. I told her I was serious. I am.

****I don’t like these people. I don’t respect them. And I won’t pretend otherwise. They’ve ruined lives, corrupted institutions, and now they want “unity”—but only on their terms.****

Here’s the truth: I don’t consent. I don’t compromise with lies, lunacy, or evil. And I won’t play along for TV cameras or career politicians who think this is all some game.

I speak for the working people, the families, and the kids who’ve been hurt by this corrupt political class.

**It’s time to get real.** We can preach peace. But “unity” only comes when we agree on the truth.

Let’s run campaigns rooted in reality. Let’s win with courage. **[Let’s show America we’re done pretending.](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=535ed3fc5da0485f9b45e7def19ec8a2&_e=vroJxp_KterZdds8sVeDKRP_vDNwv-vcXv5F_dRrjsx0PvLT7Kqr_wN3UZuZcmJSzbQnMi2KEUryr-kv3Z3NPUKntPdjAl6HwLZFFhMeYFWF48N5RRWFfR3Tg9MNrFCFZZrRu3j6-MvAjza0yKoIEAv_8QJqYr-tRAIlosdXG8SJZPS6SvcLW9H7Bdn0u4A6Q52cyveXXnrWrlbtDKcG1lT27pB8ZYUf1P7_kDVcYDG1keXNL_i1XzHV0qRn5L8LO6xUI3dSu1NWXojU7mxqiKY0M1BKOS3PYqfyAkl578bRWe0mYQ7pXCvfFf-3Km0AFRZBelp06NyBM0R8MTYFWIGz1JYfs-RiBMBJdeo3yaXYM7e6FbJLucp9i8Fas6Y3uX3duTX3dX3LH1d264_krFe1xkHdX7BqLxd9Hw7618nKDJVMKK5Hn3TO0PvZsCdQk9hrxXCoJwZErmjmV4vcniAJPOclhtzZYtgvrJfY9o_6o7z6JUjb0rN75uObMPbwqmeUc7wk43tLVu5FYGoo60d51ajYturhwAf2t-m_5nhz6x5JqMNs0eGYyzmLw8Cf)**

**If you’re ready to break the spell—stand with me.**

| [ **BREAK THE SPELL** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=535ed3fc5da0485f9b45e7def19ec8a2&_e=vroJxp_KterZdds8sVeDKRP_vDNwv-vcXv5F_dRrjsx0PvLT7Kqr_wN3UZuZcmJSzbQnMi2KEUryr-kv3Z3NPUKntPdjAl6HwLZFFhMeYFWF48N5RRWFfR3Tg9MNrFCFZZrRu3j6-MvAjza0yKoIEAv_8QJqYr-tRAIlosdXG8SJZPS6SvcLW9H7Bdn0u4A6-l9eMdxSIWgWU4q1OrylAnqU_2eKktjSu7E0aOL8o3evJ3VERAoU0DZnXlPGH9k-EgemlNr73Crt3oPKi6fkbYZj1QrwJPP7GlguPEoNQAVOMd-VW2wP659CSJ93Kx1nxWE8xN-ouJhKFxi5tln-TYdY58AwecQ3_M12rstMVK2zFbPDccdw3dmERfq6apDvug-msyk_SExba4QMCvmjPUCPNwoV1DGy5lcmf_F2rfLUkuk3tlzEfuqK3tuDLdoi8d5jDa4ZU0UyRTunhSJZLh7qn1ajr7HLeaRWGANCcpXjD2O8EGMQeQZORprzSplTF49Q_AqSX0f7JuGMZWKq5xEOsAIScMRMxDNg3Q3QJfbANOAXQEIseHyIuQuadtDI)
---

This moment wasn’t about a handshake. **[**It was about a line in the sand.**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=535ed3fc5da0485f9b45e7def19ec8a2&_e=vroJxp_KterZdds8sVeDKRP_vDNwv-vcXv5F_dRrjsx0PvLT7Kqr_wN3UZuZcmJSzbQnMi2KEUryr-kv3Z3NPUKntPdjAl6HwLZFFhMeYFWF48N5RRWFfR3Tg9MNrFCFZRwZ0MGLQwRHMdPkpuMyCrYrn8slQC_d-9uTR_Z_fx_POl4Pc2inBOl5uEcIXlET8tih3XgClhFduWoxravuT7NQrn49PXfOxppepWlv5HQkfzD3qVyHfIu-e9ov6WHtTzt6vjRj720rN2hNLbwYfmmrrxaPSafgvqBDY5AAmQ60a_utGV_ec-_HarEDWxoFVhVMmCTrPhEp7YbZY7FhPHnH5rdWD7CRIZTpA15VpClnbBt37GKNStdDOyWZPDvDTIwYM4SgCxZc_tSiWJVeQ_8f1sVrxD6EHZaMe1gNGZNE7d2Emb2T4Ikcr8s3rYHaNiWeA1U_h-WrcwEYqA8bG7rEQdf4XW_FM9XFkxutJ2FwGTit779YDBXR5K-Fm_DJlUWAZPV_2QOt6DFjshMGu9QCefSrdF14QOfSuyxsXBM%3D)**

God Bless America.
— Royce Alexander White

PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
P.O. Box 5473 Hopkins, MN 55343

body:

It’s been a chaotic few weeks, Peter.
First: Trump threatened that if the State of Colorado didn’t release Tina Peters (his fellow election conspiracy theorist and convicted criminal) from prison, there would be “harsh measures” taken.
Then: Trump announced he would be relocating U.S. Space Command from Colorado to Alabama, citing Colorado’s use of mail ballots as the reason why he has a problem with our state.
Now: It’s time to send the message that Colorado is ready to fight back. Jena has stood up to Trump as Secretary of State, and now she is running to be the Attorney General who will protect our rights and freedoms from Trump’s extremism.
Chip in now to show you’re with Jena in the fight against Trump → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2509-q3-jg]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

While we don’t know what Trump will do next, here’s what we do know: Colorado voters have rejected him three times in our free and fair elections. Trump blames mail ballots instead of his failing policies.
Tina Peters was convicted in a fair trial by a jury of her peers. Trump’s attempts to put pressure on the justice system is an embarrassment.
We must reject this behavior and elect an AG who will continue to uphold the law and protect our rights.
Chip in today to help us power Jena’s campaign in the wake of Trump’s chaos. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2509-q3-jg]

clean_body: [] It’s been a chaotic few weeks, Peter. First: Trump threatened that if the State of Colorado didn’t release Tina Peters (his fellow election conspiracy theorist and convicted criminal) from prison, there would be “harsh measures” taken. Then: Trump announced he would be relocating U.S. Space Command from Colorado to Alabama, citing Colorado’s use of mail ballots as the reason why he has a problem with our state. Now: It’s time to send the message that Colorado is ready to fight back. Jena has stood up to Trump as Secretary of State, and now she is running to be the Attorney General who will protect our rights and freedoms from Trump’s extremism. Chip in now to show you’re with Jena in the fight against Trump → [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: CONTRIBUTE $10 [] CONTRIBUTE $25 [] CONTRIBUTE $50 [] CONTRIBUTE $100 [] CONTRIBUTE $250 [] ANOTHER AMOUNT [?&] While we don’t know what Trump will do next, here’s what we do know: Colorado voters have rejected him three times in our free and fair elections. Trump blames mail ballots instead of his failing policies. Tina Peters was convicted in a fair trial by a jury of her peers. Trump’s attempts to put pressure on the justice system is an embarrassment. We must reject this behavior and elect an AG who will continue to uphold the law and protect our rights. Chip in today to help us power Jena’s campaign in the wake of Trump’s chaos. [] Thanks, Team Griswold Follow Jena Online: [] [] [] [] [] Paid for by Jena for Colorado. name: Autism Health
subject: New Partnership Bringing Hope to Families with Autism
body:
|
---
| |
---
| | **Exciting Collaboration: Autism Health Inc. & Dr. Goodenowe Enterprises**
---
| [ ](http://)
---
| **Autism Health Inc. is proud to announce a powerful new partnership with Dr. Goodenowe Community Health.** Together, we are bringing advanced plasmalogen precursor supplements and pediatric restorative health programs to families who need them most—especially those who may otherwise be unable to access these life-changing supports. **Special Offer – For the Next 2 Weeks Only**
Enjoy an exclusive **50% discount** on _ProdromeGLIA_ and _ProdromeNEURO_ supplements by using code **AHSWalk25** at [www.prodrome.com](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=f9bc75a497&e=3a42edfdc4).
* * *
### Why Plasmalogens Matter
Children and young adults with autism often face challenges such as neuroinflammation and impaired myelination, which can occur at any stage of development. Neuroinflammation depletes plasmalogens—essential brain lipids that support neurological health. Supplementation can help replenish these vital compounds, which:
* Support cognition, mobility, and resilience
* Protect neurons with powerful antioxidant properties
* Promote nervous system health and myelin sheath maintenance

* * *
### Reported Benefits*
Families of individuals with autism who have used Dr. Goodenowe’s plasmalogen precursor supplements have reported improvements in:
* Communication, eye contact, and social connection
* Mood stability and emotional regulation
* Attention span and ability to follow instructions
* Sleep quality and sensory tolerance
* Walking, balance, and coordination
* Cognition, memory, and focus
* Eating habits and reduction in stimming
* Seizure activity, motor skills, and even heart function

* * *
### Together for Families
Through this partnership, Autism Health Inc. and Dr. Goodenowe Enterprises are making breakthrough science more accessible—bringing hope and practical solutions to families impacted by autism. Take advantage of this **limited-time 50% discount** and join us in supporting healthier futures.

| We’re excited to announce that **tickets are officially on sale** for the **Autism Health Summit 2026** – happening **April 24–25, 2026** at the beautiful **Legacy Resort & Spa in San Diego, CA**! **Early Bird Special – Save 10%**
Register now and receive **10% off** your ticket with promo code **EarlyBird10**. This limited-time offer is valid through **Nov 1st only** , so don’t wait! You can also apply through your California Regional Center for approval. **Event Dates:**
* **Friday & Saturday, April 24–25** – Full conference with expert speakers, panels, and networking
* **Sunday, April 26** – **Optional Vendor Day** : An extra opportunity to connect with exhibitors and explore products, services, and resources that support the autism community

This one-of-a-kind, parent-driven event brings together top doctors, therapists, researchers, and educators to share the latest in integrative health, biomedical treatments, therapies, nutrition, and more. Whether you're a parent, caregiver, or healthcare professional, the Autism Health Summit is designed to inform, inspire, and empower. Don’t miss out on a transformative weekend of learning, connection, and hope. Sponsorships are available [HERE](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=e9de0caec4&e=3a42edfdc4). **Reserve your spot today and save 10%** at: [www.ahsconference.com](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=276ebf5b91&e=3a42edfdc4)

| **Warrior Mom is Now on Audible!**
---
|
---
| We are thrilled to share some exciting news— _Warrior Mom: A Mother’s Journey in Healing Her Son with Autism_ is now available on **Audible through Amazon**! Whether you’re driving, walking, or simply prefer to listen, you can now experience this inspiring story in a whole new way. This audiobook is a heartfelt journey of hope, resilience, and determination—created to inspire families and advocates everywhere who are seeking answers and strength on their journey with autism. If you’ve ever wanted to dive into the Warrior Mom story but haven’t had the time to sit and read the book, this is the perfect way to join. You will be encouraged, inspired, and reminded that no challenge is too great when fueled by love and perseverance. For more information and to grab your copy today, visit **[www.WarriorMom.com](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=11c65e7bd8&e=3a42edfdc4)**.

body:
Variety’s headline — “E. Jean Carroll Hopes Her Explosive Telluride Doc Will ‘Finish Off’ Donald Trump” — speaks volumes, but not about Trump. It reveals, once again, how the anti-Trump industrial complex recycles the same tired tactics, banking on the idea that a new format — in this case, a documentary — will succeed where [...] | [](http://trk.libertyledger._ZD01In0/jJMB2KMqh5Z_Qk16n7TEgQ)

The murder of 23-year-old Ukrainian refugee Iryna Zarutska has become more than a local crime story in Charlotte. It has become a mirror, reflecting the rot of Democratic leadership and the policies that enabled her killer, repeat offender Decarlos Brown Jr., to be free in the first place. From the start, Charlotte Mayor Vi Lyles’ [...]

# **[Israel Strikes Hamas Leadership](http://trk.libertyledger._rrpKNRUWWbfF2Q)**
---
Israel’s war against Hamas reached a new and unprecedented front this week — not in Gaza, not in Lebanon, but in Doha, Qatar. In a stunning escalation, the IDF and Shin Bet confirmed a targeted strike on senior Hamas leadership operating openly in Qatar’s capital. The targets, Khalil al-Hayya and Zaher Jabarin, were long considered [...]
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger._rrpKNRUWWbfF2Q)
[](http://trk.libertyledger.)
# **[Outlets Report Raises Eyebrows](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
Seventeen days. That’s how long it took for the national networks to acknowledge the brutal killing of Iryna Zarutska, a young Ukrainian refugee murdered aboard a Charlotte light rail train. Nearly three weeks passed before the legacy media finally deemed the story worthy of prime time coverage—and when they did, NBC could not resist filtering [...]
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.)
[](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/8S57_Zp499XR5TA5BL7V6g)
# **[Online Site Faces Public Outcry After Notice Placed On Post](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/8S57_Zp499XR5TA5BL7V6g)**
---
On August 22, Iryna Zarutska boarded a Charlotte light rail train with no reason to expect anything other than a routine commute. Minutes later, her life ended violently at the hands of Decarlos Brown Jr., a repeat offender with a long criminal history. The crime, caught on surveillance video, is shocking in its brutality — [...]

subject: This stuck with me.

body:
I couldn’t stop thinking about this.| | | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=74223c8226374bfa8b6f712ba186a688&_e=nAUnOafAxmTn-w5afEOPc6CaUJf92u75Zo4iWEAwTYOZ7jNZKPcZV2tCMAegYZqmnhgmBPcVcibkOlXaXAJ-dQTDgMfLfImL3JS5FMeaeIOt7oo_vHoV24CuxblrAy0Tvw6PPUb18T3V4ZeQwpkbiO2lNEBxfxhc6bCL0lihdwWY15WMmU-bJZcOVoA5rXl7oY6LUr6bAJk274itGi1BgVR6dpQndI_Akr0RPYp7yCqYRt2UE0Lain3scDLiKqZG5D4LU9LUjCpbNvzwLDfS6GJsC7tSPkpzopchMNzbSLfZdEpZrq5YRrKOmVyMdCk1ZwLUW3P7p-2FBNt2WpVAbN8KmxvWnkBkjGR5kF510yzHh7X7OhW47W-KAAj29_hI5izrVcxwiuoMKTfxBACx2q5rwzy7dBJAXQaLx3wcAa09_85Ff7esGMEisgmVrHesMkVcQNvaQTNy4ZnvVgTJBx0VaQWH7d0wXonwFTKXVNLI8E32altWsP6y3lUpBnUfTqbiKkHKYCmqMVyOi5mnAHv5QQ09SWeD97VNpd1zoRe3ONiCIRGLpfe5wq8adn9S16bFLUmgOfjs4oo6kP1yDVlfR6QrOn5nRN75gcBzaaXiwUHI-IScWqBd3fNpL7nRJN0uEY_me6F9ceNHTWNS3ePoHHbNPSk40UaGM_PqR766NeiQZEKm6wak2TBDJLUOWzV1oMATrckqqV64jC_IfduDLX9VVdWiQwhj1Rvdi8Vrhc1wL1MPqGmuIAR_qImOPFXfyXOt_yhCXGJj3yny7q_2fqFn0t1NLQHxurG1zprJXBAgtGMo_3pjaoaV6Zk03ThRv0Mrp2F0FkQCTFpZIc7XJOeqpdYfqPib5Q1APkjoTY4om7jt83wP345Ek_ClaRrD7Uiygqo2a62wRzEaxA%3D%3D)

| Peter,

I’ve got to level with you. I have some good news and some bad news to share.

**The good news?** Grassroots Democrats like you have the power to change the course of this election. In 2020, despite being outraised, people stepped up and proved that small-dollar donors can defeat Republican megadonors. We’ve done it before — and we can do it again.

**The bad news?** Republicans are sitting on a staggering $80 million war chest, while Democrats have just $15 million. That’s a $65 million gap. It’s money they’ll use to attack our candidates, redraw maps, and bankroll Donald Trump’s extreme agenda.

If we don’t close this gap, it could cost us the House for years to come. But if we rally together right now, we can match their resources and protect our democracy.

**Peter — Donald Trump has declared war on your right to vote.** He plans to ban mail-in voting and voting machines nationwide before the 2026 midterms. In his words, "It's the only way Democrats can get elected." _This is election rigging, plain and simple._ The same Trump who urged his own supporters to vote by mail now wants to strip that right away from millions of Americans. Working parents who can't take time off. Seniors who can't stand in long lines. Disabled Americans. Military voters overseas. Why? Because when more people vote, Republicans lose. **Trump knows his approval rating is in the gutter, so he's rigging the game. He's willing to destroy democracy itself to stay in power.** **[We won't let him get away with it. disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
It's been a few months since we last reached out to ask, and we're hoping for a LOT of responses today.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1806%2E791427%2Ee8PfA3)

You may have noticed that every so often, Ilhan likes our team to check in with our supporters directly to ask a simple question: **_What are the issues you care about most?**_
Well, it's been a few months since we last reached out to ask, and we're hoping for a LOT of responses to that very question today.
[**Can we count on you to take our official Team Ilhan September Issues Survey? It should only take a minute or two of your time, but any input you have is incredibly valuable to our campaign.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-sept25-issues-survey/?source=em250909-1-180&akid=1806%2E791427%2Ee8PfA3)
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-sept25-issues-survey/?source=em250909-1-180&akid=1806%2E791427%2Ee8PfA3)**
We tend to keep the options on these surveys the same every time we ask, because believe it or not, the responses to them change all the time.
It's your answers — alongside the answers of progressives nationwide — that gives us a better read on where our movement's priorities lie at any given moment.
The more responses we receive, the better Ilhan is able to continue fighting for our shared values in Congress.
That's because whether your top priorities are healthcare for all, defending immigrant communities, ending endless wars or something else entirely — it's the issues and our supporters that make our progressive movement so special.
So please, let us know what you think by taking today's survey. We're tracking responses at this link:
**[https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/Sept-2025-Issues-Survey**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-sept25-issues-survey/?source=em250909-1-180&akid=1806%2E791427%2Ee8PfA3)
We'll be reviewing the results with Ilhan in just a few days, so thank you in advance for your response.
\- Team Ilhan

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: Epstein Files
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
Remember when Donald Trump promised to release the Epstein files?
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250909_2_ossoff?refcode=em20250909-2263&amount=5&refcode2=2263_582294_f3g2GG&akid=2263%2E582294%2Ef3g2GG)
Remember when Donald Trump promised to release the Epstein files?
_Did anyone really think the sexual predator president who used to party with Jeffrey Epstein was going to release the Epstein files?_
Instead, he’s been busy taking away your health care to cut taxes for the rich and threatening to strip Americans of their citizenship and send them to foreign prisons.
We were told Donald Trump’s new GOP cared about working people.
But you can’t claim to be for working men and women when you defund their hospitals and nursing homes.
You can’t claim to be for working men and women when you defund school lunch programs that help feed little boys and girls whose hard-working parents are struggling to fill the fridge.
Let me tell you what it’s been like in Washington these last seven months.
The leaders of Georgia’s clinics and hospitals and nursing homes, caregivers for seniors and the disabled, nurses, teachers, food pantry directors — they all came to us and pleaded with Georgia's representatives in Congress: don’t do this. Don’t devastate health care. Don’t abandon seniors. Don’t starve kids.
Sen. Warnock and I listened. We fought that bill, and we voted No.
We put Georgia first.
But every Republican member of Congress who is supposed to represent Georgia put loyalty to Trump over loyalty to our state.
***
That brings me to the 2026 election.
_2026 is our only hope to recover Congressional power and reverse this descent toward one-man rule._
And here in Georgia I am the only Democratic U.S. Senator nationwide up for reelection in a state Trump won.
I am therefore MAGA’s #1 target for defeat.
_There is no path back without defending this seat — the seat that secured the Democratic majority four years ago._
This is a moment of struggle for the very substance of our Republic. This descent into one-man rule must be stopped.
[**If you share my outrage at this unprecedented corruption and abuse of power — and if you are determined to WIN — please split a donation between my campaign and Chris Pappas today. This is the most important Senate race in the country, and I can’t win without you.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250909_2_ossoff?refcode=em20250909-2263&amount=5&refcode2=2263_582294_f3g2GG&akid=2263%2E582294%2Ef3g2GG)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250909_2_ossoff?amount=5&refcode=em20250909-2263&refcode2=2263_582294_f3g2GG&akid=2263%2E582294%2Ef3g2GG)**
Five years ago, here in Georgia, we lit a beacon of hope and possibility for the whole nation. It’s still shining.
And come next November, we will raise it higher.
In a landslide, we will do our part to end this spiral into chaos and corruption.
Thank you for your support.
\- Jon
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer&refcode=em20250909-2?t=1&refcode2=2263_582294_f3g2GG&akid=2263%2E582294%2Ef3g2GG)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=2263%2E582294%2Ef3g2GG)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=3&akid=2263%2E582294%2Ef3g2GG)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2263%2E582294%2Ef3g2GG)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)
Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
Chris Pappas for Senate
PO Box 313
Manchester, NH 03105
United States

name: Mark Warner
subject: I can’t tell you how much I appreciate you, Derek.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114920452/568590029/1341216162?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Grateful_250909_T1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWE4ZDQ3Ni1iNThkLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fDmmxa8OoyT0es0CixjcIJ0roGg-mkE804j3trkzdUY=) Derek,

September has been a whirlwind so far, to say the least.

Between the incessant online attacks from right-wing conspiracy theorist and 9/11 truther Laura Loomer and my Senate hearing with RFK Jr., where we discovered that our Secretary of Health and Human Services doesn’t know how many people died from Covid – let’s just say I’ve seen better days in Washington.

**But through it all, I’ve also seen something else: the strength of this grassroots team.**

Thousands of folks have stepped up to say enough is enough. You’ve spoken out, chipped in, and stood with me as I’ve worked to hold the line on truth, accountability, and national security.

When we defeat Trump’s Republicans in Virginia and defy the odds by taking back the Senate for Democrats next year – it will be because of committed grassroots supporters like you.

I can’t tell you how much that means to me – especially during moments like this.

So today, I just want to say thank you. Truly.

And if you’re able, I hope you’ll consider making your first $5 donation to my reelection campaign. Here’s a link to donate, if you can:

[**_https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mw-email-250903_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114920454/568590034/1341216162?amount=5&refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Grateful_250909_T1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWE4ZDQ3Ni1iNThkLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fDmmxa8OoyT0es0CixjcIJ0roGg-mkE804j3trkzdUY=)

Every dollar helps us hold this critical seat for Democrats and flip the balance of power in Congress. And remember: this month is an FEC filing deadline month – which means we have the chance to post a massive fundraising haul and show Laura Loomer, Donald Trump, and the entire GOP just how strong our campaign is.

The fight continues,

Mark Warner **********[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114920455/568590036/1341216162?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Grateful_250909_T1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWE4ZDQ3Ni1iNThkLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fDmmxa8OoyT0es0CixjcIJ0roGg-mkE804j3trkzdUY=)**********

subject: My first time reaching out after the car crash

Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.
| [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9a4e2feb6228403d900552c1d53406d9&_e=q-OG1u_9Nke9iVTg1-FtKyhJ7x_Db3Aq61Vd7YmcK5H0OMtI8t_jEOZCoth9DhTfwQZFCNWKj9YxLOqGAvfLbI4do21Z6gQtCwES-NNEt1vPvXBoMEz_PsxM85Am69w3xfbL_oKV1CogSV4xUX-WansgFnOZQBDW7ZDR9JnQ8sXbtsR7WR8mdHqyqA79EyigT8KHD4GuUinKMgIfiUnCpHNBLr6NQ0hDlTp--QqblPgN1mteWfGibPL9OF-vNNaCT_Iex8LoObCzKqDJCa6Fen6WhyoBbgSkumRE15QbP3ACTsQL5o0UneL-yQ-hR1ImDT_El6yEiqQrgMk54Gq703WpRDrH28tIJ1IRIfxj0DRJqcFkooPe5rxJyoHOpVcq4edFrpsKF84haK-5ich2uzEbaKYBUqJ1HHj6CFgZP215xvuXT9bEOoD2q2La3JAW4f62tE3br1FGdVIATTgglaIJbqg4oZanCQvAaVWllF7bo8eWM3Hfh5zDn_ZLadEyOoO3ideO4D9Iz0MQsfwXgpU8OxpC1SgMMPoB7vQKNShaSyF1MBiRvnYoBpP8ifvt77cMXW7t10bdcT4G1PyB6z3bbOQhEKtNVFv9KPswK0KM_PiO6h2vFzPu1Vm2AxMQ2AoNdE_SAtiC-F-GHtHebA%3D%3D)
---
Peter,
---
So many kind souls like you have asked how I’m doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery.
---
I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed.
---
Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together.**
---
But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive **__ANYTHING!__**
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9a4e2feb6228403d900552c1d53406d9&_e=q-OG1u_9Nke9iVTg1-FtKyhJ7x_Db3Aq61Vd7YmcK5H0OMtI8t_jEOZCoth9DhTfwQZFCNWKj9YxLOqGAvfLbI4do21Z6gQtCwES-NNEt1vPvXBoMEz_PsxM85Am69w3xfbL_oKV1CogSV4xUX-WansgFnOZQBDW7ZDR9JnQ8sXbtsR7WR8mdHqyqA79EyigT8KHD4GuUinKMgIfiUnCpBlAhIDaWhR01jsHJmnoTJJ0BUkMU6YmTyRaKpAYb0to59__FZHBKe27ELBPZl9H298IARf1UlN3aWp8TJWizb8XL95iqbDQ6E2Q7H2meDtU7ub9eM8OUVyBtnoHTHnqhf4W3hnnhA-986VMrdFYq8bkTjBB6cWNCZS2CIt9YE91DHwvc_iWJTEYOpBSKXQoTgSWuJ0tsGVnfjy_xUBo_Z1UZW7-iNzw3atz-V2Ej-UPOK9DH7czAOaHD69cwifiPFwf3XXYpMxWiwmFBwj-odlOSKAhRSG0YJcxY-zyegvAydpVslIHn-KxWIQDCj5djG437gQaTdpQyUfVO_ly1DI58h0qdw7RV02aObMWhbwV4ye-l98FUrg57psDg9AIAPU_m1O7VIXallm8oc5quLIjQtdLEViZJiWZ67jwm6wJQrCpSd0m7lbSrAkRHkHfgQ%3D%3D)
__
---
One thing especially helped take the pain away...
---
...**President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom – _the highest civilian honor in America._**
---
**President Trump knows I’m in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to _federal_ cases, which means he _legally_ _cannot_ save me from the bogus _state-level_ charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS.**
---
**Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
**And now, this car crash has set me back even more...**
---
And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my _FREEDOM_ and my _JUSTICE_.
---
__Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END!__
---
[**So, if you can, please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9a4e2feb6228403d900552c1d53406d9&_e=q-OG1u_9Nke9iVTg1-FtKyhJ7x_Db3Aq61Vd7YmcK5H0OMtI8t_jEOZCoth9DhTfwQZFCNWKj9YxLOqGAvfLbI4do21Z6gQtCwES-NNEt1vPvXBoMEz_PsxM85Am69w3xfbL_oKV1CogSV4xUX-WansgFnOZQBDW7ZDR9JnQ8sXbtsR7WR8mdHqyqA79EyigT8KHD4GuUinKMgIfiUnCpDoY9BoYWoSM9B7uUV4nU-rYsrEnFhcN3K9x2B3Low8TksXyRRv8KFpPF6zdreckifURTtpPVketPx5E4QO1-IK-8THlqtWaUd5a83Yck-eM6wkijcxISeYVF6QmdVxtmqf_1ZYhcALOq8Y5AXbK7iOhXYaFn5wNRU1mzTC2vIXebMqZwbaSOQ9lCotdD7Y21lFAESo_NsgCY5UKYb5B-NAZ4tp0ZtJFx1uLiDK6NX9MvNl5a67-ni5VfHH7umJgRh6tVpABUBoIjZhqXopZLaWeDNiC_-xGYfqfCeJj-g66DkX1GTmwJlsKgSa2eDwEk2glloX5Cyb7eMJjAEpmsnRMkecHcxVeqNOOvXihRynDQ09nodTpRSomcdKL_azIdGhbM4XJ8hVx1crtHPZ3MA4AbNR2R4wKoI0VTau82Dq1vmyF5B5Kbj48RTQy2GUs-g%3D%3D)

clean_body: Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me. | Peter, So many kind souls like you have asked how I’m doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery. I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed. Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together. But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive ANYTHING! One thing especially helped take the pain away... ...President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom – the highest civilian honor in America. President Trump knows I’m in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to federal cases, which means he legally cannot save me from the bogus state-level charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS. Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my ONLY chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team. But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of BANKRUPTCY. And now, this car crash has set me back even more...** And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like YOU. That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my FREEDOM and my JUSTICE. Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END! Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

name: Movement for Freedom
subject: If they can’t win fair elections, they’ll rig ‘em.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POLITIVIST ACTION PAC
body:
https://www.movement4freedom.com/home [https://www.movement4freedom.com/home]
Peter,
Donald Trump and his allies have made it clear: if they can’t win fair elections, they’ll rig them.
Right now, they’re redrawing Congressional maps, which will suppress votes and silence communities, mostly of color.
Most recently, Trump has turned his attention to Missouri. Alongside Missouri’s spineless, far-right governor, Trump has ordered MO Republicans to redraw the state’s congressional map to target Rep. Emanuel Cleaver, a respected Black lawmaker, and eliminate his seat in Congress.
They know their extremist agenda is deeply unpopular, so they’re trying to rewrite the rules of our democracy to cling to power. We can’t let them.
In the face of these attacks on our democracy, the “Missouri Three,” State Representatives Elizabeth Fuchs, Jeremy Dean, and Ray Reed, have stood up to the Trump Regime. In a powerful act of defiance, these three lawmakers staged a sit-in on the Missouri House floor in protest of the redistricting plan.
https://secure.ngpvan.com/FIyl_DkQ4k6ttucE2Km0kw2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/FIyl_DkQ4k6ttucE2Km0kw2]
We stand with them.
Movement for Freedom exists to build grassroots power strong enough to fight back. But to meet this moment, we need resources to organize, train, and mobilize communities who are ready to resist Trump’s anti-democratic agenda.
Peter, join the Missouri Three and add your name to say you’ll fight back against Trump’s redistricting plan and to stop the real steal! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/FIyl_DkQ4k6ttucE2Km0kw2]
ADD YOUR NAME [https://secure.ngpvan.com/FIyl_DkQ4k6ttucE2Km0kw2]
And after you sign, would you consider making a donation to Movement for Freedom? $20, $10, or whatever you can will help us take on Trump’s election-rigging machine and defend our democracy >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?refcode=x_250909_missouri3_act]
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?refcode=x_250909_missouri3_act]
This fight is bigger than one state or one district. It’s about whether our government answers to the people, or answers to Trump and Trump alone.
In solidarity,
Movement for Freedom

clean_body: [] Peter, Donald Trump and his allies have made it clear: if they can’t win fair elections, they’ll rig them. Right now, they’re redrawing Congressional maps, which will suppress votes and silence communities, mostly of color. Most recently, Trump has turned his attention to Missouri. Alongside Missouri’s spineless, far-right governor, Trump has ordered MO Republicans to redraw the state’s congressional map to target Rep. Emanuel Cleaver, a respected Black lawmaker, and eliminate his seat in Congress. They know their extremist agenda is deeply unpopular, so they’re trying to rewrite the rules of our democracy to cling to power. We can’t let them. In the face of these attacks on our democracy, the “Missouri Three,” State Representatives Elizabeth Fuchs, Jeremy Dean, and Ray Reed, have stood up to the Trump Regime. In a powerful act of defiance, these three lawmakers staged a sit-in on the Missouri House floor in protest of the redistricting plan. [] We stand with them. Movement for Freedom exists to build grassroots power strong enough to fight back. But to meet this moment, we need resources to organize, train, and mobilize communities who are ready to resist Trump’s anti-democratic agenda. Peter, join the Missouri Three and add your name to say you’ll fight back against Trump’s redistricting plan and to stop the real steal! [] ADD YOUR NAME [] And after you sign, would you consider making a donation to Movement for Freedom? $20, $10, or whatever you can will help us take on Trump’s election-rigging machine and defend our democracy >> [] DONATE TODAY [] This fight is bigger than one state or one district. It’s about whether our government answers to the people, or answers to Trump and Trump alone. In solidarity, Movement for Freedom [] Movement for Freedom is a campaign, founded by former Congresswoman Cori Bush, that calls for radically transforming how we build justice, safety, and liberation through love and solidarity. Every single dollar helps us build, train, and fight for the justice we all deserve. Want to learn more? Visit our website at Movement4Freedom.com [] . In 2024 our campaign came within 799 votes of unseating Mariannette Miller-Meeks. **We know this district is ready for change, and we're determined to finish the job.**

For 2026, we’re getting out early, knocking on doors, showing up at community events, and making sure our message reaches people online and across the district. We know what it takes to win and we’re ready to do it.

The challenge is making sure we can keep up that effort day after day. Campaigns can be unpredictable, but a steady stream of support lets us plan ahead. That’s why recurring donations matter so much. Even a small monthly gift adds up over time and makes a real difference in a race this close.

body:
When will it end? [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114920780/568591134/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTNmZDBkZi1iNjhkLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4q4wVxof5bUwO2talSk2RMbaCtYx0bmpFMMnyTYFRnE=&emci=c07b302a-908d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=253fd0df-b68d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=15820338)

_Texas Republicans just took the GOP's unconstitutional anti-abortion agenda a step further:_

**Now, private citizens are allowed to sue abortion pill providers in Texas.** That means more and more care providers won’t be able to do their jobs, patients will be denied safe, essential services, and extreme Republicans are once again putting politics over people’s health.

The abortion pill is safe, _point blank._ But instead of listening to science and medical professionals like Kim, the GOP is choosing to empower private citizens to drag medical providers into court, all because of their own personal beliefs. This is not helping patients or saving lives, instead, **it's silencing doctors, putting real women's lives at risk, and robbing us of our essential freedoms.**

Peter, the majority of Americans refuse to live in a world where politics and radical extremism take precedence over human lives. While Republicans continue to spew lies about abortion access and safety— _and use those lies to take away our freedoms_ —Kim is committed to protecting reproductive rights and standing up to these dangerous attacks in every corner of our nation. **She can’t do it without you.**

[**If you stand with Kim and agree it’s time for extremists to leave abortion care where it belongs—between women and their doctors—chip in $5, or anything you can clean_body: When will it end? Texas Republicans just took the GOP's unconstitutional anti-abortion agenda a step further: Now, private citizens are allowed to sue abortion pill providers in Texas. That means more and more care providers won’t be able to do their jobs, patients will be denied safe, essential services, and extreme Republicans are once again putting politics over people’s health. The abortion pill is safe, point blank. But instead of listening to science and medical professionals like Kim, the GOP is choosing to empower private citizens to drag medical providers into court, all because of their own personal beliefs. This is not helping patients or saving lives, instead, it's silencing doctors, putting real women's lives at risk, and robbing us of our essential freedoms. Peter, the majority of Americans refuse to live in a world where politics and radical extremism take precedence over human lives. While Republicans continue to spew lies about abortion access and safety— and use those lies to take away our freedoms —Kim is committed to protecting reproductive rights and standing up to these dangerous attacks in every corner of our nation. She can’t do it without you. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Team Schrier Rep. name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: A record number of incumbents are retiring
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
This isn’t a drill.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250909-1&t=1&akid=2643%2E587540%2EmOPhGl)
Peter, we’ve got a rare opportunity on our hands.
NPR recently reported that _a record number of U.S. lawmakers are retiring_ in 2026 — Democrats and Republicans alike.
That means dozens of open seats at every level of government. And those open seats? They’re some of the most winnable races for young progressives like the ones we’re backing.
**This isn’t a drill.** This is the moment to build a new bench of leaders who will fight like hell for our future — and it’s up to us to make sure they win.
We’re preparing to recruit, train, and elect the next wave of badass young leaders to fill those seats. But we need grassroots support to do it. **[Can you pitch in $5 or whatever you can right now?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250909_1_retiring?refcode=em20250909-2643&amount=5&refcode2=2643_587540_mOPhGl&akid=2643%2E587540%2EmOPhGl)**
For decades, the system has been rigged to keep young people out — favoring older, wealthier, and well-connected incumbents who could hold their seats for life.
But now? The door is opening. And we’re stepping through.
At Leaders We Deserve, we’re not waiting for permission. We’re building something bold — recruiting candidates from our movements, giving them the tools to win, and organizing on the ground to flip seats and shift power.
In 2023, we helped elect the youngest state legislator in Virginia. Last cycle, we elected a slate of bold leaders like Molly Cook, Sarah McBride, and Oscar De Los Santos.
This cycle? **_We want to elect dozens more young progressives across the country._**
But we can’t do it without you.
Every door we knock, every ad we run, every dollar we raise — it all fuels this work.
**[If you’re ready to make history with us, chip in $5 or more now to help us seize this opportunity and elect the next generation of leaders.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250909_1_retiring?refcode=em20250909-2643&amount=5&refcode2=2643_587540_mOPhGl&akid=2643%2E587540%2EmOPhGl)**

Thank you,
Leaders We Deserve

name: Dexter HQ
subject: RFK Jr. is a public health crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maxine for Congress
body:
https://maxinefororegon.com/ [https://maxinefororegon.com/]
Peter,
Here at Dexter HQ, we stand with the more than 1,000 current and former Department of Health and Human Services employees calling for Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr.'s resignation.
RFK Jr. is a public health crisis who is attacking the vaccines and medical discoveries that have saved millions of lives.
For decades, vaccines have protected children, the vulnerable, and the immunocompromised, making it harder for diseases like chickenpox and meningitis to spread. Many life-threatening diseases, like measles and polio, were essentially eradicated in the United States because of herd immunity thanks to vaccines.
But now, RFK Jr.—who is supposed to be the top health expert in the United States—is trying to reverse decades of science that protect us.
Under his watch, the largest measles outbreak in 25 years erupted with over 900 cases of a once-eradicated disease. He’s promoted snake oil cures and repeatedly questioned the safety of the COVID-19 vaccines. And he fired all 17 members of the CDC panel of vaccine experts, replacing them with underqualified individuals who share his views.
Most recently, RFK Jr. ousted Susan Monarez, the new CDC director, for disagreements over vaccine policy. After her firing, several other top CDC officials also resigned in protest.
His anti-vaccine agenda couldn’t be more obvious—and it’s endangering all of us.
Now, disease experts, former CDC officials, senators, and thousands of HHS employees are calling for RFK Jr. to resign—and we stand with them.
Our communities can’t afford the cruel negligence and purposeful ignorance of those in power. Oregon helped form a West Coast Health Alliance—but Maxine Dexter is building a nationwide coalition to protect our families. Will you chip in to help us fight back? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=x_250909_consequences_act]
