name: Kevin Kijewski for Michigan Attorney General
subject: 🇺🇸 KEVIN KIJEWSKI, CANDIDATE FOR MICHIGAN AG, CELEBRATES MAJOR VICTORY: DISTRICT COURT JUDGE DISMISSES POLITICALLY MOTIVATED CHARGES 🇺🇸
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kijewski for Michigan, 115 W Allegan St, Ste 900, Lansing, MI 48933_
body:
| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/kevinformi/kevin-kijewski-candidate-for-michigan-ag-celebrates-major-victory-district-court-judge-dismisses-politically-motivated-charges-4740717?e=4b10910eed)
---
[|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=ff1a2da672&e=4b10910eed)
[|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=839233fb3e&e=4b10910eed)
| | | | | |
# BREAKING NEWS
# KEVIN KIJEWSKI, CANDIDATE FOR MICHIGAN ATTORNEY GENERAL, CELEBRATES MAJOR VICTORY FOR JUSTICE: DISTRICT COURT JUDGE DISMISSES POLITICALLY MOTIVATED CHARGES
---
[|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=fbea185487&e=4b10910eed)
| | **Lansing, MI** – Today, District Court Judge Kristen Simmons delivered a decisive victory for justice by finding insufficient probable cause to bind over Clifford Frost Jr. for trial and dismissing all charges against him in Michigan Attorney General Dana Nessel's politically motivated alternate elector prosecution. Atty. Kevin Kijewski (pronounced Key-Ev-Ski), Republican candidate for Michigan Attorney General and counsel for Frost, celebrated the ruling as a complete vindication and a damning indictment of Nessel's abuse of power for partisan gain.
"This decision dismantles AG Dana Nessel's baseless case and lays bare her long-standing political motivations," said Kijewski. "For years, Nessel has weaponized her office against Republicans, as evidenced by her own words in 2023 when she derisively called the alternate electors 'brainwashed' at a virtual event hosted by liberal activists. [She boasted about shopping the case to a 'very Democratic-leaning county' like Ingham to secure favorable jurors](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=feb35c9bdd&e=4b10910eed), while admitting these individuals genuinely believed they were acting lawfully and couldn't even plead guilty because they saw no wrongdoing. If that's not an admission of a weak case driven by politics rather than facts, I don't know what is." [You can watch Dana Nessel addressing her inappropriate political motivations to engage in lawfare by clicking here](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=4edb241356&e=4b10910eed).
Kijewski continued, "Nessel's actions were not only inappropriate and defamatory – she undermined her own prosecution by saying the defendants lacked the requisite criminal intent. As I stated at the time, this was a political calculation, not a pursuit of truth or justice. Today's dismissal of charges against my client, Clifford Frost Jr., confirms that Nessel's crusade was nothing more than lawfare aimed at silencing political dissent and advancing her Democratic agenda."
The charges stemmed from the 2020 alternate electors who, amid election disputes and following historical precedents like the 1960 Hawaii contest, submitted contingent certificates. Despite Nessel conceding a lack of specific criminal intent, she pressed forward in what Kijewski has long described as a "partisan witch hunt." Earlier efforts, including filing of a [Petition for a Writ of Certiorari with the United States Supreme Court](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=c28f59203c&e=4b10910eed) in the case of _Frost v. Nessel_ , underscored the overreach, and today's ruling proves Nessel’s case was built on sand. [You can read the petition Kijewski filed with the Supreme Court by clicking here](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=b916ae14be&e=4b10910eed).
"Dana Nessel's actions have eroded public trust in our justice system, prioritizing 'messaging' with progressive groups over equal application of the law," Kijewski added. "As Michigan's next Attorney General, I will end these abuses, protect constitutional rights, and focus on real threats to our communities – not vendettas against political opponents. Freedom isn't negotiable, and neither is justice." [A copy of Kijewski’s brief in the criminal case that secured the dismissal can be viewed by clicking here](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=85d90bab1d&e=4b10910eed). Kijewski is the only Michigan AG candidate that has actively fought against lawfare, both in words and actions. In fact, he fought the MI AG twice - and won both times. The first time was when he fought against a second round of COVID school closures in November 2020 in a federal lawsuit and got the Governor to back down.

name: MAHA Action
subject: Deep dive into the new MAHA Strategy Report - MAHA Media Hub #6
body:
| | | [ ](https://www.mahaaction.com/?e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=media_hub_6_invite_01_v1_1&n=1)
---
---
Dear MAHA Warriors, **This may be one of the biggest weeks for MAHA yet.** Today, [The White House released the MAHA Strategy Report,](https://www.mahaaction.com/r?u=EXOCt_RRD2OkInirUgusotMiQDUNcEk-L9OTBfjNxfkLb6NThJ71w12pH1yVFT5EstCj0_axnPCTLpZKd3uRJAmJlU3BVKg9YD5UdAYY1K8&e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=media_hub_6_invite_01_v1_1&n=2) and we're going to lead the conversation on what that means for America in tomorrow's Media Hub call. **Join us tomorrow, September 10th, at 4PM EDT**
---
| [](https://www.mahaaction.com/r?u=4ZVGYeoz2xiTn3loqsmrT_uf724Dzgpm-Ij45CSqp0cCxSUDymtho4nVB8_ys4Tx&e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=media_hub_6_invite_01_v1_1&n=3 "SAVE YOUR SPOT") [SAVE YOUR SPOT](https://www.mahaaction.com/r?u=4ZVGYeoz2xiTn3loqsmrT_uf724Dzgpm-Ij45CSqp0cCxSUDymtho4nVB8_ys4Tx&e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=media_hub_6_invite_01_v1_1&n=3)
---
_Limited Spots Remaining_ __ Join the MAHA Media Hub call for a powerhouse lineup. Hear from **Tony Lyons, Gavin de Becker, Dr. Eric Berg** , and more!
---
[ ](https://www.mahaaction.com/r?u=4ZVGYeoz2xiTn3loqsmrT_uf724Dzgpm-Ij45CSqp0cCxSUDymtho4nVB8_ys4Tx&e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=media_hub_6_invite_01_v1_1&n=4)
---
In last week's Media Hub call, over 2,500 advocates heard inspiring leaders share a powerful message: each of us has the ability to Make America Healthy Again. Together, we are committed to upholding truth and gold-standard science, and our mission is unstoppable.
---
## **Top Talking Points From Last Week's Call:**
* **We have the largest grassroots movement in the country!** Let’s continue to use this passion and dedication to Make America Healthy Again and make sure that Big Pharma, Big Ag, and their lobbyists can’t win.
* **We are winning!** The coordinated hit pieces and propaganda against Secretary Kennedy and the MAHA movement are proof of progress! They wouldn’t spend the resources to fight MAHA if they weren’t afraid of our impact.
* **Social media is the key:** As Dr. Oz said, getting LOUD in your own ways and voicing your support for this movement creates real change. Just look at Florida’s removal of vaccine mandates. Americans need to unite and make their voices heard. The momentum is on our side.

### **Blast These Messages Across Social Media**!
We have video clips of all the speakers from every Media Hub for you to share. These are yours to download and post.
---
| [](https://www.mahaaction.com/r?u=42XIdAn1v5Cn5XbOMM8Dv0w0Tj9Ogxm82IdZ5Ij-JNPmeiuokDOf9CWFnO8H8-JymoLT3Hr5XzRwNt-YMtlmIjsAAId3KfT8dklxIOrPoAE&e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=media_hub_6_invite_01_v1_1&n=5 "DOWNLOAD RESOURCES") [DOWNLOAD RESOURCES](https://www.mahaaction.com/r?u=42XIdAn1v5Cn5XbOMM8Dv0w0Tj9Ogxm82IdZ5Ij-JNPmeiuokDOf9CWFnO8H8-JymoLT3Hr5XzRwNt-YMtlmIjsAAId3KfT8dklxIOrPoAE&e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=media_hub_6_invite_01_v1_1&n=5)
---
### What You Can Do Right NOW
**Share this email.** Send it to 5 friends. Bobby deserves our support. The more noise we can raise, the less the coordinated attacks matter. **Post your own original content on social media** , or share clips from these calls, using #mahaaction. **Repost the MAHA wins** as much as you can. We need to show the public how much MAHA is getting accomplished. You can also watch the full call from last week here:
---
[ ](https://www.mahaaction.com/r?u=1AJnCcoGtHYftrUTYBwtFCx8DyQCP1kqjikxsNlK4edsr_DvA183oZvYqf388JJy&e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=media_hub_6_invite_01_v1_1&n=6)
---
## **Next Media Hub Call: Tomorrow at 4PM EDT**
Due to the unprecedented support we’ve received on the Media Hub calls, we are proud to announce that we will be having these calls weekly. **Every Wednesday, 4PM EDT
****[Save your spot!](https://www.mahaaction.com/mediahub/?e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=media_hub_6_invite_01_v1_1&n=7)** The fight is on, and we are winning. MAHA Action

body:

Friend,

I promise I won't take up much of your time.

In my film _2000 Mules_ , I exposed one of the greatest scandals in American history - the hijacking of the 2020 presidential election.

Today, I'm proud to join forces with Stand in the Gap, a non-profit organization dedicated to supporting the patriots who exercised their First Amendment rights in protest of the _outcome_ of that election.

**I want to reach as many people as I can with this request...**

I told their founder, Shane Jenkins, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to help Stand in the Gap provide help, hope, and healing to the January 6th patriots.

Even a donation of $10 can give a January 6th patriot the support they need.

[If that is all you need to hear, then please contribute $10 or any amount you can generously afford using the button below:](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=060203a684aa4997ab9c1abc3cee6f09&_e=zgVpBGdsTZNsl-bDqPsTW5njPQqeIBA4wr5GMP5sw_djfMgA1xJSxGQJgf92IPsDUULz3qP97tZxrU5WxwV3mVTqzOK2V2V5dkykNIa8F2_euE5WjCezG2PG7aNrBT5wDXICbnO4PW4sfZnV1lNlOxyObg97bZzjdVzeIiMWm6Sa8H56w5RmVriVhe72nYbHm6wm4l_YmGY9fBYW_dO4aovjzES7kFKazLqphu42nHHMoINajdhQyhjzwizx63oPNep4Wa9trO0vBXOVY4RGTXQWatXQmCwQMIwMin5zgGafRQYsKYMPi-WgtLtQqyTG3LSs1mACHt7aVB6YspdrtdDpt3qZ08iOKC5TP0djtE8YJfaGIxaJl4wY9u_iAkbCVD-Ab0jY3NiV8vQczl8DIabbn3N7deLTfiqtr7vb3WUpkll3D4ie3qJI0ORXuM1G4CRzbJV6rkY9-iP4dz-WrlZ5yHiW1MhzSrDXwePkfOHvoEDLJ2xxJL2Jj3zuaJDS1DVgEpKd7hbLecAG-WVevgaMUR3IMIKcaft6_-6W9N11dp3V_1W9Hh8KN85qO1BaxRouOBBNAzWcSZn2EtNcoeB_K4I5P7eGIJQ-SqtQavr4_hl4iUv6l97iNUCSxmwfxV0aYYFMAYkwYQuoO0JeBQ%3D%3D)

[Donate Now](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=060203a684aa4997ab9c1abc3cee6f09&_e=zgVpBGdsTZNsl-bDqPsTW5njPQqeIBA4wr5GMP5sw_djfMgA1xJSxGQJgf92IPsDUULz3qP97tZxrU5WxwV3mVTqzOK2V2V5dkykNIa8F2_euE5WjCezG2PG7aNrBT5wDXICbnO4PW4sfZnV1lNlOxyObg97bZzjdVzeIiMWm6QuV-tPZC4yc1g4-ko2zU6q2JhuFbAPpfLH7BPENEu11FpTP6zuvm5ZhlrLurtPFPc-PPdkTHCkFxlps8OMnDWsiv8JdV-3sqnTtF_qLjTrR0BN0WY3NgHhZhXs6su5DF3fEBSpMGmkNTB2u_XHLqW_tfX9tNuMIky3xBSx1WSTR7sTJL0Gw5OY91IFbmxXSy06LxUxah5EXHVsBDYI1sgiqfZy3dRKhAsX89ZqQ-ZSOxxtZxS0URegEuh3Mq5QkUJwsVahI4ZoYfpf-tKl299iIbIRZbJZK4mitWNAXOPxSUB3QTy6QhokD5nyovS440fAQy5GO7UyfAzoihFNEY1LlEX017Xs_rub6tRRgCJbmSksatJFuBKPTFcFbmyr2ar-KNmQlA3Z_4puMYnZMu2F2qLVduG2VCpZHgfxdKOjEE6wdsln91H5_Kpo4iqXIWiLuftR5H3hYnNrFOF8v6yPxQAQulk8dkdyf0SRv3uA6Q%3D%3D)

**Otherwise, let me explain why I 'm asking you to donate at least $10:**

$10 because the _" crime"_ these patriots committed was fighting for their country.

clean_body: Friend, I promise I won't take up much of your time. In my film 2000 Mules , I exposed one of the greatest scandals in American history - the hijacking of the 2020 presidential election. Today, I'm proud to join forces with Stand in the Gap, a non-profit organization dedicated to supporting the patriots who exercised their First Amendment rights in protest of the outcome of that election. I want to reach as many people as I can with this request... I told their founder, Shane Jenkins, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to help Stand in the Gap provide help, hope, and healing to the January 6th patriots. Even a donation of $10 can give a January 6th patriot the support they need. Otherwise, let me explain why I 'm asking you to donate at least $10: $10 because the " crime" these patriots committed was fighting for their country. $10 because even though they've been pardoned, many of them are struggling to get back on their feet. $10 because Stand in the Gap is providing them with the resources they need to successfully reintegrate into their communities, find work, reconnect with family, and restore their rights. Not only are these men and women patriots, but they come from all walks of life -- law enforcement, veterans, white-collar professionals, blue-collar workers, and all races and religions. And they were hunted down in a political persecution that denied them their constitutional rights. Stand in the Gap exists to provide real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives. Your gift today can help one of these patriots find the help, hope, and healing they need to succeed in their second chance. Friend, can I count on you to contribute $10 or whatever you can afford to Stand in the Gap? Click any button below to give today. Thank you, Dinesh D'Souza P.S. If you're still reading this email and I haven't convinced you to donate $10 or more, please consider what January 6th patriots still face... Harassment on social media and in their personal lives Difficulties in finding a job Homelessness Loss of rights, like the right to vote or own a firearm * Mental health challenges that their families can never understand All they did was stand up for their beliefs. clean_body: | Peter, Across the country, Donald Trump and his lackeys are trying to redraw congressional maps in an attempt to rig the midterms and stay in power past 2026. It’s wrong, and Hoosiers know it. Today, thousands of signed petitions were delivered to House Speaker Todd Huston and Senate President Pro Tem Rodric Bray showing that everyday Hoosiers stand against this blatant political power grab. = = Throughout the past weeks and months, Hoosiers have been clear that they oppose this power grab that splits the Region in two and Indianapolis into several pieces. Hoosiers have loudly said, ‘No new maps’. It’s time the Republican supermajority at our Statehouse listened. = Thanks, Hoosier Dems [content goes here] 101 W Washington St., #1110E Indianapolis, IN 46204 Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Ashley from Team Taylor
subject: We’re closing in on 10,000 grassroots donations

body:
By hitting this milestone, we’ll show anyone eyeing this race that our movement is strong, growing, and ready to defend fairness and protect our progressive majority.
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20250909-549&t=1&akid=549%2E294397%2Egke2jk)
Hey there,
I just checked ActBlue and saw this:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_20250909_1_ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250909-549&refcode2=549_294397_gke2jk&akid=549%2E294397%2Egke2jk)
We’re nearing **10,000** individual contributions to support Judge Chris Taylor.
With Justice Rebecca Bradley’s announcement that she won’t seek re-election, we don’t know who our opponent is yet. This gives the other side an opening to handpick a candidate who will do their bidding.
That makes grassroots support even more important — especially when we know right-wing special interests are ready to pour millions into Wisconsin’s Supreme Court race, just like they did last April.
They could start pouring money into Wisconsin again to target Judge Chris Taylor, which is why we’re fundraising early and often.
By hitting this milestone, we’ll show anyone eyeing this race that our movement is strong, growing, and ready to defend fairness and protect our progressive majority.
[**Can you be one of the grassroots supporters who gets us to 10,000 contributions by pitching in $10 today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_20250909_1_ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250909-549&refcode2=549_294397_gke2jk&akid=549%2E294397%2Egke2jk)

Ashley
Campaign Manager

| Peter,

We just wrapped up a meeting with Carol and the team, and we wanted to update you on some good news and some bad news.

Let’s start with the **good news!**

Carol has built quick momentum since launching her campaign. She’s gained massive endorsements from Rep. Susan Wild, EMILYs List, Latino Victory Fund, BOLD PAC, and local leaders across the district. We’re powered by an incredible grassroots network that knows Carol has what it takes to flip this seat.

Now here’s the **bad news...**

At the end of this month, our campaign is met with our second public FEC filing deadline, and we've still got a long way to go to hit our goal. National Republicans are watching to see if we have what it takes to win.

But we’re still in it to win it...

**Ryan Mackenzie was just ranked one of the most vulnerable Republicans in the country.** MAGA Republicans are ready to do everything in their power to keep him in office.

This race will come down to the wire. Our campaign has to remain laser-focused on remaining competitive, and every contribution gives us the resources we need to fight back against the GOP’s extremist attacks.

[_**We’re reaching out today because Carol needs your help. clean_body: We just wrapped up a meeting with Carol and the team, and we wanted to update you on some good news and some bad news. | = | Peter, We just wrapped up a meeting with Carol and the team, and we wanted to update you on some good news and some bad news. Let’s start with the good news! Carol has built quick momentum since launching her campaign. She’s gained massive endorsements from Rep. Susan Wild, EMILYs List, Latino Victory Fund, BOLD PAC, and local leaders across the district. We’re powered by an incredible grassroots network that knows Carol has what it takes to flip this seat. Now here’s the bad news... At the end of this month, our campaign is met with our second public FEC filing deadline, and we've still got a long way to go to hit our goal. National Republicans are watching to see if we have what it takes to win. But we’re still in it to win it... Ryan Mackenzie was just ranked one of the most vulnerable Republicans in the country. MAGA Republicans are ready to do everything in their power to keep him in office. This race will come down to the wire. Our campaign has to remain laser-focused on remaining competitive, and every contribution gives us the resources we need to fight back against the GOP’s extremist attacks. = | | | = | = | = | = | = We’re so grateful for your support! – Carol Obando-Derstine HQ * | | = Paid for by Carol for PA Carol for PA P.O Box 83 Allentown, PA 18105 United States | | | ---|---|--- = =

name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: They killed five journalists with our tax dollars
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250909-877&t=1001&akid=877%2E251025%2EiuqzmQ ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250909-877&t=1002&akid=877%2E251025%2EiuqzmQ ]Abdul for US Senate

Peter,

Netanyahu’s military killed five journalists.
During an attack on a hospital in Gaza.
Paid for with our tax dollars.

[ A ]A headline that reads: Five Journalists Among Those Killed In Israeli
Strikes on Gaza Hospital

For anyone who wonders why I call this a genocide: This is why.

Our tax dollars shouldn’t be funding bombs overseas, especially not while
Americans
struggle to afford groceries, housing, and healthcare.

That’s why I’m running for Senate — to build a government that invests in
improving life here at home rather than fuel endless war.

We have a moral responsibility to stand up and demand better. Let’s do it
together.

In solidarity,

Abdul

name: Justice Democrats
subject: a symptom of the deeper ills of our political system
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Angela Gonzales-Torres is running for Congress in California’s 34th
District because working families deserve a representative who actually
fights for them — not for lobbyists, billionaires, or their next political
promotion.

She’s going up against incumbent Rep. Jimmy Gomez — a corporate Democrat
who’s more than happy to sell out his community for PAC checks while rents
skyrocket, environmental crises go ignored, and more Angelenos are forced
to work multiple jobs just to survive.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250909?refcode=em20250909-37008&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=37008_1203867_XQ-w5I&akid=37008%2E1203867%2EXQ-w5I ]Pitch in $5 or more to support our fight to elect Angela
→

Millionaires like Jimmy don’t have to worry about the cost of groceries,
rising rent, or how to make their next paycheck stretch. Angela does. She
grew up as the daughter of a deportee, experienced housing insecurity, and
worked two jobs to put herself through community college. Today, she still
lives in the community she’s running to represent — and she’s organizing
alongside her neighbors every day.

Angela knows that if we want to solve the housing crisis, lower the costs
of living, and protect workers, we need leaders who are willing to stand
up to corporate interests — not take money from them.

Jimmy, on the other hand, has been more concerned with gaining and
retaining power at any cost, including at the expense of the community he
has been entrusted with representing. Despite pledging to protect all of
his community, including the nearly 50% of his district who were born
outside the U.S., Jimmy has taken money from corporations that profit from
prisons and detention centers — making the interests of his donors at
crystal clear odds with the interests of his community. And when you look
at his voting records — like how AIPAC spent $3 million to support Jimmy
in 2024 and he still is refusing to sign onto the Block the Bombs Act, or
how crypto lobbies spent more than half a million dollars to support him
in 2024 and he subsequently voted to greenlight Trump’s crypto corruption,
allowing Trump to make billions of dollars off his presidency at the
expense of working people — it’s clear Jimmy is guided by his donors, not
his voters.

His incumbency is a symptom of the deeper ills of our political system:
one where super PACs and the super-rich can purchase seats in Congress,
and one where corporate career politicians are all too happy to sell their
communities out for PAC checks.

Los Angeles needs representation with moral courage and deep organizing
roots to keep its community members shielded from the deepest harm — not
an empty suit who will gladly look the other way if it benefits him and
his corporate backers.

We can no longer be the Party that lets millionaires, billionaires, and
corporate Super PACs dictate our priorities and agenda. With the right
voices in Congress, and with working-class people who understand
working-class problems, we can fight to pass an agenda for us all: achieve
universal healthcare, create millions of union jobs, lower costs for
everyday people, and protect our democracy.

Angela often echoes Ayanna Pressley, saying those closest to the pain
should be the closest to the power, and that’s what this race is about:
replacing a broken status quo with real, community-rooted, working-class
leadership. That’s exactly the kind of change we need in Congress — and
exactly what Angela brings to the table.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250909?refcode=em20250909-37008&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=37008_1203867_XQ-w5I&akid=37008%2E1203867%2EXQ-w5I ]She has what it takes to defeat Jimmy — but only if this progressive
movement comes together to fuel her campaign from the ground up. Will you
chip in $5 to support us today?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250909?refcode=em20250909-37008&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=37008_1203867_XQ-w5I&akid=37008%2E1203867%2EXQ-w5I ]Contribute $5

Thank you,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250909-37008-footer&t=1002&refcode2=37008_1203867_XQ-w5I&akid=37008%2E1203867%2EXQ-w5I

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=37008%2E1203867%2EXQ-w5I

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Team Downing
subject: This message could disappear any moment…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
Before they shut us down... answer this.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)Peter,
**This may be our last message.**
They’ve come after us. **HARD**.
_The regime doesn’t want this getting out. _
But before they shut us down completely, we need to know:
[Are you with Trump? Are you with MAGA? Are you one of the true Patriots who still believe in this movement?](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[YES - I'M STILL MAGA
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._5t9r2bsXM_BIYSujg) _The clock is ticking. The censorship is real. The crackdown is here._
[ TAKE THE OFFICIAL MAGA ID POLL NOW](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
This isn’t a game.
They’ve labeled us “the enemy.”
They’ve weaponized the system.
But they haven’t broken us.
If you’re reading this, you ARE the resistance.
Hold the line.
Stay in the fight.
And for President Trump’s sake – [TAKE THE POLL.](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-ZZredw)[TAKE THE MAGA ID SURVEY
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.__07DIdh-K5vJQw)| |

name: Jahana Hayes
subject: A champion for the labor movement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jahana Hayes
body:
| | Team, I am honored to stand strong with the labor movement and with workers every single day. These hard-working people keep our streets, schools, businesses, and communities running — and I am their champion in Congress. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114923481/568599377/1672688832?refcode=AU_JH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250909_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjBhNmQ5ZS1iZThkLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5-Ll7TepVWSNdgTJhFjbyvTZp4DCAOZEdwlIRNGktoE=&emci=a90a6d9e-be8d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=ab0a6d9e-be8d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=15529135) Labor unions have given us weekends, child labor laws, the 8-hour workday, the 5-day work week, and so much more. We have gained so much as a result of the hard work of labor unions, and **that is why I am fighting for them in Congress. ** I am a supporter of the _Protecting the Right to Organize Act,_ and I have championed key labor issues like pay equity, workforce development, and more. As a union member, a member of the Subcommittee on Health, Employment, Labor, and Pensions, and as your voice in Congress, **I will continue to advocate for organized labor, unions, and the rights and protections that we have worked so hard for to build and strengthen the middle class.** **[If you stand with me in supporting the labor movement, please add your name alongside mine in support today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114923482/568599378/1672688832?refcode=AU_JH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250909_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjBhNmQ5ZS1iZThkLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5-Ll7TepVWSNdgTJhFjbyvTZp4DCAOZEdwlIRNGktoE=&emci=a90a6d9e-be8d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=ab0a6d9e-be8d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=15529135)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114923483/568599379/1672688832?refcode=AU_JH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250909_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjBhNmQ5ZS1iZThkLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5-Ll7TepVWSNdgTJhFjbyvTZp4DCAOZEdwlIRNGktoE=&emci=a90a6d9e-be8d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=ab0a6d9e-be8d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=15529135)

In solidarity,
Jahana Hayes

Jahana Hayes proudly represents Connecticut's 5th Congressional district. name: Laura Gillen
subject: I’m the most vulnerable member in New York
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Before our end-of-quarter deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
This won't be an easy race, but I'm used to overcoming the odds.
Hi there, it's Abigail Spanberger, Democratic nominee for Governor of Virginia. I'm respectfully asking: [**Will you split a $5 contribution right now between my campaign and Sarah McBride, before our end-of-quarter deadline?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250909-1?refcode=em20250909-2328&amount=5&refcode2=2328_21716_MLwQDE&akid=2328%2E21716%2EMLwQDE)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250909-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250909-2328&refcode2=2328_21716_MLwQDE&akid=2328%2E21716%2EMLwQDE)**
As the only Democrat who can flip a Governor's seat blue this year, I want to set an example for the nation.
That's why we've knocked on over 250,000 doors so far. It's why we've launched plans to make life more affordable and strengthen our schools. And it's why we've committed to building the largest grassroots campaign in our Commonwealth's history.
This won't be an easy race, but I'm used to overcoming the odds.
Back in 2018, I ran for Congress in a district that Republicans had controlled for 50 years. People told me that I shouldn't run, that I couldn't win.
_Well, together, we pulled off the impossible._
**Now, I'm running for Governor of Virginia in the biggest election yet of Trump's second term.** National Republicans are throwing millions of dollars at us, and Trump himself has started launching attacks, but I know this team will have my back with so much on the line.
It may sound small, but your $5 contribution would help us make sure we can counter all the right-wing disinformation and continue sharing our agenda with voters.
[**So, what do you say? Will you contribute $5 (or even more!) right now to my campaign and Sarah McBride so we raise the resources we need by our end-of-quarter deadline? Every dollar adds up and allows us to fund ads, organizers, yard signs, and other critical investments.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250909-1?refcode=em20250909-2328&amount=5&refcode2=2328_21716_MLwQDE&akid=2328%2E21716%2EMLwQDE)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250909-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250909-2328&refcode2=2328_21716_MLwQDE&akid=2328%2E21716%2EMLwQDE)**
Thank you so much,
Abigail Spanberger
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250909-1?refcode=em20250909-2328&amount=5&refcode2=2328_21716_MLwQDE&akid=2328%2E21716%2EMLwQDE)
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250909-1&t=1&refcode2=2328_21716_MLwQDE&akid=2328%2E21716%2EMLwQDE)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=2328%2E21716%2EMLwQDE)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=2328%2E21716%2EMLwQDE)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2328%2E21716%2EMLwQDE)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

name: Gary Miller for House of Delegates
subject: We're Getting Crushed
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY MILLER FOR DELEGATE** 121 Bell Ct
body:
To put it short: our opponent is angry. He ran over one of our yard signs with his sign-bedecked armored truck.

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us9.campaign-archive.com/?e=606d7e9aa2&u=db0c834d5d03c9893fbbb1d8a&id=11dd805b36)
---
| | | | |
---
[|
---](https://drmillerforyou.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0c834d5d03c9893fbbb1d8a&id=73d6606232&e=606d7e9aa2)
| | | | | | | | | | | | Dear Friends,
I'm Wilbur with the Dr. Gary Miller for Delegate campaign. I'm here with a report live from the front lines of our dark-horse election.

**To put it short: our opponent is angry**. **He ran over one of our yard signs with his sign-bedecked armored truck.**
---
|
---
| | Over the weekend, Danville held its first inaugural marathon. Over 800 runners went through our hilly city, from Caesar's Casino to the new YMCA. They went through our revitalized Downtown, by our beautiful churches, and across the Martin Luther King Jr. Bridge. Despite the heat, it was a rousing community success for our "Comeback City."

Republican Delegate nominee Madison Whittle was not content with **just putting signs on his rental and commercial properties** around the marathon route. He wasn't satisfied after **self-funding $60,000** of his own campaign war chest. Like this **new breed of Republican firebrands** , his aims are simple and brutal.
**He doesn't want any alternative or opposition to his personal vendettas and right-wing agenda.**
Dr. Gary Miller has served our community as a **cardiologist for 36 years** , running his own small business. On council, he's been an outspoken advocate for **building new housing and repairing our public schools.** His leadership got a new fire station and police station built for our first responders. In his free time, he's an avid outdoorsman and baseball coach, a biker and hiker, one of the big proponents of building the Danville Riverwalk Trail.
Almost everywhere I go, I find someone who got to have more time with their mother or father due to Dr. Miller's service. But we have a lot more work to do before November 4th.
**If we raise $100, we get another batch of yard signs, to replace the ones we just lost.****If we raise $500, we get another round of door hangers to hand out to our neighbors.****If we raise $1000, we get to spread the word on a crucial gospel radio station.**
I've spent almost my whole life in Halifax County and in Danville. It's not as red as you might think.******
But Dr. Miller needs your help.**
---
| | | | | | | | | | | [DONATE](https://drmillerforyou.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0c834d5d03c9893fbbb1d8a&id=4083e555e0&e=606d7e9aa2)
---
| | **No matter what, it's home and it's worth fighting for.**
Signing off,
Wilbur McLaughlinDanville City Public Schools, Class of 2016

---
| | | | | [](https://drmillerforyou.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0c834d5d03c9893fbbb1d8a&id=d9a1d22a8d&e=606d7e9aa2)
---
[](https://drmillerforyou.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0c834d5d03c9893fbbb1d8a&id=ac4b0bcd19&e=606d7e9aa2)
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | **PAID FOR BY GARY MILLER FOR DELEGATE** 121 Bell Ct.Danville, VA 24541
---
|
---

| This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

name: Forward Party
subject: Voting Season Is Nearly Upon Us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
And Forward candidates need your help NOW!

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=september_fundraising_push_2&n=1)
---
| Peter, Thank you to everyone who contributed over the weekend. Your support is what makes this movement possible. We are so grateful to have you with us on this journey. If you haven’t had a chance yet, I wanted to make sure you saw the message below. Today, we began a weeks-long campaign to introduce our incredible 2025 Forward Party candidates who are all running for office across the country for the same reason: to provide better representation for their communities. The countdown to Election Day is on, and we are mobilizing our grassroots army to help Forward candidates win this November... but we need your support! With early voting starting soon, we can’t afford to wait. Every dollar you contribute helps these candidates compete and WIN. | [](https://home.forwardparty.com/donate?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=september_fundraising_push_2&n=2 "Contribute Now!") [Contribute Now!](https://home.forwardparty.com/donate?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=september_fundraising_push_2&n=2)
---
Thanks again for your support, no matter how big or small. Together, we can make a difference!
**Kayla Berube**
_National Political Director_ _
_[Forward Party](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=FoNDizCGIqwZxX3_MhWcMJ0YMnaiQeFIA0sh68Fagfw&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=september_fundraising_push_2&n=3)
* * *
Peter \--
Later this month, we’ll announce **26 exciting new Forward candidates** stepping up to run outside of the two-party system this November. No other organization is actively recruiting and supporting leaders like this – because no one else is willing to challenge the broken rules that keep voters silenced and shut out.
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/donate?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=september_fundraising_push_2&n=4 "Chip In To Help Them Today!") [Chip In To Help Them Today!](https://home.forwardparty.com/donate?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=september_fundraising_push_2&n=4)
---
From blatant partisan redistricting to closed primaries, the legacy parties are locked in their endless slap fight to win at all costs, treating voters as collateral damage and betting that we won’t step up to change it. Let’s prove them wrong.
**Forward is different. **The legacy parties continue to break the rules and justify it in the name of winning. If no one plays by the rules, why do they even exist? We are building a movement for the millions of Americans who want leaders to represent ** _them — _** _not party leadership and outside interest groups._
Here is why Forward is positioned to enact real change:
1. **Recruiting and backing real candidates.** From this November’s election to next year’s, in primaries, local races, and statewide elections across the country, Forward is working full-time to put real choices on the ballot.
2. **Standing up to rigged systems.** From gerrymandering to closed primaries, we’re taking on the barriers that silence voters.
3. **Building a true grassroots movement.** Powered by real, everyday people in every state, not party bosses or special interests.

With early voting kicking off in many states soon, the urgency couldn’t be clearer: the system is counting on us to stay sidelined.
We are ready to take the fight to both parties, but we can’t do this without support. Every dollar goes directly into building this movement and helping our candidates WIN.
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/donate?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=september_fundraising_push_2&n=5 "Help Forward Fight Back!") [Help Forward Fight Back!](https://home.forwardparty.com/donate?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=september_fundraising_push_2&n=5)
---
**If you have been waiting for the right moment to step in, this is it.** The best way to show these candidates we have their backs is to fuel their campaigns from day one.
Thank you for stepping up. With your support, Forward is proving that real change is possible.
**Not Left. Not Right. Forward.**
Forward Party
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=september_fundraising_push_2&n=6)
[ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HN-VuZ6-MtyTZDOwpLeQohBI2w5n1fstLPCAOB1eS8pn49pgKy1KM2eEYboZkJaE&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=september_fundraising_push_2&n=7) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HR9MoATtHgNjF_4kmlo5pN8R4zJ-fGDLgTAMST8PY6mgKwzOK4bTDEpy9KU5BOzg&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=september_fundraising_push_2&n=8) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=C67zBN9acu3ZSVmLPV47peHvpkNPm4HcBUGM4-0XJTPgmEVLc_dN12xbGWLIkZIR&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=september_fundraising_push_2&n=9) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=KO8ZOB0mq2gq63DvFrKfe08uhOv-byHfKpIIFrTtOpPikh4D0waR8pVrn6wFcdzO&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=september_fundraising_push_2&n=10) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=_KeSraPW0gSlxEBMOvJrEuogCR1FcLzdL_LSGKjfikF5BT1dZn3HN2gM4OEGEI0z&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=september_fundraising_push_2&n=11) Copyright © 2025 Forward Party®, all rights reserved. name: Team Benson
subject: John James is putting Trump first, not Michigan
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=696%2E181023%2E8extoZ)
Team,
Congress is back in session, and that means John James is back in D.C., voting for Trump’s agenda instead of fighting for the people of Michigan.
Already this year, James has voted for cuts to Medicaid and SNAP, programs hundreds of thousands of Michigan families rely on to put food on the table and get the health care they need. And that is just the start — whatever Trump’s next anti-worker, anti-family, anti-Michigan priority will be, John James will be right there voting _yes_.
Michigan deserves leadership that puts our families first, not a politician who puts Donald Trump and billionaires ahead of the people he is supposed to serve.
**[That is why we need your help today. Your contribution will fuel our campaign to hold James accountable and make sure Michigan voters know the truth about his record.](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q32025.OcO0Lx&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250909_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=696%2E181023%2E8extoZ)**

name: Team Kaptur
subject: This month
body:
This month will be very important for our race, friend. Here's what to know:

| |
---
Friend, It's hard to believe that September is here already. The end of this month doesn't only bring with it the end of summer — it's also the end of our third fundraising quarter of 2025. With the election barely more than a year away, and our race shaping up to be one of the closest battles in the nation, this quarterly deadline will be our first critical fundraising goal. It's so important that we meet our goal in order to hire organizers, build out our field and digital outreach programs, and fight back against the dark money attacks that are blanketing the airwaves. ### About Marcy Kaptur
Marcy Kaptur is a fighter for high-wage jobs, growing a workforce to meet the needs of the 21st century, and protecting our region’s most vital natural resource, the Great Lakes. She’s worked with both parties to secure investments in our communities and has been a true friend of veterans, seniors, first responders and working people. clean_body: This month will be very important for our race, friend. Here's what to know: | | Friend, It's hard to believe that September is here already. The end of this month doesn't only bring with it the end of summer — it's also the end of our third fundraising quarter of 2025. With the election barely more than a year away, and our race shaping up to be one of the closest battles in the nation, this quarterly deadline will be our first critical fundraising goal. It's so important that we meet our goal in order to hire organizers, build out our field and digital outreach programs, and fight back against the dark money attacks that are blanketing the airwaves. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. Thank you so much, friend. —Team Kaptur | | | ---|---|--- About Marcy Kaptur Marcy Kaptur is a fighter for high-wage jobs, growing a workforce to meet the needs of the 21st century, and protecting our region’s most vital natural resource, the Great Lakes. She’s worked with both parties to secure investments in our communities and has been a true friend of veterans, seniors, first responders and working people. She’s a voice for us all in the People’s House. | = | = ---|--- Follow Marcy | | ---|--- Checks may also be mailed to: Kaptur for Congress - PO Box 899, Toledo, OH 43697 Paid for by Kaptur for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . Kaptur for Congress PO Box 899 Toledo, OH 43697 United States

subject: Toddler of the Year voting ends soon! Vote NOW!
body:
Voting ends on Thursday! You can help decide who becomes the National Toddler of the Year!!

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/6dd6e66ec0b9/national-toddler-of-the-year-vote-happening-now-4935570?e=b749ec4ed8)

# [WE NEED YOUR VOTE](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=f957f47cc8&e=b749ec4ed8) for the National Toddler of the Year!
---
[|
---](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=509f0db7d0&e=b749ec4ed8)
| | The National Toddler of the Year is happening now and the Quarterfinals end this Thursday Septmeber 11th! Cast your [**vote for FREE**](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=a1d0232738&e=b749ec4ed8) now to help decide who will take 1st place & advance to the SemiFinals Round. [Click here now to cast your FREE vote!](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=79995fb68e&e=b749ec4ed8)[ ](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=4420cf336e&e=b749ec4ed8)You get to pick which toddler will star in a national toy ad & be crowned TODDLER of the YEAR.
Sophia started in 11th place, but has now risen to 5th place. With your help she can get to 1st place by this Thursday & advance to the next round! The **Quarterfinals end on THIS Thursday September 11th** so make sure to [cast your **FREE VOTE**](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=97d8cb3789&e=b749ec4ed8)[****](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=acfe9b744e&e=b749ec4ed8) now. You can also click [here](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=33b082c26a&e=b749ec4ed8) to add a [daily reminder](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=9396670ae8&e=b749ec4ed8) to your calendar as an easy reminder to [vote](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=5f7ac98433&e=b749ec4ed8).
And if you want to cast even more extra votes, every [**$1 you donate = 1 extra vote**](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=eb5344f08b&e=b749ec4ed8). A**ll proceeds support Toys for Tots** & that means **your**[**donation**](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=3d32ff146b&e=b749ec4ed8)**is TAX DEDUCTIBLE**. So your donation not only gives more votes to determine the Toddler of the Year, but it also helps toys going to kids in need this holiday season in cooperation with the US Marines.
[](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=5940ea4c25&e=b749ec4ed8)To [donate $10](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=1a7bae553f&e=b749ec4ed8) click [here](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=2694a7660d&e=b749ec4ed8) & give **10 votes.** To [donate $25](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=2998cd2bc6&e=b749ec4ed8) click [here](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=1ea342a2e8&e=b749ec4ed8) & give **25 votes.** To [donate $50](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=92e2d2316d&e=b749ec4ed8) click [here](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=577285a35e&e=b749ec4ed8) & give **50 votes.** To [donate $100](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=e5fdee9111&e=b749ec4ed8) click [here](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=e234068f59&e=b749ec4ed8) & give **100 votes.** To [donate $250](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=15eacfc525&e=b749ec4ed8) click [here](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=5936f4c70d&e=b749ec4ed8) & give **250 votes.****Donations are TAX-DEDUCTIBLE** & go to benefit Toys for Tots.
To cast a [FREE vote](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=52ddb1b5ca&e=b749ec4ed8) click [here](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=c8b190555d&e=b749ec4ed8). ONLY the toddler who is ranked in 1st place on Thursday Sept. 11th will advance to the SemiFinals & can then move on to the Finals.
So make sure to [vote for Sophia](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=779a56c92e&e=b749ec4ed8) EVERY DAY from now until this Thursday so she will advance to the semi-finals. You can [cast one FREE vote every 24 hours](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=49a8a2875c&e=b749ec4ed8), or make a tax deductible donation with every $1 donated = 1 extra vote for Sophia with all donations going to Toy for Tots.
**Thank you for helping**[**select**](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=38c562c6ee&e=b749ec4ed8)**the National Toddler of the Year & **[**supporting Toys for Tots**](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=0fd7ed7a4b&e=b749ec4ed8)**in conjunction with the US Marines to benefit kids in need this holiday season.**
---
| [CAST YOUR FREE VOTE FOR SOPHIA NOW!](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=7361dcd49b&e=b749ec4ed8)

name: Heidi Hall
subject: An empty seat would be better
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250909_em_fr_b1_HH_standard [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250909_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]
Friend,
It's like we have no representative in Congress. Let me explain.
Our opponent, Kevin Kiley, has been focusing on all the wrong things and saying one thing while doing another.
He says that working families are his concern, but as the deciding vote on Trump's budget bill in the House, he voted in favor of cutting essential services like Medicaid— leaving the working people of our district without the medical coverage that they need.
And as Trump continues ICE's "roving patrols" in California after the Supreme Court decided in their favor, Kiley would rather continue his never-ending feud with Gov. Newsom than stand for something bigger than himself.
To Kiley, we're nothing more than collateral damage in his fight to appease Trump and push the Republican Party, along with his political career, forward.
Friend, I'm not running for Congress to represent billionaires or to push an ideology. I'm running because I've seen the harm that toxic politics can cause to our communities, and I know that we can do better.
Now, I need your help to bring that same attitude to Congress and kick Kiley out.
Can I count on you to join me in fighting a better future by donating any amount that you can to our campaign today? We have an End of Quarter Deadline this month and I want it to be our strongest one yet. Chip in! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250909_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Donate $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20250909_em_fr_b1_HH_standard_]
Donate $15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=20250909_em_fr_b1_HH_standard_]
Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=20250909_em_fr_b1_HH_standard_]
Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=20250909_em_fr_b1_HH_standard_]
Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=20250909_em_fr_b1_HH_standard_]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250909_em_fr_b1_HH_standard_]
In service,
Heidi Hall
Heidi Hall has spent her three-decade public service career working with others to solve problems, protect our land and water, improve health, and build opportunities for others, all while raising two boys primarily as a single mom.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250909_em_fr_b1_HH_standard [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250909_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]
Raised by parents who had persisted to make a middle-class life for their kids in Contra Costa County while lifting up others, Heidi was taught to push through and overcome challenges rather than complain about them. She learned to stick up for the vulnerable, to respect working people, and to value equal opportunity and justice.
After graduating from Pomona College and earning graduate degrees from Columbia and Rutgers, Heidi went to work for the Rockefeller Foundation promoting reproductive care and then began her career at the Environmental Protection Agency, stopping the dumping of toxic waste and holding corporate polluters accountable.
Today, Heidi chairs the Nevada County Board of Supervisors, where she’s taken on homelessness, expanded broadband access, and worked to reduce crime and illegal cannabis growth. Heidi flipped her seat from red to blue – and now she’s ready to do it again in Congress to take on toxic politics in Washington and put people first.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250909_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]
PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS

Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
United States

President Donald Trump **[addressed the nation in a video](https://substack.com/redirect/fb1b0cad-b47d-462b-9c59-14ef1b73e628?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** posted to X Tuesday, responding to the horrific killing of Ukrainian refugee Iryna Zarutska in North Carolina and calling out the soft-on-crime Democrat leaders who have failed the American people.
**[This will make your blood boil...](https://substack.com/redirect/fb1b0cad-b47d-462b-9c59-14ef1b73e628?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/bddf925b-ccb7-4ec8-9e23-24e5159fe8e5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"For far too long Americans have been forced to put up with Democrat-run cities that set loose savage, bloodthirsty criminals to prey on innocent people," Trump said in the address.
"In Charlotte, North Carolina we saw the results of these policies when a 23-year-old woman, who came here from Ukraine, met her bloody end on a public train," he continued, showing a picture of the woman and of the security camera footage that captured her stabbing.
**["She was slaughtered by a deranged monster](https://substack.com/redirect/fb1b0cad-b47d-462b-9c59-14ef1b73e628?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** who was roaming free after 14 prior arrests!" Trump explained. "We have to respond with force and strength! We have to be vicious just like they are!"
"24 of the top 25 most dangerous cities in America are run by Democrat mayors,... it's time to stop this madness!"
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/fb1b0cad-b47d-462b-9c59-14ef1b73e628?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# FBI moves in to charge suspect in horrifying train stabbing
**[The FBI announced](https://substack.com/redirect/bae8d6a3-67c2-44be-a167-c3b15bffa205?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that Decarlos Dejuan Brown Jr., 34, has been federally charged with committing an act causing death on a mass transportation system for the fatal stabbing of Ukrainian refugee Iryna Zarutska on a Charlotte light-rail train on August 22.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bae8d6a3-67c2-44be-a167-c3b15bffa205?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Maximum Penalty Sought:** Attorney General Pam Bondi announced the Justice Department will seek the maximum penalty for Brown, calling the attack a "direct result of failed soft-on-crime policies" and stating he will "never again see the light of day as a free man."
* **FBI Director Kash Patel said:** "The brutal attack on Iryna Zarutska on the Charlotte Light Rail was a disgraceful act that should never happen in America,... The FBI jumped to assist in this investigation immediately to ensure justice is served, and the perpetrator is never released from jail to kill again."
* **Victim's Background:** Zarutska, 23, was a Ukrainian refugee who fled the war in 2022 and settled in Charlotte, where she worked at Zepeddie's Pizza and was wearing her work uniform when attacked; she was described as a passionate artist and graduate of Synergy College in Kyiv with a degree in art and restoration.
* **Suspect's Criminal History:** Brown has an extensive criminal record spanning a decade with 14 arrests, including convictions for robbery with a dangerous weapon (serving over six years in prison), larceny, breaking and entering, and recent charges for communicating threats and misusing the 911 system.

name: Ruben Gallego for Senate
subject: We need your help: Say NO to the Department of War
body:
We call it the Department of Defense because as a nation we prioritize defense over war. It’s a reminder to our leaders — defend our people first, go to war only as a last resort.
#

Peter,
This might sound like just a rebrand, but it’s not.
We call it the _**Department of Defense**_ because as a nation we prioritize defense over war. It’s a reminder to our leaders — defend our people first, go to war only as a last resort.
When we forget that, it’s Americans who pay the price.
Ruben knows that all too well. He fought in Iraq, saw his friends get wounded and killed, all in a war the Republican Party lied us into. That’s what happens when we put **_War_** over **_Defense._**
And what’s the military being used for today? Vanity projects for a wannabe dictator. Deploying American soldiers in places like Los Angeles, Washington, and perhaps Chicago next.
If they want to call it the **_Department of War_** , and they deploy the military against civilians... what does that make us?
It’s not just a name. It’s an ethos. And we need to stop this in its tracks.
Ruben opposes Trump’s Executive Order turning the Department of Defense into the Department of War, and he’s opposing any action in Congress that would make it happen.
[**This is important, and he needs your help. Add your name and tell Congress: NO DEPARTMENT OF WAR.** [SIGN ON NOW](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/pet_em_250906_dept_of_war/?source=em250909-1-90&akid=3967%2E734936%2Ew43apw) Thank you, Ruben Gallego for Senate

name: Powered by People
subject: Beto hit the road hard.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
This summer, Beto hit the road hard.
More than 30 events. 11 states. Thousands of people coming together in small towns and big cities alike. From Amarillo to Houston, from Oklahoma to Virginia, everywhere he went the mission was the same: listen, organize, and fight for the future we deserve.
This is what real grassroots power looks like—neighbors meeting face-to-face, building something bigger than themselves, and refusing to back down.
And it’s exactly what Ken Paxton is terrified of. He knows that when people organize, politicians like him lose. That’s why he’s abusing his office and trying to bankrupt Powered by People, throw Beto in jail, and silence this movement.
We cannot let him win.
If we stand together, we’ll not only survive these attacks—we’ll grow stronger. But we can only do it if people like you step up right now.
[**Can you chip in $3 today to help us fight back, keep organizing, and show Paxton that Texans don’t back down?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/67048?t=2&akid=240347%2E444211%2ECcPJJ2)

name: Jane Fonda
subject: Why I’m proud to support my friend, Attorney General Rob Bonta
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
I’m reaching out today with an important message.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114925347/568605782/1328794144?refcode=ea.9dd5b3c1-c48d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.9dd5b3c1-c48d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlkZDViM2MxLWM0OGQtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bsElUGFAv4dj5icro2-5g1raod0XgmYbQP_sbnzsnUs=&emci=55b6d15c-a08d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=9dd5b3c1-c48d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=4823105)

There’s a lot of noise in politics these days, but when you find someone like my dear friend, California Attorney General Rob Bonta, you pay attention. **Rob and I have been in the climate fight together for some time now, and I can say with my whole heart he’s exactly the kind of leader I had in mind when I launched the Jane Fonda Climate PAC: someone who listens to their community, stands up to powerful polluters, and never hesitates to put people over profits.** His office has brought some of the most historic lawsuits against oil and gas giants to date — holding them accountable for decades-long campaigns of deception that have hurt our communities. **[But Rob’s sense of justice has put California squarely in the crosshairs of Big Oil and Donald Trump. So now it’s our turn to have his back. Will you make a split contribution today between Rob's campaign and JanePAC to elect more climate champions like him?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114925348/568605783/-549231976?refcode=ea.9dd5b3c1-c48d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.9dd5b3c1-c48d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlkZDViM2MxLWM0OGQtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bsElUGFAv4dj5icro2-5g1raod0XgmYbQP_sbnzsnUs=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**SPLIT $10**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114925349/568605784/-549231976?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=ea.9dd5b3c1-c48d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.9dd5b3c1-c48d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlkZDViM2MxLWM0OGQtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bsElUGFAv4dj5icro2-5g1raod0XgmYbQP_sbnzsnUs=) | [**SPLIT $25**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114925350/568605785/-549231976?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=ea.9dd5b3c1-c48d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.9dd5b3c1-c48d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlkZDViM2MxLWM0OGQtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bsElUGFAv4dj5icro2-5g1raod0XgmYbQP_sbnzsnUs=)

When it comes to people who abuse their power and put our communities at risk, Rob doesn’t look the other way. He takes them on.
His office filed a groundbreaking lawsuit against some of the biggest oil companies in the world — ExxonMobil, Shell, Chevron, ConocoPhillips, and BP — along with the American Petroleum Institute. For decades, they lied to the public, covered up the truth about climate change, and put their profits above our health and the health of our planet.
Rob is making sure these polluters finally answer for violating the law and lying to the public.
And while Trump and his MAGA allies work overtime to dismantle hard-fought solutions to the climate crisis, Rob unleashed a flurry of lawsuits over their attempts to freeze federal climate funding, halt offshore wind projects, and dismantle California’s environmental safeguards.
**That’s what makes him different: As Attorney General, Rob isn’t just calling out Donald Trump and Big Oil — he’s dragging them into places where they can finally be held accountable.**
But no one, not me, not even someone as fearless as Rob, can do this work alone. It will take all of us rolling up our sleeves, joining the fight, and chipping in what we can to protect this seat from whoever Republicans throw into this race.
**[I’m asking again because this race truly matters for the future of our country: Will you join me in supporting Attorney General Rob Bonta with a split donation of any amount between his campaign and JanePAC?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114925355/568605790/-549231976?refcode=ea.9dd5b3c1-c48d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.9dd5b3c1-c48d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlkZDViM2MxLWM0OGQtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bsElUGFAv4dj5icro2-5g1raod0XgmYbQP_sbnzsnUs=)**

clean_body: I’m reaching out today with an important message. | There’s a lot of noise in politics these days, but when you find someone like my dear friend, California Attorney General Rob Bonta, you pay attention. Rob and I have been in the climate fight together for some time now, and I can say with my whole heart he’s exactly the kind of leader I had in mind when I launched the Jane Fonda Climate PAC: someone who listens to their community, stands up to powerful polluters, and never hesitates to put people over profits. His office has brought some of the most historic lawsuits against oil and gas giants to date — holding them accountable for decades-long campaigns of deception that have hurt our communities. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = When it comes to people who abuse their power and put our communities at risk, Rob doesn’t look the other way. He takes them on. His office filed a groundbreaking lawsuit against some of the biggest oil companies in the world — ExxonMobil, Shell, Chevron, ConocoPhillips, and BP — along with the American Petroleum Institute. For decades, they lied to the public, covered up the truth about climate change, and put their profits above our health and the health of our planet. Rob is making sure these polluters finally answer for violating the law and lying to the public. And while Trump and his MAGA allies work overtime to dismantle hard-fought solutions to the climate crisis, Rob unleashed a flurry of lawsuits over their attempts to freeze federal climate funding, halt offshore wind projects, and dismantle California’s environmental safeguards. That’s what makes him different: As Attorney General, Rob isn’t just calling out Donald Trump and Big Oil — he’s dragging them into places where they can finally be held accountable. But no one, not me, not even someone as fearless as Rob, can do this work alone. It will take all of us rolling up our sleeves, joining the fight, and chipping in what we can to protect this seat from whoever Republicans throw into this race. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Your donation, along with contributions like it from people all over the country, is how we will defend this critical seat and chip away at Trump’s dangerous agenda once and for all. Thank you so much for being a part of this movement. With gratitude, xx Jane Fonda = | Follow along: | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Dawn Moore
subject: Peter, here’s the link
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=598%2E1086043%2E9C8JHy)
Hi Peter, it’s Dawn Moore, First Lady of Maryland. I’m so excited that my husband announced he’s running for reelection as Governor of Maryland today.
**So excited, in fact, that I made you your very own link to donate. You can do that here:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250909-4?refcode=em-20250909-4](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250909-4?refcode=em-20250909-4&refcode2=598_1086043_9C8JHy&akid=598%2E1086043%2E9C8JHy)**
Wes works _so hard,_ sun up to sun down, to build a better tomorrow for Maryland. He campaigned on fearless, bold aspirations for our state and spent the last few years turning those promises into policy.
Now, we have to come together to continue this progress. That’s why I’m asking this whole team:
**[Can you chip in $5 to power this movement? Grassroots supporters like you power everything we do and are what keep Wes in the fight.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250909-4?refcode=em-20250909-4&refcode2=598_1086043_9C8JHy&akid=598%2E1086043%2E9C8JHy)**
With Wes as our governor we’ve made tremendous progress in Maryland – fully funding our public schools, supporting our federal workers, and making our communities safer. _But there’s still work to be done._
**I know Wes is up to the challenge. He’s ready to continue this work. But he will need all of our support to be able to do so.**
**[When you chip in to this campaign, you’re becoming a part of a movement. Together, we’re building a Maryland where, as Wes always says, we leave no one behind. Are you in?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250909-4?refcode=em-20250909-4&refcode2=598_1086043_9C8JHy&akid=598%2E1086043%2E9C8JHy)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250909-4?amount=5&refcode=em-20250909-4&refcode2=598_1086043_9C8JHy&akid=598%2E1086043%2E9C8JHy)**
Thank you, Peter!
Dawn Moore
First Lady of Maryland
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250909-4?refcode=em-20250909-4&refcode2=598_1086043_9C8JHy&akid=598%2E1086043%2E9C8JHy)

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20250909-4&t=2&refcode2=598_1086043_9C8JHy&akid=598%2E1086043%2E9C8JHy)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=598%2E1086043%2E9C8JHy)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=598%2E1086043%2E9C8JHy)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

Look, amid all of the chaos and dysfunction ruling Washington right now, John has just one priority: **delivering real solutions to the challenges facing working families.**
So we’re highlighting the impact of Republicans’ Big Beautiful Betrayal on the American people — and crafting legislation to reverse the worst of their cuts to Medicaid, SNAP, and clean energy credits that’ll hike your energy bills.
John is pushing for fair trade policy that lifts up working families, not the fiscal lunacy of shifting tariff deadlines and economic chaos.
And we’re still fighting against any Republican attempts to resurrect their failed scheme to sell off America’s public lands.
**But with so many issues to tackle at once, it’s important that we hear from John’s top supporters _(including you!)_ to take feedback and gauge your priorities. ****[So can you take a minute to fill out our updated priorities survey, and let John know which issues are top of mind for you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114925420/568606000/-2113865463?refcode=email_090925_survey-fwd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZmYzZjMxYS1jNThkLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ziqy3kREv2wOng58P54t1vTDz9XO03ev9_TPjttsF4k=&emci=dc5f54fa-ed8c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=bff3f31a-c58d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7280715)**
| [Take the Survey →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114925421/568606001/-2113865463?refcode=email_090925_survey-fwd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZmYzZjMxYS1jNThkLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ziqy3kREv2wOng58P54t1vTDz9XO03ev9_TPjttsF4k=&emci=dc5f54fa-ed8c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=bff3f31a-c58d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7280715)

### Trump's Economic Advisors Go To war: The Feud Between Pulte & Bessent
| | [David Shuster](https://substack.com/@davidshuster)

| Sep 9

---
