### Thanks to your amazing response to our Labor Day Sale we have a new one! Thru Friday get 15% off Paid Subscriptions!
[I Want 15% Off Now!](https://substack.com/redirect/21af7c26-3f99-4b19-b813-10e26880fb10?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3ba85df7-0c29-4d80-9a33-583b20353101?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
If our republic continues to regress and must be put out of its misery, history may record that the collapse wasn't hastened by revolutionaries or foreign invaders. But by two overfed Trump sycophants squabbling at a Georgetown dinner party like drunken frat boys tossing haymakers at a Buffalo Wild Wings.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d6b5e309-1946-4ccf-9261-6eccc62207cf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
As first reported by Politico, our nation was treated--if one can call it that--to the spectacle of Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent threatening to beat the living hell out of Bill Pulte, Trump's scrawny housing regulator.
For the grave offense of... _gossip_. Not [treason](https://substack.com/redirect/47f20183-0cc7-4da4-8f6a-06280686b002?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Not excess corruption.
No, Bessent, financial genius and celebrated MAGA flunkey, nearly threw hands over playground whispers passed along to [His Most Detested](https://substack.com/redirect/bccdead2-93c3-4720-8dcf-6e4b5040c725?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Orange Majesty.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ac6fa1f6-ae93-4b0b-9b03-96fe84ee613a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
"I'm going to f---ing beat your ass," Bessent reportedly hissed, presumably while adjusting his cufflinks and downing a $400 bottle of Burgundy.
It was [the kind of snarling idiocy](https://substack.com/redirect/b5c23b5c-8a16-44e9-b512-8336a0200240?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that one expects in the cheap seats of a Philadelphia Eagles football game, not from the man responsible for steering the U.S. Treasury. But then, these are [Trump's men: feral, preening, and incapable of dignity](https://substack.com/redirect/e53617b4-35e3-46d8-9079-2f81084dd91b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5a030374-b9ec-49e2-8538-12f536185c85?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Bessent: The Banker Who Mistook Himself for a Brawler**
Let's start with Bessent. This man, who has made a career of sniffing [the groins of billionaires](https://substack.com/redirect/20b14c44-1ce7-467d-adce-24402461fa14?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--first George Soros, now Donald Trump--fancies himself a warrior for "Main Street."
Despite having never stepped foot on it without a chauffeur. His economic theories are mostly jumbled cliches borrowed from CNBC panels and drunk libertarians.
[He parrots MAGA talking points](https://substack.com/redirect/d6489e87-7ea6-40fe-b5bf-05454d907e17?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) about tariffs and inflation with the sleazy confidence of someone who has never had to balance a checkbook or walk within spitting distance of a Wal-Mart.
And yet, when insulted by a twerp half his age, this lion of finance drops the pretense and reverts to what he truly is: a rich thug with a Napoleon complex.
Had there not been witnesses, Bessent would have probably tried to throttle Pulte with a Hermes tie while screaming about mortgage-backed securities.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.v8nczWpQmZs9K7e4r-tXJ3MDOxMTpAR8lkQHez_FyH8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=173138938)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6d7ec2ea-d32b-4a8a-b083-0df7cb8ef627?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Pulte: The Nepo Baby That Cried Wolf**
But if Bessent is a poser in pinstripes, Bill Pulte is something even worse: a zero. He is a man so thoroughly unqualified for public service that his only discernible talent is having emerged from the correct uterus.
Thrust into power at the Federal Housing Finance Agency by a patronage system that would shame Eric Trump, Pulte now struts around Washington as if he built the housing market himself. Rather than inheriting a family name and tweeting about giveaways like a carnival barker with a trust fund.
Pulte's idea of governance, according to multiple reports, consists of tattling on grown adults to the president.
When he's not hurling accusations of "fraud" against Federal Reserve governors. And [pushing policy ideas that sound like they were photoshopped on a Reddit forum](https://substack.com/redirect/45296110-ad26-440d-beb2-01cc211d2fe2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) full of day traders and real estate agents.
Pulte is, in essence, a glorified snitch in loafers, who--upon being confronted--reportedly turned into a stammering child, blinking through his Chardonnay haze as Bessent offered to decorate his face with a closed fist.
**An Administration of Dunces**
This tussle apparently erupted during cocktail hour at the Executive Branch club in Georgetown where Trump allies gathered for a MAGA podcaster's birthday celebration and the venue's inaugural dinner.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e955164d-fc71-4e76-ace2-efb10dc15b01?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Bessent erupted at Pulte who apparently seemed surprised and dumbfounded. What this incident reveals is not just the mediocrity of these two Trump cretins, but the [absolute moral decay of the Trump civil service](https://substack.com/redirect/c973b03a-6c38-4c5e-8beb-e3373a9beb1c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
We have entrusted the public purse and the national mortgage market to two puffed-up sociopaths who, [in a healthier era,](https://substack.com/redirect/6c0d3d4c-b648-4705-8d55-9ffc6cdcfe19?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [would have been laughed out of the bar at an Olive Garden](https://substack.com/redirect/6c0d3d4c-b648-4705-8d55-9ffc6cdcfe19?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Instead, under Trump, they are gifted tuxedos, titles, and seats at the prominent end of every MAGA table.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8c708d7c-5de6-4333-8295-f45cd73b2ff2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.v8nczWpQmZs9K7e4r-tXJ3MDOxMTpAR8lkQHez_FyH8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=173138938)
According to reports, the near brawl was broken up by a waiter clutching hors d'oeuvres. And by club co-owner and financier Omeed Malik.
Eventually, the referees convinced Pulte and Bessent to retreat to opposite corners of the room.
Then, cocktail hour festivities resumed, as if one guy hadn't just t[hreatened to stomp the other's skull ](https://substack.com/redirect/301e46e4-47ca-41fa-bd32-2e3225a864b9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)into the cobblestones. Eventually, everybody sat down at a long table for dinner [with the combatants placed far apart](https://substack.com/redirect/39df007d-c9a0-4a39-9dbf-5cc0f56ff602?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/116132b0-a301-40d0-8165-c8268e189432?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Witnesses allegedly included:

\- Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy
\- Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick
\- Interior Secretary Doug Burgum
\- Agriculture Secretary Brooke Rollins
\- [Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard](https://substack.com/redirect/d9dd91d0-7c72-434c-8920-d5d63e58f5cc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
\- SBA Administrator Kelly Loeffler
\- Medicare and Medicaid chief Mehmet Oz
Naturally, a few of them did what Bessent accused Pulte of doing, leaking unflattering depictions of Bessent. Only instead of whispering to the President, these Trump cabinet sources dialed up Politico.
It was Washington, [D.C. under Trump in miniature: bluster, violence, cowardice](https://substack.com/redirect/2e5f7d85-ad5c-43bf-ad67-08dc6854b247?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), cake, and strategic story dropping.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.v8nczWpQmZs9K7e4r-tXJ3MDOxMTpAR8lkQHez_FyH8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=173138938)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cf56117d-6cb2-421d-954f-e01aeb78dd11?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
If this country is a sinking ship, it is only because we keep letting leeches like Bessent and Pulte stand at the helm. They have all [the ambition of Genghis Khan and none of the competence](https://substack.com/redirect/2e5f7d85-ad5c-43bf-ad67-08dc6854b247?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
They are the sort of wealthy wretches who would burn down the Treasury for the chance to squat in its ashes, take a selfie, and post on social media about it.
When historians come calling and write the story of this Trump administration, the [scribes won't need to invent villains. We already have them.](https://substack.com/redirect/39df007d-c9a0-4a39-9dbf-5cc0f56ff602?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Old Man Trump, rotting in the White House](https://substack.com/redirect/cb8bce00-c32f-4b39-81e6-0bb2821d30da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) with his delusions... and members of his economic team, lounging in a private Georgetown club, trading insults over foie gras, and daring one another to fight like 7th graders behind the gym.
To all the members of the Trump team, do the rest of us a favor. Next time, and there will certainly be a next time - don't break up any fisticuffs.
Just record them on your camera phone.
And leak that.
* * *

clean_body: Trump's Economic Advisors Go To war: The Feud Between Pulte & Bessent | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Trump's Economic Advisors Go To war: The Feud Between Pulte & Bessent | | | Sep 9 | | | | | | | | | | | | Thanks to your amazing response to our Labor Day Sale we have a new one! Thru Friday get 15% off Paid Subscriptions! | | ---|---|--- If our republic continues to regress and must be put out of its misery, history may record that the collapse wasn't hastened by revolutionaries or foreign invaders. But by two overfed Trump sycophants squabbling at a Georgetown dinner party like drunken frat boys tossing haymakers at a Buffalo Wild Wings. | | ---|---|--- As first reported by Politico, our nation was treated--if one can call it that--to the spectacle of Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent threatening to beat the living hell out of Bill Pulte, Trump's scrawny housing regulator. For the grave offense of... gossip. Not . Not excess corruption. No, Bessent, financial genius and celebrated MAGA flunkey, nearly threw hands over playground whispers passed along to Orange Majesty. | | ---|---|--- "I'm going to f---ing beat your ass," Bessent reportedly hissed, presumably while adjusting his cufflinks and downing a $400 bottle of Burgundy. It was that one expects in the cheap seats of a Philadelphia Eagles football game, not from the man responsible for steering the U.S. Treasury. But then, these are . | | ---|---|--- Bessent: The Banker Who Mistook Himself for a Brawler Let's start with Bessent. This man, who has made a career of sniffing George Soros, now Donald Trump--fancies himself a warrior for "Main Street." Despite having never stepped foot on it without a chauffeur. His economic theories are mostly jumbled cliches borrowed from CNBC panels and drunk libertarians. about tariffs and inflation with the sleazy confidence of someone who has never had to balance a checkbook or walk within spitting distance of a Wal-Mart. And yet, when insulted by a twerp half his age, this lion of finance drops the pretense and reverts to what he truly is: a rich thug with a Napoleon complex. Had there not been witnesses, Bessent would have probably tried to throttle Pulte with a Hermes tie while screaming about mortgage-backed securities. | | ---|---|--- Pulte: The Nepo Baby That Cried Wolf But if Bessent is a poser in pinstripes, Bill Pulte is something even worse: a zero. He is a man so thoroughly unqualified for public service that his only discernible talent is having emerged from the correct uterus. Thrust into power at the Federal Housing Finance Agency by a patronage system that would shame Eric Trump, Pulte now struts around Washington as if he built the housing market himself. Rather than inheriting a family name and tweeting about giveaways like a carnival barker with a trust fund. Pulte's idea of governance, according to multiple reports, consists of tattling on grown adults to the president. When he's not hurling accusations of "fraud" against Federal Reserve governors. And full of day traders and real estate agents. Pulte is, in essence, a glorified snitch in loafers, who--upon being confronted--reportedly turned into a stammering child, blinking through his Chardonnay haze as Bessent offered to decorate his face with a closed fist. An Administration of Dunces This tussle apparently erupted during cocktail hour at the Executive Branch club in Georgetown where Trump allies gathered for a MAGA podcaster's birthday celebration and the venue's inaugural dinner. | | ---|---|--- Bessent erupted at Pulte who apparently seemed surprised and dumbfounded. What this incident reveals is not just the mediocrity of these two Trump cretins, but the . We have entrusted the public purse and the national mortgage market to two puffed-up sociopaths who, . Instead, under Trump, they are gifted tuxedos, titles, and seats at the prominent end of every MAGA table. | | ---|---|--- According to reports, the near brawl was broken up by a waiter clutching hors d'oeuvres. And by club co-owner and financier Omeed Malik. Eventually, the referees convinced Pulte and Bessent to retreat to opposite corners of the room. Then, cocktail hour festivities resumed, as if one guy hadn't just t the cobblestones. Eventually, everybody sat down at a long table for dinner . | | ---|---|--- Witnesses allegedly included: \- Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy \- Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick \- Interior Secretary Doug Burgum \- Agriculture Secretary Brooke Rollins \- \- SBA Administrator Kelly Loeffler \- Medicare and Medicaid chief Mehmet Oz Naturally, a few of them did what Bessent accused Pulte of doing, leaking unflattering depictions of Bessent. Only instead of whispering to the President, these Trump cabinet sources dialed up Politico. It was Washington, , cake, and strategic story dropping. | | ---|---|--- If this country is a sinking ship, it is only because we keep letting leeches like Bessent and Pulte stand at the helm. They have all . They are the sort of wealthy wretches who would burn down the Treasury for the chance to squat in its ashes, take a selfie, and post on social media about it. When historians come calling and write the story of this Trump administration, the with his delusions... and members of his economic team, lounging in a private Georgetown club, trading insults over foie gras, and daring one another to fight like 7th graders behind the gym. To all the members of the Trump team, do the rest of us a favor. Next time, and there will certainly be a next time - don't break up any fisticuffs. Just record them on your camera phone. And leak that. * Thanks to your amazing response to our Labor Day Sale we have a new one! Thru Friday get 15% off Paid Subscriptions! You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Cliff Schecter PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 ? ?

**Trump and the MAGA GOP are dismantling our democracy** and pushing dangerous extremist policies to slash the rights of Americans in Illinois and across the nation.

Last month, Republicans sent us home for the district work period celebrating the passage of their trash budget, which rips healthcare away from millions of Americans.

Now, I’m back in DC ready to fight back against those harmful cuts and get to work on what I came here to do: _make life better for Oregonians._ **Like always, I’m laser-focused on building a better future for Oregon, protecting healthcare, and bringing down costs for families.** But with Republicans in total control of our federal government, they’re standing in the way of accomplishing this critical work. So if we want to stand up to the GOP and put an end to their chokehold in Washington, we need to stand together and hold them accountable. Now, I’m back in DC ready to fight back against those harmful cuts and get to work on what I came here to do: make life better for Oregonians. Like always, I’m laser-focused on building a better future for Oregon, protecting healthcare, and bringing down costs for families. But with Republicans in total control of our federal government, they’re standing in the way of accomplishing this critical work. So if we want to stand up to the GOP and put an end to their chokehold in Washington, we need to stand together and hold them accountable. name: Yassamin Ansari
subject: Republicans’ and Trump’s Epstein cover-up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
We need the full, unredacted Epstein files now. |
---
Peter, After Donald Trump denied any involvement in the Epstein “Birthday Book,” we now have a copy of the personal birthday note Trump wrote to Jeffrey Epstein. **As a member of the House Oversight Committee, I am incredibly proud of the work my colleagues and I are doing to seek justice and accountability once and for all.** Last week, I sat in on a closed-door meeting with several Epstein survivors. It was an experience I will never forget. I heard from 6 women in their 30s and 40s who were between the ages of 13-15 years old when they were groomed, manipulated, and abused by Jeffrey Epstein, Ghislaine Maxwell, and their associates. It’s one thing to read the accounts of the abuse these women faced in documents. It was a completely different thing to sit in the room with these victims and hear directly from them. As a young woman myself, I am in awe of the courage and resilience of these women for speaking out against their abusers and what is the most corrupt administration in American history. So now we know — Donald Trump lied once again about his involvement with Epstein. The question that remains is: **_What else is he lying about?_** The American people deserve transparency, and the victims deserve justice. We need the full, unredacted Epstein files now. Democrats on the Oversight Committee will not stop fighting until we have these documents in full. **[If you’re able, please chip in to help me continue speaking out and fighting for accountability and justice.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114925908/568607797/1289792659?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250909_PM1_V1_S4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmJkNThmMy1jNzhkLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lkIHVvjSC1Z7Ql6vxBGhPdN_3e58rIKSmRP96eTOU8U=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114925909/568607798/1289792659?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250909_PM1_V1_S4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmJkNThmMy1jNzhkLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lkIHVvjSC1Z7Ql6vxBGhPdN_3e58rIKSmRP96eTOU8U=)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Trump’s “lock him up” rhetoric has become real.
body:
Hi Peter — this is Adam Schiff. The Real Texas PAC said I could reach out with this urgent message:
Donald Trump just went on Truth Social and called for me to be prosecuted.
Why? Because I led his first impeachment. Because I’ve held him accountable. Because I haven’t stopped. And I never will. This is just Trump’s latest attempt at political retaliation against his perceived enemies.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?refcode=090925_3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?refcode=090925_3]
Over the years, Trump has called for me to be jailed for a variety of reasons, including accusing me of treason. And this latest baseless attempt at political retribution won’t stop me from holding him accountable — not by a long shot.
I’m not surprised that Trump is lashing out again. But even by his standards, this one’s weak. And as much as Trump may hope, this latest smear will not distract from his Epstein files problem.
Nevertheless, I need your help right now to respond: rush a split donation between me and The Real Texas PAC to help us fight back and keep holding Trump accountable. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?refcode=090925_3]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Adam Schiff and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?express_lane=true&refcode=090925_3&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?express_lane=true&refcode=090925_3&amount=10]

DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?express_lane=true&refcode=090925_3&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?express_lane=true&refcode=090925_3&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?refcode=090925_3&amount=25]
Trump doesn’t want to talk about skyrocketing prices, his tariff failures, the big ugly bill or why his rabid supporters are demanding answers over his refusal to release the Epstein files. So he goes back to the same tired playbook: Attack, distract, repeat.
But I won’t be intimidated. And I won’t stop doing my job – not now, not ever.
Instead of working to help families hit by extreme weather, rising costs, or his own healthcare cuts, Trump is using his platform to lash out at those who tell the truth.
He wants to silence his critics. But I refuse to back down – and with you in my corner, I never will.
Please, rush a split donation to help me and The Real Texas PAC fight back today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?refcode=090925_3]
Trump can lie and threaten me all he wants. I will never be deterred from fulfilling my duties as a U.S. Senator.
Thank you for standing with me,
Adam

The Latino Vote Podcast Season 2025 Episode 29

name: Chris Ahuja
subject: ICE Has New Power. Families Like Sharareh’s Are at Risk
body:
We must be vigilant defending our community

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=0865b58cf2&e=5a6ee82cdb)
| | | | | | Dear Peter,**Yesterday, the U.S. Supreme Court struck a devastating blow to Los Angeles immigrant communities.** In a 6-3 decision, the justices lifted restrictions on ICE, allowing them to legally resume ”roving patrol” actions (snatchings and kidnappings). **Our legal protections had prevented stops based on race, ethnicity, language, or occupation**. Now, ICE has the backing of the highest court to resume detaining families in our neighborhoods.One heartbreaking example is **Sharareh Moghadam** , a Studio City business owner, who was detained by ICE on August 1 while following instructions to report to Immigration after passing her citizenship test. She was sent to a facility in Phoenix, Arizona. Her detention is not just unjust – it’s a painful symbol of the unfettered, racist, and xenophobic policies unleashed under the Trump administration, now emboldened by the Supreme Court.Sharareh’s husband, **Hooshaag Aghdassi** , has lived and worked in Southern California for 20 years, contributing to the community alongside his wife. If she is deported, she faces life-threatening consequences, including execution, according to Mr. Aghdassi. Law-abiding immigrants like Sharareh deserve dignity, not cruelty and death squads.**I am raising our voices for fairness, due process, and human dignity.** I met with Mr. Aghdassi and I’ve reached out to Governor Newsom for support. I’m calling on our community to act. Together, we can ensure that families like the Aghdassis are protected and that unjust policies are challenged.
---
| [Take Action Now](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=57ffc0b70e&e=5a6ee82cdb)
---
| | **In solidarity,
**[****](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=4dbaecd8af&e=5a6ee82cdb)**Chris Ahuja****Democrat for Congress, CD-32**

---
| | | | | | | | | [ View email in browser](https://mailchi.mp/chrisahuja/ahuja-cost-of-living-too-high-11042088?e=5a6ee82cdb)

clean_body: We must be vigilant defending our community | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Dear Peter,Yesterday, the U.S. Supreme Court struck a devastating blow to Los Angeles immigrant communities. In a 6-3 decision, the justices lifted restrictions on ICE, allowing them to legally resume ”roving patrol” actions (snatchings and kidnappings). Our legal protections had prevented stops based on race, ethnicity, language, or occupation. Now, ICE has the backing of the highest court to resume detaining families in our neighborhoods.One heartbreaking example is Sharareh Moghadam , a Studio City business owner, who was detained by ICE on August 1 while following instructions to report to Immigration after passing her citizenship test. She was sent to a facility in Phoenix, Arizona. Her detention is not just unjust – it’s a painful symbol of the unfettered, racist, and xenophobic policies unleashed under the Trump administration, now emboldened by the Supreme Court.Sharareh’s husband, Hooshaag Aghdassi , has lived and worked in Southern California for 20 years, contributing to the community alongside his wife. If she is deported, she faces life-threatening consequences, including execution, according to Mr. Aghdassi. Law-abiding immigrants like Sharareh deserve dignity, not cruelty and death squads.I am raising our voices for fairness, due process, and human dignity. I met with Mr. Aghdassi and I’ve reached out to Governor Newsom for support. I’m calling on our community to act. Together, we can ensure that families like the Aghdassis are protected and that unjust policies are challenged. | | | In solidarity, AhujaDemocrat for Congress, CD-32 | | | | | | | | | Christopher Ahuja for Congress 21255 Burbank Blvd Ste 120 Woodland Hills, CA 91367-6669 * USA or |

name: Rep. John Ray Clemmons
subject: TN House Dems’ Fall Fundraiser is adding hosts!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Ronnie Glynn, Treasurer_
body:
Join us in Franklin to show Republicans what a real Party looks like
| | | | Can't see this email? [View in Your Browser](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K4R9918Y0G4DWFH4R7QCPWTC_0)
---
| | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K4R9918Y0G4DWFH4R7QCPWTC_1)
---
| | | | **Peter,** This year I wanted to send a clear signal to Republicans by having our Caucus’ annual Fall event in Franklin. We are not afraid to bring the fight to them in every community, as demonstrated by the strong Williamson County Democratic Party and others. So I thought it was more than appropriate to host our biggest Fall fundraiser right in Republicans’ backyard. Join us and let’s show the GOP what a real Party looks like! Since 2011, Tennessee families have paid the price for Republican control of our state: rising costs, hospital closures, cuts to public schools, and the loss of basic human rights. Meanwhile, out-of-state CEOs and corporations get tax handouts and sweetheart deals. The GOP’s priorities are out of whack, and families across our state are hurting. Tennesseans want change. If we’re going to turn things around, we must keep our foot on the gas pedal and chip away at the Republican supermajority. By hosting our annual Fall fundraiser in Franklin, you can be a part of our fight for Tennessee values and families.
---
| | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K4R9918Y0G4DWFH4R7QCPWTC_2)
---
| | [ RSVP ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K4R9918Y0G4DWFH4R7QCPWTC_3)
---
| [**Will you join our host committee or purchase your ticket today?**](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K4R9918Y0G4DWFH4R7QCPWTC_4) Every dollar raised is invested directly into targeted campaigns to protect and flip seats in the Tennessee House. Together, we can turn the tide. I look forward to seeing you in Franklin where we’re going to send a loud and clear message to Republicans that Democrats are united and we’re taking back our state - one seat at a time. With gratitude,
Rep. John Ray Clemmons
_Chairman, House Democratic Caucus_

name: Virginia Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: Voters will begin to cast their ballots this month...
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:
Voters will begin to cast their ballots this month in Virginia, in what is projected to be the most consequential and competitive election of 2025. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**Voters will begin to cast their ballots this month in Virginia, in what is projected to be the most consequential and competitive election of 2025.** On September 19th, early voting opens in Virginia’s general elections to determine control of the state legislature, the lieutenant governorship, and the governorship. Democrats won the Virginia House in 2023 with a single seat by just 975 votes – an incredibly thin margin. [Every donation to the DLCC helps mobilize organizers and support state legislative campaigns in places like Virginia. Peter,

**President Trump did something that no Democratic Governor or Mayor could ever fathom: he solved the crime problem in Washington, D.C.**

Now, he's considering deploying the National Guard to other crime-ridden cities throughout America.

| [ **ELIMINATE CRIME** ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=53c2ff81190b47bea0d9280025945fa6&_e=ij69G4eWulWyhf9zQksQbh2PKZO-lIxeW7ax5gbIG94f6lf2xzS9eFQjIyGXQeoWOR7SrJXXb3cKTaZ5VYV1H-o9IimcCn8kDeTQ0mHi29EbJa-YakFmfIdvuRRgf2vN4bsZIgxJ53w3yZu9qwGrrWgVymE3Z5eENzbSqDyfE7k9ST7_DG5f9oVFypwd1eF5hYLQN7GoFSc9tL_K_hswbR8lEee0j_78DM4L_Q9UyZ7iHNmmRjR91miYHFUWQnKUZ5v_fRkI3B8dWQnXnS04JNLESdN3zSztzU7_ekgnXZTr8aWnuA-Q41U9OWHIgW6MpGatR3dvXPu3vbdGzZYB8WYrJrOJqILHGtUxIwp-22UwM3IGMBqDuX7tULUrJXsvuJMc5_wGapF-rKIdt6tK3fbgFS_X-v-NmzHSfBPxorI-KrMqKBAeEleYLd3YXPizYpaHGd2dST9k-bVfgdJZW6OZ_HvrmFuPZZloSlg6tDgnLyHZHlrvn8Gp2eS-1v5fSmsULH7JYax0oP7dbwhhvpTb_TRjQ4PR38wh_EnStzo--D55hCtDEggCabXon6F7)
---

But Democrats across the country are doing everything they can to protect criminals and illegal immigrants. They're trying to tell the nation that Chicago doesn't have a crime problem at all.

**_Those people in Chicago are either corrupt, mentally ill, or stupid._**

I don't need to pull up data and numbers. All you've got to do is look at the news. But just to get my point across, I will:

_**Chicago averages more than one murder per day. That 's over 400 deaths per year because Democrats refuse to lock up criminals and uphold law and order.**_
I've got news for the Democrats: **a murder a day doesn 't keep Trump away.**

**When I 'm elected as Governor of Alabama, I'll never block President Trump from helping my state. He doesn't care about party lines; he just cares about saving American lives.**

But the Radical Left is dumping MILLIONS to defeat me. All I have are God-fearing Patriots like you.

[**Will you chip in $5 to help me not only protect law and order, but also work with President Trump as we deliver wins for Americans?**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=53c2ff81190b47bea0d9280025945fa6&_e=ij69G4eWulWyhf9zQksQbh2PKZO-lIxeW7ax5gbIG94f6lf2xzS9eFQjIyGXQeoWOR7SrJXXb3cKTaZ5VYV1H-o9IimcCn8kDeTQ0mHi29EbJa-YakFmfIdvuRRgf2vN4bsZIgxJ53w3yZu9qwGrrWgVymE3Z5eENzbSqDyfE7k9ST7_DG5f9oVFypwd1eF5EbFupNRJAgvOtUcSTqMMkkhOQPOBMBJ_ZsuZsVt8PYtd2V7rYGThRUL4z0xzJY8ayjIj3lozHaN9xiEkTGixEBYWQ3BqpZet3U-ar4Nz44SJAo5NZmy1AUzqlGab-nIcqErqL4RFjsduLxbpdCg2iTvDn1S_mcov3GbSjB303GAmb0mGOrD_nQHsl5ApN0b0etAXL3OOvQwb59CP9TiTHgKzFQAMb8eGwlFG-lrYSoTw5pe8pvlc5zObWOftvuGI6R5xdLnSQD4BFESMdFXSyq935xVSLjb_guQ_UgHe9e-Sakdn0FYrIIAeCA17ZqKyLVueqcB33jX9ZOhOO0i8zXChabrrAefLYN6NKQs9BGi5t39WwLE-cm-Fz-EPCb45)

Thank you,
Coach Tuberville

[ **DONATE $5** ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=53c2ff81190b47bea0d9280025945fa6&_e=ij69G4eWulWyhf9zQksQbh2PKZO-lIxeW7ax5gbIG94f6lf2xzS9eFQjIyGXQeoWOR7SrJXXb3cKTaZ5VYV1H-o9IimcCn8kDeTQ0mHi29EbJa-YakFmfIdvuRRgf2vN4bsZIgxJ53w3yZu9qwGrrYoEZ3FvH9Lp1myBYxh6jDgsWhztG9R1c2QlQr8VJDyUvv3Kk10z2GUdoJt4vZWXebiep8iKjvYxfIKsTqefSfDty-WjbctwYcHrDak2J2oy9iGv39ZbAKe_mVnjsnxB90T8r2DKo-7plHz4DtHPVZLmsGih1ay8Tj2245BNsVhpzymlEqmmJwDBJ5Aa7f2K0m1KipiiDajDwM74BaXPrfpZiYcukGY0rSKCctGornRWMVbiksJlbzEUnCgEv4GEgzkBpDSV8Aa7Yd9E6UHUgxR2t4oLun63untYHgAlbMW7yzo7O7JLUFzDRYbBqpgZd5tp-3X9acT9Tw6NG8I26fB3q9QLAi8J-KiRQbqh1RF642jtcnKc-UWEJYVLyDZZjBBHwyNqN4yeVquv4nbpo3Iy0BcOXTh1obhvF5xhPiD5)

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=53c2ff81190b47bea0d9280025945fa6&_e=ij69G4eWulWyhf9zQksQbh2PKZO-lIxeW7ax5gbIG94f6lf2xzS9eFQjIyGXQeoWOR7SrJXXb3cKTaZ5VYV1H-o9IimcCn8kDeTQ0mHi29EbJa-YakFmfIdvuRRgf2vN4bsZIgxJ53w3yZu9qwGrrWgVymE3Z5eENzbSqDyfE7k9ST7_DG5f9oVFypwd1eF5OEMkRVCTfdXyNcC8QuH9soBibHSvQjk1Whgg0D3jE9uPfFifBZINuZ4csJsOmlPJy3l3XyMOIsj9xO7Cx4-TC3Fuqk4fVaI5qPoF2mi3RQ8FAKceVHAnVjePkzKqMIG7LAaxGNNeVPukFgw8RutjXMzLSnjPIhhg_-hmuMN9ckvbFvVZMRmRzjGKE5a6oJ4uUK0c9It-9ffxFTiL_KzmHeZ1DY_gyNJ0Wepxg2V7qNe7mXehjo-EafkJzwa2bYTgSFYGNmTBACn6mCBP-8zdoZBI_wxhvMfEulnrc_GSo2lB1fWfdwN-zwDU5tjhPilDXM-lMDTbNWymqYkaPHsZgEhvpEAhO2pnFX-9BXP_IQiEXcMAMexSnKXdJmxkrA-k)

name: Katie Porter
subject: I saw firsthand how the odds are stacked against ordinary people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
We can make sure the rich follow the rules while working people don’t get left behind.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40124%2E3422442%2EsEd0Mr)
Peter,
People often ask me why I’m running for governor. One reason is simple: I’ve dedicated my career to protecting consumers—I even wrote the book on modern consumer law!
**[I’ll explain more, but first—if you’re ready to make California work for working families, chip in to my campaign today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250909_1_ak?refcode=em20250909-40124&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=40124_3422442_sEd0Mr&akid=40124%2E3422442%2EsEd0Mr)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250909_1_ak?refcode=em20250909-40124&refcode2=40124_3422442_sEd0Mr&akid=40124%2E3422442%2EsEd0Mr)
As a law professor, I saw firsthand how the odds are stacked against ordinary people. When massive corporations break the rules, it’s working families that end up paying the price. I want to change that system to give everyone a fair shot at getting ahead, no matter where they come from.
That’s why **I wrote the book on modern consumer law** : to make sure people know the rules and corporations can’t take advantage of us without being held accountable.
In Congress, I even used that book to grill Trump’s Consumer Financial Protection Bureau director and expose predatory loan practices being used on people just trying to get by. **We can make sure the rich follow the rules while working people don’t get left behind.**
California faces big challenges today. The cost of living is out of control, our housing crisis is worse than ever, and Donald Trump is threatening our very democracy. These are problems people feel every single day.
**I’m running for governor because I know how to take on these fights and win.** But I can’t do it alone. I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you to power this campaign.
**[Will you pitch in $5 today to help me keep up this fight for California families?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250909_1_ak?refcode=em20250909-40124&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=40124_3422442_sEd0Mr&akid=40124%2E3422442%2EsEd0Mr)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250909_1_ak?refcode=em20250909-40124&refcode2=40124_3422442_sEd0Mr&akid=40124%2E3422442%2EsEd0Mr)
Thank you,
Katie Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250909-40124&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=40124_3422442_sEd0Mr&akid=40124%2E3422442%2EsEd0Mr)**

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: This message is different
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
Right now, Trump’s MAGA machine is flooding Georgia with attack ads to distort my record.

| You may be receiving this email because of your previous support for organizations like The Long Run PAC. We need your support, but if you’d prefer not to receive emails from us, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=5601%2E196590%2EWFWwr_). [](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4694?t=2&akid=5601%2E196590%2EWFWwr_)
---
| Normally when I write you I like it to be different from most of the political emails you get.

I've written to you in detail about the depth of corruption and self-enrichment of the Trump Administration, the President's thirst for political retribution and intimidation, and the surreal experience of working in the Senate at this singular and disturbing moment in American history.

This email is different. It's more direct.

I am reaching out this morning with a last-ditch request for a contribution to my campaign before our end-of-quarter fundraising drive comes to a close. Here's why:

Right now, Trump’s MAGA machine is flooding Georgia with attack ads to distort my record.

**It is not normal for the GOP to be up on the airwaves and online with this kind of attack this far out from the election. It’s because they know Georgia is key. They know I’m strong. And they need to knock me down.**

_Will we let them?_

We knew these attacks were coming. But we’re facing more outside spending, earlier than we had expected — which means we’re going to have to ramp up our fundraising in order to fight back and set the record straight.

We will fight back. And we _will win_. But I can’t do it alone.

I really need your help right now.

[_**Can I count on you to split a contribution to my reelection campaign and The Long Run PAC today before our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline? Thanks in advance.**_](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4695?t=3&akid=5601%2E196590%2EWFWwr_)
---
| [SPLIT A DONATION ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4695?t=4&akid=5601%2E196590%2EWFWwr_)
---
Thanks for being part of this team.

As always,

name: Wes Moore
subject: I’m running.
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/partner_ms_wes_em_tobiasread?refcode=250909em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/partner_ms_wes_em_tobiasread?refcode=250909em]
Folks, it’s Governor Wes Moore. Tobias Read said I could reach out today to share some important news with you.
When we first launched our campaign four years ago, I had never run for political office. I was an Army Captain, the son of a single mom, and I ran one of the largest poverty-fighting organizations in the country.
So I traveled the state, listening to your stories and sharing mine. I heard the same thing again and again: That the career politicians had been telling us everything was great, when we knew it wasn’t.
Ever since I took office, I’ve been on a mission to change that. To lower taxes for middle-class families. To make health care and prescription drugs cheaper. To make our communities safer.
But our mission is far from over.
Today, I’m proud to announce that I’m running for another term as Governor of Maryland. Because our work isn’t done yet.
Will you split a contribution of $10 or more to my campaign and Tobias Read now to help power our movement? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/partner_ms_wes_em_tobiasread?refcode=250909em]
While we’ve made significant progress over the last three years, our fight is even more important now, given who is in the White House.
The President of the United States is bending over backwards for billionaires and big corporations. He’s firing federal civil servants, gutting Medicaid, and raising prices on everything from electricity to groceries for families. His reckless attacks are hitting Maryland hard.
It’s time for us to come together across counties and party lines to prove that even in the face of dysfunction in D.C.: We can show there’s a better way forward.
We already have Republican opponents in this race, and with the President and his allies working to undo our progress, the stakes couldn’t be higher. This campaign has always been about partnership – I’m grateful to have Tobias Read’s support in this race, and I’d like to have yours too. So please, give whatever you can and split a contribution between my campaign and Tobias Read today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/partner_ms_wes_em_tobiasread?refcode=250909em]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/partner_ms_wes_em_tobiasread?refcode=250909em]
Please join us. Let’s build a state where we leave no one behind.
Elevate,
Wes
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/partner_ms_wes_em_tobiasread?refcode=250909em]
Tobias Read is Oregon's Secretary of State. To support him directly, please donate here. [https://www.tobiasread.com]
Wes Moore is the Governor of Maryland. You can support him directly here. [https://wesmoore.com/]
https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR [https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR] https://twitter.com/TobiasRead [https://twitter.com/TobiasRead] https://instagram.com/tobiasreador [https://instagram.com/tobiasreador]

Friends of Tobias Read (5208)
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/IMahE5FQZEyEjGesjn_XSA2?unsubscribedata=f%2BaC%2FjWwr9VONRnHrDLu%2Bkir%2FWuUuA8asPn9HYA2x651ChmUW6fbwv4RpKmOsc6ifqJ3v7Pl93lwlkLqWDDFiRI1W2MhL53%2FOaTNll58SUNOTraahkCG1XpA1vhWjw1fweVenXx0CJ6aw2qcUpnQgYoPFwJCC%2BM%2B%2BJtk8AUWRVXDk2yD5NyQATqb%2FXVr%2FSbJCZiBfr2waqFGNuIfOGKw99qTbBQFAyN4alZezp4DaUzVMLkZ%2FJqbVB2G%2Bw1yvolLJH1ob3LRwcPeiESiuzeeOh2lg89xhrHWFM92ca8csHIykewKwpaABHpIu0iSVk5zj2%2B4ltcUzXRkrVA%2FvWbC%2FTR9QrqYYwvTknC%2BjPVBzMsCmIR1kd8gqxjmm0GMjUN3Ps0TyZ%2BxbZ6m6RyLo79kCuxc8QIEGKt7K9My83Nuiv5x0VruWhVbppxdns6UBHda .

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: Keeping your money safe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Peter,
In the years since the Supreme Court’s _Citizens United_ decision, the influence of money in politics has grown exponentially. While my campaigns have relied on the dedication and generosity of millions of grassroots supporters like you, elections have been flooded with dark money from billionaires and corporations.
Along with it a newer, and deeply cynical phenomenon has emerged: so-called “Scam PACs.”
These groups pose as champions of Democratic or progressive causes and flood inboxes, texts, and social media feeds with urgent pleas for money. They slap on names with words like “Progressive,” “Blue,” or “Democrats” or use photos of officials and candidates like me to mislead well-intentioned small-dollar donors into thinking they’re directly supporting our campaigns.
In reality, many of these groups spend little of the money they amass from online donations, sometimes less than one percent, on real work helping Democratic candidates win.
These committees, and the consultants who operate them, are running a scam. They’re exploiting good intentions and diverting critical resources away from our urgent effort to win elections and fight authoritarianism.
So please, be cautious of online solicitations asking for your hard-earned money. The best way to support a candidate is always to give a donation directly to their campaign.
**When donating on ActBlue, make sure the recipient is the candidate, as displayed here:**
[](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-sep25.SYBMcx&refcode=em250909-1-f&t=1&akid=745%2E5691347%2EoNUJqj)
Over the next year, you’ll hear from me and my team often. That’s because I really need your help! I am the only Democratic Senator running for reelection in a state Donald Trump won. He and his allies throw everything they have at us.
I’m grateful, as always, for your support. If you’d like to chip in directly to my re-election campaign, you can do so here: **[https://act.electjon.com/go/Help-Jon-Win](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-sep25.SYBMcx&refcode=em250909-1-f&t=2&akid=745%2E5691347%2EoNUJqj)**
Sincerely,
Jon Ossoff

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=3&akid=745%2E5691347%2EoNUJqj) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=745%2E5691347%2EoNUJqj) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

name: GOTV PAC
subject: Tomorrow in PA
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25]
Peter ,
On Wednesday, the ACLU of Pennsylvania will argue before the state Supreme Court that voters should not lose their voices over meaningless paperwork mistakes.
This case is about mail ballots, but the bigger picture is about the future of democracy in Pennsylvania. And here’s the urgent truth: this November, three seats on the Pennsylvania Supreme Court are up for election. If Republicans win, they’ll seize control of the court.
That means cases like this -- whether a voter’s ballot gets counted, whether districts are fair, whether our elections are free and equal -- could be decided by a Republican majority determined to tilt the rules in their favor.
At GOTV PAC, we’re working to make sure it doesn’t happen. We’ll be running voter outreach programs in Pennsylvania to ensure Democrats turn out, to protect the court, and to stop Republicans from stacking the bench.
But we can’t do it without your support. Can you chip in today to fuel our work in Pennsylvania and keep the Supreme Court from falling into Republican hands? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email0992025&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=Email0992025] DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=Email0992025]

Custom Donation [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email0992025]
Every call, every text, every reminder to vote will matter this fall. The balance of the court – and the protection of voting rights in Pennsylvania – is on the line.
-GOTV PAC

Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

name: Shontel Brown
subject: Where are the “so-called Constitutional Conservatives”?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114928186/568615593/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_250907Speech_SB_90DO_4_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGY5MzJiNC1kMDhkLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a6UtOZOr_ZEsJ-OEuAPXUUgECtRxuiT8RU7CWHkxyAo=) Peter,

Last week, I rose in opposition to President Trump’s attacks on the Constitution, free and fair elections, and the rule of law. We are watching the rise of tyranny across this country. However, House Republicans and **“so-called Constitutional Conservatives”** are doing nothing to stand up against it.

As a Black woman, I know who the oppressive executive orders coming out of the Oval Office will hurt first. I also know that everyone will be punished if these attacks on our freedoms continue.

It’s time to rise, not as Democrats or Republicans, but as Americans who want to protect our democracy, our economy, and our families.

**Last week, President Trump said, “I have the right to do anything I want to do. I’m the President of the United States.”**

[**He wants no checks and no balances. Not from the courts. Not from Congress. Not from voters. But we’re not going to let that happen. Join me in the fight against Trump’s toxic agenda by rushing $5 now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114928189/568615597/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_250907Speech_SB_90DO_4_NG_N_L1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGY5MzJiNC1kMDhkLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a6UtOZOr_ZEsJ-OEuAPXUUgECtRxuiT8RU7CWHkxyAo=) _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately:_ | | [$1 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114928191/568615599/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_250907Speech_SB_90DO_4_NG_N_EB1&express_lane=true&amount=1&refcode2=EL1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGY5MzJiNC1kMDhkLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a6UtOZOr_ZEsJ-OEuAPXUUgECtRxuiT8RU7CWHkxyAo=)

Shontel Brown
Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. clean_body: = Peter, Last week, I rose in opposition to President Trump’s attacks on the Constitution, free and fair elections, and the rule of law. We are watching the rise of tyranny across this country. However, House Republicans and “so-called Constitutional Conservatives” are doing nothing to stand up against it. As a Black woman, I know who the oppressive executive orders coming out of the Oval Office will hurt first. I also know that everyone will be punished if these attacks on our freedoms continue. It’s time to rise, not as Democrats or Republicans, but as Americans who want to protect our democracy, our economy, and our families. Last week, President Trump said, “I have the right to do anything I want to do. I’m the President of the United States.” = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = This is our moment to stand up and fight. I hope you will join me. Thank you, Shontel Brown Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As she enters her second full term in Congress, she will use that experience to continue the fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and to preserve and protect our democracy for generations to come. Will you join her and be the change we need? ******=****** Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress Shontel Brown for Congress 545 E Town Street Columbus, OH 43215 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

body:
Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.
| [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=5480051969d444458fd9445c1963e914&_e=-2IrYqw_ONnbebWGta_NuNuy3WsJfmB4aoZdJtmQGIHuwiVbQuLjL56BLwAVodlg0tfevuOu3-_ggpxDqp1-n-3UPR1syZ2Pzby0QAhfUAXn9lfoFSmzrENfG-E_KPa0MtGBnC0IhpTNQX5am43b0pz8bBi1JDd9u9bXvc3AUGb8IYfaWH_5KWfjXiIFwoBeHdO7SD_OgMseooRP4AdtWVxSraxVb-15gxZo-4pDGdpKevEGSkmmkXYiOS20bqHpz18BhcS-QtmGY85JDUo9AcDHZPhf8P0hOPwGHcF_eWwRyo4p4SwccKaGKH2mz3PnXcDRilcl_YOmF9fGOE1SOia6ZpnhDm7E8swgc43lc1D4hN01Y_GrpvsbE513aewajpfkhhxwaZm_K1n8wnQNOyT6EfBEPcg0GOpyfnmM4MXwnlxcivs_Gf6-qDdglHx4Hasc0dxCx8lwOvExt_U_jKaY8eR2rrnpKhhau2A0u3KJ739A7kzMcqHtg6CeV6PL5wOYjUZSLM9eQhl_-xqP0bZ3nZWOOaPU64Kfhi8w5qhzB7Ua-16id0VqLPpM1Pr6ojnSpIB87-F0yiepyACmqgveYAWASRjFJFo44iFrdN58f7OC6EGGOf3k8IdbOrpIVkfBv7UfMQMJ0f2HtT1YuA%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
---
So many kind souls like you have asked how I’m doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery.
---
I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed.
---
Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together.**
---
But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive **__ANYTHING!__**
---
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=5480051969d444458fd9445c1963e914&_e=-2IrYqw_ONnbebWGta_NuNuy3WsJfmB4aoZdJtmQGIHuwiVbQuLjL56BLwAVodlg0tfevuOu3-_ggpxDqp1-n-3UPR1syZ2Pzby0QAhfUAXn9lfoFSmzrENfG-E_KPa0MtGBnC0IhpTNQX5am43b0pz8bBi1JDd9u9bXvc3AUGb8IYfaWH_5KWfjXiIFwoBeHdO7SD_OgMseooRP4AdtWTx4Z1RZC0dgVfahSbobTiGLBlz6STD6P1qKzQZC4-jOLR6hL7dGwqhYOLyFirljRmmeDZVpVB45bOckoWeavdnW7EV8mYDt-BPsMy3qQ0Q2XmrHnnG9Ikrfz-QV2LU9BgU1E5fLwnfAaSH43QGGYKFDKGdahG-PpsVrSe-XNknk2pOWEAmM3YXcYkjYL2elBtTnalGzcS2k5sptn4-6g92xh4sHaFesKOv67cvhQ-GTtJZWjAGOAA3IRUyro0kgKjHNg7lcfRxTUyGiDRHE6jGmjc5L0LS4cDxccmvPQVD2eg4Pj4VYa1WAJ2cIeUqzSrgFvjiYaXdWWuH6AekcEORwFIj1SRReIOsEl0j5naFYVQqyAgM07ftXqN-GFefIXa8tlQm3zZpas2VhzZdd1y-vjUzmX6u8cKeXo6XUtoQhQRz7Ul8P6DMMzbLXi1n7Ng%3D%3D)
__
---
One thing especially helped take the pain away...
---
...**President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom – _the highest civilian honor in America._**
---
**President Trump knows I’m in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to _federal_ cases, which means he _legally_ _cannot_ save me from the bogus _state-level_ charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS.**
---
**Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
**And now, this car crash has set me back even more...**
---
And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my _FREEDOM_ and my _JUSTICE_.
---
__Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END!__
---

clean_body: Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me. | Friend, So many kind souls like you have asked how I’m doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery. I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed. Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together. But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive ANYTHING! One thing especially helped take the pain away... ...President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom – the highest civilian honor in America. President Trump knows I’m in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to federal cases, which means he legally cannot save me from the bogus state-level charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS. Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my ONLY chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team. But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of BANKRUPTCY. And now, this car crash has set me back even more...** And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like YOU. That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my FREEDOM and my JUSTICE. Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END! Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

body:
No resting!

| | | | | Hey, Peter! I know how frantic the end of the fundraising quarter always is—but this one’s different. It’s our last quarter, our biggest one, and the most mission-critical of the entire campaign. It’s also the last full month on the campaign trail before the primary! I almost missed my finance Zoom call earlier because I’ve been so busy reaching out to supporters like you. But I had to email you because, despite all these phone calls, we’re still falling short of our $8,000 goal. I was really hoping we’d meet or even exceed it because we really are almost there. **[Will you chip in $5, $10 or $15 right now to help us flip TN-07?](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/eeyt05LDGN6xrm4MHzdsOA~~/AAUS1hA~/z78Zk2oaBf0IhTA2izl9xFIWqQs9pZ8nRIulGbUCFkBMJ1dhWnpSelDgJlOYYTlRHUw7mNSdHZv83RqVBtvQ8bpgpf6LK-f9eL8rC6JRC8Udq0Xw8Fpvm60BRutqkMM6UUImPA7-ipUpzNHZtb9tQIHHXBorb26lGvZaP5JH9P3NBT-UoZ02E8j5GZMK2IfWzPWv1MrkwaMi_lDaLYv8pgr5OeKbQI57mebLCoFa-X4QmI4yOwaOH8pX4Cej5ojW3-bryBzOp4e5TGshvey6KA~~)** TN-07 is a once-in-a-generation flippable seat, and just one week from now, voters will start casting their ballots, and we’ve got to make sure everyone knows I’ll fight for them with all I’ve got. **[Chip in whatever you can today and let’s put the power behind this movement!](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/eeyt05LDGN6xrm4MHzdsOA~~/AAUS1hA~/z78Zk2oaBf0IhTA2izl9xFIWqQs9pZ8nRIulGbUCFkBMJ1dhWnpSelDgJlOYYTlRHUw7mNSdHZv83RqVBtvQ8bpgpf6LK-f9eL8rC6JRC8Udq0Xw8Fpvm60BRutqkMM6UUImPA7-ipUpzNHZtb9tQIHHXBorb26lGvZaP5JH9P3NBT-UoZ02E8j5GZMK2IfWzPWv1MrkwaMi_lDaLYv8pgr5OeKbQI57mebLCoFa-X4QmI4yOwaOH8pX4Cej5ojW3-bryBzOp4e5TGshvey6KA~~)** Thankful for you,
Vincent

name: Important Note via KG for NY
subject: Trump nominee calls Social Security a “Ponzi scheme”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
Social Security should not be a partisan issue.
Hi — Trump and his allies are at it again. They’re floating schemes to end Social Security – calling it a “Ponzi scheme” and plotting to gamble away Americans’ retirement security. This is a direct attack on decades of hard-earned benefits — and we cannot let them get away with it. That’s why we are launching a grassroots petition to show massive public opposition to Social Security cuts. [**_But we need 10,000 signatures in the next 24 hours to prove the American people won’t stand for this. Will you add your name right now to defend Social Security before tomorrow’s midnight deadline?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114928667/568617095/1706029041?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.09.09_Protect-Social-Security_B2_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTlhNzM2Ny1kMThkLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LuWCpa93mYhMRi4FAJ0N08HuO14AQvwrBS84UY6Mc6A=&emci=3e3c250c-818d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=8a9a7367-d18d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7659029) | | **[ADD YOUR NAME>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114928668/568617096/1706029041?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.09.09_Protect-Social-Security_B2_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTlhNzM2Ny1kMThkLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LuWCpa93mYhMRi4FAJ0N08HuO14AQvwrBS84UY6Mc6A=&emci=3e3c250c-818d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=8a9a7367-d18d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7659029)**

**Social Security should not be a partisan issue.** It’s a promise: after a lifetime of work, Americans can retire with dignity.
Trump and his allies want to break that promise. If they succeed, millions of seniors will be forced into poverty while the wealthy walk away richer than ever.
That’s why we need to hit this goal and show overwhelming grassroots support to protect Social Security once and for all.[**_Will you sign before the midnight deadline?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114928669/568617097/1706029041?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.09.09_Protect-Social-Security_B2_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTlhNzM2Ny1kMThkLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LuWCpa93mYhMRi4FAJ0N08HuO14AQvwrBS84UY6Mc6A=&emci=3e3c250c-818d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=8a9a7367-d18d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7659029)

name: Ashley Hinson
subject: Families in every corner of America are counting on us.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ashley Hinson Victory Committee
body:
I’m running for Senate because DC could use more Pro-Trump, Conservative Moms.

Friend, I’ll get straight to the point:
I’m a pro-Trump, conservative minivan-driving mom from the Midwest running for Senate in the biggest race in the entire country. [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b9wt/?__vbtrk=MzE4NDM2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE4NDM2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)I was born and raised in Iowa. Now, I’m raising my two boys in the state that has given me so much. I got into this fight for them, for their future.
A few years ago, their school tried to allow kids to secretly change their gender identity at school WITHOUT telling the parents. This is one of the moments that changed me and fueled my fight against the radical Left and their woke agenda.
We fought back against this nonsense, and we won. But the fight isn’t over.
In Congress, I’m fighting alongside President Trump to restore common sense and deliver real results for families.
* We’ve cut taxes.
* We’ve delivered relief for small businesses and family farms.
* We’ve put an end to waste, fraud, and abuse from federal spending.
* We’ve closed the Southern Border, we’re sending criminal aliens back to where they came from, and we’re making it crystal clear that nothing is more important than keeping Americans safe.

That’s why I’m running for Senate to stand with President Trump and get the job done.

Democrats want to elect a Senator who will blindly obey their far-Left agenda, even if it means harming our kids.

This isn’t going to happen under my watch. I apologize for being so blunt, but if we can’t get the resources to fight back against the Democrats, we will start out at a serious disadvantage.

Democrats are bankrolling a blue wave to crush conservatives like me across the map. They want to destroy President Trump’s Senate Majority to stonewall his agenda. The ONLY way to fight back is to ensure we have the resources to win this seat.

**[Chip in to elect a no-nonsense conservative Mom to stand with President Trump against the radical left.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b9wt/?__vbtrk=MzE4NDM2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE4NDM2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)** [KEEP A CONSERVATIVE MOM IN THE FIGHT
](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b9wt/?__vbtrk=MzE4NDM2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE4NDM2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)[RUSH AID TO ASHLEY HINSON
](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b9wt/?__vbtrk=MzE4NDM2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE4NDM2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)[HELP REACH ASHLEY’S CRITICAL GOAL
](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b9wt/?__vbtrk=MzE4NDM2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE4NDM2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)I hope I can count on your support today—this is more than just defending another Republican Senate Seat—our conservative values are on the chopping block if we don’t start preparing for the Democrats’ onslaught of lies.
Talk soon,
-Ashley Hinson [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b9wt/?__vbtrk=MzE4NDM2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE4NDM2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

clean_body: I’m running for Senate because DC could use more Pro-Trump, Conservative Moms. Friend, I’ll get straight to the point: I’m a pro-Trump, conservative minivan-driving mom from the Midwest running for Senate in the biggest race in the entire country. was born and raised in Iowa. Now, I’m raising my two boys in the state that has given me so much. I got into this fight for them, for their future. A few years ago, their school tried to allow kids to secretly change their gender identity at school WITHOUT telling the parents. This is one of the moments that changed me and fueled my fight against the radical Left and their woke agenda. We fought back against this nonsense, and we won. But the fight isn’t over. In Congress, I’m fighting alongside President Trump to restore common sense and deliver real results for families. We’ve cut taxes. We’ve delivered relief for small businesses and family farms. We’ve put an end to waste, fraud, and abuse from federal spending. We’ve closed the Southern Border, we’re sending criminal aliens back to where they came from, and we’re making it crystal clear that nothing is more important than keeping Americans safe. That’s why I’m running for Senate to stand with President Trump and get the job done. Democrats want to elect a Senator who will blindly obey their far-Left agenda, even if it means harming our kids. This isn’t going to happen under my watch. I apologize for being so blunt, but if we can’t get the resources to fight back against the Democrats, we will start out at a serious disadvantage. Democrats are bankrolling a blue wave to crush conservatives like me across the map. They want to destroy President Trump’s Senate Majority to stonewall his agenda. The ONLY way to fight back is to ensure we have the resources to win this seat. hope I can count on your support today—this is more than just defending another Republican Senate Seat—our conservative values are on the chopping block if we don’t start preparing for the Democrats’ onslaught of lies. Talk soon, -Ashley Hinson | | | Paid for by Ashley Hinson Victory Committee PO BOX 811 MARION, IA 52302 | 215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

Robert F. Kennedy Jr., the Secretary for the Department of Health and Human Services, ATTACKED Democratic senators and continued to spread harmful lies in his latest Senate hearing.

](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68682?t=9&akid=23382%2E4449941%2ExEg4UT) Here’s what else RFK Jr. has done since Trump took office, team:

**\- FIRED** all 17 members of the CDC’s vaccine advisory committee

He’s actively HARMING American citizens, team.

[**Thankfully, Democratic Senators are holding RFK Jr. accountable for the destruction he’s caused:**
](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68682?t=10&akid=23382%2E4449941%2ExEg4UT)

Peter, I got into this race for one reason: Marie Gluesenkamp Perez promised one thing and has delivered another. I'm certainly not the only one who feels that way. She has objectively failed to do her job as representative for the people of WA-03. A letter to the editor in _The Columbian_ this last weekend said this:

I hear a similar refrain every day when I speak with folks here in the district. [**Help us build even more momentum for this campaign. Pitch in $25, $50, $100 or any amount you can to get our message out to voters across WA-03. Can I count on you today?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUDNBL4XB4VmDp5pCYlDd03c4rOVNHlkuA3JoZCG5mxpYt_VTNN7sD12sJNkxacajWJgf2sNOUgc3O2-gIInLMtH-YL9IT5igunncNcaxCCIS-R7sOlW3y40xLZbeZHIXQFhAfIpel1-zqgfrca0OgJE-3pS6Wno0tgxO7OvPqS99DM_jFe8MBV_zsmqF2kBhnMVwnZ_7M4rYfbxOelN4PhMh1Phvunz20WISnxLrBRRE76anYo5qHbYO0jSDlwEHGQVu6KUq-Nc0ng5VxCc6kONqRYGaiWj8yJygbVkRwH_UltbbVWa5N3INuvYkZQ2SlcMacsGo8BoQCS40ENUHvtD/4jr/G0hvf_mZRReKHXZLXvaxzQ/h3/h001.WMELQJO1Gj-9-_NpUWlvLpXBtz9gMz9C9ytPUnwB3bw) Our country can't afford representatives who constantly capitulate to Trump. That's exactly what is happening right now, and the people see clearly that we are treading in dangerous water. It says a lot that _The Columbian_ printed it; and it proves what I hear all the time. We gave Marie a chance, we believed in her. But she's abandoned us. It didn't take long for Mr Weir to write up a couple of paragraphs and email them to the paper. **Now we need a flurry of letters to the editor, people standing up and speaking out. That 's how we fight for each other, and how we'll win this seat. ** [**If you 're in the district, could you submit your own letter to the editor here?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMQRTAryaXfbQytngtqtPQOotSk2v6V2SUY9UEjWPdEOO70GkRyrm-CGVBvzx-SPE9UeUsyaaTFcYEkI4WuY5qBJPEII6cNwqvT2pXzYlYQgi-lMQHDcqvknM6hcLjuQbDT2JWNAlHSizgHWI_ejVtW6yd3x6_RKWcu5O9ReyWlSwtG2XvtjqjdOOkvTYyBjhPZUwQc3ap4ZT-RFEEVtAz7eZHQI4xKlaqHDPTvk7m6z_jTTfrQ13mj6-7rIXTxHFGDsNaN7Lh3AYTYXRFa62uMGFYyL7zkNnDK0AT0Am_Odj/4jr/G0hvf_mZRReKHXZLXvaxzQ/h4/h001.TQSu4k8qRVqhuk_MiQajEWa4mOHxS-Dqd2vgzKApxtc) An endorsement like that is priceless - it's like digital door knocking on steroids. If you're like me, and ready to do what it takes to get real representation for WA-03, I need you on board now more than ever. clean_body: | | Peter, I got into this race for one reason: Marie Gluesenkamp Perez promised one thing and has delivered another. I'm certainly not the only one who feels that way. She has objectively failed to do her job as representative for the people of WA-03. A letter to the editor in The Columbian this last weekend said this: | Read the full letter to the editor . I hear a similar refrain every day when I speak with folks here in the district. Our country can't afford representatives who constantly capitulate to Trump. That's exactly what is happening right now, and the people see clearly that we are treading in dangerous water. It says a lot that The Columbian printed it; and it proves what I hear all the time. We gave Marie a chance, we believed in her. But she's abandoned us. It didn't take long for Mr Weir to write up a couple of paragraphs and email them to the paper. Now we need a flurry of letters to the editor, people standing up and speaking out. That 's how we fight for each other, and how we'll win this seat. An endorsement like that is priceless - it's like digital door knocking on steroids. If you're like me, and ready to do what it takes to get real representation for WA-03, I need you on board now more than ever. Click here to donate to our grassroots campaign to supercharge this effort. Whether it's a donation, volunteering for voter outreach, or sending a note to the editor, it matters. Let's Heal Washington! Brent Hennrich | | Marie Gluesenkamp-Perez has betrayed Democrats and the voters of WA-3 by repeatedly voting with MAGA against women's rights, immigrants, and more. Brent Hennrich is a lifelong Washingtonian, a proud working class dad, and lifelong Democratic activist. Chip in now to help elect a Democrat ready to stand up to MAGA. | | | | Paid for by Brent Hennrich for Washington ---|--- (C)2025 Brent Hennrich for Washington, all rights reserved Our mailing address is: Brent Hennrich for Washington PO BOX 820070 Vancouver, WA 98682 We hate to see you go, but if you believe you received this email in error, or you no longer wish to receive our emails you can | | Sent via . name: Wes Moore
subject: I’m proud to be running for reelection, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Together, we can make sure we’re ready for whatever attacks come our way. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114928890/568617956/343455394?refcode=partner_ms_wes_em_roycooper&ms=ea.290ae9c6-d38d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTBhZTljNi1kMzhkLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q-YrsSIfl0eRhfsl7ygZSXABDWaYPxLz36l0FhjLQos=) Hey, Peter — it’s Wes Moore. I wanted to make sure you heard the news from me: **I’m proud to announce that I’m running for another term as Governor of Maryland.** Our work to make this Maryland’s decade is just getting started, and I’m incredibly grateful to have Roy Cooper’s support in this race. Now, I’m asking if you’ll have my back, too. **[Would you please split a contribution of $10 — or any amount that feels right to you — between my campaign and Roy Cooper? I can’t win this race without you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114928891/568617957/343455394?refcode=partner_ms_wes_em_roycooper&amount=10&ms=ea.290ae9c6-d38d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTBhZTljNi1kMzhkLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q-YrsSIfl0eRhfsl7ygZSXABDWaYPxLz36l0FhjLQos=)** | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114928892/568617958/343455394?refcode=partner_ms_wes_em_roycooper&ms=ea.290ae9c6-d38d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTBhZTljNi1kMzhkLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q-YrsSIfl0eRhfsl7ygZSXABDWaYPxLz36l0FhjLQos=)**
---
Over the past three years, we’ve made tremendous strides to support Maryland families. From ensuring our children receive a world-class education, to building pathways to good jobs, to lowering taxes for the middle class, I couldn’t be prouder of how far we’ve come together.
But these past couple weeks have made one thing crystal clear: **I am now in Donald Trump’s sights. Republicans are already gearing up to take my seat in 2026.**
They’re afraid of the results we’ve delivered for Maryland. From public safety improvements to funding public education, our opponents are trying to roll it all back.
But here’s what they don’t know: I don’t back down from a fight. If they want to tear down our accomplishments, _let them try._
Peter, that’s why I need you with me. In order to stay in this fight, I’m asking for your early support as we launch our reelection so we can keep delivering results for Maryland.
**[Together, we can make sure we’re ready for whatever attacks come our way. I’d be so grateful if you’d split a $10 donation between my campaign and Roy Cooper today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114928893/568617959/343455394?refcode=partner_ms_wes_em_roycooper&amount=10&ms=ea.290ae9c6-d38d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTBhZTljNi1kMzhkLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q-YrsSIfl0eRhfsl7ygZSXABDWaYPxLz36l0FhjLQos=)**
Elevate,
Wes
_We are only asking for donations of up to $3,500 per election from individuals and for donations of up to $5,000 per election from federal political committees. We are not asking for donations in excess of these amounts or for donations from corporations, labor organizations, foreign nationals, federal contractors, or national banks._
