In order to stay in this fight, I’m asking for your early support as we launch our reelection so we can keep delivering results for Maryland. = Elevate, Wes We are only asking for donations of up to $3,500 per election from individuals and for donations of up to $5,000 per election from federal political committees. We are not asking for donations in excess of these amounts or for donations from corporations, labor organizations, foreign nationals, federal contractors, or national banks. mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Contributions or gifts to Cooper for North Carolina are not tax deductible. Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign. By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: Team Gagnier
subject: Young Kim has no plan. Christina does.
body:
|
#
Peter, Families across Orange County and the Inland Empire are struggling, and Young Kim is offering zero solutions. Groceries and gas prices keep rising, rent is out of control, and healthcare is on the chopping block. Yet, she sits on the sidelines, voting in lockstep with MAGA extremists while doing nothing to help the people she was elected to represent. **As a reminder, 82,000 of our neighbors could lose access to healthcare because of cuts she supported. Statewide, millions more will see higher insurance premiums as a result of Kim’s bad acts, forcing people to cancel their plans. Families have reached out for relief, but she’s turned her back. That kind of inaction is unacceptable.** Christina Gagnier is the only one in this race with a real plan and a record of delivering results. She will go after Big Corporations for their price-gouging and stock buybacks, provide tax relief to working families and renters, and expand healthcare coverage. And she doesn’t just talk about problems, _she solves them_. From expanding career programs for students to strengthening local small businesses, Christina has a track record of seeing a problem in her community and fixing it. That’s the leadership missing in Congress right now. We can’t afford more of Young Kim’s do-nothing politics. With the FEC end-of-quarter deadline at the end of this month, now is the time to show the strength of our grassroots movement. **[Chip in $3 today to help Christina flip CA-40 and bring real solutions to Washington.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114929049/568618523/1631137775?refcode=em-9.9.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODczMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2YwNjZlNS1kNDhkLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S40YdbHRNegaMk-FKZi_eTlznZS8iasB0ZZXv9ek1Ug=)**

clean_body: | Peter, Families across Orange County and the Inland Empire are struggling, and Young Kim is offering zero solutions. Groceries and gas prices keep rising, rent is out of control, and healthcare is on the chopping block. Yet, she sits on the sidelines, voting in lockstep with MAGA extremists while doing nothing to help the people she was elected to represent. As a reminder, 82,000 of our neighbors could lose access to healthcare because of cuts she supported. Statewide, millions more will see higher insurance premiums as a result of Kim’s bad acts, forcing people to cancel their plans. Families have reached out for relief, but she’s turned her back. That kind of inaction is unacceptable. Christina Gagnier is the only one in this race with a real plan and a record of delivering results. She will go after Big Corporations for their price-gouging and stock buybacks, provide tax relief to working families and renters, and expand healthcare coverage. And she doesn’t just talk about problems, she solves them. From expanding career programs for students to strengthening local small businesses, Christina has a track record of seeing a problem in her community and fixing it. That’s the leadership missing in Congress right now. We can’t afford more of Young Kim’s do-nothing politics. | | **_Meet Russell:_** Born and raised in Surfside Beach, SC, Congressman Russell Fry is the proud and homegrown Representative for South Carolina’s 7th Congressional District. Growing up in a cinder block home with no heating or air conditioning, Russell learned at an early age that hard work and perseverance pave the only true path to the American Dream. He watched his parents work day in and day out to make ends meet. And the values they instilled in him during his upbringing led Russell to self-fund both his undergraduate education at the University of South Carolina, and later his law studies at the Charleston School of Law. At Charleston, Russell served as the President of the Student Bar Association and even helped the school achieve its American Bar Association accreditation. He went on to practice law in the Grand Strand area for over a decade before entering the political arena to serve in the South Carolina House of Representatives for State House District 106 (Horry County). During his seven-year tenure in the SC House, Russell fought to safeguard Constitutional liberties, lower taxes, and put the best interests of South Carolina families above all else. He climbed the ranks to become Chief Majority Whip, and also chaired the House Opioid Prevention Study Committee. Under Russell’s leadership, 18 policy initiatives to combat the opioid crisis were signed into law. Since the first day he stepped foot in Washington, Russell has strived to shake up the corrupt status quo and deliver real change for the American people. He believes adamantly that so long as the American people stand united, we can keep the American Dream alive for every citizen of our great nation. Russell is a dedicated husband to his wife, Bronwen, and a loving father to his son, James. The family lives in Murrells Inlet with their chocolate lab, Jasper.

name: Andy Beshear
subject: Here’s what I’ve been telling people:
body:
---
Hey Derek, Here’s what I’ve been telling people in Kentucky, where I’m grateful to serve as governor: **If you feel like the current president is against you, I want you to know you have a governor who is with you.** **And that’s what I’ll say to you, too:** Wherever you live, you may have a mayor, a member of Congress, or a city council member who’s with you. And you certainly have a Democratic state party and the Democratic National Committee with you, too. You’ve got people fighting to move us all forward. Here in Kentucky, I’ve worked for progress on health care, public education, and creating good jobs for our people. But under this administration, all of those priorities are under attack, and I’ve learned two important lessons I’d like to share with you: First, that for all of us trying to serve our states, towns, or districts, our work is connected. What the Republican majority in the U.S. House and Senate do — like passing the largest cut to health care and food assistance in American history with Trump’s budget — directly impacts families in my state. And second, I’ve learned that Democratic governors stand as our last line of defense against this administration. That’s why it’s so important that we elect a Democratic governor in Virginia and New Jersey this November. It’s also critical we take back Congress. These fights matter, Derek. I’m doing all I can to protect our people, and I know my fellow Democrats are with me. **I’m writing to you now because these lessons make clear the importance of a strong Democratic National Committee. Only the DNC works to support and elect Democrats at all levels of government, nationwide, every single year. That work is more important than it’s ever been.** **[Derek, the DNC is the place to chip in if you want to both support public servants fighting for our shared values now _and_ strengthen Democratic power in the years to come. Please make a donation today:](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-september-2025?refcode=em_20250909_4547_fr&amount=3&refcode2=4547_22930333_S7T2l9&akid=4547%2E22930333%2ES7T2l9)**
